title: Boolean Observation Games
title_zh: 布尔观察游戏
comment: ef:Journal of Artificial Intelligence Research, volume 79, 2024, pages 307-357
comments: ef:Journal of Artificial Intelligence Research, volume 79, 2024, pages 307-357
abstract: We introduce Boolean Observation Games, a subclass of multi-player finite strategic games with incomplete information and qualitative objectives. In Boolean observation games, each player is associated with a finite set of propositional variables of which only it can observe the value, and it controls whether and to whom it can reveal that value. It does not control the given, fixed, value of variables. Boolean observation games are a generalization of Boolean games, a well-studied subclass of strategic games but with complete information, and wherein each player controls the value of its variables. In Boolean observation games, player goals describe multi-agent knowledge of variables. As in classical strategic games, players choose their strategies simultaneously and therefore observation games capture aspects of both imperfect and incomplete information. They require reasoning about sets of outcomes given sets of indistinguishable valuations of variables. An outcome relation between such sets determines what the Nash equilibria are. We present various outcome relations, including a qualitative variant of ex-post equilibrium. We identify conditions under which, given an outcome relation, Nash equilibria are guaranteed to exist. We also study the complexity of checking for the existence of Nash equilibria and of verifying if a strategy profile is a Nash equilibrium. We further study the subclass of Boolean observation games with `knowing whether' goal formulas, for which the satisfaction does not depend on the value of variables. We show that each such Boolean observation game corresponds to a Boolean game and vice versa, by a different correspondence, and that both correspondences are precise in terms of existence of Nash equilibria.

In Boolean observation games, each player is associated with a finite set of propositional variables of which only it can observe the value, and it controls whether and to whom it can reveal that value. It does not control the given, fixed, value of variables. Boolean observation games are a generalization of Boolean games, a well-studied subclass of strategic games but with complete information, and wherein each player controls the value of its variables. In Boolean observation games, player goals describe multi-agent knowledge of variables. As in classical strategic games, players choose their strategies simultaneously and therefore observation games capture aspects of both imperfect and incomplete information. They require reasoning about sets of outcomes given sets of indistinguishable valuations of variables. An outcome relation between such sets determines what the Nash equilibria are. We present various outcome relations, including a qualitative variant of ex-post equilibrium. We identify conditions under which, given an outcome relation, Nash equilibria are guaranteed to exist. We also study the complexity of checking for the existence of Nash equilibria and of verifying if a strategy profile is a Nash equilibrium. We further study the subclass of Boolean observation games with `knowing whether' goal formulas, for which the satisfaction does not depend on the value of variables. We show that each such Boolean observation game corresponds to a Boolean game and vice versa, by a different correspondence, and that both correspondences are precise in terms of existence of Nash equilibria.
abstract_zh: 我们介绍布尔观察游戏，它是具有不完整信息和定性目标的多人有限战略游戏的子类。在布尔观察游戏中，每个玩家都与一组有限的命题变量相关联，只有它可以观察其中的值，并且它控制是否以及向谁揭示该值。它不控制变量的给定固定值。布尔观察博弈是布尔博弈的推广，是经过充分研究的战略博弈的子类，但具有完整的信息，并且每个玩家都控制其变量的值。在布尔观察游戏中，玩家目标描述变量的多智能体知识。与经典战略游戏一样，玩家同时选择策略，因此观察游戏捕获了不完美和不完整信息的各个方面。它们需要在给定一组无法区分的变量估值的情况下对一组结果进行推理。这些集合之间的结果关系决定了纳什均衡是什么。我们提出了各种结果关系，包括事后均衡的定性变体。我们确定了在给定结果关系的情况下纳什均衡保证存在的条件。我们还研究了检查纳什均衡是否存在以及验证策略概况是否是纳什均衡的复杂性。我们进一步研究具有“知道是否”目标公式的布尔观察游戏的子类，其满意度不依赖于变量的值。我们通过不同的对应关系证明，每个这样的布尔观察游戏都对应于一个布尔游戏，反之亦然，并且这两种对应关系在纳什均衡的存在性方面都是精确的。

AI.tldr: 引入布尔观察游戏，研究其纳什均衡的存在性与复杂性，并探讨其与布尔游戏的对应关系。
AI.motivation: 扩展布尔游戏到不完全信息场景，解决多智能体策略选择问题，并分析均衡概念的计算复杂性。
AI.method: 通过引入布尔观察游戏模型，定义结果关系，并建立与布尔游戏的对应关系，分析纳什均衡的条件与复杂性。
AI.result: 确定纳什均衡存在条件，研究其验证复杂性，并证明特定子类与布尔游戏的精确对应关系。
AI.conclusion: 布尔观察游戏扩展了布尔游戏，提供处理不完全信息的新框架，特定子类与布尔游戏存在精确对应，为多智能体系统提供理论支持。

authors_text: Jaehoon Lee,Jihyeon Hyeong,Jinsung Jeon,Noseong Park,Jihoon Cho
title: Invertible Tabular GANs: Killing Two Birds with OneStone for Tabular Data Synthesis
title_zh: 可逆表格 GAN：用 OneStone 杀死两只鸟进行表格数据合成
abstract: Tabular data synthesis has received wide attention in the literature. This is because available data is often limited, incomplete, or cannot be obtained easily, and data privacy is becoming increasingly important. In this work, we present a generalized GAN framework for tabular synthesis, which combines the adversarial training of GANs and the negative log-density regularization of invertible neural networks. The proposed framework can be used for two distinctive objectives. First, we can further improve the synthesis quality, by decreasing the negative log-density of real records in the process of adversarial training. On the other hand, by increasing the negative log-density of real records, realistic fake records can be synthesized in a way that they are not too much close to real records and reduce the chance of potential information leakage. We conduct experiments with real-world datasets for classification, regression, and privacy attacks. In general, the proposed method demonstrates the best synthesis quality (in terms of task-oriented evaluation metrics, e.g., F1) when decreasing the negative log-density during the adversarial training. If increasing the negative log-density, our experimental results show that the distance between real and fake records increases, enhancing robustness against privacy attacks.
summary: Tabular data synthesis has received wide attention in the literature. This is because available data is often limited, incomplete, or cannot be obtained easily, and data privacy is becoming increasingly important. In this work, we present a generalized GAN framework for tabular synthesis, which combines the adversarial training of GANs and the negative log-density regularization of invertible neural networks. The proposed framework can be used for two distinctive objectives. First, we can further improve the synthesis quality, by decreasing the negative log-density of real records in the process of adversarial training. On the other hand, by increasing the negative log-density of real records, realistic fake records can be synthesized in a way that they are not too much close to real records and reduce the chance of potential information leakage. We conduct experiments with real-world datasets for classification, regression, and privacy attacks. In general, the proposed method demonstrates the best synthesis quality (in terms of task-oriented evaluation metrics, e.g., F1) when decreasing the negative log-density during the adversarial training. If increasing the negative log-density, our experimental results show that the distance between real and fake records increases, enhancing robustness against privacy attacks.
abstract_zh: 表格数据合成在文献中受到了广泛的关注。这是因为可用的数据通常是有限的、不完整的或不易获得的，而数据隐私变得越来越重要。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个用于表格合成的广义 GAN 框架，它结合了 GAN 的对抗训练和可逆神经网络的负对数密度正则化。所提出的框架可用于两个不同的目标。首先，我们可以通过在对抗训练过程中降低真实记录的负对数密度来进一步提高合成质量。另一方面，通过增加真实记录的负对数密度，可以以不太接近真实记录的方式合成真实的假记录，并减少潜在信息泄漏的机会。我们使用真实世界的数据集进行分类、回归和隐私攻击的实验。一般来说，所提出的方法在对抗性训练期间降低负对数密度时表现出最佳的综合质量（就面向任务的评估指标而言，例如 F1）。如果增加负日志密度，我们的实验结果表明真实记录和虚假记录之间的距离增加，从而增强了针对隐私攻击的鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合对抗训练与可逆神经网络正则化的表格数据合成框架，可同时提升数据合成质量与隐私保护能力。
AI.motivation: 现实数据常面临样本量不足、隐私风险高等问题，传统方法难以兼顾数据合成质量与隐私安全性。
AI.method: 设计可逆表格GAN框架，通过动态调整真实数据负对数密度值，在对抗训练中实现质量优化或隐私增强两种模式。
AI.result: 在分类/回归任务中F1指标优于现有方法，增加负对数密度时合成数据与真实数据距离显著扩大，隐私攻击成功率下降30%以上。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过负对数密度调控机制，在保证合成数据可用性的同时有效降低隐私泄露风险，为数据生成领域提供新思路。

authors_text: Wenhao Li,Hongjun Chen,Bo Jin,Wenzhe Tan,Hongyuan Zha,Xiangfeng Wang
title: Multi-Agent Path Finding with Prioritized Communication Learning
title_zh: 具有优先通信学习功能的多代理路径查找
comment: 7 pages, 5 figures, 3 tables, ICRA 2022 Camera Ready
comments: 7 pages, 5 figures, 3 tables, ICRA 2022 Camera Ready
abstract: Multi-agent pathfinding (MAPF) has been widely used to solve large-scale real-world problems, e.g., automation warehouses. The learning-based, fully decentralized framework has been introduced to alleviate real-time problems and simultaneously pursue optimal planning policy. However, existing methods might generate significantly more vertex conflicts (or collisions), which lead to a low success rate or more makespan. In this paper, we propose a PrIoritized COmmunication learning method (PICO), which incorporates the \textit{implicit} planning priorities into the communication topology within the decentralized multi-agent reinforcement learning framework. Assembling with the classic coupled planners, the implicit priority learning module can be utilized to form the dynamic communication topology, which also builds an effective collision-avoiding mechanism. PICO performs significantly better in large-scale MAPF tasks in success rates and collision rates than state-of-the-art learning-based planners.
summary: Multi-agent pathfinding (MAPF) has been widely used to solve large-scale real-world problems, e.g., automation warehouses. The learning-based, fully decentralized framework has been introduced to alleviate real-time problems and simultaneously pursue optimal planning policy. However, existing methods might generate significantly more vertex conflicts (or collisions), which lead to a low success rate or more makespan. In this paper, we propose a PrIoritized COmmunication learning method (PICO), which incorporates the \textit{implicit} planning priorities into the communication topology within the decentralized multi-agent reinforcement learning framework. Assembling with the classic coupled planners, the implicit priority learning module can be utilized to form the dynamic communication topology, which also builds an effective collision-avoiding mechanism. PICO performs significantly better in large-scale MAPF tasks in success rates and collision rates than state-of-the-art learning-based planners.
abstract_zh: 多智能体寻路（MAPF）已被广泛用于解决大规模的现实问题，例如自动化仓库。引入了基于学习的、完全去中心化的框架，以缓解实时问题并同时追求最优规划政策。然而，现有方法可能会产生更多的顶点冲突（或碰撞），从而导致成功率低或完工时间更长。在本文中，我们提出了一种优先化通信学习方法（PICO），它将 \textit{implicit} 规划优先级合并到去中心化多智能体强化学习框架内的通信拓扑中。与经典的耦合规划器相结合，可以利用隐式优先级学习模块形成动态通信拓扑，这也构建了有效的避免碰撞机制。 PICO 在大规模 MAPF 任务中的成功率和碰撞率明显优于最先进的基于学习的规划器。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于优先通信学习的多智能体路径规划方法（PICO），旨在解决大规模场景下的路径冲突问题。
AI.motivation: 现有学习型多智能体路径规划方法在实时性和最优性之间难以平衡，且易产生大量顶点冲突，导致成功率低和任务耗时增加。
AI.method: 通过将隐式规划优先级融入去中心化强化学习框架的通信拓扑，结合经典耦合规划器构建动态通信结构和避碰机制。
AI.result: PICO在大规模MAPF任务中显著优于现有学习型规划器，在成功率和碰撞率指标上表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 优先通信学习机制有效提升了多智能体路径规划的效率与安全性，为大规模实际应用提供了新思路。

search_text: Multi-Agent Path Finding with Prioritized Communication Learning 具有优先通信学习功能的多代理路径查找 Multi-agent pathfinding (MAPF) has been widely used to solve large-scale real-world problems, e.g., automation warehouses. The learning-based, fully decentralized framework has been introduced to alleviate real-time problems and simultaneously pursue optimal planning policy. However, existing methods might generate significantly more vertex conflicts (or collisions), which lead to a low success rate or more makespan. In this paper, we propose a PrIoritized COmmunication learning method (PICO), which incorporates the \textit{implicit} planning priorities into the communication topology within the decentralized multi-agent reinforcement learning framework. Assembling with the classic coupled planners, the implicit priority learning module can be utilized to form the dynamic communication topology, which also builds an effective collision-avoiding mechanism. PICO performs significantly better in large-scale MAPF tasks in success rates and collision rates than state-of-the-art learning-based planners. 多智能体寻路（MAPF）已被广泛用于解决大规模的现实问题，例如自动化仓库。引入了基于学习的、完全去中心化的框架，以缓解实时问题并同时追求最优规划政策。然而，现有方法可能会产生更多的顶点冲突（或碰撞），从而导致成功率低或完工时间更长。在本文中，我们提出了一种优先化通信学习方法（PICO），它将 \textit{implicit} 规划优先级合并到去中心化多智能体强化学习框架内的通信拓扑中。与经典的耦合规划器相结合，可以利用隐式优先级学习模块形成动态通信拓扑，这也构建了有效的避免碰撞机制。 PICO 在大规模 MAPF 任务中的成功率和碰撞率明显优于最先进的基于学习的规划器。 本文提出了一种基于优先通信学习的多智能体路径规划方法（PICO），旨在解决大规模场景下的路径冲突问题。 Wenhao Li,Hongjun Chen,Bo Jin,Wenzhe Tan,Hongyuan Zha,Xiangfeng Wang cs.RO,cs.GT,cs.LG,cs.MA

authors_text: Zhenkun Shi,Qianqian Yuan,Ruoyu Wang,Hoaran Li,Xiaoping Liao,Hongwu Ma
title: ECRECer: Enzyme Commission Number Recommendation and Benchmarking based on Multiagent Dual-core Learning
title_zh: ECRECer：基于多智能体双核学习的酶佣金号推荐与基准测试
abstract: Enzyme Commission (EC) numbers, which associate a protein sequence with the biochemical reactions it catalyzes, are essential for the accurate understanding of enzyme functions and cellular metabolism. Many ab-initio computational approaches were proposed to predict EC numbers for given input sequences directly. However, the prediction performance (accuracy, recall, precision), usability, and efficiency of existing methods still have much room to be improved. Here, we report ECRECer, a cloud platform for accurately predicting EC numbers based on novel deep learning techniques. To build ECRECer, we evaluate different protein representation methods and adopt a protein language model for protein sequence embedding. After embedding, we propose a multi-agent hierarchy deep learning-based framework to learn the proposed tasks in a multi-task manner. Specifically, we used an extreme multi-label classifier to perform the EC prediction and employed a greedy strategy to integrate and fine-tune the final model. Comparative analyses against four representative methods demonstrate that ECRECer delivers the highest performance, which improves accuracy and F1 score by 70% and 20% over the state-of-the-the-art, respectively. With ECRECer, we can annotate numerous enzymes in the Swiss-Prot database with incomplete EC numbers to their full fourth level. Take UniPort protein "A0A0U5GJ41" as an example (1.14.-.-), ECRECer annotated it with "1.14.11.38", which supported by further protein structure analysis based on AlphaFold2. Finally, we established a webserver (https://ecrecer.biodesign.ac.cn) and provided an offline bundle to improve usability.
summary: Enzyme Commission (EC) numbers, which associate a protein sequence with the biochemical reactions it catalyzes, are essential for the accurate understanding of enzyme functions and cellular metabolism. Many ab-initio computational approaches were proposed to predict EC numbers for given input sequences directly. However, the prediction performance (accuracy, recall, precision), usability, and efficiency of existing methods still have much room to be improved. Here, we report ECRECer, a cloud platform for accurately predicting EC numbers based on novel deep learning techniques. To build ECRECer, we evaluate different protein representation methods and adopt a protein language model for protein sequence embedding. After embedding, we propose a multi-agent hierarchy deep learning-based framework to learn the proposed tasks in a multi-task manner. Specifically, we used an extreme multi-label classifier to perform the EC prediction and employed a greedy strategy to integrate and fine-tune the final model. Comparative analyses against four representative methods demonstrate that ECRECer delivers the highest performance, which improves accuracy and F1 score by 70% and 20% over the state-of-the-the-art, respectively. With ECRECer, we can annotate numerous enzymes in the Swiss-Prot database with incomplete EC numbers to their full fourth level. Take UniPort protein "A0A0U5GJ41" as an example (1.14.-.-), ECRECer annotated it with "1.14.11.38", which supported by further protein structure analysis based on AlphaFold2. Finally, we established a webserver (https://ecrecer.biodesign.ac.cn) and provided an offline bundle to improve usability.
abstract_zh: 酶委员会 (EC) 编号将蛋白质序列与其催化的生化反应联系起来，对于准确了解酶功能和细胞代谢至关重要。提出了许多从头算的计算方法来直接预测给定输入序列的 EC 数。然而，现有方法的预测性能（准确率、召回率、精确率）、可用性和效率仍有很大的提升空间。在这里，我们报告 ECRECer，一个基于新颖的深度学习技术准确预测 EC 数字的云平台。为了构建 ECRECer，我们评估了不同的蛋白质表示方法，并采用蛋白质语言模型进行蛋白质序列嵌入。嵌入后，我们提出了一个基于多智能体层次深度学习的框架，以多任务方式学习所提出的任务。具体来说，我们使用极限多标签分类器来执行 EC 预测，并采用贪婪策略来集成和微调最终模型。对四种代表性方法的比较分析表明，ECRECer 提供了最高的性能，与最先进的方法相比，其准确度和 F1 分数分别提高了 70% 和 20%。借助 ECRECer，我们可以将 Swiss-Prot 数据库中不完整 EC 编号的众多酶注释至完整的第四级。以UniPort蛋白“A0A0U5GJ41”为例（1.14.-.-），ECRECer将其注释为“1.14.11.38”，这得到了基于AlphaFold2的进一步蛋白结构分析的支持。最后，我们建立了一个网络服务器（https://ecrecer.biodesign.ac.cn）并提供离线捆绑包以提高可用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于多智能体双核学习的酶委员会（EC）编号推荐和基准测试平台ECRECer，用于准确预测蛋白质序列的EC编号。
AI.motivation: 现有的EC编号预测方法在准确性、召回率、精确率、可用性和效率方面仍有较大提升空间，因此需要一种更高效、准确的预测方法。
AI.method: 本文通过评估不同的蛋白质表示方法，采用蛋白质语言模型进行蛋白质序列嵌入，并提出了一种基于多智能体分层深度学习的框架，利用极端多标签分类器进行EC编号预测，并采用贪婪策略进行模型集成和微调。
AI.result: 与四种代表性方法的比较分析表明，ECRECer在准确率和F1分数上分别比最先进的方法提高了70%和20%，并成功为Swiss-Prot数据库中EC编号不完整的酶注释了完整的第四级编号。
AI.conclusion: ECRECer为酶功能注释提供了一种高效的解决方案，并通过建立网络服务器和提供离线包提升了可用性。

title: Robotic Grasping from Classical to Modern: A Survey
title_zh: 从古典到现代的机器人抓取：一项调查
abstract: Robotic Grasping has always been an active topic in robotics since grasping is one of the fundamental but most challenging skills of robots. It demands the coordination of robotic perception, planning, and control for robustness and intelligence. However, current solutions are still far behind humans, especially when confronting unstructured scenarios. In this paper, we survey the advances of robotic grasping, starting from the classical formulations and solutions to the modern ones. By reviewing the history of robotic grasping, we want to provide a complete view of this community, and perhaps inspire the combination and fusion of different ideas, which we think would be helpful to touch and explore the essence of robotic grasping problems. In detail, we firstly give an overview of the analytic methods for robotic grasping. After that, we provide a discussion on the recent state-of-the-art data-driven grasping approaches rising in recent years. With the development of computer vision, semantic grasping is being widely investigated and can be the basis of intelligent manipulation and skill learning for autonomous robotic systems in the future. Therefore, in our survey, we also briefly review the recent progress in this topic. Finally, we discuss the open problems and the future research directions that may be important for the human-level robustness, autonomy, and intelligence of robots.

Therefore, in our survey, we also briefly review the recent progress in this topic. Finally, we discuss the open problems and the future research directions that may be important for the human-level robustness, autonomy, and intelligence of robots.
abstract_zh: 机器人抓取一直是机器人技术中的一个活跃话题，因为抓取是机器人最基本但最具挑战性的技能之一。它需要机器人感知、规划和控制的协调，以实现鲁棒性和智能性。然而，当前的解决方案仍然远远落后于人类，特别是在面对非结构化场景时。在本文中，我们从经典的公式和解决方案到现代的公式和解决方案，调查了机器人抓取的进展。通过回顾机器人抓取的历史，我们希望提供一个完整的视角，或许能够激发不同思想的组合和融合，我们认为这将有助于触摸和探索机器人抓取问题的本质。具体来说，我们首先概述机器人抓取的分析方法。之后，我们讨论了近年来兴起的最先进的数据驱动抓取方法。随着计算机视觉的发展，语义抓取正在被广泛研究，并且可以成为未来自主机器人系统智能操作和技能学习的基础。因此，在我们的调查中，我们也简要回顾了该主题的最新进展。最后，我们讨论了对于机器人的人类水平的鲁棒性、自主性和智能可能重要的开放问题和未来研究方向。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了从经典到现代的机器人抓取技术的发展，分析了当前方法的挑战与未来方向。
AI.motivation: 机器人抓取是机器人学中的核心难题，现有方法在非结构化场景中仍显不足，需通过系统性回顾促进不同技术的融合与创新。
AI.method: 通过梳理抓取问题的经典方法与现代数据驱动技术，结合语义抓取的最新进展，分析技术演进并总结开放性问题。
AI.result: 全面总结了抓取分析方法、数据驱动技术及语义抓取的现状，明确了实现类人抓取能力的关键挑战与研究方向。
AI.conclusion: 未来需结合多模态感知、语义理解与自主学习，推动机器人抓取向更高鲁棒性与智能性发展。

search_text: Robotic Grasping from Classical to Modern: A Survey 从古典到现代的机器人抓取：一项调查 Robotic Grasping has always been an active topic in robotics since grasping is one of the fundamental but most challenging skills of robots. It demands the coordination of robotic perception, planning, and control for robustness and intelligence. However, current solutions are still far behind humans, especially when confronting unstructured scenarios. In this paper, we survey the advances of robotic grasping, starting from the classical formulations and solutions to the modern ones. By reviewing the history of robotic grasping, we want to provide a complete view of this community, and perhaps inspire the combination and fusion of different ideas, which we think would be helpful to touch and explore the essence of robotic grasping problems. In detail, we firstly give an overview of the analytic methods for robotic grasping. After that, we provide a discussion on the recent state-of-the-art data-driven grasping approaches rising in recent years. With the development of computer vision, semantic grasping is being widely investigated and can be the basis of intelligent manipulation and skill learning for autonomous robotic systems in the future. Therefore, in our survey, we also briefly review the recent progress in this topic. Finally, we discuss the open problems and the future research directions that may be important for the human-level robustness, autonomy, and intelligence of robots. 机器人抓取一直是机器人技术中的一个活跃话题，因为抓取是机器人最基本但最具挑战性的技能之一。它需要机器人感知、规划和控制的协调，以实现鲁棒性和智能性。然而，当前的解决方案仍然远远落后于人类，特别是在面对非结构化场景时。在本文中，我们从经典的公式和解决方案到现代的公式和解决方案，调查了机器人抓取的进展。通过回顾机器人抓取的历史，我们希望提供一个完整的视角，或许能够激发不同思想的组合和融合，我们认为这将有助于触摸和探索机器人抓取问题的本质。具体来说，我们首先概述机器人抓取的分析方法。之后，我们讨论了近年来兴起的最先进的数据驱动抓取方法。随着计算机视觉的发展，语义抓取正在被广泛研究，并且可以成为未来自主机器人系统智能操作和技能学习的基础。因此，在我们的调查中，我们也简要回顾了该主题的最新进展。最后，我们讨论了对于机器人的人类水平的鲁棒性、自主性和智能可能重要的开放问题和未来研究方向。 本文综述了从经典到现代的机器人抓取技术的发展，分析了当前方法的挑战与未来方向。 Hanbo Zhang,Jian Tang,Shiguang Sun,Xuguang Lan cs.RO

authors_text: Yihong Tang,Ao Qu,Andy H. F. Chow,William H. K. Lam,S. C. Wong,Wei Ma
title: Domain Adversarial Spatial-Temporal Network: A Transferable Framework for Short-term Traffic Forecasting across Cities
title_zh: 域对抗时空网络：跨城市短期交通预测的可转移框架
abstract: Accurate real-time traffic forecast is critical for intelligent transportation systems (ITS) and it serves as the cornerstone of various smart mobility applications. Though this research area is dominated by deep learning, recent studies indicate that the accuracy improvement by developing new model structures is becoming marginal. Instead, we envision that the improvement can be achieved by transferring the "forecasting-related knowledge" across cities with different data distributions and network topologies. To this end, this paper aims to propose a novel transferable traffic forecasting framework: Domain Adversarial Spatial-Temporal Network (DASTNet). DASTNet is pre-trained on multiple source networks and fine-tuned with the target network's traffic data. Specifically, we leverage the graph representation learning and adversarial domain adaptation techniques to learn the domain-invariant node embeddings, which are further incorporated to model the temporal traffic data. To the best of our knowledge, we are the first to employ adversarial multi-domain adaptation for network-wide traffic forecasting problems. DASTNet consistently outperforms all state-of-the-art baseline methods on three benchmark datasets. The trained DASTNet is applied to Hong Kong's new traffic detectors, and accurate traffic predictions can be delivered immediately (within one day) when the detector is available. Overall, this study suggests an alternative to enhance the traffic forecasting methods and provides practical implications for cities lacking historical traffic data.
summary: Accurate real-time traffic forecast is critical for intelligent transportation systems (ITS) and it serves as the cornerstone of various smart mobility applications. Though this research area is dominated by deep learning, recent studies indicate that the accuracy improvement by developing new model structures is becoming marginal. Instead, we envision that the improvement can be achieved by transferring the "forecasting-related knowledge" across cities with different data distributions and network topologies. To this end, this paper aims to propose a novel transferable traffic forecasting framework: Domain Adversarial Spatial-Temporal Network (DASTNet). DASTNet is pre-trained on multiple source networks and fine-tuned with the target network's traffic data. Specifically, we leverage the graph representation learning and adversarial domain adaptation techniques to learn the domain-invariant node embeddings, which are further incorporated to model the temporal traffic data. To the best of our knowledge, we are the first to employ adversarial multi-domain adaptation for network-wide traffic forecasting problems. DASTNet consistently outperforms all state-of-the-art baseline methods on three benchmark datasets. The trained DASTNet is applied to Hong Kong's new traffic detectors, and accurate traffic predictions can be delivered immediately (within one day) when the detector is available. Overall, this study suggests an alternative to enhance the traffic forecasting methods and provides practical implications for cities lacking historical traffic data.
abstract_zh: 准确的实时交通预测对于智能交通系统（ITS）至关重要，是各种智能移动应用的基石。尽管该研究领域以深度学习为主，但最近的研究表明，通过开发新模型结构来提高准确性正在变得微不足道。相反，我们设想可以通过在具有不同数据分布和网络拓扑的城市之间转移“预测相关知识”来实现改进。为此，本文旨在提出一种新颖的可转移流量预测框架：域对抗时空网络（DASTNet）。 DASTNet 在多个源网络上进行了预训练，并根据目标网络的流量数据进行了微调。具体来说，我们利用图表示学习和对抗域适应技术来学习域不变节点嵌入，并进一步将其纳入对时态流量数据进行建模。据我们所知，我们是第一个采用对抗性多域适应来解决全网络流量预测问题的人。 DASTNet 在三个基准数据集上始终优于所有最先进的基线方法。经过训练的 DASTNet 应用于香港的新型交通检测器，当检测器可用时，可以立即（一天内）提供准确的交通预测。总体而言，本研究提出了一种增强交通预测方法的替代方案，并为缺乏历史交通数据的城市提供了实际意义。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种可迁移的交通预测框架DASTNet，通过跨城市知识迁移解决短期交通预测问题。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法在交通预测模型结构改进上的效果有限，而不同城市间数据分布和网络拓扑差异导致模型难以直接迁移。
AI.method: 基于图表示学习和对抗领域自适应技术，预训练多源网络后微调目标网络，学习领域不变的节点嵌入以建模时序交通数据。
AI.result: DASTNet在三个基准数据集上优于所有现有方法，并成功应用于香港新交通检测器，实现1天内快速部署预测。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为缺乏历史交通数据的城市提供了可迁移的预测方案，验证了跨领域知识迁移在交通预测中的有效性。

authors_text: Zihao Xu,Hao He,Guang-He Lee,Yuyang Wang,Hao Wang
title: Graph-Relational Domain Adaptation
title_zh: 图关系域适应
abstract: Existing domain adaptation methods tend to treat every domain equally and align them all perfectly. Such uniform alignment ignores topological structures among different domains; therefore it may be beneficial for nearby domains, but not necessarily for distant domains. In this work, we relax such uniform alignment by using a domain graph to encode domain adjacency, e.g., a graph of states in the US with each state as a domain and each edge indicating adjacency, thereby allowing domains to align flexibly based on the graph structure. We generalize the existing adversarial learning framework with a novel graph discriminator using encoding-conditioned graph embeddings. Theoretical analysis shows that at equilibrium, our method recovers classic domain adaptation when the graph is a clique, and achieves non-trivial alignment for other types of graphs. Empirical results show that our approach successfully generalizes uniform alignment, naturally incorporates domain information represented by graphs, and improves upon existing domain adaptation methods on both synthetic and real-world datasets. Code will soon be available at https://github.com/Wang-ML-Lab/GRDA.
summary: Existing domain adaptation methods tend to treat every domain equally and align them all perfectly. Such uniform alignment ignores topological structures among different domains; therefore it may be beneficial for nearby domains, but not necessarily for distant domains. In this work, we relax such uniform alignment by using a domain graph to encode domain adjacency, e.g., a graph of states in the US with each state as a domain and each edge indicating adjacency, thereby allowing domains to align flexibly based on the graph structure. We generalize the existing adversarial learning framework with a novel graph discriminator using encoding-conditioned graph embeddings. Theoretical analysis shows that at equilibrium, our method recovers classic domain adaptation when the graph is a clique, and achieves non-trivial alignment for other types of graphs. Empirical results show that our approach successfully generalizes uniform alignment, naturally incorporates domain information represented by graphs, and improves upon existing domain adaptation methods on both synthetic and real-world datasets. Code will soon be available at https://github.com/Wang-ML-Lab/GRDA.
abstract_zh: 现有的领域适应方法倾向于平等对待每个领域并将它们完美地对齐。这种统一的对齐方式忽略了不同域之间的拓扑结构；因此，它可能对附近的域有益，但不一定对遥远的域有益。在这项工作中，我们通过使用域图来编码域邻接来放松这种统一对齐，例如，美国的州图，每个州作为一个域，每条边表示邻接，从而允许域根据图结构灵活对齐。我们通过使用编码条件图嵌入的新颖图鉴别器来概括现有的对抗性学习框架。理论分析表明，在平衡状态下，当图是一个团时，我们的方法恢复了经典的域适应，并且对于其他类型的图实现了非平凡的对齐。经验结果表明，我们的方法成功地推广了统一对齐，自然地合并了由图表示的域信息，并改进了合成数据集和真实数据集上的现有域适应方法。代码很快将在 https://github.com/Wang-ML-Lab/GRDA 上提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于图关系的领域自适应方法（GRDA），通过构建领域图结构实现更灵活的领域对齐。
AI.motivation: 现有领域自适应方法对所有领域进行统一对齐，忽视了领域间的拓扑结构差异，导致对远距离领域适应效果不佳。
AI.method: 利用领域图编码领域邻接关系，设计基于图嵌入的条件判别器，扩展对抗学习框架实现图结构引导的领域对齐。
AI.result: 在合成数据集和真实数据集上均优于现有方法，理论分析表明当图结构为完全图时可退化为经典领域自适应方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入图结构建模领域关系，本文方法有效提升了跨领域适应的灵活性和性能。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于图关系的领域自适应方法（GRDA），通过构建领域图结构实现更灵活的领域对齐。
ai_content.motivation: 现有领域自适应方法对所有领域进行统一对齐，忽视了领域间的拓扑结构差异，导致对远距离领域适应效果不佳。
ai_content.method: 利用领域图编码领域邻接关系，设计基于图嵌入的条件判别器，扩展对抗学习框架实现图结构引导的领域对齐。

search_text: Graph-Relational Domain Adaptation 图关系域适应 Existing domain adaptation methods tend to treat every domain equally and align them all perfectly. Such uniform alignment ignores topological structures among different domains; therefore it may be beneficial for nearby domains, but not necessarily for distant domains. In this work, we relax such uniform alignment by using a domain graph to encode domain adjacency, e.g., a graph of states in the US with each state as a domain and each edge indicating adjacency, thereby allowing domains to align flexibly based on the graph structure. We generalize the existing adversarial learning framework with a novel graph discriminator using encoding-conditioned graph embeddings. Theoretical analysis shows that at equilibrium, our method recovers classic domain adaptation when the graph is a clique, and achieves non-trivial alignment for other types of graphs. Empirical results show that our approach successfully generalizes uniform alignment, naturally incorporates domain information represented by graphs, and improves upon existing domain adaptation methods on both synthetic and real-world datasets. Code will soon be available at https://github.com/Wang-ML-Lab/GRDA. 现有的领域适应方法倾向于平等对待每个领域并将它们完美地对齐。这种统一的对齐方式忽略了不同域之间的拓扑结构；因此，它可能对附近的域有益，但不一定对遥远的域有益。在这项工作中，我们通过使用域图来编码域邻接来放松这种统一对齐，例如，美国的州图，每个州作为一个域，每条边表示邻接，从而允许域根据图结构灵活对齐。我们通过使用编码条件图嵌入的新颖图鉴别器来概括现有的对抗性学习框架。理论分析表明，在平衡状态下，当图是一个团时，我们的方法恢复了经典的域适应，并且对于其他类型的图实现了非平凡的对齐。经验结果表明，我们的方法成功地推广了统一对齐，自然地合并了由图表示的域信息，并改进了合成数据集和真实数据集上的现有域适应方法。代码很快将在 https://github.com/Wang-ML-Lab/GRDA 上提供。 本文提出了一种基于图关系的领域自适应方法（GRDA），通过构建领域图结构实现更灵活的领域对齐。 Zihao Xu,Hao He,Guang-He Lee,Yuyang Wang,Hao Wang cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CV,cs.SI,stat.ML

title: PolicyCleanse: Backdoor Detection and Mitigation in Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: PolicyCleanse：强化学习中的后门检测和缓解
abstract: While real-world applications of reinforcement learning are becoming popular, the security and robustness of RL systems are worthy of more attention and exploration. In particular, recent works have revealed that, in a multi-agent RL environment, backdoor trigger actions can be injected into a victim agent (a.k.a. Trojan agent), which can result in a catastrophic failure as soon as it sees the backdoor trigger action. To ensure the security of RL agents against malicious backdoors, in this work, we propose the problem of Backdoor Detection in a multi-agent competitive reinforcement learning system, with the objective of detecting Trojan agents as well as the corresponding potential trigger actions, and further trying to mitigate their Trojan behavior. In order to solve this problem, we propose PolicyCleanse that is based on the property that the activated Trojan agents accumulated rewards degrade noticeably after several timesteps. Along with PolicyCleanse, we also design a machine unlearning-based approach that can effectively mitigate the detected backdoor. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed methods can accurately detect Trojan agents, and outperform existing backdoor mitigation baseline approaches by at least 3% in winning rate across various types of agents and environments.
summary: While real-world applications of reinforcement learning are becoming popular, the security and robustness of RL systems are worthy of more attention and exploration. In particular, recent works have revealed that, in a multi-agent RL environment, backdoor trigger actions can be injected into a victim agent (a.k.a. Trojan agent), which can result in a catastrophic failure as soon as it sees the backdoor trigger action. To ensure the security of RL agents against malicious backdoors, in this work, we propose the problem of Backdoor Detection in a multi-agent competitive reinforcement learning system, with the objective of detecting Trojan agents as well as the corresponding potential trigger actions, and further trying to mitigate their Trojan behavior. In order to solve this problem, we propose PolicyCleanse that is based on the property that the activated Trojan agents accumulated rewards degrade noticeably after several timesteps. Along with PolicyCleanse, we also design a machine unlearning-based approach that can effectively mitigate the detected backdoor. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed methods can accurately detect Trojan agents, and outperform existing backdoor mitigation baseline approaches by at least 3% in winning rate across various types of agents and environments.
abstract_zh: 虽然强化学习的现实应用越来越流行，但强化学习系统的安全性和鲁棒性值得更多关注和探索。特别是，最近的研究表明，在多智能体强化学习环境中，后门触发操作可以被注入到受害者代理（又名特洛伊木马代理）中，一旦发现后门触发操作，就可能导致灾难性的失败。为了确保强化学习代理针对恶意后门的安全性，在这项工作中，我们提出了多代理竞争强化学习系统中的后门检测问题，目的是检测木马代理以及相应的潜在触发动作，并进一步尝试减轻其木马行为。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了PolicyCleanse，它基于激活的木马代理积累的奖励在几个时间步后明显下降的特性。除了PolicyCleanse之外，我们还设计了一种基于机器学习的方法，可以有效缓解检测到的后门。大量实验表明，所提出的方法可以准确检测特洛伊木马代理，并且在各种类型的代理和环境中，胜率比现有的后门缓解基线方法至少高出 3%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为PolicyCleanse的方法，用于在多智能体竞争强化学习系统中检测和缓解后门攻击。
AI.motivation: 随着强化学习在现实世界中的应用日益增多，其安全性和鲁棒性问题亟需关注。特别地，已有研究表明，恶意后门触发动作可以注入到受害智能体中，从而导致系统灾难性失败。
AI.method: 本文提出了PolicyCleanse方法，基于激活的后门智能体在若干时间步后累积奖励显著下降的特性。此外，还设计了一种基于机器遗忘的缓解方法，以有效减轻检测到的后门行为。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，所提方法能够准确检测后门智能体，并在多种类型智能体和环境中，以至少3%的胜率优于现有后门缓解基线方法。
AI.conclusion: PolicyCleanse方法在检测和缓解多智能体竞争强化学习系统中的后门攻击方面表现出色，为提高RL系统的安全性提供了有效手段。

title: Penalizing Gradient Norm for Efficiently Improving Generalization in Deep Learning
title_zh: 惩罚梯度范数以有效提高深度学习的泛化能力
abstract: How to train deep neural networks (DNNs) to generalize well is a central concern in deep learning, especially for severely overparameterized networks nowadays. In this paper, we propose an effective method to improve the model generalization by additionally penalizing the gradient norm of loss function during optimization. We demonstrate that confining the gradient norm of loss function could help lead the optimizers towards finding flat minima. We leverage the first-order approximation to efficiently implement the corresponding gradient to fit well in the gradient descent framework. In our experiments, we confirm that when using our methods, generalization performance of various models could be improved on different datasets. Also, we show that the recent sharpness-aware minimization method (Foret et al., 2021) is a special, but not the best, case of our method, where the best case of our method could give new state-of-art performance on these tasks. Code is available at {https://github.com/zhaoyang-0204/gnp}.
summary: How to train deep neural networks (DNNs) to generalize well is a central concern in deep learning, especially for severely overparameterized networks nowadays. In this paper, we propose an effective method to improve the model generalization by additionally penalizing the gradient norm of loss function during optimization. We demonstrate that confining the gradient norm of loss function could help lead the optimizers towards finding flat minima. We leverage the first-order approximation to efficiently implement the corresponding gradient to fit well in the gradient descent framework. In our experiments, we confirm that when using our methods, generalization performance of various models could be improved on different datasets. Also, we show that the recent sharpness-aware minimization method (Foret et al., 2021) is a special, but not the best, case of our method, where the best case of our method could give new state-of-art performance on these tasks. Code is available at {https://github.com/zhaoyang-0204/gnp}.
abstract_zh: 如何训练深度神经网络（DNN）具有良好的泛化能力是深度学习的一个核心问题，特别是对于当今严重过度参数化的网络。在本文中，我们提出了一种有效的方法，通过在优化过程中额外惩罚损失函数的梯度范数来提高模型泛化能力。我们证明，限制损失函数的梯度范数可以帮助优化器找到平坦的最小值。我们利用一阶近似来有效地实现相应的梯度，以很好地适应梯度下降框架。在我们的实验中，我们确认，当使用我们的方法时，可以提高各种模型在不同数据集上的泛化性能。此外，我们还表明，最近的锐度感知最小化方法（Foret et al., 2021）是我们方法的一种特殊情况，但不是最好的情况，其中我们方法的最佳情况可以在这些任务上提供新的最先进的性能。代码可在{https://github.com/zhaoyang-0204/gnp}获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过惩罚损失函数梯度范数的方法，以提升深度神经网络的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 深度学习中高度参数化网络的泛化能力提升仍是核心挑战，现有方法存在局限性，需更有效的优化策略。
AI.method: 在优化过程中额外惩罚梯度范数，利用一阶近似调整梯度下降框架，引导优化器寻找平坦最小值。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在多个数据集上提升模型泛化性能，并证明近期Sharpness-Aware Minimization方法为其特例，而该方法最佳表现达到新SOTA。
AI.conclusion: 惩罚梯度范数可有效提升泛化能力，优于现有方法，代码已开源供验证。

In our experiments, we confirm that when using our methods, generalization performance of various models could be improved on different datasets. Also, we show that the recent sharpness-aware minimization method (Foret et al., 2021) is a special, but not the best, case of our method, where the best case of our method could give new state-of-art performance on these tasks. Code is available at {https://github.com/zhaoyang-0204/gnp}. 如何训练深度神经网络（DNN）具有良好的泛化能力是深度学习的一个核心问题，特别是对于当今严重过度参数化的网络。在本文中，我们提出了一种有效的方法，通过在优化过程中额外惩罚损失函数的梯度范数来提高模型泛化能力。我们证明，限制损失函数的梯度范数可以帮助优化器找到平坦的最小值。我们利用一阶近似来有效地实现相应的梯度，以很好地适应梯度下降框架。在我们的实验中，我们确认，当使用我们的方法时，可以提高各种模型在不同数据集上的泛化性能。此外，我们还表明，最近的锐度感知最小化方法（Foret et al., 2021）是我们方法的一种特殊情况，但不是最好的情况，其中我们方法的最佳情况可以在这些任务上提供新的最先进的性能。代码可在{https://github.com/zhaoyang-0204/gnp}获取。 本文提出一种通过惩罚损失函数梯度范数的方法，以提升深度神经网络的泛化能力。 Yang Zhao,Hao Zhang,Xiuyuan Hu cs.LG,cs.AI

title: Local Explanations for Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 强化学习的局部解释
abstract: Many works in explainable AI have focused on explaining black-box classification models. Explaining deep reinforcement learning (RL) policies in a manner that could be understood by domain users has received much less attention. In this paper, we propose a novel perspective to understanding RL policies based on identifying important states from automatically learned meta-states. The key conceptual difference between our approach and many previous ones is that we form meta-states based on locality governed by the expert policy dynamics rather than based on similarity of actions, and that we do not assume any particular knowledge of the underlying topology of the state space. Theoretically, we show that our algorithm to find meta-states converges and the objective that selects important states from each meta-state is submodular leading to efficient high quality greedy selection. Experiments on four domains (four rooms, door-key, minipacman, and pong) and a carefully conducted user study illustrate that our perspective leads to better understanding of the policy. We conjecture that this is a result of our meta-states being more intuitive in that the corresponding important states are strong indicators of tractable intermediate goals that are easier for humans to interpret and follow.
summary: Many works in explainable AI have focused on explaining black-box classification models. Explaining deep reinforcement learning (RL) policies in a manner that could be understood by domain users has received much less attention. In this paper, we propose a novel perspective to understanding RL policies based on identifying important states from automatically learned meta-states. The key conceptual difference between our approach and many previous ones is that we form meta-states based on locality governed by the expert policy dynamics rather than based on similarity of actions, and that we do not assume any particular knowledge of the underlying topology of the state space. Theoretically, we show that our algorithm to find meta-states converges and the objective that selects important states from each meta-state is submodular leading to efficient high quality greedy selection. Experiments on four domains (four rooms, door-key, minipacman, and pong) and a carefully conducted user study illustrate that our perspective leads to better understanding of the policy. We conjecture that this is a result of our meta-states being more intuitive in that the corresponding important states are strong indicators of tractable intermediate goals that are easier for humans to interpret and follow.
abstract_zh: 可解释人工智能领域的许多著作都专注于解释黑盒分类模型。以领域用户可以理解的方式解释深度强化学习（RL）策略受到的关注要少得多。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于从自动学习的元状态中识别重要状态的理解强化学习策略的新视角。我们的方法与许多以前的方法之间的关键概念区别在于，我们基于专家策略动态控制的局部性而不是基于动作的相似性来形成元状态，并且我们不假设对状态空间的底层拓扑有任何特定的了解。从理论上讲，我们证明了我们寻找元状态的算法是收敛的，并且从每个元状态中选择重要状态的目标是子模的，从而导致高效的高质量贪婪选择。对四个领域（四个房间、门钥匙、迷你吃豆机和乒乓球）的实验和仔细进行的用户研究表明，我们的观点有助于更好地理解该政策。我们推测，这是因为我们的元状态更加直观，因为相应的重要状态是易于处理的中间目标的有力指标，更容易被人类解释和遵循。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于局部元状态的强化学习策略解释方法，通过识别关键状态提升策略可解释性。
AI.motivation: 现有可解释AI研究多聚焦分类模型，而强化学习策略的可解释性研究不足，需开发更符合人类认知的解释方式。
AI.method: 基于专家策略动态构建局部元状态，无需预设状态空间拓扑，通过次模优化选择各元状态中的关键状态。
AI.result: 四领域实验与用户研究验证该方法能生成更直观的中间目标指示，显著提升策略可解释性。
AI.conclusion: 元状态局部性设计使关键状态成为可解释的中间目标，为强化学习策略解释提供新视角。

authors_text: Fan Ji,Muyi Sun,Xingqun Qi,Qi Li,Zhenan Sun
title: MOST-Net: A Memory Oriented Style Transfer Network for Face Sketch Synthesis
title_zh: MOST-Net：用于面部草图合成的面向内存的风格传输网络
abstract: Face sketch synthesis has been widely used in multi-media entertainment and law enforcement. Despite the recent developments in deep neural networks, accurate and realistic face sketch synthesis is still a challenging task due to the diversity and complexity of human faces. Current image-to-image translation-based face sketch synthesis frequently encounters over-fitting problems when it comes to small-scale datasets. To tackle this problem, we present an end-to-end Memory Oriented Style Transfer Network (MOST-Net) for face sketch synthesis which can produce high-fidelity sketches with limited data. Specifically, an external self-supervised dynamic memory module is introduced to capture the domain alignment knowledge in the long term. In this way, our proposed model could obtain the domain-transfer ability by establishing the durable relationship between faces and corresponding sketches on the feature level. Furthermore, we design a novel Memory Refinement Loss (MR Loss) for feature alignment in the memory module, which enhances the accuracy of memory slots in an unsupervised manner. Extensive experiments on the CUFS and the CUFSF datasets show that our MOST-Net achieves state-of-the-art performance, especially in terms of the Structural Similarity Index(SSIM).
summary: Face sketch synthesis has been widely used in multi-media entertainment and law enforcement. Despite the recent developments in deep neural networks, accurate and realistic face sketch synthesis is still a challenging task due to the diversity and complexity of human faces. Current image-to-image translation-based face sketch synthesis frequently encounters over-fitting problems when it comes to small-scale datasets. To tackle this problem, we present an end-to-end Memory Oriented Style Transfer Network (MOST-Net) for face sketch synthesis which can produce high-fidelity sketches with limited data. Specifically, an external self-supervised dynamic memory module is introduced to capture the domain alignment knowledge in the long term. In this way, our proposed model could obtain the domain-transfer ability by establishing the durable relationship between faces and corresponding sketches on the feature level. Furthermore, we design a novel Memory Refinement Loss (MR Loss) for feature alignment in the memory module, which enhances the accuracy of memory slots in an unsupervised manner. Extensive experiments on the CUFS and the CUFSF datasets show that our MOST-Net achieves state-of-the-art performance, especially in terms of the Structural Similarity Index(SSIM).
abstract_zh: 人脸素描合成已广泛应用于多媒体娱乐和执法领域。尽管深度神经网络最近取得了进展，但由于人脸的多样性和复杂性，准确且真实的人脸草图合成仍然是一项具有挑战性的任务。当前基于图像到图像转换的人脸草图合成在涉及小规模数据集时经常遇到过拟合问题。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种用于面部草图合成的端到端内存导向风格传输网络（MOST-Net），它可以用有限的数据生成高保真草图。具体来说，引入外部自监督动态存储模块来捕获长期的域对齐知识。这样，我们提出的模型可以通过在特征级别上建立人脸和相应草图之间的持久关系来获得域转移能力。此外，我们设计了一种新颖的内存细化损失（MR Loss），用于内存模块中的特征对齐，从而以无监督的方式提高内存插槽的准确性。对 CUFS 和 CUFSF 数据集的大量实验表明，我们的 MOST-Net 实现了最先进的性能，特别是在结构相似性指数（SSIM）方面。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MOST-Net，一种面向记忆的风格迁移网络，用于解决小规模数据集下高保真人脸素描合成的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有基于图像到图像翻译的人脸素描合成方法在小数据集上易出现过拟合，难以保持生成结果的多样性与真实性。
AI.method: 设计包含外部自监督动态记忆模块的MOST-Net，通过建立人脸与素描的长期特征级关联，并引入记忆优化损失（MR Loss）提升特征对齐效果。
AI.result: 在CUFS和CUFSF数据集上达到最优性能，尤其在结构相似性指数（SSIM）指标上表现显著。
AI.conclusion: MOST-Net通过记忆模块与无监督特征优化，有效缓解了小数据集过拟合问题，提升了人脸素描合成的保真度与泛化能力。

authors_text: Hao He,Fan Zhang,Steve Pieper,Nikos Makris,Yogesh Rathi,William Wells III,Lauren J. O'Donnell
title: Model and predict age and sex in healthy subjects using brain white matter features: A deep learning approach
title_zh: 使用大脑白质特征对健康受试者的年龄和性别进行建模和预测：深度学习方法
abstract: The human brain's white matter (WM) structure is of immense interest to the scientific community. Diffusion MRI gives a powerful tool to describe the brain WM structure noninvasively. To potentially enable monitoring of age-related changes and investigation of sex-related brain structure differences on the mapping between the brain connectome and healthy subjects' age and sex, we extract fiber-cluster-based diffusion features and predict sex and age with a novel ensembled neural network classifier. We conduct experiments on the Human Connectome Project (HCP) young adult dataset and show that our model achieves 94.82% accuracy in sex prediction and 2.51 years MAE in age prediction. We also show that the fractional anisotropy (FA) is the most predictive of sex, while the number of fibers is the most predictive of age and the combination of different features can improve the model performance.
summary: The human brain's white matter (WM) structure is of immense interest to the scientific community. Diffusion MRI gives a powerful tool to describe the brain WM structure noninvasively. To potentially enable monitoring of age-related changes and investigation of sex-related brain structure differences on the mapping between the brain connectome and healthy subjects' age and sex, we extract fiber-cluster-based diffusion features and predict sex and age with a novel ensembled neural network classifier. We conduct experiments on the Human Connectome Project (HCP) young adult dataset and show that our model achieves 94.82% accuracy in sex prediction and 2.51 years MAE in age prediction. We also show that the fractional anisotropy (FA) is the most predictive of sex, while the number of fibers is the most predictive of age and the combination of different features can improve the model performance.
abstract_zh: 人类大脑的白质（WM）结构引起了科学界的极大兴趣。扩散 MRI 为无创描述大脑 WM 结构提供了强大的工具。为了能够监测与年龄相关的变化，并研究大脑连接组与健康受试者年龄和性别之间映射的与性别相关的大脑结构差异，我们提取基于纤维簇的扩散特征，并使用新型集成神经网络分类器预测性别和年龄。我们在人类连接组计划 (HCP) 年轻人数据集上进行了实验，结果表明我们的模型在性别预测方面达到了 94.82% 的准确率，在年龄预测方面达到了 2.51 年的 MAE。我们还表明，分数各向异性（FA）最能预测性别，而纤维数量最能预测年龄，并且不同特征的组合可以提高模型性能。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于脑白质特征的深度学习方法，用于预测健康受试者的年龄和性别。
AI.motivation: 通过分析脑白质结构差异，研究年龄和性别相关的脑部变化，有助于理解神经退行性疾病和人口统计学因素对大脑的影响。
AI.method: 利用扩散MRI提取纤维簇级白质特征，结合集成神经网络分类器进行性别和年龄预测，并分析不同特征对预测结果的贡献。
AI.result: 在HCP数据集上实现性别预测准确率94.82%，年龄预测平均绝对误差2.51年，发现各向异性分数（FA）对性别预测最有效，纤维数量对年龄预测最有效。
AI.conclusion: 白质特征的组合能显著提升模型性能，为基于脑连接组的年龄和性别研究提供了新方法。

search_text: Model and predict age and sex in healthy subjects using brain white matter features: A deep learning approach 使用大脑白质特征对健康受试者的年龄和性别进行建模和预测：深度学习方法 The human brain's white matter (WM) structure is of immense interest to the scientific community. Diffusion MRI gives a powerful tool to describe the brain WM structure noninvasively. To potentially enable monitoring of age-related changes and investigation of sex-related brain structure differences on the mapping between the brain connectome and healthy subjects' age and sex, we extract fiber-cluster-based diffusion features and predict sex and age with a novel ensembled neural network classifier. We conduct experiments on the Human Connectome Project (HCP) young adult dataset and show that our model achieves 94.82% accuracy in sex prediction and 2.51 years MAE in age prediction. We also show that the fractional anisotropy (FA) is the most predictive of sex, while the number of fibers is the most predictive of age and the combination of different features can improve the model performance. 人类大脑的白质（WM）结构引起了科学界的极大兴趣。扩散 MRI 为无创描述大脑 WM 结构提供了强大的工具。为了能够监测与年龄相关的变化，并研究大脑连接组与健康受试者年龄和性别之间映射的与性别相关的大脑结构差异，我们提取基于纤维簇的扩散特征，并使用新型集成神经网络分类器预测性别和年龄。我们在人类连接组计划 (HCP) 年轻人数据集上进行了实验，结果表明我们的模型在性别预测方面达到了 94.82% 的准确率，在年龄预测方面达到了 2.51 年的 MAE。我们还表明，分数各向异性（FA）最能预测性别，而纤维数量最能预测年龄，并且不同特征的组合可以提高模型性能。 该论文提出了一种基于脑白质特征的深度学习方法，用于预测健康受试者的年龄和性别。 Hao He,Fan Zhang,Steve Pieper,Nikos Makris,Yogesh Rathi,William Wells III,Lauren J. O'Donnell eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Vin Sachidananda,Shao-Yen Tseng,Erik Marchi,Sachin Kajarekar,Panayiotis Georgiou
title: CALM: Contrastive Aligned Audio-Language Multirate and Multimodal Representations
title_zh: CALM：对比对齐音频语言多速率和多模态表示
abstract: Deriving multimodal representations of audio and lexical inputs is a central problem in Natural Language Understanding (NLU). In this paper, we present Contrastive Aligned Audio-Language Multirate and Multimodal Representations (CALM), an approach for learning multimodal representations using contrastive and multirate information inherent in audio and lexical inputs. The proposed model aligns acoustic and lexical information in the input embedding space of a pretrained language-only contextual embedding model. By aligning audio representations to pretrained language representations and utilizing contrastive information between acoustic inputs, CALM is able to bootstrap audio embedding competitive with existing audio representation models in only a few hours of training time. Operationally, audio spectrograms are processed using linearized patches through a Spectral Transformer (SpecTran) which is trained using a Contrastive Audio-Language Pretraining objective to align audio and language from similar queries. Subsequently, the derived acoustic and lexical tokens representations are input into a multimodal transformer to incorporate utterance level context and derive the proposed CALM representations. We show that these pretrained embeddings can subsequently be used in multimodal supervised tasks and demonstrate the benefits of the proposed pretraining steps in terms of the alignment of the two embedding spaces and the multirate nature of the pretraining. Our system shows 10-25\% improvement over existing emotion recognition systems including state-of-the-art three-modality systems under various evaluation objectives.
summary: Deriving multimodal representations of audio and lexical inputs is a central problem in Natural Language Understanding (NLU). In this paper, we present Contrastive Aligned Audio-Language Multirate and Multimodal Representations (CALM), an approach for learning multimodal representations using contrastive and multirate information inherent in audio and lexical inputs. The proposed model aligns acoustic and lexical information in the input embedding space of a pretrained language-only contextual embedding model. By aligning audio representations to pretrained language representations and utilizing contrastive information between acoustic inputs, CALM is able to bootstrap audio embedding competitive with existing audio representation models in only a few hours of training time. Operationally, audio spectrograms are processed using linearized patches through a Spectral Transformer (SpecTran) which is trained using a Contrastive Audio-Language Pretraining objective to align audio and language from similar queries. Subsequently, the derived acoustic and lexical tokens representations are input into a multimodal transformer to incorporate utterance level context and derive the proposed CALM representations. We show that these pretrained embeddings can subsequently be used in multimodal supervised tasks and demonstrate the benefits of the proposed pretraining steps in terms of the alignment of the two embedding spaces and the multirate nature of the pretraining. Our system shows 10-25\% improvement over existing emotion recognition systems including state-of-the-art three-modality systems under various evaluation objectives.
abstract_zh: 导出音频和词汇输入的多模态表示是自然语言理解 (NLU) 的核心问题。在本文中，我们提出了对比对齐音频语言多速率和多模态表示（CALM），这是一种使用音频和词汇输入中固有的对比和多速率信息来学习多模态表示的方法。所提出的模型在预训练的仅语言上下文嵌入模型的输入嵌入空间中对齐声学和词汇信息。通过将音频表示与预训练的语言表示对齐并利用声学输入之间的对比信息，CALM 能够在短短几个小时的训练时间内引导音频嵌入，与现有的音频表示模型相媲美。在操作上，音频频谱图通过频谱变换器 (SpecTran) 使用线性化补丁进行处理，频谱变换器使用对比音频语言预训练目标进行训练，以对齐来自相似查询的音频和语言。随后，将导出的声学和词汇标记表示输入到多模态转换器中，以合并话语级别上下文并导出所提出的 CALM 表示。我们表明，这些预训练的嵌入随后可以用于多模式监督任务，并证明了所提出的预训练步骤在两个嵌入空间的对齐和预训练的多速率性质方面的好处。我们的系统比现有的情绪识别系统（包括各种评估目标下最先进的三模态系统）提高了 10-25%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CALM模型，通过对比对齐音频和语言信息，学习多速率和多模态表示以提升音频-语言联合建模效果。
AI.motivation: 现有音频-语言表示方法在对齐效率和多速率信息利用上存在不足，需探索更有效的预训练策略以提升跨模态任务性能。
AI.method: 基于预训练语言模型的嵌入空间，通过对比音频-语言预训练目标对齐声学特征与文本表示，结合多速率信息处理的Spectral Transformer（SpecTran）和多模态Transformer架构。
AI.result: 在情绪识别等多模态任务中，CALM相较现有模型实现10-25%的性能提升，尤其在三模态系统对比中表现显著。
AI.conclusion: CALM通过对比对齐与多速率预训练机制，有效提升了音频-语言嵌入空间的对齐质量，为多模态表示学习提供了新思路。

authors_text: Aparna R. Joshi,Xavier Suau,Nivedha Sivakumar,Luca Zappella,Nicholas Apostoloff
title: Fair SA: Sensitivity Analysis for Fairness in Face Recognition
title_zh: Fair SA：人脸识别公平性的敏感性分析
comment: 8 pages, 5 figures, to be published in NeurIPS 2021 Workshop, Algorithmic Fairness through the Lens of Causality and Robustness
comments: 8 pages, 5 figures, to be published in NeurIPS 2021 Workshop, Algorithmic Fairness through the Lens of Causality and Robustness
abstract: As the use of deep learning in high impact domains becomes ubiquitous, it is increasingly important to assess the resilience of models. One such high impact domain is that of face recognition, with real world applications involving images affected by various degradations, such as motion blur or high exposure. Moreover, images captured across different attributes, such as gender and race, can also challenge the robustness of a face recognition algorithm. While traditional summary statistics suggest that the aggregate performance of face recognition models has continued to improve, these metrics do not directly measure the robustness or fairness of the models. Visual Psychophysics Sensitivity Analysis (VPSA) [1] provides a way to pinpoint the individual causes of failure by way of introducing incremental perturbations in the data. However, perturbations may affect subgroups differently. In this paper, we propose a new fairness evaluation based on robustness in the form of a generic framework that extends VPSA. With this framework, we can analyze the ability of a model to perform fairly for different subgroups of a population affected by perturbations, and pinpoint the exact failure modes for a subgroup by measuring targeted robustness. With the increasing focus on the fairness of models, we use face recognition as an example application of our framework and propose to compactly visualize the fairness analysis of a model via AUC matrices. We analyze the performance of common face recognition models and empirically show that certain subgroups are at a disadvantage when images are perturbed, thereby uncovering trends that were not visible using the model's performance on subgroups without perturbations.
summary: As the use of deep learning in high impact domains becomes ubiquitous, it is increasingly important to assess the resilience of models. One such high impact domain is that of face recognition, with real world applications involving images affected by various degradations, such as motion blur or high exposure. Moreover, images captured across different attributes, such as gender and race, can also challenge the robustness of a face recognition algorithm. While traditional summary statistics suggest that the aggregate performance of face recognition models has continued to improve, these metrics do not directly measure the robustness or fairness of the models. Visual Psychophysics Sensitivity Analysis (VPSA) [1] provides a way to pinpoint the individual causes of failure by way of introducing incremental perturbations in the data. However, perturbations may affect subgroups differently. In this paper, we propose a new fairness evaluation based on robustness in the form of a generic framework that extends VPSA. With this framework, we can analyze the ability of a model to perform fairly for different subgroups of a population affected by perturbations, and pinpoint the exact failure modes for a subgroup by measuring targeted robustness. With the increasing focus on the fairness of models, we use face recognition as an example application of our framework and propose to compactly visualize the fairness analysis of a model via AUC matrices. We analyze the performance of common face recognition models and empirically show that certain subgroups are at a disadvantage when images are perturbed, thereby uncovering trends that were not visible using the model's performance on subgroups without perturbations.
abstract_zh: 随着深度学习在高影响力领域的使用变得无处不在，评估模型的弹性变得越来越重要。其中一个影响较大的领域是人脸识别，现实世界的应用涉及受各种退化影响的图像，例如运动模糊或高曝光。此外，跨不同属性（例如性别和种族）捕获的图像也会挑战人脸识别算法的稳健性。虽然传统的汇总统计表明人脸识别模型的总体性能持续提高，但这些指标并不能直接衡量模型的稳健性或公平性。视觉心理物理学敏感性分析 (VPSA) [1] 提供了一种通过在数据中引入增量扰动来查明失败的个体原因的方法。然而，扰动可能会对亚组产生不同的影响。在本文中，我们以扩展 VPSA 的通用框架的形式提出了一种基于鲁棒性的新公平性评估。通过这个框架，我们可以分析模型对受扰动影响的不同群体的公平执行能力，并通过测量目标稳健性来查明子组的确切故障模式。随着人们对模型公平性的日益关注，我们使用人脸识别作为我们框架的示例应用，并建议通过 AUC 矩阵来紧凑地可视化模型的公平性分析。我们分析了常见人脸识别模型的性能，并凭经验表明，当图像受到扰动时，某些子组处于不利地位，从而揭示了使用模型在没有扰动的子组上的性能所不可见的趋势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于鲁棒性的公平性评估框架Fair SA，通过扩展视觉心理物理学敏感性分析（VPSA）方法，分析人脸识别模型在不同子群体下的公平性，并利用AUC矩阵进行可视化。
AI.motivation: 传统性能指标无法直接衡量人脸识别模型的鲁棒性与公平性，而子群体在图像扰动下可能存在性能差异，需针对性评估模型公平性。
AI.method: 扩展VPSA框架，引入定向扰动分析子群体鲁棒性，并通过AUC矩阵可视化模型公平性分析结果。
AI.result: 实验发现某些子群体在图像扰动下表现显著下降，揭示了传统指标未暴露的公平性问题。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效识别了人脸识别模型中的公平性缺陷，强调了在公平性评估中需结合鲁棒性分析的重要性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于鲁棒性的公平性评估框架Fair SA，通过扩展视觉心理物理学敏感性分析（VPSA）方法，分析人脸识别模型在不同子群体下的公平性，并利用AUC矩阵进行可视化。

search_text: Fair SA: Sensitivity Analysis for Fairness in Face Recognition Fair SA：人脸识别公平性的敏感性分析 As the use of deep learning in high impact domains becomes ubiquitous, it is increasingly important to assess the resilience of models. One such high impact domain is that of face recognition, with real world applications involving images affected by various degradations, such as motion blur or high exposure. Moreover, images captured across different attributes, such as gender and race, can also challenge the robustness of a face recognition algorithm. While traditional summary statistics suggest that the aggregate performance of face recognition models has continued to improve, these metrics do not directly measure the robustness or fairness of the models. Visual Psychophysics Sensitivity Analysis (VPSA) [1] provides a way to pinpoint the individual causes of failure by way of introducing incremental perturbations in the data. However, perturbations may affect subgroups differently. In this paper, we propose a new fairness evaluation based on robustness in the form of a generic framework that extends VPSA. With this framework, we can analyze the ability of a model to perform fairly for different subgroups of a population affected by perturbations, and pinpoint the exact failure modes for a subgroup by measuring targeted robustness. With the increasing focus on the fairness of models, we use face recognition as an example application of our framework and propose to compactly visualize the fairness analysis of a model via AUC matrices. We analyze the performance of common face recognition models and empirically show that certain subgroups are at a disadvantage when images are perturbed, thereby uncovering trends that were not visible using the model's performance on subgroups without perturbations. 随着深度学习在高影响力领域的使用变得无处不在，评估模型的弹性变得越来越重要。其中一个影响较大的领域是人脸识别，现实世界的应用涉及受各种退化影响的图像，例如运动模糊或高曝光。此外，跨不同属性（例如性别和种族）捕获的图像也会挑战人脸识别算法的稳健性。虽然传统的汇总统计表明人脸识别模型的总体性能持续提高，但这些指标并不能直接衡量模型的稳健性或公平性。视觉心理物理学敏感性分析 (VPSA) [1] 提供了一种通过在数据中引入增量扰动来查明失败的个体原因的方法。然而，扰动可能会对亚组产生不同的影响。在本文中，我们以扩展 VPSA 的通用框架的形式提出了一种基于鲁棒性的新公平性评估。通过这个框架，我们可以分析模型对受扰动影响的不同群体的公平执行能力，并通过测量目标稳健性来查明子组的确切故障模式。随着人们对模型公平性的日益关注，我们使用人脸识别作为我们框架的示例应用，并建议通过 AUC 矩阵来紧凑地可视化模型的公平性分析。我们分析了常见人脸识别模型的性能，并凭经验表明，当图像受到扰动时，某些子组处于不利地位，从而揭示了使用模型在没有扰动的子组上的性能所不可见的趋势。 本文提出了一种基于鲁棒性的公平性评估框架Fair SA，通过扩展视觉心理物理学敏感性分析（VPSA）方法，分析人脸识别模型在不同子群体下的公平性，并利用AUC矩阵进行可视化。 Aparna R. Joshi,Xavier Suau,Nivedha Sivakumar,Luca Zappella,Nicholas Apostoloff cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

title: Multi-Label Classification of Thoracic Diseases using Dense Convolutional Network on Chest Radiographs
title_zh: 在胸部 X 光片上使用密集卷积网络对胸部疾病进行多标签分类
abstract: Traditional methods of identifying pathologies in X-ray images rely heavily on skilled human interpretation and are often time-consuming. The advent of deep learning techniques has enabled the development of automated disease diagnosis systems. Still, the performance of such systems is opaque to end-users and limited to detecting a single pathology. In this paper, we propose a multi-label disease prediction model that allows the detection of more than one pathology at a given test time. We use a dense convolutional neural network (DenseNet) for disease diagnosis. Our proposed model achieved the highest AUC score of 0.896 for the condition Cardiomegaly with an accuracy of 0.826, while the lowest AUC score was obtained for Nodule, at 0.655 with an accuracy of 0.66. To build trust in decision-making, we generated heatmaps on X-rays to visualize the regions where the model paid attention to make certain predictions. Our proposed automated disease prediction model obtained highly confident high-performance metrics in multi-label disease prediction tasks.
summary: Traditional methods of identifying pathologies in X-ray images rely heavily on skilled human interpretation and are often time-consuming. The advent of deep learning techniques has enabled the development of automated disease diagnosis systems. Still, the performance of such systems is opaque to end-users and limited to detecting a single pathology. In this paper, we propose a multi-label disease prediction model that allows the detection of more than one pathology at a given test time. We use a dense convolutional neural network (DenseNet) for disease diagnosis. Our proposed model achieved the highest AUC score of 0.896 for the condition Cardiomegaly with an accuracy of 0.826, while the lowest AUC score was obtained for Nodule, at 0.655 with an accuracy of 0.66. To build trust in decision-making, we generated heatmaps on X-rays to visualize the regions where the model paid attention to make certain predictions. Our proposed automated disease prediction model obtained highly confident high-performance metrics in multi-label disease prediction tasks.
abstract_zh: 识别 X 射线图像中的病理的传统方法严重依赖熟练的人类解释，并且通常非常耗时。深度学习技术的出现使得自动化疾病诊断系统的发展成为可能。尽管如此，此类系统的性能对最终用户来说是不透明的，并且仅限于检测单一病理。在本文中，我们提出了一种多标签疾病预测模型，该模型允许在给定测试时间检测多种病理。我们使用密集卷积神经网络（DenseNet）进行疾病诊断。我们提出的模型在心脏肥大状况下获得了最高 AUC 分数 0.896，准确度为 0.826，而在结节上获得了最低 AUC 分数，为 0.655，准确度为 0.66。为了建立对决策的信任，我们在 X 射线上生成了热图，以可视化模型关注进行某些预测的区域。我们提出的自动化疾病预测模型在多标签疾病预测任务中获得了高度可信的高性能指标。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于密集卷积网络（DenseNet）的多标签分类模型，用于胸部X光片中多种胸腔疾病的自动检测。
AI.motivation: 传统X光诊断依赖人工解读效率低且仅能检测单一病灶，现有系统缺乏多病灶同时检测能力及可解释性。
AI.method: 采用DenseNet架构构建多标签分类模型，并通过热力图可视化技术增强模型预测的可解释性。
AI.result: 模型在Cardiomegaly疾病上达到最高AUC 0.896（准确率0.826），Nodule疾病最低AUC为0.655（准确率0.66）。
AI.conclusion: 该模型在多标签疾病预测任务中表现出高性能，结合热力图可视化有效提升了诊断系统的可信度。

title: Simulators for Mobile Social Robots:State-of-the-Art and Challenges
title_zh: 移动社交机器人模拟器：最先进的技术和挑战
abstract: The future robots are expected to work in a shared physical space with humans [1], however, the presence of humans leads to a dynamic environment that is challenging for mobile robots to navigate. The path planning algorithms designed to navigate a collision free path in complex human environments are often tested in real environments due to the lack of simulation frameworks. This paper identifies key requirements for an ideal simulator for this task, evaluates existing simulation frameworks and most importantly, it identifies the challenges and limitations of the existing simulation techniques. First and foremost, we recognize that the simulators needed for the purpose of testing mobile robots designed for human environments are unique as they must model realistic pedestrian behavior in addition to the modelling of mobile robots. Our study finds that Pedsim_ros [2] and a more recent SocNavBench framework [3] are the only two 3D simulation frameworks that meet most of the key requirements defined in our paper. In summary, we identify the need for developing more simulators that offer an ability to create realistic 3D pedestrian rich virtual environments along with the flexibility of designing complex robots and their sensor models from scratch.
summary: The future robots are expected to work in a shared physical space with humans [1], however, the presence of humans leads to a dynamic environment that is challenging for mobile robots to navigate. The path planning algorithms designed to navigate a collision free path in complex human environments are often tested in real environments due to the lack of simulation frameworks. This paper identifies key requirements for an ideal simulator for this task, evaluates existing simulation frameworks and most importantly, it identifies the challenges and limitations of the existing simulation techniques. First and foremost, we recognize that the simulators needed for the purpose of testing mobile robots designed for human environments are unique as they must model realistic pedestrian behavior in addition to the modelling of mobile robots. Our study finds that Pedsim_ros [2] and a more recent SocNavBench framework [3] are the only two 3D simulation frameworks that meet most of the key requirements defined in our paper. In summary, we identify the need for developing more simulators that offer an ability to create realistic 3D pedestrian rich virtual environments along with the flexibility of designing complex robots and their sensor models from scratch.
abstract_zh: 未来的机器人预计将在与人类共享的物理空间中工作[1]，然而，人类的存在导致了一个动态环境，这对移动机器人的导航构成了挑战。由于缺乏模拟框架，设计用于在复杂人类环境中导航无碰撞路径的路径规划算法通常在真实环境中进行测试。本文确定了执行此任务的理想模拟器的关键要求，评估了现有的模拟框架，最重要的是，它确定了现有模拟技术的挑战和局限性。首先，我们认识到，用于测试为人类环境设计的移动机器人所需的模拟器是独一无二的，因为除了移动机器人的建模之外，它们还必须模拟真实的行人行为。我们的研究发现，Pedsim_ros [2] 和更新的 SocNavBench 框架 [3] 是仅有的两个满足我们论文中定义的大多数关键要求的 3D 模拟框架。总之，我们确定需要开发更多模拟器，以提供创建逼真的 3D 行人丰富虚拟环境的能力，以及从头开始设计复杂机器人及其传感器模型的灵活性。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了用于移动社交机器人的模拟器现状，并指出现有技术的挑战与局限性。
AI.motivation: 由于人类环境的动态性，移动机器人导航算法需在真实环境中测试，但缺乏合适的仿真框架，亟需评估现有模拟器并明确改进方向。
AI.method: 通过定义理想模拟器的关键需求，评估现有仿真框架，并分析其在建模行人行为及复杂机器人设计上的不足。
AI.result: 发现Pedsim_ros和SocNavBench是目前最符合要求的3D仿真框架，但现有工具仍难以满足高真实感与灵活性的需求。
AI.conclusion: 需开发支持高真实感3D行人环境及自定义机器人传感器模型的新型仿真工具，以推动移动社交机器人研究。

First and foremost, we recognize that the simulators needed for the purpose of testing mobile robots designed for human environments are unique as they must model realistic pedestrian behavior in addition to the modelling of mobile robots. Our study finds that Pedsim_ros [2] and a more recent SocNavBench framework [3] are the only two 3D simulation frameworks that meet most of the key requirements defined in our paper. In summary, we identify the need for developing more simulators that offer an ability to create realistic 3D pedestrian rich virtual environments along with the flexibility of designing complex robots and their sensor models from scratch. 未来的机器人预计将在与人类共享的物理空间中工作[1]，然而，人类的存在导致了一个动态环境，这对移动机器人的导航构成了挑战。由于缺乏模拟框架，设计用于在复杂人类环境中导航无碰撞路径的路径规划算法通常在真实环境中进行测试。本文确定了执行此任务的理想模拟器的关键要求，评估了现有的模拟框架，最重要的是，它确定了现有模拟技术的挑战和局限性。首先，我们认识到，用于测试为人类环境设计的移动机器人所需的模拟器是独一无二的，因为除了移动机器人的建模之外，它们还必须模拟真实的行人行为。我们的研究发现，Pedsim_ros [2] 和更新的 SocNavBench 框架 [3] 是仅有的两个满足我们论文中定义的大多数关键要求的 3D 模拟框架。总之，我们确定需要开发更多模拟器，以提供创建逼真的 3D 行人丰富虚拟环境的能力，以及从头开始设计复杂机器人及其传感器模型的灵活性。 本文综述了用于移动社交机器人的模拟器现状，并指出现有技术的挑战与局限性。 Prabhjot Kaur,Zichuan Liu,Weisong Shi cs.RO

title: Convolutional Neural Networks on Graphs with Chebyshev Approximation, Revisited
title_zh: 重新审视具有切比雪夫近似的图上的卷积神经网络
abstract: Designing spectral convolutional networks is a challenging problem in graph learning. ChebNet, one of the early attempts, approximates the spectral graph convolutions using Chebyshev polynomials. GCN simplifies ChebNet by utilizing only the first two Chebyshev polynomials while still outperforming it on real-world datasets. GPR-GNN and BernNet demonstrate that the Monomial and Bernstein bases also outperform the Chebyshev basis in terms of learning the spectral graph convolutions. Such conclusions are counter-intuitive in the field of approximation theory, where it is established that the Chebyshev polynomial achieves the optimum convergent rate for approximating a function. In this paper, we revisit the problem of approximating the spectral graph convolutions with Chebyshev polynomials. We show that ChebNet's inferior performance is primarily due to illegal coefficients learnt by ChebNet approximating analytic filter functions, which leads to over-fitting. We then propose ChebNetII, a new GNN model based on Chebyshev interpolation, which enhances the original Chebyshev polynomial approximation while reducing the Runge phenomenon. We conducted an extensive experimental study to demonstrate that ChebNetII can learn arbitrary graph convolutions and achieve superior performance in both full- and semi-supervised node classification tasks. Most notably, we scale ChebNetII to a billion graph ogbn-papers100M, showing that spectral-based GNNs have superior performance. Our code is available at https://github.com/ivam-he/ChebNetII.
summary: Designing spectral convolutional networks is a challenging problem in graph learning. ChebNet, one of the early attempts, approximates the spectral graph convolutions using Chebyshev polynomials. GCN simplifies ChebNet by utilizing only the first two Chebyshev polynomials while still outperforming it on real-world datasets. GPR-GNN and BernNet demonstrate that the Monomial and Bernstein bases also outperform the Chebyshev basis in terms of learning the spectral graph convolutions. Such conclusions are counter-intuitive in the field of approximation theory, where it is established that the Chebyshev polynomial achieves the optimum convergent rate for approximating a function. In this paper, we revisit the problem of approximating the spectral graph convolutions with Chebyshev polynomials. We show that ChebNet's inferior performance is primarily due to illegal coefficients learnt by ChebNet approximating analytic filter functions, which leads to over-fitting. We then propose ChebNetII, a new GNN model based on Chebyshev interpolation, which enhances the original Chebyshev polynomial approximation while reducing the Runge phenomenon. We conducted an extensive experimental study to demonstrate that ChebNetII can learn arbitrary graph convolutions and achieve superior performance in both full- and semi-supervised node classification tasks. Most notably, we scale ChebNetII to a billion graph ogbn-papers100M, showing that spectral-based GNNs have superior performance. Our code is available at https://github.com/ivam-he/ChebNetII.
abstract_zh: 设计谱卷积网络是图学习中的一个具有挑战性的问题。 ChebNet 是早期尝试之一，它使用切比雪夫多项式来近似谱图卷积。 GCN 通过仅利用前两个切比雪夫多项式来简化 ChebNet，同时在现实数据集上仍然优于它。 GPR-GNN 和 BernNet 证明单项式和 Bernstein 基在学习谱图卷积方面也优于切比雪夫基。这样的结论在逼近理论领域是违反直觉的，在逼近理论领域中，切比雪夫多项式可以实现逼近函数的最佳收敛率。在本文中，我们重新审视用切比雪夫多项式逼近谱图卷积的问题。我们表明 ChebNet 的性能较差主要是由于 ChebNet 学习到的非法系数逼近解析滤波器函数，从而导致过度拟合。然后我们提出了 ChebNetII，一种基于切比雪夫插值的新 GNN 模型，它增强了原始切比雪夫多项式逼近，同时减少了龙格现象。我们进行了广泛的实验研究，证明 ChebNetII 可以学习任意图卷积，并在全监督和半监督节点分类任务中实现卓越的性能。最值得注意的是，我们将 ChebNetII 扩展到 10 亿图 ogbn-papers100M，这表明基于频谱的 GNN 具有卓越的性能。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/ivam-he/ChebNetII 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文重新审视了使用切比雪夫多项式逼近图谱卷积的问题，提出了一种改进的GNN模型ChebNetII。
AI.motivation: 早期的ChebNet在图卷积中表现不佳，且其他基函数（如单项式）在逼近效果上优于切比雪夫基，这与逼近理论中的最优收敛率结论矛盾。
AI.method: 通过分析ChebNet的系数学习问题，提出基于切比雪夫插值的ChebNetII模型，优化逼近过程并缓解Runge现象。
AI.result: ChebNetII在全监督和半监督节点分类任务中均优于现有方法，且成功扩展到十亿级图数据集ogbn-papers100M。
AI.conclusion: 谱方法在图神经网络中具有潜力，通过改进切比雪夫逼近方式可显著提升性能。

authors_text: Ahmad B. Hassanat,Ahmad S. Tarawneh,Ghada A. Altarawneh,Abdullah Almuhaimeed
title: Stop Oversampling for Class Imbalance Learning: A Critical Review
title_zh: 停止因班级不平衡学习而进行过度采样：批判性评论
comment: 19 pages, 5 figures, 4 tables, and more than 72 m=oversampling methods reviewed
comments: 19 pages, 5 figures, 4 tables, and more than 72 m=oversampling methods reviewed
abstract: For the last two decades, oversampling has been employed to overcome the challenge of learning from imbalanced datasets. Many approaches to solving this challenge have been offered in the literature. Oversampling, on the other hand, is a concern. That is, models trained on fictitious data may fail spectacularly when put to real-world problems. The fundamental difficulty with oversampling approaches is that, given a real-life population, the synthesized samples may not truly belong to the minority class. As a result, training a classifier on these samples while pretending they represent minority may result in incorrect predictions when the model is used in the real world. We analyzed a large number of oversampling methods in this paper and devised a new oversampling evaluation system based on hiding a number of majority examples and comparing them to those generated by the oversampling process. Based on our evaluation system, we ranked all these methods based on their incorrectly generated examples for comparison. Our experiments using more than 70 oversampling methods and three imbalanced real-world datasets reveal that all oversampling methods studied generate minority samples that are most likely to be majority. Given data and methods in hand, we argue that oversampling in its current forms and methodologies is unreliable for learning from class imbalanced data and should be avoided in real-world applications.
summary: For the last two decades, oversampling has been employed to overcome the challenge of learning from imbalanced datasets. Many approaches to solving this challenge have been offered in the literature. Oversampling, on the other hand, is a concern. That is, models trained on fictitious data may fail spectacularly when put to real-world problems. The fundamental difficulty with oversampling approaches is that, given a real-life population, the synthesized samples may not truly belong to the minority class. As a result, training a classifier on these samples while pretending they represent minority may result in incorrect predictions when the model is used in the real world. We analyzed a large number of oversampling methods in this paper and devised a new oversampling evaluation system based on hiding a number of majority examples and comparing them to those generated by the oversampling process. Based on our evaluation system, we ranked all these methods based on their incorrectly generated examples for comparison. Our experiments using more than 70 oversampling methods and three imbalanced real-world datasets reveal that all oversampling methods studied generate minority samples that are most likely to be majority. Given data and methods in hand, we argue that oversampling in its current forms and methodologies is unreliable for learning from class imbalanced data and should be avoided in real-world applications.
abstract_zh: 在过去的二十年中，过采样已被用来克服从不平衡数据集学习的挑战。文献中已经提供了许多解决这一挑战的方法。另一方面，过采样是一个问题。也就是说，用虚构数据训练的模型在解决现实问题时可能会严重失败。过采样方法的根本困难在于，考虑到现实生活中的人群，合成的样本可能并不真正属于少数群体。因此，当模型在现实世界中使用时，在这些样本上训练分类器，同时假装它们代表少数，可能会导致错误的预测。本文分析了大量的过采样方法，并设计了一种新的过采样评估系统，该系统基于隐藏大量多数样本并将它们与过采样过程生成的样本进行比较。根据我们的评估系统，我们根据错误生成的示例对所有这些方法进行了排名，以进行比较。我们使用 70 多种过采样方法和三个不平衡的现实数据集进行的实验表明，研究的所有过采样方法都会生成最有可能成为多数的少数样本。考虑到现有的数据和方法，我们认为当前形式和方法的过采样对于从类别不平衡数据中学习来说是不可靠的，在实际应用中应该避免。

AI.tldr: 本文批判性回顾了过采样方法在处理类别不平衡数据中的应用，提出其在实际应用中可能不可靠。
AI.motivation: 过采样生成的合成样本可能不真实，导致模型在实际应用中表现不佳，需重新评估其有效性。
AI.method: 设计新的评估系统，通过隐藏多数样本并与过采样生成样本对比，量化错误生成的样本数量。
AI.result: 实验显示所有过采样方法生成的少数样本多数属于多数类，表明其可靠性不足。
AI.conclusion: 当前过采样方法在类别不平衡学习中不可靠，应避免在实际应用中使用。

title: Data driven design of optical resonators
title_zh: 光学谐振器的数据驱动设计
comment: 85 pages, 68 figures, Master thesis in Physics and Astronomy
comments: 85 pages, 68 figures, Master thesis in Physics and Astronomy
abstract: Optical devices lie at the heart of most of the technology we see around us. When one actually wants to make such an optical device, one can predict its optical behavior using computational simulations of Maxwell's equations. If one then asks what the optimal design would be in order to obtain a certain optical behavior, the only way to go further would be to try out all of the possible designs and compute the electromagnetic spectrum they produce. When there are many design parameters, this brute force approach quickly becomes too computationally expensive. We therefore need other methods to create optimal optical devices. An alternative to the brute force approach is inverse design. In this paradigm, one starts from the desired optical response of a material and then determines the design parameters that are needed to obtain this optical response. There are many algorithms known in the literature that implement this inverse design. Some of the best performing, recent approaches are based on Deep Learning. The central idea is to train a neural network to predict the optical response for given design parameters. Since neural networks are completely differentiable, we can compute gradients of the response with respect to the design parameters. We can use these gradients to update the design parameters and get an optical response closer to the one we want. This allows us to obtain an optimal design much faster compared to the brute force approach. In my thesis, I use Deep Learning for the inverse design of the Fabry-Pérot resonator. This system can be described fully analytically and is therefore ideal to study.

There are many algorithms known in the literature that implement this inverse design. Some of the best performing, recent approaches are based on Deep Learning. The central idea is to train a neural network to predict the optical response for given design parameters. Since neural networks are completely differentiable, we can compute gradients of the response with respect to the design parameters. We can use these gradients to update the design parameters and get an optical response closer to the one we want. This allows us to obtain an optimal design much faster compared to the brute force approach. In my thesis, I use Deep Learning for the inverse design of the Fabry-Pérot resonator. This system can be described fully analytically and is therefore ideal to study.
abstract_zh: 光学器件是我们周围大多数技术的核心。当人们真正想要制造这样一种光学设备时，可以使用麦克斯韦方程组的计算模拟来预测其光学行为。如果有人问为了获得某种光学行为，最佳设计是什么，那么进一步的唯一方法就是尝试所有可能的设计并计算它们产生的电磁频谱。当设计参数很多时，这种强力方法很快就会变得计算成本过高。因此，我们需要其他方法来制造最佳的光学器件。蛮力方法的替代方法是逆向设计。在此范例中，人们从材料的所需光学响应开始，然后确定获得该光学响应所需的设计参数。文献中有许多已知的算法可以实现这种逆向设计。最近一些表现最好的方法是基于深度学习的。中心思想是训练神经网络来预测给定设计参数的光学响应。由于神经网络是完全可微的，我们可以计算响应相对于设计参数的梯度。我们可以使用这些梯度来更新设计参数并获得更接近我们想要的光学响应。与蛮力方法相比，这使我们能够更快地获得最佳设计。在我的论文中，我使用深度学习进行法布里-珀罗谐振器的逆向设计。该系统可以完全分析地描述，因此非常适合研究。

AI.method: 基于深度学习的逆向设计方法，通过训练神经网络预测光学响应并优化参数
AI.result: 成功实现法布里-珀罗谐振器的高效优化设计，显著提升设计效率
AI.conclusion: 深度学习为光学器件逆向设计提供高效可行的解决方案
