search_text: Data driven design of optical resonators 光学谐振器的数据驱动设计 Optical devices lie at the heart of most of the technology we see around us. When one actually wants to make such an optical device, one can predict its optical behavior using computational simulations of Maxwell's equations. If one then asks what the optimal design would be in order to obtain a certain optical behavior, the only way to go further would be to try out all of the possible designs and compute the electromagnetic spectrum they produce. When there are many design parameters, this brute force approach quickly becomes too computationally expensive. We therefore need other methods to create optimal optical devices. An alternative to the brute force approach is inverse design. In this paradigm, one starts from the desired optical response of a material and then determines the design parameters that are needed to obtain this optical response. There are many algorithms known in the literature that implement this inverse design. Some of the best performing, recent approaches are based on Deep Learning. The central idea is to train a neural network to predict the optical response for given design parameters. Since neural networks are completely differentiable, we can compute gradients of the response with respect to the design parameters. We can use these gradients to update the design parameters and get an optical response closer to the one we want. This allows us to obtain an optimal design much faster compared to the brute force approach. In my thesis, I use Deep Learning for the inverse design of the Fabry-Pérot resonator. This system can be described fully analytically and is therefore ideal to study. 光学器件是我们周围大多数技术的核心。当人们真正想要制造这样一种光学设备时，可以使用麦克斯韦方程组的计算模拟来预测其光学行为。如果有人问为了获得某种光学行为，最佳设计是什么，那么进一步的唯一方法就是尝试所有可能的设计并计算它们产生的电磁频谱。当设计参数很多时，这种强力方法很快就会变得计算成本过高。因此，我们需要其他方法来制造最佳的光学器件。蛮力方法的替代方法是逆向设计。在此范例中，人们从材料的所需光学响应开始，然后确定获得该光学响应所需的设计参数。文献中有许多已知的算法可以实现这种逆向设计。最近一些表现最好的方法是基于深度学习的。中心思想是训练神经网络来预测给定设计参数的光学响应。由于神经网络是完全可微的，我们可以计算响应相对于设计参数的梯度。我们可以使用这些梯度来更新设计参数并获得更接近我们想要的光学响应。与蛮力方法相比，这使我们能够更快地获得最佳设计。在我的论文中，我使用深度学习进行法布里-珀罗谐振器的逆向设计。该系统可以完全分析地描述，因此非常适合研究。 利用深度学习进行光学谐振器的逆向设计优化 Joeri Lenaerts,Hannah Pinson,Vincent Ginis cs.LG,cs.AI

title: Learnability Lock: Authorized Learnability Control Through Adversarial Invertible Transformations
title_zh: 学习性锁定：通过对抗性可逆变换进行授权的学习性控制
abstract: Owing much to the revolution of information technology, the recent progress of deep learning benefits incredibly from the vastly enhanced access to data available in various digital formats. However, in certain scenarios, people may not want their data being used for training commercial models and thus studied how to attack the learnability of deep learning models. Previous works on learnability attack only consider the goal of preventing unauthorized exploitation on the specific dataset but not the process of restoring the learnability for authorized cases. To tackle this issue, this paper introduces and investigates a new concept called "learnability lock" for controlling the model's learnability on a specific dataset with a special key. In particular, we propose adversarial invertible transformation, that can be viewed as a mapping from image to image, to slightly modify data samples so that they become "unlearnable" by machine learning models with negligible loss of visual features. Meanwhile, one can unlock the learnability of the dataset and train models normally using the corresponding key. The proposed learnability lock leverages class-wise perturbation that applies a universal transformation function on data samples of the same label. This ensures that the learnability can be easily restored with a simple inverse transformation while remaining difficult to be detected or reverse-engineered. We empirically demonstrate the success and practicability of our method on visual classification tasks.
summary: Owing much to the revolution of information technology, the recent progress of deep learning benefits incredibly from the vastly enhanced access to data available in various digital formats. However, in certain scenarios, people may not want their data being used for training commercial models and thus studied how to attack the learnability of deep learning models. Previous works on learnability attack only consider the goal of preventing unauthorized exploitation on the specific dataset but not the process of restoring the learnability for authorized cases. To tackle this issue, this paper introduces and investigates a new concept called "learnability lock" for controlling the model's learnability on a specific dataset with a special key. In particular, we propose adversarial invertible transformation, that can be viewed as a mapping from image to image, to slightly modify data samples so that they become "unlearnable" by machine learning models with negligible loss of visual features. Meanwhile, one can unlock the learnability of the dataset and train models normally using the corresponding key. The proposed learnability lock leverages class-wise perturbation that applies a universal transformation function on data samples of the same label. This ensures that the learnability can be easily restored with a simple inverse transformation while remaining difficult to be detected or reverse-engineered. We empirically demonstrate the success and practicability of our method on visual classification tasks.
abstract_zh: 很大程度上得益于信息技术的革命，深度学习的最新进展极大地受益于对各种数字格式的数据访问的极大增强。然而，在某些场景下，人们可能不希望自己的数据被用于训练商业模型，从而研究如何攻击深度学习模型的可学习性。以前的可学习性攻击工作只考虑了防止对特定数据集进行未经授权的利用的目标，而没有考虑恢复授权案例的可学习性的过程。为了解决这个问题，本文引入并研究了一种称为“学习性锁”的新概念，用于使用特殊密钥控制模型在特定数据集上的可学习性。特别是，我们提出了对抗性可逆变换，它可以被视为从图像到图像的映射，稍微修改数据样本，使它们变得“无法被机器学习模型学习”，而视觉特征的损失可以忽略不计。同时，人们可以解锁数据集的可学习性，并使用相应的密钥正常训练模型。所提出的可学习性锁利用了类扰动，对相同标签的数据样本应用通用变换函数。这确保了可以通过简单的逆变换轻松恢复可学习性，同时保持难以检测或逆向工程。我们凭经验证明了我们的方法在视觉分类任务上的成功和实用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为'可学习性锁'的新概念，通过对抗可逆变换控制深度学习模型对特定数据集的可学习性，仅授权用户可恢复学习能力。
AI.motivation: 现有可学习性攻击研究仅关注阻止未授权数据利用，未解决授权场景下学习能力恢复问题，需设计可控制的数据访问机制。
AI.method: 设计对抗可逆变换对数据样本进行微小修改，使其对模型不可学习，同时通过类别级扰动和通用变换函数实现授权用户使用逆变换恢复学习能力。
AI.result: 在视觉分类任务中验证方法有效性，数据修改后模型无法学习但授权用户可恢复，且变换难以被检测或逆向工程。
AI.conclusion: 提出的可学习性锁机制实现了数据访问的可控性，为保护数据隐私与授权使用提供了新思路，相比传统方法更具实用性。

authors_text: Paul Swoboda,Bjoern Andres,Andrea Hornakova,Florian Bernard,Jannik Irmai,Paul Roetzer,Bogdan Savchynskyy,David Stein,Ahmed Abbas
title: Structured Prediction Problem Archive
title_zh: 结构化预测问题档案
comment: Added multicast instances from Andres group
comments: Added multicast instances from Andres group
abstract: Structured prediction problems are one of the fundamental tools in machine learning. In order to facilitate algorithm development for their numerical solution, we collect in one place a large number of datasets in easy to read formats for a diverse set of problem classes. We provide archival links to datasets, description of the considered problems and problem formats, and a short summary of problem characteristics including size, number of instances etc. For reference we also give a non-exhaustive selection of algorithms proposed in the literature for their solution. We hope that this central repository will make benchmarking and comparison to established works easier. We welcome submission of interesting new datasets and algorithms for inclusion in our archive.
summary: Structured prediction problems are one of the fundamental tools in machine learning. In order to facilitate algorithm development for their numerical solution, we collect in one place a large number of datasets in easy to read formats for a diverse set of problem classes. We provide archival links to datasets, description of the considered problems and problem formats, and a short summary of problem characteristics including size, number of instances etc. For reference we also give a non-exhaustive selection of algorithms proposed in the literature for their solution. We hope that this central repository will make benchmarking and comparison to established works easier. We welcome submission of interesting new datasets and algorithms for inclusion in our archive.
abstract_zh: 结构化预测问题是机器学习的基本工具之一。为了促进数值解决方案的算法开发，我们在一个地方收集了大量易于阅读的数据集，适用于不同的问题类别。我们提供数据集的档案链接、所考虑的问题和问题格式的描述，以及问题特征的简短摘要，包括大小、实例数量等。作为参考，我们还提供了文献中提出的算法的非详尽选择以供其解决方案。我们希望这个中央存储库将使基准测试和与已建立的作品的比较变得更加容易。我们欢迎提交有趣的新数据集和算法以纳入我们的档案中。

AI.tldr: 本文的主要任务是构建一个结构化预测问题的数据集存档库，以支持算法开发和基准测试。
AI.motivation: 为促进结构化预测问题的算法研发与标准化评估，需建立统一的数据集资源库以简化实验对比流程。
AI.method: 通过收集多类问题数据集并整理为标准化格式，提供数据集链接、问题描述、格式规范及算法文献索引。
AI.result: 创建了包含多种问题类别的数据集资源库，并系统整理了相关算法信息，形成可公开访问的基准测试平台。
AI.conclusion: 该存档库为结构化预测领域提供了统一的实验基准，有助于推动算法创新与性能对比研究。

result: 创建了包含多种问题类别的数据集资源库，并系统整理了相关算法信息，形成可公开访问的基准测试平台。
conclusion: 该存档库为结构化预测领域提供了统一的实验基准，有助于推动算法创新与性能对比研究。
search_text: Structured Prediction Problem Archive 结构化预测问题档案 Structured prediction problems are one of the fundamental tools in machine learning. In order to facilitate algorithm development for their numerical solution, we collect in one place a large number of datasets in easy to read formats for a diverse set of problem classes. We provide archival links to datasets, description of the considered problems and problem formats, and a short summary of problem characteristics including size, number of instances etc. For reference we also give a non-exhaustive selection of algorithms proposed in the literature for their solution. We hope that this central repository will make benchmarking and comparison to established works easier. We welcome submission of interesting new datasets and algorithms for inclusion in our archive. 结构化预测问题是机器学习的基本工具之一。为了促进数值解决方案的算法开发，我们在一个地方收集了大量易于阅读的数据集，适用于不同的问题类别。我们提供数据集的档案链接、所考虑的问题和问题格式的描述，以及问题特征的简短摘要，包括大小、实例数量等。作为参考，我们还提供了文献中提出的算法的非详尽选择以供其解决方案。我们希望这个中央存储库将使基准测试和与已建立的作品的比较变得更加容易。我们欢迎提交有趣的新数据集和算法以纳入我们的档案中。 本文的主要任务是构建一个结构化预测问题的数据集存档库，以支持算法开发和基准测试。 Paul Swoboda,Bjoern Andres,Andrea Hornakova,Florian Bernard,Jannik Irmai,Paul Roetzer,Bogdan Savchynskyy,David Stein,Ahmed Abbas cs.LG,cs.CV

authors_text: Chang Min Hyun,Taigyntuya Bayaraa,Hye Sun Yun,Tae Jun Jang,Hyoung Suk Park,Jin Keun Seo
title: Metal Artifact Reduction with Intra-Oral Scan Data for 3D Low Dose Maxillofacial CBCT Modeling
title_zh: 利用口腔内扫描数据减少金属伪影，进行 3D 低剂量颌面 CBCT 建模
abstract: Low-dose dental cone beam computed tomography (CBCT) has been increasingly used for maxillofacial modeling. However, the presence of metallic inserts, such as implants, crowns, and dental filling, causes severe streaking and shading artifacts in a CBCT image and loss of the morphological structures of the teeth, which consequently prevents accurate segmentation of bones. A two-stage metal artifact reduction method is proposed for accurate 3D low-dose maxillofacial CBCT modeling, where a key idea is to utilize explicit tooth shape prior information from intra-oral scan data whose acquisition does not require any extra radiation exposure. In the first stage, an image-to-image deep learning network is employed to mitigate metal-related artifacts. To improve the learning ability, the proposed network is designed to take advantage of the intra-oral scan data as side-inputs and perform multi-task learning of auxiliary tooth segmentation. In the second stage, a 3D maxillofacial model is constructed by segmenting the bones from the dental CBCT image corrected in the first stage. For accurate bone segmentation, weighted thresholding is applied, wherein the weighting region is determined depending on the geometry of the intra-oral scan data. Because acquiring a paired training dataset of metal-artifact-free and metal artifact-affected dental CBCT images is challenging in clinical practice, an automatic method of generating a realistic dataset according to the CBCT physics model is introduced. Numerical simulations and clinical experiments show the feasibility of the proposed method, which takes advantage of tooth surface information from intra-oral scan data in 3D low dose maxillofacial CBCT modeling.
summary: Low-dose dental cone beam computed tomography (CBCT) has been increasingly used for maxillofacial modeling. However, the presence of metallic inserts, such as implants, crowns, and dental filling, causes severe streaking and shading artifacts in a CBCT image and loss of the morphological structures of the teeth, which consequently prevents accurate segmentation of bones. A two-stage metal artifact reduction method is proposed for accurate 3D low-dose maxillofacial CBCT modeling, where a key idea is to utilize explicit tooth shape prior information from intra-oral scan data whose acquisition does not require any extra radiation exposure. In the first stage, an image-to-image deep learning network is employed to mitigate metal-related artifacts. To improve the learning ability, the proposed network is designed to take advantage of the intra-oral scan data as side-inputs and perform multi-task learning of auxiliary tooth segmentation. In the second stage, a 3D maxillofacial model is constructed by segmenting the bones from the dental CBCT image corrected in the first stage. For accurate bone segmentation, weighted thresholding is applied, wherein the weighting region is determined depending on the geometry of the intra-oral scan data. Because acquiring a paired training dataset of metal-artifact-free and metal artifact-affected dental CBCT images is challenging in clinical practice, an automatic method of generating a realistic dataset according to the CBCT physics model is introduced. Numerical simulations and clinical experiments show the feasibility of the proposed method, which takes advantage of tooth surface information from intra-oral scan data in 3D low dose maxillofacial CBCT modeling.
abstract_zh: 低剂量牙科锥形束计算机断层扫描 (CBCT) 已越来越多地用于颌面建模。然而，金属插入物（例如种植体、牙冠和牙齿填充物）的存在会导致 CBCT 图像中出现严重的条纹和阴影伪影，并导致牙齿形态结构的丢失，从而妨碍骨骼的准确分割。提出了一种两阶段金属伪影减少方法，用于精确的 3D 低剂量颌面 CBCT 建模，其关键思想是利用口腔内扫描数据中的显式牙齿形状先验信息，其采集不需要任何额外的辐射暴露。在第一阶段，采用图像到图像深度学习网络来减轻与金属相关的伪影。为了提高学习能力，所提出的网络被设计为利用口腔内扫描数据作为侧输入并执行辅助牙齿分割的多任务学习。在第二阶段，通过从第一阶段校正的牙科 CBCT 图像中分割骨骼来构建 3D 颌面模型。为了准确的骨分割，应用加权阈值处理，其中加权区域根据口腔内扫描数据的几何形状来确定。由于获取无金属伪影和受金属伪影影响的牙科 CBCT 图像的配对训练数据集在临床实践中具有挑战性，因此引入了一种根据 CBCT 物理模型自动生成真实数据集的方法。数值模拟和临床实验表明了该方法的可行性，该方法利用口腔内扫描数据的牙齿表面信息进行3D低剂量颌面CBCT建模。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种利用牙内扫描数据的两阶段金属伪影减少方法，用于低剂量颌面部CBCT建模。
AI.motivation: 低剂量牙科CBCT因金属植入物（如种植体、牙冠）导致严重伪影，影响骨骼分割准确性，需减少辐射暴露的同时提升图像质量。
AI.method: 两阶段方法：第一阶段采用图像到图像的深度学习网络，结合牙内扫描数据作为侧输入进行多任务学习；第二阶段基于修正后的CBCT图像和牙内扫描几何信息进行加权阈值分割，并引入物理模型生成训练数据。
AI.result: 数值模拟和临床实验验证了该方法在降低金属伪影和提升骨骼分割准确性方面的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 利用牙内扫描数据的先验信息可有效减少低剂量CBCT金属伪影，为精准颌面部建模提供新思路。

title: Phase-Stretch Adaptive Gradient-Field Extractor (PAGE)
title_zh: 相拉伸自适应梯度场提取器 (PAGE)
abstract: Phase-Stretch Adaptive Gradient-Field Extractor (PAGE) is an edge detection algorithm that is inspired by physics of electromagnetic diffraction and dispersion. A computational imaging algorithm, it identifies edges, their orientations and sharpness in a digital image where the image brightness changes abruptly. Edge detection is a basic operation performed by the eye and is crucial to visual perception. PAGE embeds an original image into a set of feature maps that can be used for object representation and classification. The algorithm performs exceptionally well as an edge and texture extractor in low light level and low contrast images. This manuscript is prepared to support the open-source code which is being simultaneously made available within the GitHub repository https://github.com/JalaliLabUCLA/Phase-Stretch-Adaptive-Gradient-field-Extractor/.
summary: Phase-Stretch Adaptive Gradient-Field Extractor (PAGE) is an edge detection algorithm that is inspired by physics of electromagnetic diffraction and dispersion. A computational imaging algorithm, it identifies edges, their orientations and sharpness in a digital image where the image brightness changes abruptly. Edge detection is a basic operation performed by the eye and is crucial to visual perception. PAGE embeds an original image into a set of feature maps that can be used for object representation and classification. The algorithm performs exceptionally well as an edge and texture extractor in low light level and low contrast images. This manuscript is prepared to support the open-source code which is being simultaneously made available within the GitHub repository https://github.com/JalaliLabUCLA/Phase-Stretch-Adaptive-Gradient-field-Extractor/.
abstract_zh: 相拉伸自适应梯度场提取器 (PAGE) 是一种受电磁衍射和色散物理学启发的边缘检测算法。一种计算成像算法，它可以识别数字图像中图像亮度突然变化的边缘、方向和清晰度。边缘检测是眼睛执行的基本操作，对于视觉感知至关重要。 PAGE 将原始图像嵌入到一组可用于对象表示和分类的特征图中。该算法作为边缘和纹理提取器在低光照和低对比度图像中表现出色。本手稿准备支持开源代码，该代码同时在 GitHub 存储库 https://github.com/JalaliLabUCLA/Phase-Stretch-Adaptive-Gradient-field-Extractor/ 中提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为PAGE的边缘检测算法，该算法受电磁衍射和色散物理原理启发，用于在低光和低对比度图像中提取边缘、方向和锐度信息。
AI.motivation: 传统边缘检测方法在低光照和低对比度场景下表现不佳，需开发一种基于物理原理的鲁棒算法以提升图像特征提取能力。
AI.method: 通过计算成像技术，将原始图像嵌入特征图中，利用相位拉伸和自适应梯度场提取机制，模拟电磁波传播特性实现边缘检测。
AI.result: PAGE算法在低光和低对比度图像中表现出卓越的边缘与纹理提取能力，并已开源代码供研究使用。
AI.conclusion: 该算法为复杂光照条件下的图像分析提供了新方法，其物理启发式设计有效提升了边缘检测的鲁棒性。

title: Four Geometry Problems to Introduce Automated Deduction in Secondary Schools
title_zh: 中学引入自动演绎的四道几何题
abstract: The introduction of automated deduction systems in secondary schools face several bottlenecks, the absence of the subject of rigorous mathematical demonstrations in the curricula, the lack of knowledge by the teachers about the subject and the difficulty of tackling the task by automatic means. Despite those difficulties we claim that the subject of automated deduction in geometry can be introduced, by addressing it in particular cases: simple to manipulate by students and teachers and reasonably easy to be dealt by automatic deduction tools. The subject is discussed by addressing four secondary schools geometry problems: their rigorous proofs, visual proofs, numeric proofs, algebraic formal proofs, synthetic formal proofs, or the lack of them. For these problems we discuss a lesson plan to address them with the help of Information and Communications Technology, more specifically, automated deduction tools.
summary: The introduction of automated deduction systems in secondary schools face several bottlenecks, the absence of the subject of rigorous mathematical demonstrations in the curricula, the lack of knowledge by the teachers about the subject and the difficulty of tackling the task by automatic means. Despite those difficulties we claim that the subject of automated deduction in geometry can be introduced, by addressing it in particular cases: simple to manipulate by students and teachers and reasonably easy to be dealt by automatic deduction tools. The subject is discussed by addressing four secondary schools geometry problems: their rigorous proofs, visual proofs, numeric proofs, algebraic formal proofs, synthetic formal proofs, or the lack of them. For these problems we discuss a lesson plan to address them with the help of Information and Communications Technology, more specifically, automated deduction tools.
abstract_zh: 在中学引入自动推演系统面临着几个瓶颈：课程中缺乏严格的数学演示科目、教师缺乏该科目的知识以及通过自动方式完成任务的困难。尽管存在这些困难，我们声称可以通过在特定情况下解决它来引入几何自动演绎的主题：学生和教师易于操作并且相当容易通过自动演绎工具处理。通过解决四个中学几何问题来讨论该主题：严格证明、视觉证明、数字证明、代数形式证明、综合形式证明或缺乏它们。对于这些问题，我们讨论了一个课程计划，以借助信息和通信技术（更具体地说，自动演绎工具）来解决这些问题。

AI.tldr: 本文通过四个几何问题探讨如何在中学教育中引入自动推理系统，克服课程和教学中的障碍。
AI.motivation: 当前中学课程缺乏严格数学证明内容，教师知识不足且自动推理工具应用困难，但作者认为通过简化案例可实现突破。
AI.method: 分析四个几何问题的多种证明方式（严谨证明、视觉证明等），并设计结合ICT工具的教学方案。
AI.result: 展示了可行的教学案例和自动推理工具的应用方法，证明在中学阶段引入该主题具有实践可能性。
AI.conclusion: 尽管存在挑战，但通过针对性案例和教学设计，自动推理系统可有效融入中学几何教学。

authors_text: Juan Eugenio Iglesias,Riana Schleicher,Sonia Laguna,Benjamin Billot,Pamela Schaefer,Brenna McKaig,Joshua N. Goldstein,Kevin N. Sheth,Matthew S. Rosen,W. Taylor Kimberly
title: Accurate super-resolution low-field brain MRI
title_zh: 精确的超分辨率低场脑部 MRI
abstract: The recent introduction of portable, low-field MRI (LF-MRI) into the clinical setting has the potential to transform neuroimaging. However, LF-MRI is limited by lower resolution and signal-to-noise ratio, leading to incomplete characterization of brain regions. To address this challenge, recent advances in machine learning facilitate the synthesis of higher resolution images derived from one or multiple lower resolution scans. Here, we report the extension of a machine learning super-resolution (SR) algorithm to synthesize 1 mm isotropic MPRAGE-like scans from LF-MRI T1-weighted and T2-weighted sequences. Our initial results on a paired dataset of LF and high-field (HF, 1.5T-3T) clinical scans show that: (i) application of available automated segmentation tools directly to LF-MRI images falters; but (ii) segmentation tools succeed when applied to SR images with high correlation to gold standard measurements from HF-MRI (e.g., r = 0.85 for hippocampal volume, r = 0.84 for the thalamus, r = 0.92 for the whole cerebrum). This work demonstrates proof-of-principle post-processing image enhancement from lower resolution LF-MRI sequences. These results lay the foundation for future work to enhance the detection of normal and abnormal image findings at LF and ultimately improve the diagnostic performance of LF-MRI. Our tools are publicly available on FreeSurfer (surfer.nmr.mgh.harvard.edu/).
summary: The recent introduction of portable, low-field MRI (LF-MRI) into the clinical setting has the potential to transform neuroimaging. However, LF-MRI is limited by lower resolution and signal-to-noise ratio, leading to incomplete characterization of brain regions. To address this challenge, recent advances in machine learning facilitate the synthesis of higher resolution images derived from one or multiple lower resolution scans. Here, we report the extension of a machine learning super-resolution (SR) algorithm to synthesize 1 mm isotropic MPRAGE-like scans from LF-MRI T1-weighted and T2-weighted sequences. Our initial results on a paired dataset of LF and high-field (HF, 1.5T-3T) clinical scans show that: (i) application of available automated segmentation tools directly to LF-MRI images falters; but (ii) segmentation tools succeed when applied to SR images with high correlation to gold standard measurements from HF-MRI (e.g., r = 0.85 for hippocampal volume, r = 0.84 for the thalamus, r = 0.92 for the whole cerebrum). This work demonstrates proof-of-principle post-processing image enhancement from lower resolution LF-MRI sequences. These results lay the foundation for future work to enhance the detection of normal and abnormal image findings at LF and ultimately improve the diagnostic performance of LF-MRI. Our tools are publicly available on FreeSurfer (surfer.nmr.mgh.harvard.edu/).
abstract_zh: 最近将便携式低场 MRI (LF-MRI) 引入临床环境有可能改变神经影像学。然而，LF-MRI 受到分辨率和信噪比较低的限制，导致大脑区域的表征不完整。为了应对这一挑战，机器学习的最新进展促进了从一个或多个较低分辨率扫描中合成更高分辨率的图像。在这里，我们报告了机器学习超分辨率（SR）算法的扩展，用于从 LF-MRI T1 加权和 T2 加权序列合成 1 mm 各向同性 MPRAGE 样扫描。我们对 LF 和高场（HF、1.5T-3T）临床扫描配对数据集的初步结果表明：（i）将可用的自动分割工具直接应用于 LF-MRI 图像会出现问题；但 (ii) 当应用于与 HF-MRI 黄金标准测量高度相关的 SR 图像时，分割工具会成功（例如，海马体积 r = 0.85，丘脑 r = 0.84，整个大脑 r = 0.92）。这项工作演示了低分辨率 LF-MRI 序列的后处理图像增强的原理验证。这些结果为未来加强 LF 正常和异常图像发现的检测并最终提高 LF-MRI 的诊断性能奠定了基础。我们的工具可在 FreeSurfer (surfer.nmr.mgh.harvard.edu/) 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本研究提出一种基于机器学习的超分辨率算法，用于提升低场强脑MRI图像的分辨率，使其接近高场强MRI的图像质量，从而改善脑区分割的准确性。
AI.motivation: 低场强MRI（LF-MRI）因便携性优势被引入临床，但其分辨率与信噪比不足，导致脑区分割工具效果不佳，限制了其应用。
AI.method: 扩展机器学习超分辨率（SR）算法，利用LF-MRI的T1加权和T2加权序列合成1mm各向同性MPRAGE样图像，并在配对的LF与高场强（HF）临床扫描数据集上验证。
AI.result: 超分辨率图像显著提升分割工具性能，与HF-MRI金标准的海马体体积、丘脑及全脑体积相关系数分别达0.85、0.84和0.92。
AI.conclusion: 该方法验证了低场MRI后处理增强的可行性，为提升LF-MRI在正常与异常图像检测中的诊断性能奠定基础，相关工具已开源。

title: Aladdin: Joint Atlas Building and Diffeomorphic Registration Learning with Pairwise Alignment
title_zh: 阿拉丁：联合图集构建和微分同构配准学习与成对对齐
abstract: Atlas building and image registration are important tasks for medical image analysis. Once one or multiple atlases from an image population have been constructed, commonly (1) images are warped into an atlas space to study intra-subject or inter-subject variations or (2) a possibly probabilistic atlas is warped into image space to assign anatomical labels. Atlas estimation and nonparametric transformations are computationally expensive as they usually require numerical optimization. Additionally, previous approaches for atlas building often define similarity measures between a fuzzy atlas and each individual image, which may cause alignment difficulties because a fuzzy atlas does not exhibit clear anatomical structures in contrast to the individual images. This work explores using a convolutional neural network (CNN) to jointly predict the atlas and a stationary velocity field (SVF) parameterization for diffeomorphic image registration with respect to the atlas. Our approach does not require affine pre-registrations and utilizes pairwise image alignment losses to increase registration accuracy. We evaluate our model on 3D knee magnetic resonance images (MRI) from the OAI-ZIB dataset. Our results show that the proposed framework achieves better performance than other state-of-the-art image registration algorithms, allows for end-to-end training, and for fast inference at test time.
summary: Atlas building and image registration are important tasks for medical image analysis. Once one or multiple atlases from an image population have been constructed, commonly (1) images are warped into an atlas space to study intra-subject or inter-subject variations or (2) a possibly probabilistic atlas is warped into image space to assign anatomical labels. Atlas estimation and nonparametric transformations are computationally expensive as they usually require numerical optimization. Additionally, previous approaches for atlas building often define similarity measures between a fuzzy atlas and each individual image, which may cause alignment difficulties because a fuzzy atlas does not exhibit clear anatomical structures in contrast to the individual images. This work explores using a convolutional neural network (CNN) to jointly predict the atlas and a stationary velocity field (SVF) parameterization for diffeomorphic image registration with respect to the atlas. Our approach does not require affine pre-registrations and utilizes pairwise image alignment losses to increase registration accuracy. We evaluate our model on 3D knee magnetic resonance images (MRI) from the OAI-ZIB dataset. Our results show that the proposed framework achieves better performance than other state-of-the-art image registration algorithms, allows for end-to-end training, and for fast inference at test time.
abstract_zh: 图谱构建和图像配准是医学图像分析的重要任务。一旦构建了来自图像群体的一个或多个图集，通常（1）图像被扭曲到图集空间中以研究受试者内或受试者间变化，或者（2）可能的概率图集被扭曲到图像空间中以分配解剖标签。图集估计和非参数变换的计算成本很高，因为它们通常需要数值优化。此外，以前的图集构建方法通常定义模糊图集和每个单独图像之间的相似性度量，这可能会导致对齐困难，因为与单独图像相比，模糊图集没有表现出清晰的解剖结构。这项工作探索使用卷积神经网络（CNN）联合预测图集和静止速度场（SVF）参数化，以针对图集进行微分同胚图像配准。我们的方法不需要仿射预配准，并利用成对图像对齐损失来提高配准精度。我们在 OAI-ZIB 数据集的 3D 膝关节磁共振图像 (MRI) 上评估我们的模型。我们的结果表明，所提出的框架比其他最先进的图像配准算法实现了更好的性能，允许端到端训练，并在测试时进行快速推理。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于卷积神经网络（CNN）的联合图谱构建与微分同胚图像配准学习方法Aladdin，无需预对齐即可直接预测图谱和速度场参数化。
AI.motivation: 传统图谱构建和图像配准方法计算成本高且依赖模糊图谱的相似性度量，导致对齐困难。现有方法需预对齐操作且难以捕捉清晰解剖结构。
AI.method: 设计CNN联合预测图谱和静态速度场（SVF），通过成对图像对齐损失提升配准精度，无需仿射预配准，实现端到端训练。
AI.result: 在OAI-ZIB数据集的3D膝关节MRI实验中，该框架在配准性能上优于现有算法，支持端到端训练和快速推理。
AI.conclusion: Aladdin通过联合学习图谱与配准参数，解决了传统方法的计算复杂度和对齐难题，在医学图像分析中具有应用潜力。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于卷积神经网络（CNN）的联合图谱构建与微分同胚图像配准学习方法Aladdin，无需预对齐即可直接预测图谱和速度场参数化。
ai_content.motivation: 传统图谱构建和图像配准方法计算成本高且依赖模糊图谱的相似性度量，导致对齐困难。现有方法需预对齐操作且难以捕捉清晰解剖结构。
ai_content.method: 设计CNN联合预测图谱和静态速度场（SVF），通过成对图像对齐损失提升配准精度，无需仿射预配准，实现端到端训练。
ai_content.result: 在OAI-ZIB数据集的3D膝关节MRI实验中，该框架在配准性能上优于现有算法，支持端到端训练和快速推理。
ai_content.conclusion: Aladdin通过联合学习图谱与配准参数，解决了传统方法的计算复杂度和对齐难题，在医学图像分析中具有应用潜力。

search_text: Aladdin: Joint Atlas Building and Diffeomorphic Registration Learning with Pairwise Alignment 阿拉丁：联合图集构建和微分同构配准学习与成对对齐 Atlas building and image registration are important tasks for medical image analysis. Once one or multiple atlases from an image population have been constructed, commonly (1) images are warped into an atlas space to study intra-subject or inter-subject variations or (2) a possibly probabilistic atlas is warped into image space to assign anatomical labels. Atlas estimation and nonparametric transformations are computationally expensive as they usually require numerical optimization. Additionally, previous approaches for atlas building often define similarity measures between a fuzzy atlas and each individual image, which may cause alignment difficulties because a fuzzy atlas does not exhibit clear anatomical structures in contrast to the individual images. This work explores using a convolutional neural network (CNN) to jointly predict the atlas and a stationary velocity field (SVF) parameterization for diffeomorphic image registration with respect to the atlas. Our approach does not require affine pre-registrations and utilizes pairwise image alignment losses to increase registration accuracy. We evaluate our model on 3D knee magnetic resonance images (MRI) from the OAI-ZIB dataset. Our results show that the proposed framework achieves better performance than other state-of-the-art image registration algorithms, allows for end-to-end training, and for fast inference at test time. 图谱构建和图像配准是医学图像分析的重要任务。一旦构建了来自图像群体的一个或多个图集，通常（1）图像被扭曲到图集空间中以研究受试者内或受试者间变化，或者（2）可能的概率图集被扭曲到图像空间中以分配解剖标签。图集估计和非参数变换的计算成本很高，因为它们通常需要数值优化。此外，以前的图集构建方法通常定义模糊图集和每个单独图像之间的相似性度量，这可能会导致对齐困难，因为与单独图像相比，模糊图集没有表现出清晰的解剖结构。这项工作探索使用卷积神经网络（CNN）联合预测图集和静止速度场（SVF）参数化，以针对图集进行微分同胚图像配准。我们的方法不需要仿射预配准，并利用成对图像对齐损失来提高配准精度。我们在 OAI-ZIB 数据集的 3D 膝关节磁共振图像 (MRI) 上评估我们的模型。我们的结果表明，所提出的框架比其他最先进的图像配准算法实现了更好的性能，允许端到端训练，并在测试时进行快速推理。 本文提出了一种基于卷积神经网络（CNN）的联合图谱构建与微分同胚图像配准学习方法Aladdin，无需预对齐即可直接预测图谱和速度场参数化。 Zhipeng Ding,Marc Niethammer eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Nhan H. Pham,Lam M. Nguyen,Jie Chen,Hoang Thanh Lam,Subhro Das,Tsui-Wei Weng
title: Attacking c-MARL More Effectively: A Data Driven Approach
title_zh: 更有效地攻击 c-MARL：数据驱动方法
abstract: In recent years, a proliferation of methods were developed for cooperative multi-agent reinforcement learning (c-MARL). However, the robustness of c-MARL agents against adversarial attacks has been rarely explored. In this paper, we propose to evaluate the robustness of c-MARL agents via a model-based approach, named c-MBA. Our proposed formulation can craft much stronger adversarial state perturbations of c-MARL agents to lower total team rewards than existing model-free approaches. In addition, we propose the first victim-agent selection strategy and the first data-driven approach to define targeted failure states where each of them allows us to develop even stronger adversarial attack without the expert knowledge to the underlying environment. Our numerical experiments on two representative MARL benchmarks illustrate the advantage of our approach over other baselines: our model-based attack consistently outperforms other baselines in all tested environments.
summary: In recent years, a proliferation of methods were developed for cooperative multi-agent reinforcement learning (c-MARL). However, the robustness of c-MARL agents against adversarial attacks has been rarely explored. In this paper, we propose to evaluate the robustness of c-MARL agents via a model-based approach, named c-MBA. Our proposed formulation can craft much stronger adversarial state perturbations of c-MARL agents to lower total team rewards than existing model-free approaches. In addition, we propose the first victim-agent selection strategy and the first data-driven approach to define targeted failure states where each of them allows us to develop even stronger adversarial attack without the expert knowledge to the underlying environment. Our numerical experiments on two representative MARL benchmarks illustrate the advantage of our approach over other baselines: our model-based attack consistently outperforms other baselines in all tested environments.
abstract_zh: 近年来，开发了多种协作多智能体强化学习（c-MARL）方法。然而，c-MARL 代理对抗对抗性攻击的鲁棒性却很少被探索。在本文中，我们建议通过基于模型的方法（称为 c-MBA）评估 c-MARL 代理的稳健性。我们提出的公式可以对 c-MARL 代理进行更强的对抗性状态扰动，从而比现有的无模型方法降低团队总奖励。此外，我们提出了第一个受害者代理选择策略和第一个数据驱动方法来定义目标故障状态，其中每一个都允许我们在没有底层环境专业知识的情况下开发更强大的对抗性攻击。我们对两个代表性 MARL 基准进行的数值实验说明了我们的方法相对于其他基线的优势：我们基于模型的攻击在所有测试环境中始终优于其他基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种数据驱动的方法，通过模型基于方法有效攻击协作多智能体强化学习（c-MARL）系统，提升对抗攻击效果。
AI.motivation: 现有c-MARL方法在对抗攻击鲁棒性研究不足，缺乏有效评估其脆弱性的手段，需开发无需专家知识的攻击策略。
AI.method: 提出基于模型的c-MBA方法，结合受害者代理选择策略与数据驱动的目标失败状态定义，生成更强对抗扰动。
AI.result: 在两个MARL基准测试中，模型攻击方法在降低团队奖励方面优于所有基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效提升了c-MARL系统的攻击效率，为后续安全性研究提供了新思路与工具。

title: HeadPosr: End-to-end Trainable Head Pose Estimation using Transformer Encoders
title_zh: HeadPosr：使用 Transformer 编码器进行端到端可训练头部姿势估计
abstract: In this paper, HeadPosr is proposed to predict the head poses using a single RGB image. \textit{HeadPosr} uses a novel architecture which includes a transformer encoder. In concrete, it consists of: (1) backbone; (2) connector; (3) transformer encoder; (4) prediction head. The significance of using a transformer encoder for HPE is studied. An extensive ablation study is performed on varying the (1) number of encoders; (2) number of heads; (3) different position embeddings; (4) different activations; (5) input channel size, in a transformer used in HeadPosr. Further studies on using: (1) different backbones, (2) using different learning rates are also shown. The elaborated experiments and ablations studies are conducted using three different open-source widely used datasets for HPE, i.e., 300W-LP, AFLW2000, and BIWI datasets. Experiments illustrate that \textit{HeadPosr} outperforms all the state-of-art methods including both the landmark-free and the others based on using landmark or depth estimation on the AFLW2000 dataset and BIWI datasets when trained with 300W-LP. It also outperforms when averaging the results from the compared datasets, hence setting a benchmark for the problem of HPE, also demonstrating the effectiveness of using transformers over the state-of-the-art.
summary: In this paper, HeadPosr is proposed to predict the head poses using a single RGB image. \textit{HeadPosr} uses a novel architecture which includes a transformer encoder. In concrete, it consists of: (1) backbone; (2) connector; (3) transformer encoder; (4) prediction head. The significance of using a transformer encoder for HPE is studied. An extensive ablation study is performed on varying the (1) number of encoders; (2) number of heads; (3) different position embeddings; (4) different activations; (5) input channel size, in a transformer used in HeadPosr. Further studies on using: (1) different backbones, (2) using different learning rates are also shown. The elaborated experiments and ablations studies are conducted using three different open-source widely used datasets for HPE, i.e., 300W-LP, AFLW2000, and BIWI datasets. Experiments illustrate that \textit{HeadPosr} outperforms all the state-of-art methods including both the landmark-free and the others based on using landmark or depth estimation on the AFLW2000 dataset and BIWI datasets when trained with 300W-LP. It also outperforms when averaging the results from the compared datasets, hence setting a benchmark for the problem of HPE, also demonstrating the effectiveness of using transformers over the state-of-the-art.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，HeadPosr 被提出使用单个 RGB 图像来预测头部姿势。 \textit{HeadPosr} 使用一种新颖的架构，其中包括变压器编码器。具体包括：（1）骨干网； (2)连接器； (3)变压器编码器； (4)预测头。研究了在 HPE 中使用变压器编码器的重要性。针对改变 (1) 编码器数量进行了广泛的消融研究； (2) 头数； (3)不同位置嵌入； (4)不同的激活方式； (5) 输入通道大小，在 HeadPosr 中使用的变压器中。还显示了有关使用的进一步研究：（1）不同的骨干网，（2）使用不同的学习率。详细的实验和消融研究是使用 HPE 广泛使用的三种不同的开源数据集（即 300W-LP、AFLW2000 和 BIWI 数据集）进行的。实验表明，当使用 300W-LP 进行训练时，\textit{HeadPosr} 优于所有最先进的方法，包括无地标方法和基于在 AFLW2000 数据集和 BIWI 数据集上使用地标或深度估计的其他方法。在对比较数据集的结果进行平均时，它也表现出色，因此为 HPE 问题设定了基准，也证明了使用 Transformer 相对于最先进的技术的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出HeadPosr模型，利用Transformer编码器实现端到端的头部姿态估计。
AI.motivation: 传统头部姿态估计方法依赖手工特征或浅层网络，难以捕捉复杂空间关系，而Transformer在建模长距离依赖方面表现优异。
AI.method: 模型包含四部分：骨干网络、连接层、Transformer编码器和预测头。通过消融实验分析编码器数量、注意力头数、位置嵌入等参数影响，并对比不同骨干网络与学习率设置。
AI.result: 在AFLW2000和BIWI数据集上优于现有方法，且跨数据集平均性能最佳，验证了Transformer在HPE任务中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: Transformer编码器显著提升头部姿态估计性能，HeadPosr为该领域设立了新基准。

It also outperforms when averaging the results from the compared datasets, hence setting a benchmark for the problem of HPE, also demonstrating the effectiveness of using transformers over the state-of-the-art. 在本文中，HeadPosr 被提出使用单个 RGB 图像来预测头部姿势。 \textit{HeadPosr} 使用一种新颖的架构，其中包括变压器编码器。具体包括：（1）骨干网； (2)连接器； (3)变压器编码器； (4)预测头。研究了在 HPE 中使用变压器编码器的重要性。针对改变 (1) 编码器数量进行了广泛的消融研究； (2) 头数； (3)不同位置嵌入； (4)不同的激活方式； (5) 输入通道大小，在 HeadPosr 中使用的变压器中。还显示了有关使用的进一步研究：（1）不同的骨干网，（2）使用不同的学习率。详细的实验和消融研究是使用 HPE 广泛使用的三种不同的开源数据集（即 300W-LP、AFLW2000 和 BIWI 数据集）进行的。实验表明，当使用 300W-LP 进行训练时，\textit{HeadPosr} 优于所有最先进的方法，包括无地标方法和基于在 AFLW2000 数据集和 BIWI 数据集上使用地标或深度估计的其他方法。在对比较数据集的结果进行平均时，它也表现出色，因此为 HPE 问题设定了基准，也证明了使用 Transformer 相对于最先进的技术的有效性。 本文提出HeadPosr模型，利用Transformer编码器实现端到端的头部姿态估计。 Naina Dhingra cs.CV

title: LwPosr: Lightweight Efficient Fine-Grained Head Pose Estimation
title_zh: LwPosr：轻量级高效细粒度头部姿势估计
abstract: This paper presents a lightweight network for head pose estimation (HPE) task. While previous approaches rely on convolutional neural networks, the proposed network \textit{LwPosr} uses mixture of depthwise separable convolutional (DSC) and transformer encoder layers which are structured in two streams and three stages to provide fine-grained regression for predicting head poses. The quantitative and qualitative demonstration is provided to show that the proposed network is able to learn head poses efficiently while using less parameter space. Extensive ablations are conducted using three open-source datasets namely 300W-LP, AFLW2000, and BIWI datasets. To our knowledge, (1) \textit{LwPosr} is the lightest network proposed for estimating head poses compared to both keypoints-based and keypoints-free approaches; (2) it sets a benchmark for both overperforming the previous lightweight network on mean absolute error and on reducing number of parameters; (3) it is first of its kind to use mixture of DSCs and transformer encoders for HPE. This approach is suitable for mobile devices which require lightweight networks.
summary: This paper presents a lightweight network for head pose estimation (HPE) task. While previous approaches rely on convolutional neural networks, the proposed network \textit{LwPosr} uses mixture of depthwise separable convolutional (DSC) and transformer encoder layers which are structured in two streams and three stages to provide fine-grained regression for predicting head poses. The quantitative and qualitative demonstration is provided to show that the proposed network is able to learn head poses efficiently while using less parameter space. Extensive ablations are conducted using three open-source datasets namely 300W-LP, AFLW2000, and BIWI datasets. To our knowledge, (1) \textit{LwPosr} is the lightest network proposed for estimating head poses compared to both keypoints-based and keypoints-free approaches; (2) it sets a benchmark for both overperforming the previous lightweight network on mean absolute error and on reducing number of parameters; (3) it is first of its kind to use mixture of DSCs and transformer encoders for HPE. This approach is suitable for mobile devices which require lightweight networks.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种用于头部姿势估计（HPE）任务的轻量级网络。虽然以前的方法依赖于卷积神经网络，但所提出的网络 \textit{LwPosr} 使用深度可分离卷积（DSC）和变压器编码器层的混合，这些编码器层分为两个流和三个阶段，为预测头部姿势提供细粒度回归。提供的定量和定性演示表明，所提出的网络能够在使用更少的参数空间的情况下有效地学习头部姿势。使用三个开源数据集（即 300W-LP、AFLW2000 和 BIWI 数据集）进行广泛的消融。据我们所知，（1）与基于关键点和无关键点的方法相比，\textit{LwPosr}是用于估计头部姿势的最轻的网络； （2）它为在平均绝对误差和减少参数数量方面超越之前的轻量级网络设定了基准； (3) HPE 首次将 DSC 与变压器编码器混合使用。这种方法适合需要轻量级网络的移动设备。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种轻量级网络LwPosr，用于高效细粒度头部姿态估计。
AI.motivation: 现有头部姿态估计方法依赖卷积神经网络，参数量大且效率低，难以满足移动端轻量化需求。
AI.method: 融合深度可分离卷积（DSC）与Transformer编码器，构建双流三阶段结构实现细粒度姿态回归。
AI.result: 在300W-LP、AFLW2000和BIWI数据集上验证，参数量最少且均方误差优于现有轻量级网络。
AI.conclusion: LwPosr是首个结合DSC与Transformer的轻量级头部姿态估计网络，适用于移动设备部署。

title: Self-Supervised Representation Learning for Speech Using Visual Grounding and Masked Language Modeling
title_zh: 使用视觉基础和掩蔽语言模型进行自我监督的语音表征学习
comment: SAS workshop at AAAI2022, code and model weights available at https://github.com/jasonppy/FaST-VGS-Family
comments: SAS workshop at AAAI2022, code and model weights available at https://github.com/jasonppy/FaST-VGS-Family
abstract: In this paper, we describe our submissions to the ZeroSpeech 2021 Challenge and SUPERB benchmark. Our submissions are based on the recently proposed FaST-VGS model, which is a Transformer-based model that learns to associate raw speech waveforms with semantically related images, all without the use of any transcriptions of the speech. Additionally, we introduce a novel extension of this model, FaST-VGS+, which is learned in a multi-task fashion with a masked language modeling objective in addition to the visual grounding objective. On ZeroSpeech 2021, we show that our models perform competitively on the ABX task, outperform all other concurrent submissions on the Syntactic and Semantic tasks, and nearly match the best system on the Lexical task. On the SUPERB benchmark, we show that our models also achieve strong performance, in some cases even outperforming the popular wav2vec2.0 model.
summary: In this paper, we describe our submissions to the ZeroSpeech 2021 Challenge and SUPERB benchmark. Our submissions are based on the recently proposed FaST-VGS model, which is a Transformer-based model that learns to associate raw speech waveforms with semantically related images, all without the use of any transcriptions of the speech. Additionally, we introduce a novel extension of this model, FaST-VGS+, which is learned in a multi-task fashion with a masked language modeling objective in addition to the visual grounding objective. On ZeroSpeech 2021, we show that our models perform competitively on the ABX task, outperform all other concurrent submissions on the Syntactic and Semantic tasks, and nearly match the best system on the Lexical task. On the SUPERB benchmark, we show that our models also achieve strong performance, in some cases even outperforming the popular wav2vec2.0 model.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们描述了我们向 ZeroSpeech 2021 挑战赛和 SUPERB 基准测试提交的内容。我们提交的内容基于最近提出的 FaST-VGS 模型，该模型是一个基于 Transformer 的模型，可以学习将原始语音波形与语义相关的图像关联起来，所有这些都无需使用任何语音转录。此外，我们还介绍了该模型的新颖扩展 FaST-VGS+，它以多任务方式学习，除了视觉基础目标之外，还具有掩码语言建模目标。在 ZeroSpeech 2021 上，我们表明我们的模型在 ABX 任务上表现出竞争力，在句法和语义任务上优于所有其他并发提交，并且几乎与词汇任务上的最佳系统相匹配。在 SUPERB 基准测试中，我们表明我们的模型也实现了强大的性能，在某些情况下甚至优于流行的 wav2vec2.0 模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于视觉 grounding 和掩码语言建模的自监督语音表征学习方法，并在 ZeroSpeech 2021 和 SUPERB 基准测试中验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 传统语音表征学习依赖转录文本，而本文旨在探索无需转录的自监督方法，通过视觉信息和语言模型增强语义理解。
AI.method: 基于 FaST-VGS 模型（Transformer 架构，关联语音波形与语义图像），并扩展为多任务 FaST-VGS+，新增掩码语言建模目标。
AI.result: 在 ZeroSpeech 2021 的 ABX、句法和语义任务中表现优异，在 SUPERB 基准上部分任务超越 wav2vec2.0。
AI.conclusion: 结合视觉 grounding 与掩码语言建模可提升无转录语音表征能力，验证了跨模态多任务学习的有效性。

authors_text: Aline Sindel,Abner Hernandez,Seung Hee Yang,Vincent Christlein,Andreas Maier
title: SliTraNet: Automatic Detection of Slide Transitions in Lecture Videos using Convolutional Neural Networks
title_zh: SliTraNet：使用卷积神经网络自动检测讲座视频中的幻灯片过渡
comment: 6 pages, 5 figures, 1 table, accepted to OAGM Workshop 2021
comments: 6 pages, 5 figures, 1 table, accepted to OAGM Workshop 2021
abstract: With the increasing number of online learning material in the web, search for specific content in lecture videos can be time consuming. Therefore, automatic slide extraction from the lecture videos can be helpful to give a brief overview of the main content and to support the students in their studies. For this task, we propose a deep learning method to detect slide transitions in lectures videos. We first process each frame of the video by a heuristic-based approach using a 2-D convolutional neural network to predict transition candidates. Then, we increase the complexity by employing two 3-D convolutional neural networks to refine the transition candidates. Evaluation results demonstrate the effectiveness of our method in finding slide transitions.
summary: With the increasing number of online learning material in the web, search for specific content in lecture videos can be time consuming. Therefore, automatic slide extraction from the lecture videos can be helpful to give a brief overview of the main content and to support the students in their studies. For this task, we propose a deep learning method to detect slide transitions in lectures videos. We first process each frame of the video by a heuristic-based approach using a 2-D convolutional neural network to predict transition candidates. Then, we increase the complexity by employing two 3-D convolutional neural networks to refine the transition candidates. Evaluation results demonstrate the effectiveness of our method in finding slide transitions.
abstract_zh: 随着网络中在线学习材料数量的不断增加，在讲座视频中搜索特定内容可能非常耗时。因此，从讲座视频中自动提取幻灯片有助于简要概述主要内容并支持学生的学习。对于此任务，我们提出了一种深度学习方法来检测讲座视频中的幻灯片过渡。我们首先使用二维卷积神经网络通过基于启发式的方法处理视频的每一帧来预测过渡候选者。然后，我们通过使用两个 3-D 卷积神经网络来细化转换候选者来增加复杂性。评估结果证明了我们的方法在寻找幻灯片过渡方面的有效性。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于卷积神经网络的自动检测讲座视频中幻灯片转换的方法。
AI.motivation: 在线学习材料增多导致搜索特定内容耗时，自动提取幻灯片可帮助学生学习。
AI.method: 首先使用基于启发式的2D卷积神经网络预测转换候选，再利用两个3D卷积神经网络优化候选。
AI.result: 评估结果验证了方法在检测幻灯片转换中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效提升了讲座视频中幻灯片转换检测的自动化水平。

search_text: SliTraNet: Automatic Detection of Slide Transitions in Lecture Videos using Convolutional Neural Networks SliTraNet：使用卷积神经网络自动检测讲座视频中的幻灯片过渡 With the increasing number of online learning material in the web, search for specific content in lecture videos can be time consuming. Therefore, automatic slide extraction from the lecture videos can be helpful to give a brief overview of the main content and to support the students in their studies. For this task, we propose a deep learning method to detect slide transitions in lectures videos. We first process each frame of the video by a heuristic-based approach using a 2-D convolutional neural network to predict transition candidates. Then, we increase the complexity by employing two 3-D convolutional neural networks to refine the transition candidates. Evaluation results demonstrate the effectiveness of our method in finding slide transitions. 随着网络中在线学习材料数量的不断增加，在讲座视频中搜索特定内容可能非常耗时。因此，从讲座视频中自动提取幻灯片有助于简要概述主要内容并支持学生的学习。对于此任务，我们提出了一种深度学习方法来检测讲座视频中的幻灯片过渡。我们首先使用二维卷积神经网络通过基于启发式的方法处理视频的每一帧来预测过渡候选者。然后，我们通过使用两个 3-D 卷积神经网络来细化转换候选者来增加复杂性。评估结果证明了我们的方法在寻找幻灯片过渡方面的有效性。 提出一种基于卷积神经网络的自动检测讲座视频中幻灯片转换的方法。 Aline Sindel,Abner Hernandez,Seung Hee Yang,Vincent Christlein,Andreas Maier cs.CV

authors_text: Vishwanath Saragadam,Jasper Tan,Guha Balakrishnan,Richard G. Baraniuk,Ashok Veeraraghavan
title: MINER: Multiscale Implicit Neural Representations
title_zh: MINER：多尺度隐式神经表征
abstract: We introduce a new neural signal model designed for efficient high-resolution representation of large-scale signals. The key innovation in our multiscale implicit neural representation (MINER) is an internal representation via a Laplacian pyramid, which provides a sparse multiscale decomposition of the signal that captures orthogonal parts of the signal across scales. We leverage the advantages of the Laplacian pyramid by representing small disjoint patches of the pyramid at each scale with a small MLP. This enables the capacity of the network to adaptively increase from coarse to fine scales, and only represent parts of the signal with strong signal energy. The parameters of each MLP are optimized from coarse-to-fine scale which results in faster approximations at coarser scales, thereby ultimately an extremely fast training process. We apply MINER to a range of large-scale signal representation tasks, including gigapixel images and very large point clouds, and demonstrate that it requires fewer than 25% of the parameters, 33% of the memory footprint, and 10% of the computation time of competing techniques such as ACORN to reach the same representation accuracy.
summary: We introduce a new neural signal model designed for efficient high-resolution representation of large-scale signals. The key innovation in our multiscale implicit neural representation (MINER) is an internal representation via a Laplacian pyramid, which provides a sparse multiscale decomposition of the signal that captures orthogonal parts of the signal across scales. We leverage the advantages of the Laplacian pyramid by representing small disjoint patches of the pyramid at each scale with a small MLP. This enables the capacity of the network to adaptively increase from coarse to fine scales, and only represent parts of the signal with strong signal energy. The parameters of each MLP are optimized from coarse-to-fine scale which results in faster approximations at coarser scales, thereby ultimately an extremely fast training process. We apply MINER to a range of large-scale signal representation tasks, including gigapixel images and very large point clouds, and demonstrate that it requires fewer than 25% of the parameters, 33% of the memory footprint, and 10% of the computation time of competing techniques such as ACORN to reach the same representation accuracy.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了一种新的神经信号模型，旨在有效地高分辨率表示大规模信号。我们的多尺度隐式神经表示（MINER）的关键创新是通过拉普拉斯金字塔进行内部表示，它提供信号的稀疏多尺度分解，捕获跨尺度信号的正交部分。我们利用拉普拉斯金字塔的优势，用一个小的 MLP 来表示每个尺度上金字塔的不相交的小块。这使得网络的容量能够从粗尺度到细尺度自适应地增加，并且仅表示信号能量较强的部分。每个 MLP 的参数从粗到细进行优化，从而在较粗的尺度上实现更快的近似，从而最终实现极快的训练过程。我们将 MINER 应用于一系列大规模信号表示任务，包括十亿像素图像和非常大的点云，并证明它需要比 ACORN 等竞争技术不到 25% 的参数、33% 的内存占用和 10% 的计算时间来达到相同的表示精度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为MINER的多尺度隐式神经表示模型，用于高效表示大规模高分辨率信号。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理大规模信号时存在参数量大、内存消耗高和计算效率低的问题，需更高效的表示方法。
AI.method: 通过拉普拉斯金字塔实现信号稀疏多尺度分解，结合各尺度的小型MLP网络，采用从粗到细的参数优化策略。
AI.result: 在保持相同表示精度下，MINER参数量仅为ACORN的25%，内存占用33%，计算时间仅需10%。
AI.conclusion: MINER在参数效率、内存占用和计算速度上显著优于现有技术，适用于大规模信号处理任务。

title: Integrated Multiscale Domain Adaptive YOLO
title_zh: 集成多尺度域自适应 YOLO
comment: This paper is a significantly expanded version of our 2021 ICIP paper arXiv:2106.01483 and includes new tools and architectures for improving the original MS-DAYOLO framework
comments: This paper is a significantly expanded version of our 2021 ICIP paper arXiv:2106.01483 and includes new tools and architectures for improving the original MS-DAYOLO framework
abstract: The area of domain adaptation has been instrumental in addressing the domain shift problem encountered by many applications. This problem arises due to the difference between the distributions of source data used for training in comparison with target data used during realistic testing scenarios. In this paper, we introduce a novel MultiScale Domain Adaptive YOLO (MS-DAYOLO) framework that employs multiple domain adaptation paths and corresponding domain classifiers at different scales of the recently introduced YOLOv4 object detector. Building on our baseline multiscale DAYOLO framework, we introduce three novel deep learning architectures for a Domain Adaptation Network (DAN) that generates domain-invariant features. In particular, we propose a Progressive Feature Reduction (PFR), a Unified Classifier (UC), and an Integrated architecture. We train and test our proposed DAN architectures in conjunction with YOLOv4 using popular datasets. Our experiments show significant improvements in object detection performance when training YOLOv4 using the proposed MS-DAYOLO architectures and when tested on target data for autonomous driving applications. Moreover, MS-DAYOLO framework achieves an order of magnitude real-time speed improvement relative to Faster R-CNN solutions while providing comparable object detection performance.
summary: The area of domain adaptation has been instrumental in addressing the domain shift problem encountered by many applications. This problem arises due to the difference between the distributions of source data used for training in comparison with target data used during realistic testing scenarios. In this paper, we introduce a novel MultiScale Domain Adaptive YOLO (MS-DAYOLO) framework that employs multiple domain adaptation paths and corresponding domain classifiers at different scales of the recently introduced YOLOv4 object detector. Building on our baseline multiscale DAYOLO framework, we introduce three novel deep learning architectures for a Domain Adaptation Network (DAN) that generates domain-invariant features. In particular, we propose a Progressive Feature Reduction (PFR), a Unified Classifier (UC), and an Integrated architecture. We train and test our proposed DAN architectures in conjunction with YOLOv4 using popular datasets. Our experiments show significant improvements in object detection performance when training YOLOv4 using the proposed MS-DAYOLO architectures and when tested on target data for autonomous driving applications. Moreover, MS-DAYOLO framework achieves an order of magnitude real-time speed improvement relative to Faster R-CNN solutions while providing comparable object detection performance.
abstract_zh: 域适应领域有助于解决许多应用程序遇到的域转移问题。出现此问题的原因是用于训练的源数据的分布与实际测试场景中使用的目标数据的分布之间存在差异。在本文中，我们介绍了一种新颖的多尺度域自适应 YOLO (MS-DAYOLO) 框架，该框架在最近推出的 YOLOv4 目标检测器的不同尺度上采用多个域自适应路径和相应的域分类器。在我们的基线多尺度 DAYOLO 框架的基础上，我们为域适应网络 (DAN) 引入了三种新颖的深度学习架构，可生成域不变特征。特别是，我们提出了渐进特征缩减（PFR）、统一分类器（UC）和集成架构。我们使用流行的数据集与 YOLOv4 结合训练和测试我们提出的 DAN 架构。我们的实验表明，使用所提出的 MS-DAYOLO 架构训练 YOLOv4 以及在自动驾驶应用的目标数据上进行测试时，目标检测性能显着提高。此外，MS-DAYOLO 框架相对于 Faster R-CNN 解决方案实现了一个数量级的实时速度提升，同时提供了相当的目标检测性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多尺度领域自适应YOLO框架（MS-DAYOLO），通过改进YOLOv4模型解决领域偏移问题，提升目标检测在自动驾驶场景中的性能。
AI.motivation: 现实场景中训练数据与目标数据分布差异导致模型性能下降，传统方法难以兼顾检测精度与实时性，需设计高效领域自适应方案。
AI.method: 构建多尺度领域自适应路径，设计渐进特征减少（PFR）、统一分类器（UC）和集成架构三种领域自适应网络（DAN），与YOLOv4结合实现特征对齐与领域不变特征学习。
AI.result: 在自动驾驶数据集上检测精度显著提升，较Faster R-CNN快10倍且保持相近性能，验证了框架的有效性与实时性优势。
AI.conclusion: MS-DAYOLO通过多尺度领域自适应机制有效缓解领域偏移问题，为自动驾驶等实际应用提供了高精度与实时性的目标检测解决方案。

title: Stakeholder utility measures for declarative processes and their use in process comparisons
title_zh: 声明性流程的利益相关者效用度量及其在流程比较中的使用
abstract: We present a method for calculating and analyzing stakeholder utilities of processes that arise in, but are not limited to, the social sciences. These areas include business process analysis, healthcare workflow analysis and policy process analysis. This method is quite general and applicable to any situation in which declarative-type constraints of a modal and/or temporal nature play a part. A declarative process is a process in which activities may freely happen while respecting a set of constraints. For such a process, anything may happen so long as it is not explicitly forbidden. Declarative processes have been used and studied as models of business and healthcare workflows by several authors. In considering a declarative process as a model of some system it is natural to consider how the process behaves with respect to stakeholders. We derive a measure for stakeholder utility that can be applied in a very general setting. This derivation is achieved by listing a collection a properties which we argue such a stakeholder utility function ought to satisfy, and then using these to show a very specific form must hold for such a utility. The utility measure depends on the set of unique traces of the declarative process, and calculating this set requires a combinatorial analysis of the declarative graph that represents the process. This builds on previous work of the author wherein the combinatorial diversity metrics for declarative processes were derived for use in policy process analysis. The collection of stakeholder utilities can themselves then be used to form a metric with which we can compare different declarative processes to one another. These are illustrated using several examples of declarative processes that already exist in the literature.

These areas include business process analysis, healthcare workflow analysis and policy process analysis. This method is quite general and applicable to any situation in which declarative-type constraints of a modal and/or temporal nature play a part. A declarative process is a process in which activities may freely happen while respecting a set of constraints. For such a process, anything may happen so long as it is not explicitly forbidden. Declarative processes have been used and studied as models of business and healthcare workflows by several authors. abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种计算和分析利益相关者效用的方法，该方法出现在（但不限于）社会科学中。这些领域包括业务流程分析、医疗保健工作流程分析和政策流程分析。该方法非常通用并且适用于模态和/或时间性质的声明类型约束起作用的任何情况。声明性流程是一个活动可以在遵守一组约束的同时自由发生的流程。对于这样的过程，只要没有明确禁止，任何事情都可能发生。声明性流程已被多位作者用作业务和医疗保健工作流程的模型并进行了研究。在将声明性流程视为某些系统的模型时，很自然地要考虑流程相对于利益相关者的行为方式。我们得出了一种可以应用于非常普遍的环境中的利益相关者效用的衡量标准。这种推导是通过列出我们认为这样的利益相关者效用函数应该满足的属性的集合来实现的，然后使用这些属性来显示这样的效用必须保持的非常具体的形式。效用度量取决于声明性过程的唯一跟踪集，并且计算该集需要对表示该过程的声明性图进行组合分析。这是建立在作者之前的工作的基础上的，其中导出了声明性过程的组合多样性度量以用于政策过程分析。然后，利益相关者实用程序的集合本身可以用来形成一种指标，我们可以通过该指标来相互比较不同的声明性流程。这些是使用文献中已经存在的声明性过程的几个例子来说明的。

AI.tldr: 提出一种计算和分析声明式流程中利益相关者效用的方法，并用于不同流程间的比较。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏对声明式流程中利益相关者效用的系统性度量方法，需建立通用模型以支持跨领域流程分析与比较。
AI.method: 基于约束属性推导效用函数形式，结合组合分析计算声明式流程的追踪集，构建比较指标。
AI.result: 成功构建了通用效用度量模型，并通过实例验证其在业务、医疗等场景中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的效用度量方法为声明式流程分析提供了新的比较维度，适用于多领域流程优化。

title: Smoothed Online Optimization with Unreliable Predictions
title_zh: 通过不可靠的预测进行平滑的在线优化
abstract: We examine the problem of smoothed online optimization, where a decision maker must sequentially choose points in a normed vector space to minimize the sum of per-round, non-convex hitting costs and the costs of switching decisions between rounds. The decision maker has access to a black-box oracle, such as a machine learning model, that provides untrusted and potentially inaccurate predictions of the optimal decision in each round. The goal of the decision maker is to exploit the predictions if they are accurate, while guaranteeing performance that is not much worse than the hindsight optimal sequence of decisions, even when predictions are inaccurate. We impose the standard assumption that hitting costs are globally $α$-polyhedral. We propose a novel algorithm, Adaptive Online Switching (AOS), and prove that, for a large set of feasible $δ> 0$, it is $(1+δ)$-competitive if predictions are perfect, while also maintaining a uniformly bounded competitive ratio of $2^{\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(1/(αδ))}$ even when predictions are adversarial. Further, we prove that this trade-off is necessary and nearly optimal in the sense that \emph{any} deterministic algorithm which is $(1+δ)$-competitive if predictions are perfect must be at least $2^{\tildeΩ(1/(αδ))}$-competitive when predictions are inaccurate. In fact, we observe a unique threshold-type behavior in this trade-off: if $δ$ is not in the set of feasible options, then \emph{no} algorithm is simultaneously $(1 + δ)$-competitive if predictions are perfect and $ζ$-competitive when predictions are inaccurate for any $ζ< \infty$. Furthermore, we discuss that memory is crucial in AOS by proving that any algorithm that does not use memory cannot benefit from predictions. We complement our theoretical results by a numerical study on a microgrid application.
summary: We examine the problem of smoothed online optimization, where a decision maker must sequentially choose points in a normed vector space to minimize the sum of per-round, non-convex hitting costs and the costs of switching decisions between rounds. The decision maker has access to a black-box oracle, such as a machine learning model, that provides untrusted and potentially inaccurate predictions of the optimal decision in each round. The goal of the decision maker is to exploit the predictions if they are accurate, while guaranteeing performance that is not much worse than the hindsight optimal sequence of decisions, even when predictions are inaccurate. We impose the standard assumption that hitting costs are globally $α$-polyhedral. We propose a novel algorithm, Adaptive Online Switching (AOS), and prove that, for a large set of feasible $δ> 0$, it is $(1+δ)$-competitive if predictions are perfect, while also maintaining a uniformly bounded competitive ratio of $2^{\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(1/(αδ))}$ even when predictions are adversarial. Further, we prove that this trade-off is necessary and nearly optimal in the sense that \emph{any} deterministic algorithm which is $(1+δ)$-competitive if predictions are perfect must be at least $2^{\tildeΩ(1/(αδ))}$-competitive when predictions are inaccurate. In fact, we observe a unique threshold-type behavior in this trade-off: if $δ$ is not in the set of feasible options, then \emph{no} algorithm is simultaneously $(1 + δ)$-competitive if predictions are perfect and $ζ$-competitive when predictions are inaccurate for any $ζ< \infty$. Furthermore, we discuss that memory is crucial in AOS by proving that any algorithm that does not use memory cannot benefit from predictions. We complement our theoretical results by a numerical study on a microgrid application.
abstract_zh: 我们研究平滑在线优化的问题，其中决策者必须顺序选择规范向量空间中的点，以最小化每轮非凸命中成本和轮次之间切换决策的成本之和。决策者可以访问黑盒预言机，例如机器学习模型，它可以对每轮中的最佳决策提供不受信任且可能不准确的预测。决策者的目标是利用准确的预测，同时保证性能不比事后最优决策序列差很多，即使预测不准确也是如此。我们强加标准假设，击球成本在全球范围内是 $α$ 多面体。我们提出了一种新颖的算法，自适应在线切换（AOS），并证明，对于大量可行的 $δ> 0$，如果预测是完美的，则具有 $(1+δ)$ 竞争性，同时即使预测是对抗性的，也能保持 $2^{\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(1/(αδ))}$ 的均匀有界竞争比。此外，我们证明这种权衡是必要的，并且几乎是最优的，因为如果预测完美，则 \emph{any} 确定性算法具有 $(1+δ)$ 竞争性，而当预测不准确时，该算法必须至少具有 $2^{\tildeΩ(1/(αδ))}$ 竞争性。事实上，我们在这种权衡中观察到一种独特的阈值类型行为：如果 $δ$ 不在可行选项集中，那么 \emph{no} 算法在预测完美的情况下同时具有 $(1 + δ)$ 竞争性，而在任何 $ζ< \infty$ 的预测不准确时则具有 $ζ$ 竞争性。此外，我们通过证明任何不使用内存的算法都无法从预测中受益，讨论了内存在 AOS 中的重要性。我们通过微电网应用的数值研究来补充我们的理论结果。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在不可靠预测下的平滑在线优化问题，提出了一种自适应在线切换算法（AOS），以在预测准确时利用预测并保证预测不准确时的性能。
AI.motivation: 在线优化中，决策者依赖可能不可靠的预测，需在利用预测与保证最差情况性能之间取得平衡，现有方法缺乏对此类问题的有效解决方案。
AI.method: 提出自适应在线切换算法（AOS），结合预测信息与历史记忆，通过理论分析证明其竞争比，并探讨记忆对算法性能的关键作用。
AI.result: 证明AOS在预测完美时为(1+δ)-竞争，预测对抗时具有统一界2^~O(1/(αδ))，且该界接近最优；数值实验验证了算法在微电网应用中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: AOS算法通过记忆机制有效平衡预测利用与性能保障，揭示了预测精度与竞争比之间的阈值特性，为在线优化提供了理论与实践指导。

title: Maximizing Audio Event Detection Model Performance on Small Datasets Through Knowledge Transfer, Data Augmentation, And Pretraining: An Ablation Study
title_zh: 通过知识转移、数据增强和预训练最大限度地提高小数据集上的音频事件检测模型性能：消融研究
abstract: An Xception model reaches state-of-the-art (SOTA) accuracy on the ESC-50 dataset for audio event detection through knowledge transfer from ImageNet weights, pretraining on AudioSet, and an on-the-fly data augmentation pipeline. This paper presents an ablation study that analyzes which components contribute to the boost in performance and training time. A smaller Xception model is also presented which nears SOTA performance with almost a third of the parameters.
summary: An Xception model reaches state-of-the-art (SOTA) accuracy on the ESC-50 dataset for audio event detection through knowledge transfer from ImageNet weights, pretraining on AudioSet, and an on-the-fly data augmentation pipeline. This paper presents an ablation study that analyzes which components contribute to the boost in performance and training time. A smaller Xception model is also presented which nears SOTA performance with almost a third of the parameters.
abstract_zh: Xception 模型通过 ImageNet 权重的知识传输、AudioSet 上的预训练以及动态数据增强管道，在 ESC-50 数据集上达到了最先进的 (SOTA) 精度，用于音频事件检测。本文提出了一项消融研究，分析了哪些成分有助于提高表现和训练时间。还提出了一个较小的 Xception 模型，其性能接近 SOTA，参数减少了近三分之一。

AI.tldr: 本文通过知识迁移、数据增强和预训练方法，在小数据集上提升音频事件检测模型性能，并进行消融实验分析各组件贡献。
AI.motivation: 音频事件检测在小数据集上面临性能瓶颈，需探索有效方法提升模型表现。
AI.method: 采用Xception模型，结合ImageNet知识迁移、AudioSet预训练及实时数据增强，并通过消融实验验证各组件效果，同时设计参数更少的轻量Xception变体。
AI.result: 在ESC-50数据集上达到SOTA准确率，消融实验确认各技术的有效性，轻量模型参数减少近三分之一仍接近SOTA。
AI.conclusion: 知识迁移与预训练对小数据集性能提升至关重要，轻量化模型设计可有效降低参数量而不显著损失性能。

title: Scribble-based Boundary-aware Network for Weakly Supervised Salient Object Detection in Remote Sensing Images
title_zh: 基于涂鸦的边界感知网络用于遥感图像中弱监督显着目标检测
abstract: Existing CNNs-based salient object detection (SOD) heavily depends on the large-scale pixel-level annotations, which is labor-intensive, time-consuming, and expensive. By contrast, the sparse annotations become appealing to the salient object detection community. However, few efforts are devoted to learning salient object detection from sparse annotations, especially in the remote sensing field. In addition, the sparse annotation usually contains scanty information, which makes it challenging to train a well-performing model, resulting in its performance largely lagging behind the fully-supervised models. Although some SOD methods adopt some prior cues to improve the detection performance, they usually lack targeted discrimination of object boundaries and thus provide saliency maps with poor boundary localization. To this end, in this paper, we propose a novel weakly-supervised salient object detection framework to predict the saliency of remote sensing images from sparse scribble annotations. To implement it, we first construct the scribble-based remote sensing saliency dataset by relabelling an existing large-scale SOD dataset with scribbles, namely S-EOR dataset. After that, we present a novel scribble-based boundary-aware network (SBA-Net) for remote sensing salient object detection. Specifically, we design a boundary-aware module (BAM) to explore the object boundary semantics, which is explicitly supervised by the high-confidence object boundary (pseudo) labels generated by the boundary label generation (BLG) module, forcing the model to learn features that highlight the object structure and thus boosting the boundary localization of objects. Then, the boundary semantics are integrated with high-level features to guide the salient object detection under the supervision of scribble labels.
summary: Existing CNNs-based salient object detection (SOD) heavily depends on the large-scale pixel-level annotations, which is labor-intensive, time-consuming, and expensive. By contrast, the sparse annotations become appealing to the salient object detection community. However, few efforts are devoted to learning salient object detection from sparse annotations, especially in the remote sensing field. In addition, the sparse annotation usually contains scanty information, which makes it challenging to train a well-performing model, resulting in its performance largely lagging behind the fully-supervised models. Although some SOD methods adopt some prior cues to improve the detection performance, they usually lack targeted discrimination of object boundaries and thus provide saliency maps with poor boundary localization. To this end, in this paper, we propose a novel weakly-supervised salient object detection framework to predict the saliency of remote sensing images from sparse scribble annotations. To implement it, we first construct the scribble-based remote sensing saliency dataset by relabelling an existing large-scale SOD dataset with scribbles, namely S-EOR dataset. After that, we present a novel scribble-based boundary-aware network (SBA-Net) for remote sensing salient object detection. Specifically, we design a boundary-aware module (BAM) to explore the object boundary semantics, which is explicitly supervised by the high-confidence object boundary (pseudo) labels generated by the boundary label generation (BLG) module, forcing the model to learn features that highlight the object structure and thus boosting the boundary localization of objects. Then, the boundary semantics are integrated with high-level features to guide the salient object detection under the supervision of scribble labels.
abstract_zh: 现有的基于 CNN 的显着目标检测（SOD）严重依赖于大规模像素级注释，这是劳动密集型、耗时且昂贵的。相比之下，稀疏注释对显着目标检测社区很有吸引力。然而，很少有人致力于从稀疏注释中学习显着目标检测，特别是在遥感领域。此外，稀疏注释通常包含很少的信息，这使得训练性能良好的模型变得具有挑战性，导致其性能很大程度上落后于完全监督的模型。尽管一些SOD方法采用一些先验线索来提高检测性能，但它们通常缺乏对目标边界的针对性辨别，从而提供边界定位较差的显着图。为此，在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的弱监督显着性对象检测框架，用于从稀疏涂鸦注释中预测遥感图像的显着性。为了实现它，我们首先通过用涂鸦重新标记现有的大规模 SOD 数据集来构建基于涂鸦的遥感显着性数据集，即 S-EOR 数据集。之后，我们提出了一种新颖的基于涂鸦的边界感知网络（SBA-Net），用于遥感显着目标检测。具体来说，我们设计了一个边界感知模块（BAM）来探索对象边界语义，该语义由边界标签生成（BLG）模块生成的高置信度对象边界（伪）标签显式监督，迫使模型学习突出对象结构的特征，从而促进对象的边界定位。然后，将边界语义与高级特征相结合，以指导在涂鸦标签的监督下进行显着目标检测。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于草图标注的边界感知网络（SBA-Net），用于弱监督遥感图像显著物体检测，通过构建S-EOR数据集和边界感知模块提升边界定位能力。
AI.motivation: 现有显著物体检测方法依赖大量像素级标注，成本高昂且难以应用于遥感领域。稀疏标注虽具吸引力，但现有方法缺乏对物体边界的有效建模，导致检测性能不足。
AI.method: 构建S-EOR数据集并设计SBA-Net网络，包含边界感知模块（BAM）和边界标签生成模块（BLG）。BAM通过伪边界标签学习物体结构特征，结合高层特征提升显著性检测精度。
AI.result: 实验表明，SBA-Net在多个遥感数据集上显著优于现有弱监督方法，尤其在边界定位方面表现突出，接近全监督模型效果。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了稀疏标注下遥感显著物体检测的边界定位难题，为弱监督学习提供了新思路，具有实际应用价值。

title: Random Ferns for Semantic Segmentation of PolSAR Images
title_zh: 用于 PolSAR 图像语义分割的随机蕨
comment: This is the author's version of the article as accepted for publication in IEEE Transactions on Geoscience and Remote Sensing, 2021. Link to original: https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/document/9627989
comments: This is the author's version of the article as accepted for publication in IEEE Transactions on Geoscience and Remote Sensing, 2021. Link to original: https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/document/9627989
abstract: Random Ferns -- as a less known example of Ensemble Learning -- have been successfully applied in many Computer Vision applications ranging from keypoint matching to object detection. This paper extends the Random Fern framework to the semantic segmentation of polarimetric synthetic aperture radar images. By using internal projections that are defined over the space of Hermitian matrices, the proposed classifier can be directly applied to the polarimetric covariance matrices without the need to explicitly compute predefined image features. Furthermore, two distinct optimization strategies are proposed: The first based on pre-selection and grouping of internal binary features before the creation of the classifier; and the second based on iteratively improving the properties of a given Random Fern. Both strategies are able to boost the performance by filtering features that are either redundant or have a low information content and by grouping correlated features to best fulfill the independence assumptions made by the Random Fern classifier. Experiments show that results can be achieved that are similar to a more complex Random Forest model and competitive to a deep learning baseline.
summary: Random Ferns -- as a less known example of Ensemble Learning -- have been successfully applied in many Computer Vision applications ranging from keypoint matching to object detection. This paper extends the Random Fern framework to the semantic segmentation of polarimetric synthetic aperture radar images. By using internal projections that are defined over the space of Hermitian matrices, the proposed classifier can be directly applied to the polarimetric covariance matrices without the need to explicitly compute predefined image features. Furthermore, two distinct optimization strategies are proposed: The first based on pre-selection and grouping of internal binary features before the creation of the classifier; and the second based on iteratively improving the properties of a given Random Fern. Both strategies are able to boost the performance by filtering features that are either redundant or have a low information content and by grouping correlated features to best fulfill the independence assumptions made by the Random Fern classifier. Experiments show that results can be achieved that are similar to a more complex Random Forest model and competitive to a deep learning baseline.
abstract_zh: 随机蕨——作为集成学习的一个鲜为人知的例子——已成功应用于从关键点匹配到对象检测的许多计算机视觉应用中。本文将 Random Fern 框架扩展到极化合成孔径雷达图像的语义分割。通过使用在埃尔米特矩阵空间上定义的内部投影，所提出的分类器可以直接应用于偏振协方差矩阵，而不需要显式计算预定义的图像特征。此外，提出了两种不同的优化策略：第一种基于在创建分类器之前对内部二进制特征进行预选择和分组；第二个基于迭代改进给定随机蕨的属性。这两种策略都能够通过过滤冗余或信息含量低的特征以及通过对相关特征进行分组以最好地满足随机 Fern 分类器所做的独立性假设来提高性能。实验表明，可以获得类似于更复杂的随机森林模型的结果，并且与深度学习基线具有竞争力。

AI.tldr: 本文将随机蕨分类器扩展至极化合成孔径雷达（PolSAR）图像的语义分割任务。
AI.motivation: 传统方法处理PolSAR图像语义分割需复杂特征工程，而随机蕨作为集成学习方法可简化流程并保持性能。
AI.method: 通过赫米特矩阵空间的内部投影直接处理极化协方差矩阵，提出两种优化策略：特征预筛选分组和迭代优化随机蕨属性。

search_text: Random Ferns for Semantic Segmentation of PolSAR Images 用于 PolSAR 图像语义分割的随机蕨 Random Ferns -- as a less known example of Ensemble Learning -- have been successfully applied in many Computer Vision applications ranging from keypoint matching to object detection. This paper extends the Random Fern framework to the semantic segmentation of polarimetric synthetic aperture radar images. By using internal projections that are defined over the space of Hermitian matrices, the proposed classifier can be directly applied to the polarimetric covariance matrices without the need to explicitly compute predefined image features. Furthermore, two distinct optimization strategies are proposed: The first based on pre-selection and grouping of internal binary features before the creation of the classifier; and the second based on iteratively improving the properties of a given Random Fern. Both strategies are able to boost the performance by filtering features that are either redundant or have a low information content and by grouping correlated features to best fulfill the independence assumptions made by the Random Fern classifier. Experiments show that results can be achieved that are similar to a more complex Random Forest model and competitive to a deep learning baseline. 随机蕨——作为集成学习的一个鲜为人知的例子——已成功应用于从关键点匹配到对象检测的许多计算机视觉应用中。本文将 Random Fern 框架扩展到极化合成孔径雷达图像的语义分割。通过使用在埃尔米特矩阵空间上定义的内部投影，所提出的分类器可以直接应用于偏振协方差矩阵，而不需要显式计算预定义的图像特征。此外，提出了两种不同的优化策略：第一种基于在创建分类器之前对内部二进制特征进行预选择和分组；第二个基于迭代改进给定随机蕨的属性。这两种策略都能够通过过滤冗余或信息含量低的特征以及通过对相关特征进行分组以最好地满足随机 Fern 分类器所做的独立性假设来提高性能。实验表明，可以获得类似于更复杂的随机森林模型的结果，并且与深度学习基线具有竞争力。 本文将随机蕨分类器扩展至极化合成孔径雷达（PolSAR）图像的语义分割任务。 Pengchao Wei,Ronny Hänsch cs.CV,eess.IV

title: A crawling robot driven by a folded self-sustained oscillator
title_zh: 折叠自持振荡器驱动的爬行机器人
comment: 6 pages, 8 figures, has been accepted by RoboSoft 2022
comments: 6 pages, 8 figures, has been accepted by RoboSoft 2022
abstract: Locomotive robots that do not rely on electronics and/or electromagnetic components will open up new perspectives and applications for robotics. However, these robots usually involve complicated and tedious fabrication processes, limiting their applications. Here, we develop an easy-to-fabricate crawling robot by embedding simple control and actuation into origami-inspired mechanisms through folding, eliminating the need for discrete electronics and transducers. Our crawling robot locomotes through directional friction propelled by an onboard origami self-sustained oscillator, which generates periodic actuation from a single source of constant power. The crawling robot is lightweight (~ 3.8 gram), ultra low-cost (~ US $1), nonmagnetic, and electronic-free; it may enable practical applications in extreme environments, e.g., large radiation or magnetic fields. The robot can be fabricated through a monolithic origami-inspired folding-based method with universal materials, i.e., sheet materials and conductive threads. This rapid design and fabrication approach enables the programmable assembly of various mechanisms within this manufacturing paradigm, laying the foundation for autonomous, untethered robots without requiring electronics.
summary: Locomotive robots that do not rely on electronics and/or electromagnetic components will open up new perspectives and applications for robotics. However, these robots usually involve complicated and tedious fabrication processes, limiting their applications. Here, we develop an easy-to-fabricate crawling robot by embedding simple control and actuation into origami-inspired mechanisms through folding, eliminating the need for discrete electronics and transducers. Our crawling robot locomotes through directional friction propelled by an onboard origami self-sustained oscillator, which generates periodic actuation from a single source of constant power. The crawling robot is lightweight (~ 3.8 gram), ultra low-cost (~ US $1), nonmagnetic, and electronic-free; it may enable practical applications in extreme environments, e.g., large radiation or magnetic fields. The robot can be fabricated through a monolithic origami-inspired folding-based method with universal materials, i.e., sheet materials and conductive threads. This rapid design and fabrication approach enables the programmable assembly of various mechanisms within this manufacturing paradigm, laying the foundation for autonomous, untethered robots without requiring electronics.
abstract_zh: 不依赖电子和/或电磁元件的机车机器人将为机器人技术开辟新的视角和应用。然而，这些机器人通常涉及复杂而繁琐的制造过程，限制了它们的应用。在这里，我们通过折叠将简单的控制和驱动嵌入到折纸启发的机制中，从而开发了一种易于制造的爬行机器人，从而消除了对分立电子设备和传感器的需求。我们的爬行机器人通过机载折纸自持振荡器推动的定向摩擦运动，该振荡器从单一恒定功率源产生周期性驱动。该爬行机器人重量轻（约 3.8 克）、超低成本（约 1 美元）、无磁性、无电子；它可以在极端环境（例如大辐射或磁场）中实现实际应用。该机器人可以通过整体折纸启发的折叠方法使用通用材料（即片材和导电线）来制造。这种快速设计和制造方法使得能够在这种制造范例中对各种机构进行可编程组装，从而为无需电子设备的自主、不受束缚的机器人奠定了基础。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需电子元件的爬行机器人，通过折纸机制实现自主运动。
AI.motivation: 传统无电子机器人依赖复杂制造工艺，限制了其应用，需开发简易且低成本的替代方案。
AI.method: 采用折纸启发的折叠方法，结合导电线材与片状材料，构建自维持振荡器驱动的定向摩擦运动系统。
AI.result: 实现3.8克、成本约1美元的无磁无电子机器人，可在极端辐射或磁场环境中运行。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为自主式无电子机器人提供了可编程制造范式，拓展了机器人在极端环境的应用潜力。
