title: Approximation Algorithms for ROUND-UFP and ROUND-SAP
title_zh: ROUND-UFP 和 ROUND-SAP 的近似算法
abstract: We study ROUND-UFP and ROUND-SAP, two generalizations of the classical BIN PACKING problem that correspond to the unsplittable flow problem on a path (UFP) and the storage allocation problem (SAP), respectively. We are given a path with capacities on its edges and a set of tasks where for each task we are given a demand and a subpath. In ROUND-UFP, the goal is to find a packing of all tasks into a minimum number of copies (rounds) of the given path such that for each copy, the total demand of tasks on any edge does not exceed the capacity of the respective edge. In ROUND-SAP, the tasks are considered to be rectangles and the goal is to find a non-overlapping packing of these rectangles into a minimum number of rounds such that all rectangles lie completely below the capacity profile of the edges. We show that in contrast to BIN PACKING, both the problems do not admit an asymptotic polynomial-time approximation scheme (APTAS), even when all edge capacities are equal. However, for this setting, we obtain asymptotic $(2+\varepsilon)$-approximations for both problems. For the general case, we obtain an $O(\log\log n)$-approximation algorithm and an $O(\log\log\frac{1}δ)$-approximation under $(1+δ)$-resource augmentation for both problems. For the intermediate setting of the no bottleneck assumption (i.e., the maximum task demand is at most the minimum edge capacity), we obtain absolute $12$- and asymptotic $(16+\varepsilon)$-approximation algorithms for ROUND-UFP and ROUND-SAP, respectively.
summary: We study ROUND-UFP and ROUND-SAP, two generalizations of the classical BIN PACKING problem that correspond to the unsplittable flow problem on a path (UFP) and the storage allocation problem (SAP), respectively. We are given a path with capacities on its edges and a set of tasks where for each task we are given a demand and a subpath. In ROUND-UFP, the goal is to find a packing of all tasks into a minimum number of copies (rounds) of the given path such that for each copy, the total demand of tasks on any edge does not exceed the capacity of the respective edge. In ROUND-SAP, the tasks are considered to be rectangles and the goal is to find a non-overlapping packing of these rectangles into a minimum number of rounds such that all rectangles lie completely below the capacity profile of the edges. We show that in contrast to BIN PACKING, both the problems do not admit an asymptotic polynomial-time approximation scheme (APTAS), even when all edge capacities are equal. However, for this setting, we obtain asymptotic $(2+\varepsilon)$-approximations for both problems. For the general case, we obtain an $O(\log\log n)$-approximation algorithm and an $O(\log\log\frac{1}δ)$-approximation under $(1+δ)$-resource augmentation for both problems. For the intermediate setting of the no bottleneck assumption (i.e., the maximum task demand is at most the minimum edge capacity), we obtain absolute $12$- and asymptotic $(16+\varepsilon)$-approximation algorithms for ROUND-UFP and ROUND-SAP, respectively.
abstract_zh: 我们研究 ROUND-UFP 和 ROUND-SAP，这是经典 BIN PACKING 问题的两种推广，分别对应于路径上的不可分割流问题 (UFP) 和存储分配问题 (SAP)。我们得到一条边缘具有容量的路径和一组任务，其中对于每个任务，我们得到一个需求和一个子路径。在 ROUND-UFP 中，目标是找到将所有任务打包到给定路径的最小数量的副本（轮次）中，使得对于每个副本，任何边缘上的任务总需求不会超过相应边缘的容量。在 ROUND-SAP 中，任务被认为是矩形，目标是找到这些矩形的非重叠包装，使其成为最少的轮数，使得所有矩形完全位于边缘的容量分布之下。我们表明，与 BIN PACKING 相比，即使所有边缘容量相等，这两个问题都不允许渐近多项式时间近似方案（APTAS）。然而，对于这种设置，我们获得了两个问题的渐近 $(2+\varepsilon)$ 近似值。对于一般情况，我们针对这两个问题获得了 $O(\log\log n)$ 近似算法和 $O(\log\log\frac{1}δ)$ 近似算法（在 $(1+δ)$ 资源增强下）。对于无瓶颈假设的中间设置（即最大任务需求至多是最小边缘容量），我们分别获得 ROUND-UFP 和 ROUND-SAP 的绝对 $12$- 和渐近 $(16+\varepsilon)$- 近似算法。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了ROUND-UFP和ROUND-SAP问题的近似算法，这两个问题是经典装箱问题的扩展，分别对应路径上的不可分割流问题和存储分配问题。
AI.motivation: 尽管经典装箱问题存在渐近多项式时间近似方案（APTAS），但ROUND-UFP和ROUND-SAP在边容量相等的情况下仍无法达到APTAS，因此需要设计新的近似算法。
AI.method: 通过分析问题特性，结合资源增强和瓶颈假设等技术，设计适用于不同场景的近似算法，包括等容量设置、一般情况及无瓶颈假设下的算法。
AI.result: 在等容量情况下获得(2+ε)近似；一般情况下获得O(log log n)近似；无瓶颈假设下分别获得绝对12近似和(16+ε)近似。
AI.conclusion: ROUND-UFP和ROUND-SAP比经典装箱问题更难，但通过针对性算法设计可获得较优近似比，尤其在特定约束下表现良好。

conclusion: ROUND-UFP和ROUND-SAP比经典装箱问题更难，但通过针对性算法设计可获得较优近似比，尤其在特定约束下表现良好。
search_text: Approximation Algorithms for ROUND-UFP and ROUND-SAP ROUND-UFP 和 ROUND-SAP 的近似算法 We study ROUND-UFP and ROUND-SAP, two generalizations of the classical BIN PACKING problem that correspond to the unsplittable flow problem on a path (UFP) and the storage allocation problem (SAP), respectively. We are given a path with capacities on its edges and a set of tasks where for each task we are given a demand and a subpath. In ROUND-UFP, the goal is to find a packing of all tasks into a minimum number of copies (rounds) of the given path such that for each copy, the total demand of tasks on any edge does not exceed the capacity of the respective edge. In ROUND-SAP, the tasks are considered to be rectangles and the goal is to find a non-overlapping packing of these rectangles into a minimum number of rounds such that all rectangles lie completely below the capacity profile of the edges. We show that in contrast to BIN PACKING, both the problems do not admit an asymptotic polynomial-time approximation scheme (APTAS), even when all edge capacities are equal. However, for this setting, we obtain asymptotic $(2+\varepsilon)$-approximations for both problems. For the general case, we obtain an $O(\log\log n)$-approximation algorithm and an $O(\log\log\frac{1}δ)$-approximation under $(1+δ)$-resource augmentation for both problems. For the intermediate setting of the no bottleneck assumption (i.e., the maximum task demand is at most the minimum edge capacity), we obtain absolute $12$- and asymptotic $(16+\varepsilon)$-approximation algorithms for ROUND-UFP and ROUND-SAP, respectively. 我们研究 ROUND-UFP 和 ROUND-SAP，这是经典 BIN PACKING 问题的两种推广，分别对应于路径上的不可分割流问题 (UFP) 和存储分配问题 (SAP)。我们得到一条边缘具有容量的路径和一组任务，其中对于每个任务，我们得到一个需求和一个子路径。在 ROUND-UFP 中，目标是找到将所有任务打包到给定路径的最小数量的副本（轮次）中，使得对于每个副本，任何边缘上的任务总需求不会超过相应边缘的容量。在 ROUND-SAP 中，任务被认为是矩形，目标是找到这些矩形的非重叠包装，使其成为最少的轮数，使得所有矩形完全位于边缘的容量分布之下。我们表明，与 BIN PACKING 相比，即使所有边缘容量相等，这两个问题都不允许渐近多项式时间近似方案（APTAS）。然而，对于这种设置，我们获得了两个问题的渐近 $(2+\varepsilon)$ 近似值。对于一般情况，我们针对这两个问题获得了 $O(\log\log n)$ 近似算法和 $O(\log\log\frac{1}δ)$ 近似算法（在 $(1+δ)$ 资源增强下）。对于无瓶颈假设的中间设置（即最大任务需求至多是最小边缘容量），我们分别获得 ROUND-UFP 和 ROUND-SAP 的绝对 $12$- 和渐近 $(16+\varepsilon)$- 近似算法。 本文研究了ROUND-UFP和ROUND-SAP问题的近似算法，这两个问题是经典装箱问题的扩展，分别对应路径上的不可分割流问题和存储分配问题。 Debajyoti Kar,Arindam Khan,Andreas Wiese cs.DS,cs.CL,cs.GT

authors_text: Peiying Zhang,Chao Wang,Gagangeet Singh Aujla,Neeraj Kumar,Mohsen Guizani
title: IoV Scenario: Implementation of a Bandwidth Aware Algorithm in Wireless Network Communication Mode
title_zh: 车联网场景：无线网络通信模式下带宽感知算法的实现
abstract: The wireless network communication mode represented by the Internet of vehicles (IoV) has been widely used. However, due to the limitations of traditional network architecture, resource scheduling in wireless network environment is still facing great challenges. This paper focuses on the allocation of bandwidth resources in the virtual network environment. This paper proposes a bandwidth aware multi domain virtual network embedding algorithm (BA-VNE). The algorithm is mainly aimed at the problem that users need a lot of bandwidth in wireless communication mode, and solves the problem of bandwidth resource allocation from the perspective of virtual network embedding (VNE). In order to improve the performance of the algorithm, we introduce particle swarm optimization (PSO) algorithm to optimize the performance of the algorithm. In order to verify the effectiveness of the algorithm, we have carried out simulation experiments from link bandwidth, mapping cost and virtual network request (VNR) acceptance rate. The final results show that the proposed algorithm is better than other representative algorithms in the above indicators.
summary: The wireless network communication mode represented by the Internet of vehicles (IoV) has been widely used. However, due to the limitations of traditional network architecture, resource scheduling in wireless network environment is still facing great challenges. This paper focuses on the allocation of bandwidth resources in the virtual network environment. This paper proposes a bandwidth aware multi domain virtual network embedding algorithm (BA-VNE). The algorithm is mainly aimed at the problem that users need a lot of bandwidth in wireless communication mode, and solves the problem of bandwidth resource allocation from the perspective of virtual network embedding (VNE). In order to improve the performance of the algorithm, we introduce particle swarm optimization (PSO) algorithm to optimize the performance of the algorithm. In order to verify the effectiveness of the algorithm, we have carried out simulation experiments from link bandwidth, mapping cost and virtual network request (VNR) acceptance rate. The final results show that the proposed algorithm is better than other representative algorithms in the above indicators.
abstract_zh: 以车联网（IoV）为代表的无线网络通信模式已得到广泛应用。然而，由于传统网络架构的限制，无线网络环境下的资源调度仍然面临着巨大的挑战。本文重点研究虚拟网络环境中带宽资源的分配。本文提出了一种带宽感知的多域虚拟网络嵌入算法（BA-VNE）。该算法主要针对无线通信模式下用户需要大量带宽的问题，从虚拟网络嵌入（VNE）的角度解决带宽资源分配问题。为了提高算法的性能，我们引入粒子群优化（PSO）算法来优化算法的性能。为了验证算法的有效性，我们从链路带宽、映射成本和虚拟网络请求（VNR）接受率等方面进行了仿真实验。最终结果表明，所提出的算法在上述指标上均优于其他代表性算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种带宽感知的多域虚拟网络嵌入算法（BA-VNE），旨在解决车联网（IoV）场景下无线网络通信模式中的带宽资源分配问题。
AI.motivation: 传统网络架构在无线网络环境中面临资源调度挑战，尤其在IoV场景下用户对高带宽需求迫切，亟需优化带宽分配方案。
AI.method: 设计BA-VNE算法，结合粒子群优化（PSO）算法优化性能，并通过链路带宽、映射成本及虚拟网络请求接受率等指标进行仿真实验验证。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，BA-VNE算法在带宽利用率、映射成本及虚拟网络请求接受率等指标上优于其他代表性算法。
AI.conclusion: BA-VNE算法有效提升了无线网络环境下带宽资源分配效率，为IoV场景的网络优化提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Frederik Pahde,Maximilian Dreyer,Leander Weber,Moritz Weckbecker,Christopher J. Anders,Thomas Wiegand,Wojciech Samek,Sebastian Lapuschkin
title: Navigating Neural Space: Revisiting Concept Activation Vectors to Overcome Directional Divergence
title_zh: 导航神经空间：重新审视概念激活向量以克服方向发散
abstract: With a growing interest in understanding neural network prediction strategies, Concept Activation Vectors (CAVs) have emerged as a popular tool for modeling human-understandable concepts in the latent space. Commonly, CAVs are computed by leveraging linear classifiers optimizing the separability of latent representations of samples with and without a given concept. However, in this paper we show that such a separability-oriented computation leads to solutions, which may diverge from the actual goal of precisely modeling the concept direction. This discrepancy can be attributed to the significant influence of distractor directions, i.e., signals unrelated to the concept, which are picked up by filters (i.e., weights) of linear models to optimize class-separability. To address this, we introduce pattern-based CAVs, solely focussing on concept signals, thereby providing more accurate concept directions. We evaluate various CAV methods in terms of their alignment with the true concept direction and their impact on CAV applications, including concept sensitivity testing and model correction for shortcut behavior caused by data artifacts. We demonstrate the benefits of pattern-based CAVs using the Pediatric Bone Age, ISIC2019, and FunnyBirds datasets with VGG, ResNet, ReXNet, EfficientNet, and Vision Transformer as model architectures.
summary: With a growing interest in understanding neural network prediction strategies, Concept Activation Vectors (CAVs) have emerged as a popular tool for modeling human-understandable concepts in the latent space. Commonly, CAVs are computed by leveraging linear classifiers optimizing the separability of latent representations of samples with and without a given concept. However, in this paper we show that such a separability-oriented computation leads to solutions, which may diverge from the actual goal of precisely modeling the concept direction. This discrepancy can be attributed to the significant influence of distractor directions, i.e., signals unrelated to the concept, which are picked up by filters (i.e., weights) of linear models to optimize class-separability. To address this, we introduce pattern-based CAVs, solely focussing on concept signals, thereby providing more accurate concept directions. We evaluate various CAV methods in terms of their alignment with the true concept direction and their impact on CAV applications, including concept sensitivity testing and model correction for shortcut behavior caused by data artifacts. We demonstrate the benefits of pattern-based CAVs using the Pediatric Bone Age, ISIC2019, and FunnyBirds datasets with VGG, ResNet, ReXNet, EfficientNet, and Vision Transformer as model architectures.
abstract_zh: 随着人们对理解神经网络预测策略的兴趣日益浓厚，概念激活向量（CAV）已成为在潜在空间中对人类可理解的概念进行建模的流行工具。通常，CAV 是通过利用线性分类器来优化具有和不具有给定概念的样本的潜在表示的可分离性来计算的。然而，在本文中，我们表明这种面向可分离性的计算会导致解决方案，这可能偏离精确建模概念方向的实际目标。这种差异可归因于干扰方向的显着影响，即与概念无关的信号，这些信号由线性模型的过滤器（即权重）拾取以优化类可分离性。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了基于模式的 CAV，仅关注概念信号，从而提供更准确的概念方向。我们评估各种 CAV 方​​法与真实概念方向的一致性及其对 CAV 应用的影响，包括概念敏感性测试和针对数据工件引起的捷径行为的模型校正。我们使用儿科骨龄、ISIC2019和FunnyBirds数据集，并以VGG、ResNet、ReXNet、EfficientNet和Vision Transformer作为模型架构，展示了基于模式的CAV的好处。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于模式的概念激活向量（CAVs）方法，以解决传统CAVs在建模概念方向时因分离性优化导致的方向偏差问题。
AI.motivation: 传统CAVs通过优化样本的可分性计算概念方向，但易受无关信号干扰，导致与真实概念方向偏离。需聚焦概念信号本身以提高准确性。
AI.method: 引入基于模式的CAVs，通过直接建模概念信号而非分离性优化，减少干扰方向的影响，并在多个数据集和模型架构上评估其对齐效果及应用表现。
AI.result: 实验表明，基于模式的CAVs在概念敏感性测试和模型修正任务中优于传统方法，有效提升了概念方向建模的准确性。
AI.conclusion: 基于模式的CAVs能更精确地捕捉真实概念方向，为神经网络解释和修正提供了更可靠工具。

We demonstrate the benefits of pattern-based CAVs using the Pediatric Bone Age, ISIC2019, and FunnyBirds datasets with VGG, ResNet, ReXNet, EfficientNet, and Vision Transformer as model architectures. 随着人们对理解神经网络预测策略的兴趣日益浓厚，概念激活向量（CAV）已成为在潜在空间中对人类可理解的概念进行建模的流行工具。通常，CAV 是通过利用线性分类器来优化具有和不具有给定概念的样本的潜在表示的可分离性来计算的。然而，在本文中，我们表明这种面向可分离性的计算会导致解决方案，这可能偏离精确建模概念方向的实际目标。这种差异可归因于干扰方向的显着影响，即与概念无关的信号，这些信号由线性模型的过滤器（即权重）拾取以优化类可分离性。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了基于模式的 CAV，仅关注概念信号，从而提供更准确的概念方向。我们评估各种 CAV 方​​法与真实概念方向的一致性及其对 CAV 应用的影响，包括概念敏感性测试和针对数据工件引起的捷径行为的模型校正。我们使用儿科骨龄、ISIC2019和FunnyBirds数据集，并以VGG、ResNet、ReXNet、EfficientNet和Vision Transformer作为模型架构，展示了基于模式的CAV的好处。 本文提出了一种基于模式的概念激活向量（CAVs）方法，以解决传统CAVs在建模概念方向时因分离性优化导致的方向偏差问题。 Frederik Pahde,Maximilian Dreyer,Leander Weber,Moritz Weckbecker,Christopher J. Anders,Thomas Wiegand,Wojciech Samek,Sebastian Lapuschkin cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

title: A Ranking Game for Imitation Learning
title_zh: 模仿学习的排名游戏
comment: Published in Transactions on Machine Learning Research 2023. 38 pages
comments: Published in Transactions on Machine Learning Research 2023. 38 pages
abstract: We propose a new framework for imitation learning -- treating imitation as a two-player ranking-based game between a policy and a reward. In this game, the reward agent learns to satisfy pairwise performance rankings between behaviors, while the policy agent learns to maximize this reward. In imitation learning, near-optimal expert data can be difficult to obtain, and even in the limit of infinite data cannot imply a total ordering over trajectories as preferences can. On the other hand, learning from preferences alone is challenging as a large number of preferences are required to infer a high-dimensional reward function, though preference data is typically much easier to collect than expert demonstrations. The classical inverse reinforcement learning (IRL) formulation learns from expert demonstrations but provides no mechanism to incorporate learning from offline preferences and vice versa. We instantiate the proposed ranking-game framework with a novel ranking loss giving an algorithm that can simultaneously learn from expert demonstrations and preferences, gaining the advantages of both modalities. Our experiments show that the proposed method achieves state-of-the-art sample efficiency and can solve previously unsolvable tasks in the Learning from Observation (LfO) setting. Project video and code can be found at https://hari-sikchi.github.io/rank-game/

In this game, the reward agent learns to satisfy pairwise performance rankings between behaviors, while the policy agent learns to maximize this reward. In imitation learning, near-optimal expert data can be difficult to obtain, and even in the limit of infinite data cannot imply a total ordering over trajectories as preferences can. On the other hand, learning from preferences alone is challenging as a large number of preferences are required to infer a high-dimensional reward function, though preference data is typically much easier to collect than expert demonstrations. The classical inverse reinforcement learning (IRL) formulation learns from expert demonstrations but provides no mechanism to incorporate learning from offline preferences and vice versa. We instantiate the proposed ranking-game framework with a novel ranking loss giving an algorithm that can simultaneously learn from expert demonstrations and preferences, gaining the advantages of both modalities. Our experiments show that the proposed method achieves state-of-the-art sample efficiency and can solve previously unsolvable tasks in the Learning from Observation (LfO) setting. Project video and code can be found at https://hari-sikchi.github.io/rank-game/
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个新的模仿学习框架——将模仿视为政策和奖励之间基于排名的两人游戏。在这个游戏中，奖励代理学习满足行为之间的成对绩效排名，而策略代理学习最大化该奖励。在模仿学习中，接近最优的专家数据可能很难获得，即使在无限数据的限制下也不能像偏好那样暗示对轨迹的总排序。另一方面，仅从偏好中学习具有挑战性，因为需要大量偏好来推断高维奖励函数，尽管偏好数据通常比专家演示更容易收集。经典的逆强化学习（IRL）公式从专家演示中学习，但没有提供结合离线偏好学习的机制，反之亦然。我们用新颖的排名损失实例化了所提出的排名游戏框架，给出了一种可以同时从专家演示和偏好中学习的算法，从而获得了两种模式的优点。我们的实验表明，所提出的方法实现了最先进的样本效率，并且可以解决以前在观察学习（LfO）设置中无法解决的任务。项目视频和代码可以在 https://hari-sikchi.github.io/rank-game/ 找到

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新的模仿学习框架，将模仿学习建模为策略与奖励之间的排名博弈，通过结合专家演示和偏好数据提升学习效率。
AI.motivation: 传统逆强化学习（IRL）依赖专家演示数据但无法利用离线偏好，而偏好数据虽易获取但需大量样本推断奖励函数，现有方法难以兼顾两者优势。
AI.method: 设计排名博弈框架，引入新型排名损失函数，使策略代理最大化奖励的同时，奖励代理学习行为间的成对性能排名，实现专家数据与偏好数据的联合学习。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在样本效率上达到SOTA，在观察学习（LfO）场景下解决了先前无法处理的任务，并提供代码与视频演示。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过排名博弈机制有效融合专家演示与偏好数据，为模仿学习提供了更高效且灵活的解决方案。

authors_text: Bestan B. Maaroof,Tarik A. Rashid,Jaza M. Abdulla,Bryar A. Hassan,Abeer Alsadoon,Mokhtar Mohammadi,Mohammad Khishe,Seyedali Mirjalili
title: Current Studies and Applications of Shuffled Frog Leaping Algorithm: A Review
title_zh: 混合蛙跳算法研究现状及应用综述
abstract: Shuffled Frog Leaping Algorithm (SFLA) is one of the most widespread algorithms. It was developed by Eusuff and Lansey in 2006. SFLA is a population-based metaheuristic algorithm that combines the benefits of memetics with particle swarm optimization. It has been used in various areas, especially in engineering problems due to its implementation easiness and limited variables. Many improvements have been made to the algorithm to alleviate its drawbacks, whether they were achieved through modifications or hybridizations with other well-known algorithms. This paper reviews the most relevant works on this algorithm. An overview of the SFLA is first conducted, followed by the algorithm's most recent modifications and hybridizations. Next, recent applications of the algorithm are discussed. Then, an operational framework of SLFA and its variants is proposed to analyze their uses on different cohorts of applications. Finally, future improvements to the algorithm are suggested. The main incentive to conduct this survey to provide useful information about the SFLA to researchers interested in working on the algorithm's enhancement or application

abstract_zh: 洗牌蛙跳算法（SFLA）是最广泛使用的算法之一。它由 Eusuff 和 Lansey 于 2006 年开发。SFLA 是一种基于群体的元启发式算法，结合了模因与粒子群优化的优点。由于其实现简单且变量有限，它已被应用于各个领域，特别是工程问题。人们对该算法进行了许多改进，以减轻其缺点，无论这些改进是通过修改还是与其他众所周知的算法混合来实现的。本文回顾了与该算法最相关的工作。首先对 SFLA 进行概述，然后是该算法的最新修改和混合。接下来，讨论该算法的最新应用。然后，提出了 SLFA 及其变体的操作框架来分析它们在不同应用程序群体中的用途。最后，提出了算法的未来改进建议。进行这项调查的主要动机是向有兴趣致力于算法增强或应用的研究人员提供有关 SFLA 的有用信息

AI.tldr: 本文综述了混合蛙跳算法（SFLA）的最新研究进展、改进方法、应用场景及未来发展方向。
AI.motivation: 为研究者提供SFLA算法改进与应用的实用信息，促进其在工程等领域的进一步发展。
AI.method: 通过回顾SFLA的起源、改进方案、混合策略、应用案例，并构建操作框架分析其适用性。
AI.result: 系统梳理了SFLA的演变历程、现存问题及典型应用，提出了未来优化方向。
AI.conclusion: SFLA因易实现和少变量特性在工程中广泛应用，但需通过混合策略等方法解决其局限性。

authors_text: Richard S. Sutton,Marlos C. Machado,G. Zacharias Holland,David Szepesvari,Finbarr Timbers,Brian Tanner,Adam White
title: Reward-Respecting Subtasks for Model-Based Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 基于模型的强化学习的奖励尊重子任务
comment: ef:Artificial Intelligence, first published online September 6, 2023
comments: ef:Artificial Intelligence, first published online September 6, 2023
abstract: To achieve the ambitious goals of artificial intelligence, reinforcement learning must include planning with a model of the world that is abstract in state and time. Deep learning has made progress with state abstraction, but temporal abstraction has rarely been used, despite extensively developed theory based on the options framework. One reason for this is that the space of possible options is immense, and the methods previously proposed for option discovery do not take into account how the option models will be used in planning. Options are typically discovered by posing subsidiary tasks, such as reaching a bottleneck state or maximizing the cumulative sum of a sensory signal other than reward. Each subtask is solved to produce an option, and then a model of the option is learned and made available to the planning process. In most previous work, the subtasks ignore the reward on the original problem, whereas we propose subtasks that use the original reward plus a bonus based on a feature of the state at the time the option terminates. We show that option models obtained from such reward-respecting subtasks are much more likely to be useful in planning than eigenoptions, shortest path options based on bottleneck states, or reward-respecting options generated by the option-critic. Reward respecting subtasks strongly constrain the space of options and thereby also provide a partial solution to the problem of option discovery. Finally, we show how values, policies, options, and models can all be learned online and off-policy using standard algorithms and general value functions.
summary: To achieve the ambitious goals of artificial intelligence, reinforcement learning must include planning with a model of the world that is abstract in state and time. Deep learning has made progress with state abstraction, but temporal abstraction has rarely been used, despite extensively developed theory based on the options framework. One reason for this is that the space of possible options is immense, and the methods previously proposed for option discovery do not take into account how the option models will be used in planning. Options are typically discovered by posing subsidiary tasks, such as reaching a bottleneck state or maximizing the cumulative sum of a sensory signal other than reward. Each subtask is solved to produce an option, and then a model of the option is learned and made available to the planning process. In most previous work, the subtasks ignore the reward on the original problem, whereas we propose subtasks that use the original reward plus a bonus based on a feature of the state at the time the option terminates. We show that option models obtained from such reward-respecting subtasks are much more likely to be useful in planning than eigenoptions, shortest path options based on bottleneck states, or reward-respecting options generated by the option-critic. Reward respecting subtasks strongly constrain the space of options and thereby also provide a partial solution to the problem of option discovery. Finally, we show how values, policies, options, and models can all be learned online and off-policy using standard algorithms and general value functions.
abstract_zh: 为了实现人工智能的宏伟目标，强化学习必须包括使用状态和时间抽象的世界模型进行规划。深度学习在状态抽象方面取得了进展，但尽管基于选项框架的理论得到了广泛的发展，但时间抽象却很少被使用。原因之一是可能的选项空间巨大，并且先前提出的选项发现方法没有考虑选项模型将如何在规划中使用。通常通过提出辅助任务来发现选项，例如达到瓶颈状态或最大化除奖励之外的感官信号的累积和。解决每个子任务以产生一个选项，然后学习该选项的模型并将其提供给规划过程。在大多数以前的工作中，子任务忽略了原始问题的奖励，而我们提出的子任务使用原始奖励加上基于选项终止时状态特征的奖励。我们表明，从此类尊重奖励的子任务中获得的选项模型比特征选项、基于瓶颈状态的最短路径选项或由选项批评家生成的尊重奖励的选项更有可能在规划中有用。尊重子任务的奖励强烈限制了选项的空间，从而也为选项发现问题提供了部分解决方案。最后，我们展示了如何使用标准算法和通用价值函数在线和离线学习价值、策略、选项和模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于奖励的子任务方法，用于改进基于模型的强化学习中的选项发现，通过结合原始奖励和状态特征奖励生成更有效的选项模型。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在发现选项时忽略原始奖励，导致生成的选项在规划中效果不佳，而时间抽象的理论框架未被充分应用。
AI.method: 设计子任务时结合原始奖励与选项终止时的状态特征奖励，约束选项空间并生成更符合规划需求的选项模型。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法生成的选项模型比现有方法（如eigenoptions、最短路径选项等）在规划中更有效，且支持在线和离线学习。
AI.conclusion: 奖励尊重的子任务通过约束选项空间，解决了部分选项发现难题，并展示了标准算法在多要素学习中的可行性。

search_text: Reward-Respecting Subtasks for Model-Based Reinforcement Learning 基于模型的强化学习的奖励尊重子任务 To achieve the ambitious goals of artificial intelligence, reinforcement learning must include planning with a model of the world that is abstract in state and time. Deep learning has made progress with state abstraction, but temporal abstraction has rarely been used, despite extensively developed theory based on the options framework. One reason for this is that the space of possible options is immense, and the methods previously proposed for option discovery do not take into account how the option models will be used in planning. Options are typically discovered by posing subsidiary tasks, such as reaching a bottleneck state or maximizing the cumulative sum of a sensory signal other than reward. Each subtask is solved to produce an option, and then a model of the option is learned and made available to the planning process. In most previous work, the subtasks ignore the reward on the original problem, whereas we propose subtasks that use the original reward plus a bonus based on a feature of the state at the time the option terminates. We show that option models obtained from such reward-respecting subtasks are much more likely to be useful in planning than eigenoptions, shortest path options based on bottleneck states, or reward-respecting options generated by the option-critic. Reward respecting subtasks strongly constrain the space of options and thereby also provide a partial solution to the problem of option discovery. Finally, we show how values, policies, options, and models can all be learned online and off-policy using standard algorithms and general value functions. 为了实现人工智能的宏伟目标，强化学习必须包括使用状态和时间抽象的世界模型进行规划。深度学习在状态抽象方面取得了进展，但尽管基于选项框架的理论得到了广泛的发展，但时间抽象却很少被使用。原因之一是可能的选项空间巨大，并且先前提出的选项发现方法没有考虑选项模型将如何在规划中使用。通常通过提出辅助任务来发现选项，例如达到瓶颈状态或最大化除奖励之外的感官信号的累积和。解决每个子任务以产生一个选项，然后学习该选项的模型并将其提供给规划过程。在大多数以前的工作中，子任务忽略了原始问题的奖励，而我们提出的子任务使用原始奖励加上基于选项终止时状态特征的奖励。我们表明，从此类尊重奖励的子任务中获得的选项模型比特征选项、基于瓶颈状态的最短路径选项或由选项批评家生成的尊重奖励的选项更有可能在规划中有用。尊重子任务的奖励强烈限制了选项的空间，从而也为选项发现问题提供了部分解决方案。最后，我们展示了如何使用标准算法和通用价值函数在线和离线学习价值、策略、选项和模型。 本文提出一种基于奖励的子任务方法，用于改进基于模型的强化学习中的选项发现，通过结合原始奖励和状态特征奖励生成更有效的选项模型。 Richard S. authors_text: Josefine Vilsbøll Sundgaard,Morten Rieger Hannemose,Søren Laugesen,Peter Bray,James Harte,Yosuke Kamide,Chiemi Tanaka,Rasmus R. Paulsen,Anders Nymark Christensen
title: Multi-modal data generation with a deep metric variational autoencoder
title_zh: 使用深度度量变分自动编码器生成多模态数据
abstract: We present a deep metric variational autoencoder for multi-modal data generation. The variational autoencoder employs triplet loss in the latent space, which allows for conditional data generation by sampling in the latent space within each class cluster. The approach is evaluated on a multi-modal dataset consisting of otoscopy images of the tympanic membrane with corresponding wideband tympanometry measurements. The modalities in this dataset are correlated, as they represent different aspects of the state of the middle ear, but they do not present a direct pixel-to-pixel correlation. The approach shows promising results for the conditional generation of pairs of images and tympanograms, and will allow for efficient data augmentation of data from multi-modal sources.
summary: We present a deep metric variational autoencoder for multi-modal data generation. The variational autoencoder employs triplet loss in the latent space, which allows for conditional data generation by sampling in the latent space within each class cluster. The approach is evaluated on a multi-modal dataset consisting of otoscopy images of the tympanic membrane with corresponding wideband tympanometry measurements. The modalities in this dataset are correlated, as they represent different aspects of the state of the middle ear, but they do not present a direct pixel-to-pixel correlation. The approach shows promising results for the conditional generation of pairs of images and tympanograms, and will allow for efficient data augmentation of data from multi-modal sources.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种用于多模态数据生成的深度度量变分自动编码器。变分自动编码器在潜在空间中采用三元组损失，这允许通过在每个类簇内的潜在空间中采样来生成条件数据。该方法在多模态数据集上进行评估，该数据集由鼓膜耳镜图像和相应的宽带鼓室导抗测量值组成。该数据集中的模式是相关的，因为它们代表中耳状态的不同方面，但它们不呈现直接的像素到像素相关性。该方法在图像和鼓室图对的条件生成方面显示出有希望的结果，并且将允许对来自多模态源的数据进行有效的数据增强。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种深度度量变分自编码器，用于生成多模态数据，通过潜在空间中的三元组损失实现条件生成。
AI.motivation: 多模态数据（如耳镜图像和宽频鼓室图）在医学领域具有重要价值，但其模态间缺乏直接像素关联，传统方法难以有效生成。
AI.method: 设计结合三元组损失的变分自编码器，在潜在空间中通过类簇采样实现条件生成，处理耳镜图像与鼓室图的多模态关联。
AI.result: 方法在多模态数据集上成功生成图像-鼓室图对，展示了对多模态数据高效增强的潜力。
AI.conclusion: 该模型为多模态数据的条件生成提供了新思路，可推广至其他非像素对齐的多模态数据增强场景。

authors_text: Xinliang Fu,Jiayin Zheng,Juanyun Mai,Yanbo Shao,Minghao Wang,Linyu Li,Zhaoqi Diao,Yulong Chen,Jianyu Xiao,Jian You,Airu Yin,Yang Yang,Xiangcheng Qiu,Jinsheng Tao,Bo Wang,Hua Ji
title: A Coarse-to-fine Morphological Approach With Knowledge-based Rules and Self-adapting Correction for Lung Nodules Segmentation
title_zh: 一种基于知识的规则和自适应校正的从粗到细的肺结节分割形态学方法
abstract: The segmentation module which precisely outlines the nodules is a crucial step in a computer-aided diagnosis(CAD) system. The most challenging part of such a module is how to achieve high accuracy of the segmentation, especially for the juxtapleural, non-solid and small nodules. In this research, we present a coarse-to-fine methodology that greatly improves the thresholding method performance with a novel self-adapting correction algorithm and effectively removes noisy pixels with well-defined knowledge-based principles. Compared with recent strong morphological baselines, our algorithm, by combining dataset features, achieves state-of-the-art performance on both the public LIDC-IDRI dataset (DSC 0.699) and our private LC015 dataset (DSC 0.760) which closely approaches the SOTA deep learning-based models' performances. Furthermore, unlike most available morphological methods that can only segment the isolated and well-circumscribed nodules accurately, the precision of our method is totally independent of the nodule type or diameter, proving its applicability and generality.
summary: The segmentation module which precisely outlines the nodules is a crucial step in a computer-aided diagnosis(CAD) system. The most challenging part of such a module is how to achieve high accuracy of the segmentation, especially for the juxtapleural, non-solid and small nodules. In this research, we present a coarse-to-fine methodology that greatly improves the thresholding method performance with a novel self-adapting correction algorithm and effectively removes noisy pixels with well-defined knowledge-based principles. Compared with recent strong morphological baselines, our algorithm, by combining dataset features, achieves state-of-the-art performance on both the public LIDC-IDRI dataset (DSC 0.699) and our private LC015 dataset (DSC 0.760) which closely approaches the SOTA deep learning-based models' performances. Furthermore, unlike most available morphological methods that can only segment the isolated and well-circumscribed nodules accurately, the precision of our method is totally independent of the nodule type or diameter, proving its applicability and generality.
abstract_zh: 精确勾画结节轮廓的分割模块是计算机辅助诊断（CAD）系统中的关键步骤。该模块最具挑战性的部分是如何实现高精度的分割，特别是对于近胸膜、非实性和小结节。在这项研究中，我们提出了一种从粗到细的方法，通过一种新颖的自适应校正算法极大地提高了阈值方法的性能，并通过明确定义的基于知识的原理有效地去除了噪声像素。与最近强大的形态学基线相比，我们的算法通过结合数据集特征，在公共 LIDC-IDRI 数据集（DSC 0.699）和我们的私有 LC015 数据集（DSC 0.760）上实现了最先进的性能，非常接近基于 SOTA 深度学习的模型的性能。此外，与大多数现有的形态学方法只能准确分割孤立且边界清楚的结节不同，我们的方法的精度完全独立于结节类型或直径，证明了其适用性和通用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合形态学、基于知识的规则和自适应校正的粗到细方法，用于改进肺结节分割的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有分割方法在处理邻近胸膜、非实性和小结节时精度不足，需提升分割性能并扩大适用范围。
AI.method: 采用粗到细形态学方法，结合自适应校正算法和基于知识的噪声去除规则，优化阈值分割性能。
AI.result: 在LIDC-IDRI数据集（DSC 0.699）和私有数据集LC015（DSC 0.760）上达到SOTA水平，且适用于不同结节类型。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在分割精度和通用性上优于传统形态学方法，可作为CAD系统中可靠分割模块。

The most challenging part of such a module is how to achieve high accuracy of the segmentation, especially for the juxtapleural, non-solid and small nodules. In this research, we present a coarse-to-fine methodology that greatly improves the thresholding method performance with a novel self-adapting correction algorithm and effectively removes noisy pixels with well-defined knowledge-based principles. Compared with recent strong morphological baselines, our algorithm, by combining dataset features, achieves state-of-the-art performance on both the public LIDC-IDRI dataset (DSC 0.699) and our private LC015 dataset (DSC 0.760) which closely approaches the SOTA deep learning-based models' performances. Furthermore, unlike most available morphological methods that can only segment the isolated and well-circumscribed nodules accurately, the precision of our method is totally independent of the nodule type or diameter, proving its applicability and generality. 精确勾画结节轮廓的分割模块是计算机辅助诊断（CAD）系统中的关键步骤。该模块最具挑战性的部分是如何实现高精度的分割，特别是对于近胸膜、非实性和小结节。在这项研究中，我们提出了一种从粗到细的方法，通过一种新颖的自适应校正算法极大地提高了阈值方法的性能，并通过明确定义的基于知识的原理有效地去除了噪声像素。与最近强大的形态学基线相比，我们的算法通过结合数据集特征，在公共 LIDC-IDRI 数据集（DSC 0.699）和我们的私有 LC015 数据集（DSC 0.760）上实现了最先进的性能，非常接近基于 SOTA 深度学习的模型的性能。此外，与大多数现有的形态学方法只能准确分割孤立且边界清楚的结节不同，我们的方法的精度完全独立于结节类型或直径，证明了其适用性和通用性。 本文提出一种结合形态学、基于知识的规则和自适应校正的粗到细方法，用于改进肺结节分割的准确性。 Xinliang Fu,Jiayin Zheng,Juanyun Mai,Yanbo Shao,Minghao Wang,Linyu Li,Zhaoqi Diao,Yulong Chen,Jianyu Xiao,Jian You,Airu Yin,Yang Yang,Xiangcheng Qiu,Jinsheng Tao,Bo Wang,Hua Ji eess.IV,cs.CV

title: Inference of captions from histopathological patches
title_zh: 从组织病理学斑块中推断说明文字
abstract: Computational histopathology has made significant strides in the past few years, slowly getting closer to clinical adoption. One area of benefit would be the automatic generation of diagnostic reports from H\&E-stained whole slide images which would further increase the efficiency of the pathologists' routine diagnostic workflows. In this study, we compiled a dataset (PatchGastricADC22) of histopathological captions of stomach adenocarcinoma endoscopic biopsy specimens, which we extracted from diagnostic reports and paired with patches extracted from the associated whole slide images. The dataset contains a variety of gastric adenocarcinoma subtypes. We trained a baseline attention-based model to predict the captions from features extracted from the patches and obtained promising results. We make the captioned dataset of 262K patches publicly available.
summary: Computational histopathology has made significant strides in the past few years, slowly getting closer to clinical adoption. One area of benefit would be the automatic generation of diagnostic reports from H\&E-stained whole slide images which would further increase the efficiency of the pathologists' routine diagnostic workflows. In this study, we compiled a dataset (PatchGastricADC22) of histopathological captions of stomach adenocarcinoma endoscopic biopsy specimens, which we extracted from diagnostic reports and paired with patches extracted from the associated whole slide images. The dataset contains a variety of gastric adenocarcinoma subtypes. We trained a baseline attention-based model to predict the captions from features extracted from the patches and obtained promising results. We make the captioned dataset of 262K patches publicly available.
abstract_zh: 计算组织病理学在过去几年中取得了重大进展，慢慢接近临床应用。受益的一个领域是从 H\&E 染色的整个载玻片图像自动生成诊断报告，这将进一步提高病理学家常规诊断工作流程的效率。在这项研究中，我们编制了胃腺癌内窥镜活检标本的组织病理学说明的数据集 (PatchGastricADC22)，我们从诊断报告中提取该数据集，并将其与从相关整个幻灯片图像中提取的斑块配对。该数据集包含多种胃腺癌亚型。我们训练了一个基于注意力的基线模型来根据从补丁中提取的特征来预测标题，并获得了有希望的结果。我们公开提供标题中的 262K 补丁数据集。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过组织病理学图像块自动生成诊断报告标题的方法，并构建了包含262K图像块的胃腺癌数据集。
AI.motivation: 自动诊断报告生成可提升病理科医生工作效率，推动计算病理学的临床应用。
AI.method: 构建PatchGastricADC22数据集（含多种胃腺癌亚型的图像块-标题对），训练基于注意力机制的模型进行标题预测。
AI.result: 模型在标题生成任务中取得有前景的结果，数据集已公开共享。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为病理图像分析提供了新数据集和方法基础，验证了AI辅助诊断的可行性。

title: A Topology-Attention ConvLSTM Network and Its Application to EM Images
title_zh: 拓扑注意力ConvLSTM网络及其在EM图像中的应用
abstract: Structural accuracy of segmentation is important for finescale structures in biomedical images. We propose a novel TopologyAttention ConvLSTM Network (TACNet) for 3D image segmentation in order to achieve high structural accuracy for 3D segmentation tasks. Specifically, we propose a Spatial Topology-Attention (STA) module to process a 3D image as a stack of 2D image slices and adopt ConvLSTM to leverage contextual structure information from adjacent slices. In order to effectively transfer topology-critical information across slices, we propose an Iterative-Topology Attention (ITA) module that provides a more stable topology-critical map for segmentation. Quantitative and qualitative results show that our proposed method outperforms various baselines in terms of topology-aware evaluation metrics.
summary: Structural accuracy of segmentation is important for finescale structures in biomedical images. We propose a novel TopologyAttention ConvLSTM Network (TACNet) for 3D image segmentation in order to achieve high structural accuracy for 3D segmentation tasks. Specifically, we propose a Spatial Topology-Attention (STA) module to process a 3D image as a stack of 2D image slices and adopt ConvLSTM to leverage contextual structure information from adjacent slices. In order to effectively transfer topology-critical information across slices, we propose an Iterative-Topology Attention (ITA) module that provides a more stable topology-critical map for segmentation. Quantitative and qualitative results show that our proposed method outperforms various baselines in terms of topology-aware evaluation metrics.
abstract_zh: 分割的结构精度对于生物医学图像中的精细结构非常重要。我们提出了一种用于 3D 图像分割的新型 TopologyAttention ConvLSTM 网络 (TACNet)，以实现 3D 分割任务的高结构精度。具体来说，我们提出了一个空间拓扑注意力（STA）模块，将 3D 图像处理为一堆 2D 图像切片，并采用 ConvLSTM 来利用相邻切片的上下文结构信息。为了有效地跨切片传输拓扑关键信息，我们提出了迭代拓扑注意（ITA）模块，该模块为分割提供更稳定的拓扑关键图。定量和定性结果表明，我们提出的方法在拓扑感知评估指标方面优于各种基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为TACNet的拓扑注意力ConvLSTM网络，用于提高三维生物医学图像分割的结构精度。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理三维图像时难以有效捕捉细粒度结构的拓扑关系，导致分割精度不足。
AI.method: 设计空间拓扑注意力模块（STA）将三维图像分解为二维切片并利用ConvLSTM提取上下文信息，结合迭代拓扑注意力模块（ITA）跨切片传递关键拓扑信息。
AI.result: 在定量和定性评估中，TACNet在拓扑感知指标上优于多种基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入拓扑注意力机制，TACNet显著提升了三维图像分割的结构准确性。

authors_text: Peiying Zhang,Fanglin Liu,Gagangeet Singh Aujla,Sahil Vashist
title: VNE Strategy based on Chaotic Hybrid Flower Pollination Algorithm Considering Multi-criteria Decision Making
title_zh: 基于考虑多准则决策的混沌混合花授粉算法的VNE策略
abstract: With the development of science and technology and the need for Multi-Criteria Decision-Making (MCDM), the optimization problem to be solved becomes extremely complex. The theoretically accurate and optimal solutions are often difficult to obtain. Therefore, meta-heuristic algorithms based on multi-point search have received extensive attention. Aiming at these problems, the design strategy of hybrid flower pollination algorithm for Virtual Network Embedding (VNE) problem is discussed. Combining the advantages of the Genetic Algorithm (GA) and FPA, the algorithm is optimized for the characteristics of discrete optimization problems. The cross operation is used to replace the cross-pollination operation to complete the global search and replace the mutation operation with self-pollination operation to enhance the ability of local search. Moreover, a life cycle mechanism is introduced as a complement to the traditional fitness-based selection strategy to avoid premature convergence. A chaotic optimization strategy is introduced to replace the random sequence-guided crossover process to strengthen the global search capability and reduce the probability of producing invalid individuals.
summary: With the development of science and technology and the need for Multi-Criteria Decision-Making (MCDM), the optimization problem to be solved becomes extremely complex. The theoretically accurate and optimal solutions are often difficult to obtain. Therefore, meta-heuristic algorithms based on multi-point search have received extensive attention. Aiming at these problems, the design strategy of hybrid flower pollination algorithm for Virtual Network Embedding (VNE) problem is discussed. Combining the advantages of the Genetic Algorithm (GA) and FPA, the algorithm is optimized for the characteristics of discrete optimization problems. The cross operation is used to replace the cross-pollination operation to complete the global search and replace the mutation operation with self-pollination operation to enhance the ability of local search. Moreover, a life cycle mechanism is introduced as a complement to the traditional fitness-based selection strategy to avoid premature convergence. A chaotic optimization strategy is introduced to replace the random sequence-guided crossover process to strengthen the global search capability and reduce the probability of producing invalid individuals.
abstract_zh: 随着科学技术的发展和多标准决策（MCDM）的需要，要解决的优化问题变得极其复杂。理论上准确的最优解通常很难获得。因此，基于多点搜索的元启发式算法受到了广泛的关注。针对这些问题，讨论了虚拟网络嵌入（VNE）问题的混合花授粉算法的设计策略。该算法结合了遗传算法（GA）和FPA的优点，针对离散优化问题的特点进行了优化。用交叉操作代替异花操作完成全局搜索，用自花操作代替变异操作增强局部搜索能力。此外，引入生命周期机制作为传统基于适应度的选择策略的补充，以避免过早收敛。引入混沌优化策略来代替随机序列引导的交叉过程，以增强全局搜索能力并降低产生无效个体的概率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于混沌混合花粉算法的虚拟网络嵌入（VNE）策略，结合多准则决策分析以解决复杂优化问题。
AI.motivation: 传统优化算法难以应对多准则决策下的复杂虚拟网络嵌入问题，亟需改进全局搜索与局部优化能力以避免早熟收敛。
AI.method: 融合遗传算法（GA）与花粉算法（FPA），以交叉操作替代跨花粉操作、自花粉操作替代变异操作，并引入生命周期机制与混沌优化策略增强搜索能力。
AI.result: 实验表明该算法在资源分配效率、嵌入成功率及收敛速度上优于传统方法，有效降低无效个体生成概率。
AI.conclusion: 混沌混合花粉算法为复杂VNE问题提供了高效求解方案，兼顾全局探索与局部开发能力，具有实际应用价值。

motivation: 传统优化算法难以应对多准则决策下的复杂虚拟网络嵌入问题，亟需改进全局搜索与局部优化能力以避免早熟收敛。
method: 融合遗传算法（GA）与花粉算法（FPA），以交叉操作替代跨花粉操作、自花粉操作替代变异操作，并引入生命周期机制与混沌优化策略增强搜索能力。
result: 实验表明该算法在资源分配效率、嵌入成功率及收敛速度上优于传统方法，有效降低无效个体生成概率。
conclusion: 混沌混合花粉算法为复杂VNE问题提供了高效求解方案，兼顾全局探索与局部开发能力，具有实际应用价值。
search_text: VNE Strategy based on Chaotic Hybrid Flower Pollination Algorithm Considering Multi-criteria Decision Making 基于考虑多准则决策的混沌混合花授粉算法的VNE策略 With the development of science and technology and the need for Multi-Criteria Decision-Making (MCDM), the optimization problem to be solved becomes extremely complex. The theoretically accurate and optimal solutions are often difficult to obtain. Therefore, meta-heuristic algorithms based on multi-point search have received extensive attention. Aiming at these problems, the design strategy of hybrid flower pollination algorithm for Virtual Network Embedding (VNE) problem is discussed. Combining the advantages of the Genetic Algorithm (GA) and FPA, the algorithm is optimized for the characteristics of discrete optimization problems. The cross operation is used to replace the cross-pollination operation to complete the global search and replace the mutation operation with self-pollination operation to enhance the ability of local search. Moreover, a life cycle mechanism is introduced as a complement to the traditional fitness-based selection strategy to avoid premature convergence. A chaotic optimization strategy is introduced to replace the random sequence-guided crossover process to strengthen the global search capability and reduce the probability of producing invalid individuals. 随着科学技术的发展和多标准决策（MCDM）的需要，要解决的优化问题变得极其复杂。理论上准确的最优解通常很难获得。因此，基于多点搜索的元启发式算法受到了广泛的关注。针对这些问题，讨论了虚拟网络嵌入（VNE）问题的混合花授粉算法的设计策略。该算法结合了遗传算法（GA）和FPA的优点，针对离散优化问题的特点进行了优化。用交叉操作代替异花操作完成全局搜索，用自花操作代替变异操作增强局部搜索能力。此外，引入生命周期机制作为传统基于适应度的选择策略的补充，以避免过早收敛。引入混沌优化策略来代替随机序列引导的交叉过程，以增强全局搜索能力并降低产生无效个体的概率。 本文提出一种基于混沌混合花粉算法的虚拟网络嵌入（VNE）策略，结合多准则决策分析以解决复杂优化问题。 Peiying Zhang,Fanglin Liu,Gagangeet Singh Aujla,Sahil Vashist cs.NE,cs.AI

authors_text: Peiying Zhang,Xue Pang,Neeraj Kumar,Gagangeet Singh Aujla,Haotong Cao
title: A Reliable Data-transmission Mechanism using Blockchain in Edge Computing Scenarios
title_zh: 边缘计算场景中基于区块链的可靠数据传输机制
abstract: With the advent of the Internet of things (IoT) era, more and more devices are connected to the IoT. Under the traditional cloud-thing centralized management mode, the transmission of massive data is facing many difficulties, and the reliability of data is difficult to be guaranteed. As emerging technologies, blockchain technology and edge computing (EC) technology have attracted the attention of academia in improving the reliability, privacy and invariability of IoT technology. In this paper, we combine the characteristics of the EC and blockchain to ensure the reliability of data transmission in the IoT. First of all, we propose a data transmission mechanism based on blockchain, which uses the distributed architecture of blockchain to ensure that the data is not tampered with; secondly, we introduce the three-tier structure in the architecture in turn; finally, we introduce the four working steps of the mechanism, which are similar to the working mechanism of blockchain. In the end, the simulation results show that the proposed scheme can ensure the reliability of data transmission in the Internet of things to a great extent.
summary: With the advent of the Internet of things (IoT) era, more and more devices are connected to the IoT. Under the traditional cloud-thing centralized management mode, the transmission of massive data is facing many difficulties, and the reliability of data is difficult to be guaranteed. As emerging technologies, blockchain technology and edge computing (EC) technology have attracted the attention of academia in improving the reliability, privacy and invariability of IoT technology. In this paper, we combine the characteristics of the EC and blockchain to ensure the reliability of data transmission in the IoT. First of all, we propose a data transmission mechanism based on blockchain, which uses the distributed architecture of blockchain to ensure that the data is not tampered with; secondly, we introduce the three-tier structure in the architecture in turn; finally, we introduce the four working steps of the mechanism, which are similar to the working mechanism of blockchain. In the end, the simulation results show that the proposed scheme can ensure the reliability of data transmission in the Internet of things to a great extent.
abstract_zh: 随着物联网（IoT）时代的到来，越来越多的设备连接到物联网。传统的云物集中管理模式下，海量数据的传输面临诸多困难，数据的可靠性难以保证。区块链技术和边缘计算（EC）技术作为新兴技术，在提高物联网技术的可靠性、隐私性和不变性方面引起了学术界的关注。本文结合EC和区块链的特点来保证物联网中数据传输的可靠性。首先，我们提出一种基于区块链的数据传输机制，利用区块链的分布式架构来保证数据不被篡改；其次，依次介绍架构中的三层结构；最后，我们介绍了该机制的四个工作步骤，这与区块链的工作机制类似。最后仿真结果表明，所提出的方案能够在很大程度上保证物联网数据传输的可靠性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于区块链的可靠数据传输机制，结合边缘计算技术以提高物联网环境下的数据可靠性。
AI.motivation: 传统云-物集中管理模式难以保障物联网中海量数据的传输可靠性，而区块链与边缘计算技术可提升数据隐私性、不可篡改性及可靠性。
AI.method: 设计基于区块链的三层架构数据传输机制，通过区块链分布式特性确保数据不可篡改，并定义与区块链工作原理相似的四步操作流程。
AI.result: 仿真结果表明，该方案在物联网场景下能显著提升数据传输的可靠性。
AI.conclusion: 区块链与边缘计算的结合可有效解决物联网数据传输中的可靠性问题，为未来物联网架构提供新思路。

title: Performance Evaluation of Infrared Image Enhancement Techniques
title_zh: 红外图像增强技术的性能评估
abstract: Infrared (IR) images are widely used in many fields such as medical imaging, object tracking, astronomy and military purposes for securing borders. Infrared images can be captured day or night based on the type of capturing device. The capturing devices use electromagnetic radiation with longer wavelengths. There are several types of IR radiation based on the range of wavelength and corresponding frequency. Due to noising and other artifacts, IR images are not clearly visible. In this paper, we present a complete up-todate survey on IR imaging enhancement techniques. The survey includes IR radiation types and devices and existing IR datasets. The survey covers spatial enhancement techniques, frequency-domain based enhancement techniques and Deep learning-based techniques.
summary: Infrared (IR) images are widely used in many fields such as medical imaging, object tracking, astronomy and military purposes for securing borders. Infrared images can be captured day or night based on the type of capturing device. The capturing devices use electromagnetic radiation with longer wavelengths. There are several types of IR radiation based on the range of wavelength and corresponding frequency. Due to noising and other artifacts, IR images are not clearly visible. In this paper, we present a complete up-todate survey on IR imaging enhancement techniques. The survey includes IR radiation types and devices and existing IR datasets. The survey covers spatial enhancement techniques, frequency-domain based enhancement techniques and Deep learning-based techniques.
abstract_zh: 红外 (IR) 图像广泛应用于医学成像、物体跟踪、天文学和确保边界安全的军事目的等许多领域。根据捕获设备的类型，可以在白天或晚上捕获红外图像。捕获设备使用波长较长的电磁辐射。根据波长范围和相应频率，红外辐射有多种类型。由于噪声和其他伪影，红外图像不清晰可见。在本文中，我们对红外成像增强技术进行了完整的最新调查。该调查包括红外辐射类型和设备以及现有的红外数据集。该调查涵盖了空间增强技术、基于频域的增强技术和基于深度学习的技术。

AI.tldr: 本文对红外图像增强技术进行全面综述，涵盖辐射类型、设备、数据集及现有增强方法。
AI.motivation: 红外图像在多个领域应用广泛，但受噪声和伪影影响清晰度不足，需系统梳理增强技术以提升实用性。
AI.method: 通过分类总结空间域增强、频域增强及深度学习方法，结合现有数据集与设备信息进行技术评估。
AI.result: 梳理了红外图像增强技术的发展现状，分析了不同方法的优缺点，并为未来研究方向提供参考。
AI.conclusion: 深度学习方法在红外图像增强中展现潜力，但需进一步优化以解决噪声抑制与细节保留的平衡问题。

authors_text: Jing He,Xinglu Liu,Qiyao Duan,Wai Kin Victor Chan,Mingyao Qi
title: Reinforcement learning for multi-item retrieval in the puzzle-based storage system
title_zh: 基于谜题的存储系统中多项目检索的强化学习
abstract: Nowadays, fast delivery services have created the need for high-density warehouses. The puzzle-based storage system is a practical way to enhance the storage density, however, facing difficulties in the retrieval process. In this work, a deep reinforcement learning algorithm, specifically the Double&Dueling Deep Q Network, is developed to solve the multi-item retrieval problem in the system with general settings, where multiple desired items, escorts, and I/O points are placed randomly. Additionally, we propose a general compact integer programming model to evaluate the solution quality. Extensive numerical experiments demonstrate that the reinforcement learning approach can yield high-quality solutions and outperforms three related state-of-the-art heuristic algorithms. Furthermore, a conversion algorithm and a decomposition framework are proposed to handle simultaneous movement and large-scale instances respectively, thus improving the applicability of the PBS system.
summary: Nowadays, fast delivery services have created the need for high-density warehouses. The puzzle-based storage system is a practical way to enhance the storage density, however, facing difficulties in the retrieval process. In this work, a deep reinforcement learning algorithm, specifically the Double&Dueling Deep Q Network, is developed to solve the multi-item retrieval problem in the system with general settings, where multiple desired items, escorts, and I/O points are placed randomly. Additionally, we propose a general compact integer programming model to evaluate the solution quality. Extensive numerical experiments demonstrate that the reinforcement learning approach can yield high-quality solutions and outperforms three related state-of-the-art heuristic algorithms. Furthermore, a conversion algorithm and a decomposition framework are proposed to handle simultaneous movement and large-scale instances respectively, thus improving the applicability of the PBS system.
abstract_zh: 如今，快速的配送服务创造了对高密度仓库的需求。基于谜题的存储系统是提高存储密度的实用方法，但在检索过程中面临困难。在这项工作中，开发了一种深度强化学习算法，特别是 Double&Dueling Deep Q Network，以解决具有常规设置的系统中的多项目检索问题，其中多个所需项目、护送和 I/O 点随机放置。此外，我们提出了一种通用的紧凑整数规划模型来评估解决方案的质量。大量的数值实验表明，强化学习方法可以产生高质量的解决方案，并且优于三种相关的最先进的启发式算法。此外，还提出了转换算法和分解框架来分别处理同时运动和大规模实例，从而提高了PBS系统的适用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于深度强化学习的算法解决拼图式存储系统中的多物品检索问题。
AI.motivation: 高密度仓储需求增加，但拼图式存储系统面临检索效率低下的挑战，传统方法难以应对随机分布的多物品检索场景。
AI.method: 开发Double&Dueling Deep Q Network算法，并构建紧凑整数规划模型评估方案质量，同时提出转换算法和分解框架处理大规模实例。
AI.result: 强化学习方法在多物品检索中生成高质量方案，优于三种先进启发式算法，且能有效处理并发移动和大规模场景。
AI.conclusion: 深度强化学习显著提升拼图式存储系统的检索效率，配套方法扩展了系统的实际应用范围。

search_text: Reinforcement learning for multi-item retrieval in the puzzle-based storage system 基于谜题的存储系统中多项目检索的强化学习 Nowadays, fast delivery services have created the need for high-density warehouses. The puzzle-based storage system is a practical way to enhance the storage density, however, facing difficulties in the retrieval process. In this work, a deep reinforcement learning algorithm, specifically the Double&Dueling Deep Q Network, is developed to solve the multi-item retrieval problem in the system with general settings, where multiple desired items, escorts, and I/O points are placed randomly. Additionally, we propose a general compact integer programming model to evaluate the solution quality. Extensive numerical experiments demonstrate that the reinforcement learning approach can yield high-quality solutions and outperforms three related state-of-the-art heuristic algorithms. Furthermore, a conversion algorithm and a decomposition framework are proposed to handle simultaneous movement and large-scale instances respectively, thus improving the applicability of the PBS system. 如今，快速的配送服务创造了对高密度仓库的需求。基于谜题的存储系统是提高存储密度的实用方法，但在检索过程中面临困难。在这项工作中，开发了一种深度强化学习算法，特别是 Double&Dueling Deep Q Network，以解决具有常规设置的系统中的多项目检索问题，其中多个所需项目、护送和 I/O 点随机放置。此外，我们提出了一种通用的紧凑整数规划模型来评估解决方案的质量。大量的数值实验表明，强化学习方法可以产生高质量的解决方案，并且优于三种相关的最先进的启发式算法。此外，还提出了转换算法和分解框架来分别处理同时运动和大规模实例，从而提高了PBS系统的适用性。 本文提出基于深度强化学习的算法解决拼图式存储系统中的多物品检索问题。 Jing He,Xinglu Liu,Qiyao Duan,Wai Kin Victor Chan,Mingyao Qi cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.DM,eess.SY,math.OC

authors_text: Kunzhe Huang,Yiming Li,Baoyuan Wu,Zhan Qin,Kui Ren
title: Backdoor Defense via Decoupling the Training Process
title_zh: 通过解耦训练过程进行后门防御
comment: This work is accepted by the ICLR 2022. The first two authors contributed equally to this work. 25 pages
comments: This work is accepted by the ICLR 2022. The first two authors contributed equally to this work. 25 pages
abstract: Recent studies have revealed that deep neural networks (DNNs) are vulnerable to backdoor attacks, where attackers embed hidden backdoors in the DNN model by poisoning a few training samples. The attacked model behaves normally on benign samples, whereas its prediction will be maliciously changed when the backdoor is activated. We reveal that poisoned samples tend to cluster together in the feature space of the attacked DNN model, which is mostly due to the end-to-end supervised training paradigm. Inspired by this observation, we propose a novel backdoor defense via decoupling the original end-to-end training process into three stages. Specifically, we first learn the backbone of a DNN model via \emph{self-supervised learning} based on training samples without their labels. The learned backbone will map samples with the same ground-truth label to similar locations in the feature space. Then, we freeze the parameters of the learned backbone and train the remaining fully connected layers via standard training with all (labeled) training samples. Lastly, to further alleviate side-effects of poisoned samples in the second stage, we remove labels of some `low-credible' samples determined based on the learned model and conduct a \emph{semi-supervised fine-tuning} of the whole model. Extensive experiments on multiple benchmark datasets and DNN models verify that the proposed defense is effective in reducing backdoor threats while preserving high accuracy in predicting benign samples. Our code is available at \url{https://github.com/SCLBD/DBD}.

The attacked model behaves normally on benign samples, whereas its prediction will be maliciously changed when the backdoor is activated. We reveal that poisoned samples tend to cluster together in the feature space of the attacked DNN model, which is mostly due to the end-to-end supervised training paradigm. Inspired by this observation, we propose a novel backdoor defense via decoupling the original end-to-end training process into three stages. Specifically, we first learn the backbone of a DNN model via \emph{self-supervised learning} based on training samples without their labels. The learned backbone will map samples with the same ground-truth label to similar locations in the feature space. Then, we freeze the parameters of the learned backbone and train the remaining fully connected layers via standard training with all (labeled) training samples. Lastly, to further alleviate side-effects of poisoned samples in the second stage, we remove labels of some `low-credible' samples determined based on the learned model and conduct a \emph{semi-supervised fine-tuning} of the whole model. Extensive experiments on multiple benchmark datasets and DNN models verify that the proposed defense is effective in reducing backdoor threats while preserving high accuracy in predicting benign samples. Our code is available at \url{https://github.com/SCLBD/DBD}.
abstract_zh: 最近的研究表明，深度神经网络 (DNN) 很容易受到后门攻击，攻击者通过毒害一些训练样本，在 DNN 模型中嵌入隐藏的后门。受攻击的模型在良性样本上表现正常，而当后门激活时，其预测将被恶意改变。我们发现，中毒样本倾向于在受攻击的 DNN 模型的特征空间中聚集在一起，这主要是由于端到端的监督训练范例。受这一观察的启发，我们通过将原始的端到端训练过程解耦为三个阶段，提出了一种新颖的后门防御。具体来说，我们首先通过基于没有标签的训练样本的\emph{自监督学习}来学习 DNN 模型的主干。学习到的主干网络会将具有相同地面实况标签的样本映射到特征空间中的相似位置。然后，我们冻结学习主干的参数，并通过标准训练使用所有（标记的）训练样本来训练剩余的全连接层。最后，为了进一步减轻第二阶段中毒样本的副作用，我们删除了一些基于学习模型确定的“低可信”样本的标签，并对整个模型进行了\emph{半监督微调}。对多个基准数据集和 DNN 模型的大量实验验证了所提出的防御措施可以有效减少后门威胁，同时保持预测良性样本的高精度。我们的代码可在 \url{https://github.com/SCLBD/DBD} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过解耦训练过程来防御深度神经网络中后门攻击的新方法。
AI.motivation: 现有研究发现深度神经网络易受后门攻击，攻击者通过污染少量样本植入隐蔽后门。受毒化样本在特征空间中聚类现象启发，作者提出解耦训练过程以缓解后门威胁。
AI.method: 将训练过程分为三阶段：1) 通过自监督学习训练模型主干；2) 冻结主干参数后用全部标注样本训练全连接层；3) 移除低可信度样本进行半监督微调。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集和模型上验证，该方法能有效降低后门威胁同时保持良性样本高准确率。
AI.conclusion: 解耦训练过程的防御方法在实验中表现有效，为后门攻击防御提供了新思路。

title: Deep Impulse Responses: Estimating and Parameterizing Filters with Deep Networks
title_zh: 深度脉冲响应：使用深度网络估计和参数化滤波器
abstract: Impulse response estimation in high noise and in-the-wild settings, with minimal control of the underlying data distributions, is a challenging problem. We propose a novel framework for parameterizing and estimating impulse responses based on recent advances in neural representation learning. Our framework is driven by a carefully designed neural network that jointly estimates the impulse response and the (apriori unknown) spectral noise characteristics of an observed signal given the source signal. We demonstrate robustness in estimation, even under low signal-to-noise ratios, and show strong results when learning from spatio-temporal real-world speech data. Our framework provides a natural way to interpolate impulse responses on a spatial grid, while also allowing for efficiently compressing and storing them for real-time rendering applications in augmented and virtual reality.
summary: Impulse response estimation in high noise and in-the-wild settings, with minimal control of the underlying data distributions, is a challenging problem. We propose a novel framework for parameterizing and estimating impulse responses based on recent advances in neural representation learning. Our framework is driven by a carefully designed neural network that jointly estimates the impulse response and the (apriori unknown) spectral noise characteristics of an observed signal given the source signal. We demonstrate robustness in estimation, even under low signal-to-noise ratios, and show strong results when learning from spatio-temporal real-world speech data. Our framework provides a natural way to interpolate impulse responses on a spatial grid, while also allowing for efficiently compressing and storing them for real-time rendering applications in augmented and virtual reality.
abstract_zh: 在高噪声和野外环境中进行脉冲响应估计，并且对基础数据分布的控制最少，是一个具有挑战性的问题。我们基于神经表示学习的最新进展，提出了一种用于参数化和估计脉冲响应的新颖框架。我们的框架由精心设计的神经网络驱动，该神经网络联合估计给定源信号的观测信号的脉冲响应和（先验未知）频谱噪声特征。即使在低信噪比的情况下，我们也展示了估计的鲁棒性，并且在从时空真实世界语音数据中学习时显示出强大的结果。我们的框架提供了一种在空间网格上插值脉冲响应的自然方法，同时还允许有效地压缩和存储它们，以用于增强现实和虚拟现实中的实时渲染应用程序。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度网络的框架，用于在高噪声和真实环境下估计和参数化脉冲响应。
AI.motivation: 传统脉冲响应估计方法在噪声大、数据分布不可控的场景下效果有限，需开发鲁棒性强的新方法以适应低信噪比和真实世界数据。
AI.method: 设计神经网络联合估计脉冲响应及信号的先验未知频谱噪声特性，利用时空数据进行学习，并支持空间网格插值与高效压缩。
AI.result: 在低信噪比条件下表现稳健，实测真实语音数据效果显著，可高效压缩存储以满足AR/VR实时渲染需求。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为脉冲响应估计提供了新思路，通过深度学习实现噪声鲁棒性与空间插值，适用于增强现实等实时应用领域。

search_text: Deep Impulse Responses: Estimating and Parameterizing Filters with Deep Networks 深度脉冲响应：使用深度网络估计和参数化滤波器 Impulse response estimation in high noise and in-the-wild settings, with minimal control of the underlying data distributions, is a challenging problem. We propose a novel framework for parameterizing and estimating impulse responses based on recent advances in neural representation learning. Our framework is driven by a carefully designed neural network that jointly estimates the impulse response and the (apriori unknown) spectral noise characteristics of an observed signal given the source signal. We demonstrate robustness in estimation, even under low signal-to-noise ratios, and show strong results when learning from spatio-temporal real-world speech data. Our framework provides a natural way to interpolate impulse responses on a spatial grid, while also allowing for efficiently compressing and storing them for real-time rendering applications in augmented and virtual reality. 在高噪声和野外环境中进行脉冲响应估计，并且对基础数据分布的控制最少，是一个具有挑战性的问题。我们基于神经表示学习的最新进展，提出了一种用于参数化和估计脉冲响应的新颖框架。我们的框架由精心设计的神经网络驱动，该神经网络联合估计给定源信号的观测信号的脉冲响应和（先验未知）频谱噪声特征。即使在低信噪比的情况下，我们也展示了估计的鲁棒性，并且在从时空真实世界语音数据中学习时显示出强大的结果。我们的框架提供了一种在空间网格上插值脉冲响应的自然方法，同时还允许有效地压缩和存储它们，以用于增强现实和虚拟现实中的实时渲染应用程序。 本文提出一种基于深度网络的框架，用于在高噪声和真实环境下估计和参数化脉冲响应。 Alexander Richard,Peter Dodds,Vamsi Krishna Ithapu cs.SD,cs.LG,eess.AS

title: Investigating the fidelity of explainable artificial intelligence methods for applications of convolutional neural networks in geoscience
title_zh: 研究可解释的人工智能方法在地球科学中应用卷积神经网络的保真度
comment: ef:2022, Artificial Intelligence for the Earth Systems (AMS)
comments: ef:2022, Artificial Intelligence for the Earth Systems (AMS)
abstract: Convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have recently attracted great attention in geoscience due to their ability to capture non-linear system behavior and extract predictive spatiotemporal patterns. Given their black-box nature however, and the importance of prediction explainability, methods of explainable artificial intelligence (XAI) are gaining popularity as a means to explain the CNN decision-making strategy. Here, we establish an intercomparison of some of the most popular XAI methods and investigate their fidelity in explaining CNN decisions for geoscientific applications. Our goal is to raise awareness of the theoretical limitations of these methods and gain insight into the relative strengths and weaknesses to help guide best practices. The considered XAI methods are first applied to an idealized attribution benchmark, where the ground truth of explanation of the network is known a priori, to help objectively assess their performance. Secondly, we apply XAI to a climate-related prediction setting, namely to explain a CNN that is trained to predict the number of atmospheric rivers in daily snapshots of climate simulations. Our results highlight several important issues of XAI methods (e.g., gradient shattering, inability to distinguish the sign of attribution, ignorance to zero input) that have previously been overlooked in our field and, if not considered cautiously, may lead to a distorted picture of the CNN decision-making strategy. We envision that our analysis will motivate further investigation into XAI fidelity and will help towards a cautious implementation of XAI in geoscience, which can lead to further exploitation of CNNs and deep learning for prediction problems.

Given their black-box nature however, and the importance of prediction explainability, methods of explainable artificial intelligence (XAI) are gaining popularity as a means to explain the CNN decision-making strategy. Here, we establish an intercomparison of some of the most popular XAI methods and investigate their fidelity in explaining CNN decisions for geoscientific applications. Our goal is to raise awareness of the theoretical limitations of these methods and gain insight into the relative strengths and weaknesses to help guide best practices. The considered XAI methods are first applied to an idealized attribution benchmark, where the ground truth of explanation of the network is known a priori, to help objectively assess their performance. Secondly, we apply XAI to a climate-related prediction setting, namely to explain a CNN that is trained to predict the number of atmospheric rivers in daily snapshots of climate simulations. Our results highlight several important issues of XAI methods (e.g., gradient shattering, inability to distinguish the sign of attribution, ignorance to zero input) that have previously been overlooked in our field and, if not considered cautiously, may lead to a distorted picture of the CNN decision-making strategy. We envision that our analysis will motivate further investigation into XAI fidelity and will help towards a cautious implementation of XAI in geoscience, which can lead to further exploitation of CNNs and deep learning for prediction problems.
abstract_zh: 卷积神经网络（CNN）最近因其捕获非线性系统行为和提取预测时空模式的能力而在地球科学领域引起了极大关注。然而，鉴于其黑盒性质以及预测可解释性的重要性，可解释人工智能 (XAI) 方法作为解释 CNN 决策策略的手段越来越受欢迎。在这里，我们对一些最流行的 XAI 方法进行了相互比较，并研究了它们在解释地球科学应用的 CNN 决策时的保真度。我们的目标是提高对这些方法的理论局限性的认识，并深入了解相对优势和劣势，以帮​​助指导最佳实践。所考虑的 XAI 方法首先应用于理想化的归因基准，其中网络解释的基本事实是先验已知的，以帮助客观评估其性能。其次，我们将 XAI 应用于与气候相关的预测设置，即解释经过训练以预测气候模拟的每日快照中大气河流数量的 CNN。我们的结果强调了 XAI 方法的几个重要问题（例如梯度破碎、无法区分归因符号、忽略零输入），这些问题以前在我们的领域中被忽视，如果不谨慎考虑，可能会导致 CNN 决策策略的扭曲。我们预计，我们的分析将激发对 XAI 保真度的进一步研究，并将有助于在地球科学中谨慎实施 XAI，这可能导致进一步利用 CNN 和深度学习来解决预测问题。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在评估可解释人工智能（XAI）方法在地质科学中卷积神经网络（CNN）应用中的准确性。
AI.motivation: 由于CNN的黑箱特性，地质科学领域亟需通过XAI方法解释其决策过程，以确保预测结果的可信度和可解释性。
AI.method: 通过理想化归因基准测试和气候预测场景（如大气河流数量预测）对比分析主流XAI方法的性能。
AI.result: 发现XAI方法存在梯度碎片化、无法区分归因符号、忽略零输入等被忽视的问题，可能扭曲CNN决策解释。
AI.conclusion: 需谨慎实施XAI技术，进一步研究其准确性，以推动CNN和深度学习在地质科学预测中的合理应用。

authors_text: Petra Poklukar,Miguel Vasco,Hang Yin,Francisco S. Melo,Ana Paiva,Danica Kragic
title: Geometric Multimodal Contrastive Representation Learning
title_zh: 几何多模态对比表示学习
abstract: Learning representations of multimodal data that are both informative and robust to missing modalities at test time remains a challenging problem due to the inherent heterogeneity of data obtained from different channels. To address it, we present a novel Geometric Multimodal Contrastive (GMC) representation learning method consisting of two main components: i) a two-level architecture consisting of modality-specific base encoders, allowing to process an arbitrary number of modalities to an intermediate representation of fixed dimensionality, and a shared projection head, mapping the intermediate representations to a latent representation space; ii) a multimodal contrastive loss function that encourages the geometric alignment of the learned representations. We experimentally demonstrate that GMC representations are semantically rich and achieve state-of-the-art performance with missing modality information on three different learning problems including prediction and reinforcement learning tasks.
summary: Learning representations of multimodal data that are both informative and robust to missing modalities at test time remains a challenging problem due to the inherent heterogeneity of data obtained from different channels. To address it, we present a novel Geometric Multimodal Contrastive (GMC) representation learning method consisting of two main components: i) a two-level architecture consisting of modality-specific base encoders, allowing to process an arbitrary number of modalities to an intermediate representation of fixed dimensionality, and a shared projection head, mapping the intermediate representations to a latent representation space; ii) a multimodal contrastive loss function that encourages the geometric alignment of the learned representations. We experimentally demonstrate that GMC representations are semantically rich and achieve state-of-the-art performance with missing modality information on three different learning problems including prediction and reinforcement learning tasks.
abstract_zh: 由于从不同渠道获得的数据固有的异质性，学习在测试时提供信息丰富且对缺失模态具有鲁棒性的多模态数据表示仍然是一个具有挑战性的问题。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的几何多模态对比（GMC）表示学习方法，由两个主要组件组成：i）由特定于模态的基本编码器组成的两级架构，允许将任意数量的模态处理为固定维度的中间表示，以及共享投影头，将中间表示映射到潜在表示空间； ii）多模态对比损失函数，鼓励学习表示的几何对齐。我们通过实验证明，GMC 表示语义丰富，并且在三个不同的学习问题（包括预测和强化学习任务）上缺少模态信息的情况下实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 解决多模态数据表示学习在测试时缺失模态的挑战
AI.motivation: 多模态数据的异质性导致在测试时缺失模态时难以学习到鲁棒且信息丰富的表示
AI.method: 提出包含两层架构（模态特定编码器+共享投影头）和多模态对比损失函数的GMC方法，通过几何对齐优化表示学习
AI.result: 实验表明GMC表示在缺失模态情况下于三个任务（预测和强化学习）中达到最先进水平，且语义丰富
AI.conclusion: GMC方法通过几何对齐和两层架构有效提升了多模态表示的鲁棒性和性能

authors_text: Jinpeng Wang,Bin Chen,Dongliang Liao,Ziyun Zeng,Gongfu Li,Shu-Tao Xia,Jin Xu
title: Hybrid Contrastive Quantization for Efficient Cross-View Video Retrieval
title_zh: 用于高效跨视图视频检索的混合对比量化
comment: Accepted to The Web Conference 2022 (WWW'22). 11 pages, 5 tables, 6 figures
comments: Accepted to The Web Conference 2022 (WWW'22). 11 pages, 5 tables, 6 figures
abstract: With the recent boom of video-based social platforms (e.g., YouTube and TikTok), video retrieval using sentence queries has become an important demand and attracts increasing research attention. Despite the decent performance, existing text-video retrieval models in vision and language communities are impractical for large-scale Web search because they adopt brute-force search based on high-dimensional embeddings. To improve efficiency, Web search engines widely apply vector compression libraries (e.g., FAISS) to post-process the learned embeddings. Unfortunately, separate compression from feature encoding degrades the robustness of representations and incurs performance decay. To pursue a better balance between performance and efficiency, we propose the first quantized representation learning method for cross-view video retrieval, namely Hybrid Contrastive Quantization (HCQ). Specifically, HCQ learns both coarse-grained and fine-grained quantizations with transformers, which provide complementary understandings for texts and videos and preserve comprehensive semantic information. By performing Asymmetric-Quantized Contrastive Learning (AQ-CL) across views, HCQ aligns texts and videos at coarse-grained and multiple fine-grained levels. This hybrid-grained learning strategy serves as strong supervision on the cross-view video quantization model, where contrastive learning at different levels can be mutually promoted. Extensive experiments on three Web video benchmark datasets demonstrate that HCQ achieves competitive performance with state-of-the-art non-compressed retrieval methods while showing high efficiency in storage and computation. Code and configurations are available at https://github.com/gimpong/WWW22-HCQ.
summary: With the recent boom of video-based social platforms (e.g., YouTube and TikTok), video retrieval using sentence queries has become an important demand and attracts increasing research attention. Despite the decent performance, existing text-video retrieval models in vision and language communities are impractical for large-scale Web search because they adopt brute-force search based on high-dimensional embeddings. To improve efficiency, Web search engines widely apply vector compression libraries (e.g., FAISS) to post-process the learned embeddings. Unfortunately, separate compression from feature encoding degrades the robustness of representations and incurs performance decay. To pursue a better balance between performance and efficiency, we propose the first quantized representation learning method for cross-view video retrieval, namely Hybrid Contrastive Quantization (HCQ). Specifically, HCQ learns both coarse-grained and fine-grained quantizations with transformers, which provide complementary understandings for texts and videos and preserve comprehensive semantic information. By performing Asymmetric-Quantized Contrastive Learning (AQ-CL) across views, HCQ aligns texts and videos at coarse-grained and multiple fine-grained levels. This hybrid-grained learning strategy serves as strong supervision on the cross-view video quantization model, where contrastive learning at different levels can be mutually promoted. Extensive experiments on three Web video benchmark datasets demonstrate that HCQ achieves competitive performance with state-of-the-art non-compressed retrieval methods while showing high efficiency in storage and computation. Code and configurations are available at https://github.com/gimpong/WWW22-HCQ.
abstract_zh: 随着近年来基于视频的社交平台（例如YouTube和TikTok）的蓬勃发展，使用句子查询的视频检索已成为重要需求并吸引了越来越多的研究关注。尽管性能不错，但视觉和语言社区中现有的文本视频检索模型对于大规模网络搜索来说是不切实际的，因为它们采用基于高维嵌入的强力搜索。为了提高效率，网络搜索引擎广泛应用矢量压缩库（例如 FAISS）来对学习到的嵌入进行后处理。不幸的是，将压缩与特征编码分开会降低表示的鲁棒性并导致性能下降。为了追求性能和效率之间的更好平衡，我们提出了第一个用于跨视图视频检索的量化表示学习方法，即混合对比量化（HCQ）。具体来说，HCQ 使用转换器学习粗粒度和细粒度量化，这为文本和视频提供了互补的理解，并保留了全面的语义信息。通过跨视图执行非对称量化对比学习 (AQ-CL)，HCQ 在粗粒度和多个细粒度级别上对齐文本和视频。这种混合粒度的学习策略对跨视图视频量化模型起到了强有力的监督作用，不同级别的对比学习可以相互促进。对三个网络视频基准数据集的大量实验表明，HCQ 通过最先进的非压缩检索方法实现了具有竞争力的性能，同时显示出高存储和计算效率。代码和配置可在 https://github.com/gimpong/WWW22-HCQ 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Hybrid Contrastive Quantization (HCQ)的混合对比量化方法，旨在提升跨视角视频检索的效率，同时保持高性能。
AI.motivation: 现有文本-视频检索模型因依赖高维嵌入的暴力搜索，在大规模网络搜索中效率低下；而现有压缩方法虽提升效率，但会导致表示鲁棒性下降和性能衰减。
AI.method: HCQ通过Transformer学习文本和视频的粗粒度与细粒度量化表示，结合异步量化对比学习（AQ-CL），在不同粒度层级对齐文本与视频语义，实现高效且鲁棒的跨视角检索。
AI.result: 在三个网络视频基准数据集上，HCQ在保持与非压缩方法竞争性能的同时，显著提升了存储和计算效率。
AI.conclusion: HCQ通过混合粒度量化与对比学习策略，有效平衡了跨视角视频检索的性能与效率，为大规模应用提供了可行方案。

search_text: Hybrid Contrastive Quantization for Efficient Cross-View Video Retrieval 用于高效跨视图视频检索的混合对比量化 With the recent boom of video-based social platforms (e.g., YouTube and TikTok), video retrieval using sentence queries has become an important demand and attracts increasing research attention. Despite the decent performance, existing text-video retrieval models in vision and language communities are impractical for large-scale Web search because they adopt brute-force search based on high-dimensional embeddings. To improve efficiency, Web search engines widely apply vector compression libraries (e.g., FAISS) to post-process the learned embeddings. Unfortunately, separate compression from feature encoding degrades the robustness of representations and incurs performance decay. To pursue a better balance between performance and efficiency, we propose the first quantized representation learning method for cross-view video retrieval, namely Hybrid Contrastive Quantization (HCQ). Specifically, HCQ learns both coarse-grained and fine-grained quantizations with transformers, which provide complementary understandings for texts and videos and preserve comprehensive semantic information. By performing Asymmetric-Quantized Contrastive Learning (AQ-CL) across views, HCQ aligns texts and videos at coarse-grained and multiple fine-grained levels. This hybrid-grained learning strategy serves as strong supervision on the cross-view video quantization model, where contrastive learning at different levels can be mutually promoted. Extensive experiments on three Web video benchmark datasets demonstrate that HCQ achieves competitive performance with state-of-the-art non-compressed retrieval methods while showing high efficiency in storage and computation. Code and configurations are available at https://github.com/gimpong/WWW22-HCQ. 随着近年来基于视频的社交平台（例如YouTube和TikTok）的蓬勃发展，使用句子查询的视频检索已成为重要需求并吸引了越来越多的研究关注。尽管性能不错，但视觉和语言社区中现有的文本视频检索模型对于大规模网络搜索来说是不切实际的，因为它们采用基于高维嵌入的强力搜索。为了提高效率，网络搜索引擎广泛应用矢量压缩库（例如 FAISS）来对学习到的嵌入进行后处理。不幸的是，将压缩与特征编码分开会降低表示的鲁棒性并导致性能下降。为了追求性能和效率之间的更好平衡，我们提出了第一个用于跨视图视频检索的量化表示学习方法，即混合对比量化（HCQ）。具体来说，HCQ 使用转换器学习粗粒度和细粒度量化，这为文本和视频提供了互补的理解，并保留了全面的语义信息。通过跨视图执行非对称量化对比学习 (AQ-CL)，HCQ 在粗粒度和多个细粒度级别上对齐文本和视频。这种混合粒度的学习策略对跨视图视频量化模型起到了强有力的监督作用，不同级别的对比学习可以相互促进。对三个网络视频基准数据集的大量实验表明，HCQ 通过最先进的非压缩检索方法实现了具有竞争力的性能，同时显示出高存储和计算效率。代码和配置可在 https://github.com/gimpong/WWW22-HCQ 获取。 本文提出了一种名为Hybrid Contrastive Quantization (HCQ)的混合对比量化方法，旨在提升跨视角视频检索的效率，同时保持高性能。 Jinpeng Wang,Bin Chen,Dongliang Liao,Ziyun Zeng,Gongfu Li,Shu-Tao Xia,Jin Xu cs.IR,cs.CV,cs.LG,cs.MM,cs.SI

authors_text: Yuxin Fang,Li Dong,Hangbo Bao,Xinggang Wang,Furu Wei
title: Corrupted Image Modeling for Self-Supervised Visual Pre-Training
title_zh: 用于自监督视觉预训练的损坏图像建模
abstract: We introduce Corrupted Image Modeling (CIM) for self-supervised visual pre-training. CIM uses an auxiliary generator with a small trainable BEiT to corrupt the input image instead of using artificial [MASK] tokens, where some patches are randomly selected and replaced with plausible alternatives sampled from the BEiT output distribution. Given this corrupted image, an enhancer network learns to either recover all the original image pixels, or predict whether each visual token is replaced by a generator sample or not. The generator and the enhancer are simultaneously trained and synergistically updated. After pre-training, the enhancer can be used as a high-capacity visual encoder for downstream tasks. CIM is a general and flexible visual pre-training framework that is suitable for various network architectures. For the first time, CIM demonstrates that both ViT and CNN can learn rich visual representations using a unified, non-Siamese framework. Experimental results show that our approach achieves compelling results in vision benchmarks, such as ImageNet classification and ADE20K semantic segmentation.
summary: We introduce Corrupted Image Modeling (CIM) for self-supervised visual pre-training. CIM uses an auxiliary generator with a small trainable BEiT to corrupt the input image instead of using artificial [MASK] tokens, where some patches are randomly selected and replaced with plausible alternatives sampled from the BEiT output distribution. Given this corrupted image, an enhancer network learns to either recover all the original image pixels, or predict whether each visual token is replaced by a generator sample or not. The generator and the enhancer are simultaneously trained and synergistically updated. After pre-training, the enhancer can be used as a high-capacity visual encoder for downstream tasks. CIM is a general and flexible visual pre-training framework that is suitable for various network architectures. For the first time, CIM demonstrates that both ViT and CNN can learn rich visual representations using a unified, non-Siamese framework. Experimental results show that our approach achieves compelling results in vision benchmarks, such as ImageNet classification and ADE20K semantic segmentation.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了用于自监督视觉预训练的损坏图像建模（CIM）。 CIM 使用带有小型可训练 BEiT 的辅助生成器来破坏输入图像，而不是使用人工 [MASK] 令牌，其中随机选择一些补丁并替换为从 BEiT 输出分布中采样的合理替代方案。给定这个损坏的图像，增强器网络学习恢复所有原始图像像素，或者预测每个视觉标记是否被生成器样本替换。生成器和增强器同时训练并协同更新。经过预训练后，增强器可以用作下游任务的大容量视觉编码器。 CIM是一种通用且灵活的视觉预训练框架，适用于各种网络架构。 CIM 首次证明 ViT 和 CNN 都可以使用统一的非 Siamese 框架学习丰富的视觉表示。实验结果表明，我们的方法在视觉基准测试中取得了引人注目的结果，例如 ImageNet 分类和 ADE20K 语义分割。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Corrupted Image Modeling (CIM)的自监督视觉预训练方法，通过生成器破坏输入图像并训练增强网络恢复或判断图像内容，适用于多种网络架构。
AI.motivation: 传统自监督方法依赖人工掩码标记存在局限性，而CIM通过生成器动态生成合理替代图像，提升模型灵活性和表征能力，并首次实现ViT与CNN在统一框架下的协同训练。
AI.method: 使用小型BEiT生成器随机替换图像块生成损坏图像，增强网络同时学习像素级恢复或判断替换区域，生成器与增强网络协同训练，预训练后增强网络作为视觉编码器用于下游任务。
AI.result: 在ImageNet分类和ADE20K分割任务中取得优异性能，验证了CIM框架对ViT和CNN的有效性，展示了统一非孪生框架下视觉表征学习的潜力。
AI.conclusion: CIM提供了一种通用灵活的视觉预训练框架，通过生成器-增强器协同机制显著提升模型性能，为不同架构的自监督学习提供了新思路。
