title: Benchmarking and Analyzing Point Cloud Classification under Corruptions
title_zh: 腐败情况下点云分类的基准测试和分析
comment: ICML 2022; Code and dataset are available at https://github.com/jiawei-ren/modelnetc
comments: ICML 2022; Code and dataset are available at https://github.com/jiawei-ren/modelnetc
abstract: 3D perception, especially point cloud classification, has achieved substantial progress. However, in real-world deployment, point cloud corruptions are inevitable due to the scene complexity, sensor inaccuracy, and processing imprecision. In this work, we aim to rigorously benchmark and analyze point cloud classification under corruptions. To conduct a systematic investigation, we first provide a taxonomy of common 3D corruptions and identify the atomic corruptions. Then, we perform a comprehensive evaluation on a wide range of representative point cloud models to understand their robustness and generalizability. Our benchmark results show that although point cloud classification performance improves over time, the state-of-the-art methods are on the verge of being less robust. Based on the obtained observations, we propose several effective techniques to enhance point cloud classifier robustness. We hope our comprehensive benchmark, in-depth analysis, and proposed techniques could spark future research in robust 3D perception.
summary: 3D perception, especially point cloud classification, has achieved substantial progress. However, in real-world deployment, point cloud corruptions are inevitable due to the scene complexity, sensor inaccuracy, and processing imprecision. In this work, we aim to rigorously benchmark and analyze point cloud classification under corruptions. To conduct a systematic investigation, we first provide a taxonomy of common 3D corruptions and identify the atomic corruptions. Then, we perform a comprehensive evaluation on a wide range of representative point cloud models to understand their robustness and generalizability. Our benchmark results show that although point cloud classification performance improves over time, the state-of-the-art methods are on the verge of being less robust. Based on the obtained observations, we propose several effective techniques to enhance point cloud classifier robustness. We hope our comprehensive benchmark, in-depth analysis, and proposed techniques could spark future research in robust 3D perception.
abstract_zh: 3D感知，特别是点云分类，取得了长足的进步。然而，在实际部署中，由于场景复杂性、传感器不准确和处理不精确，点云损坏是不可避免的。在这项工作中，我们的目标是严格基准测试和分析损坏情况下的点云分类。为了进行系统调查，我们首先提供常见 3D 损坏的分类并识别原子损坏。然后，我们对各种代表性点云模型进行综合评估，以了解它们的鲁棒性和泛化性。我们的基准测试结果表明，尽管点云分类性能随着时间的推移而提高，但最先进的方法正处于鲁棒性下降的边缘。根据获得的观察结果，我们提出了几种有效的技术来增强点云分类器的鲁棒性。我们希望我们的综合基准、深入分析和提出的技术能够激发未来对稳健 3D 感知的研究。

AI.tldr: 该论文旨在通过构建基准测试和深入分析，评估点云分类模型在各种噪声和损坏情况下的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现实场景中点云数据常受场景复杂性、传感器误差等因素影响，现有研究缺乏对点云分类模型鲁棒性的系统性评估。
AI.method: 提出3D损坏分类法，识别基础损坏类型；对多种代表性点云模型进行大规模实验，分析其在不同损坏下的性能表现，并提出增强鲁棒性的技术方案。
AI.result: 实验表明尽管分类性能持续提升，但最先进方法在损坏场景下表现脆弱，所提技术能有效提升模型鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 通过构建的基准测试和分析方法，为鲁棒3D感知研究提供参考，推动未来在复杂环境下的模型优化方向。

search_text: Benchmarking and Analyzing Point Cloud Classification under Corruptions 腐败情况下点云分类的基准测试和分析 3D perception, especially point cloud classification, has achieved substantial progress. However, in real-world deployment, point cloud corruptions are inevitable due to the scene complexity, sensor inaccuracy, and processing imprecision. In this work, we aim to rigorously benchmark and analyze point cloud classification under corruptions. To conduct a systematic investigation, we first provide a taxonomy of common 3D corruptions and identify the atomic corruptions. Then, we perform a comprehensive evaluation on a wide range of representative point cloud models to understand their robustness and generalizability. Our benchmark results show that although point cloud classification performance improves over time, the state-of-the-art methods are on the verge of being less robust. Based on the obtained observations, we propose several effective techniques to enhance point cloud classifier robustness. We hope our comprehensive benchmark, in-depth analysis, and proposed techniques could spark future research in robust 3D perception. 3D感知，特别是点云分类，取得了长足的进步。然而，在实际部署中，由于场景复杂性、传感器不准确和处理不精确，点云损坏是不可避免的。在这项工作中，我们的目标是严格基准测试和分析损坏情况下的点云分类。为了进行系统调查，我们首先提供常见 3D 损坏的分类并识别原子损坏。然后，我们对各种代表性点云模型进行综合评估，以了解它们的鲁棒性和泛化性。我们的基准测试结果表明，尽管点云分类性能随着时间的推移而提高，但最先进的方法正处于鲁棒性下降的边缘。根据获得的观察结果，我们提出了几种有效的技术来增强点云分类器的鲁棒性。我们希望我们的综合基准、深入分析和提出的技术能够激发未来对稳健 3D 感知的研究。 该论文旨在通过构建基准测试和深入分析，评估点云分类模型在各种噪声和损坏情况下的鲁棒性。 Jiawei Ren,Liang Pan,Ziwei Liu cs.CV

title: Message Passing Neural PDE Solvers
title_zh: 消息传递神经偏微分方程求解器
abstract: The numerical solution of partial differential equations (PDEs) is difficult, having led to a century of research so far. Recently, there have been pushes to build neural--numerical hybrid solvers, which piggy-backs the modern trend towards fully end-to-end learned systems. Most works so far can only generalize over a subset of properties to which a generic solver would be faced, including: resolution, topology, geometry, boundary conditions, domain discretization regularity, dimensionality, etc. In this work, we build a solver, satisfying these properties, where all the components are based on neural message passing, replacing all heuristically designed components in the computation graph with backprop-optimized neural function approximators. We show that neural message passing solvers representationally contain some classical methods, such as finite differences, finite volumes, and WENO schemes. In order to encourage stability in training autoregressive models, we put forward a method that is based on the principle of zero-stability, posing stability as a domain adaptation problem. We validate our method on various fluid-like flow problems, demonstrating fast, stable, and accurate performance across different domain topologies, equation parameters, discretizations, etc., in 1D and 2D.
summary: The numerical solution of partial differential equations (PDEs) is difficult, having led to a century of research so far. Recently, there have been pushes to build neural--numerical hybrid solvers, which piggy-backs the modern trend towards fully end-to-end learned systems. Most works so far can only generalize over a subset of properties to which a generic solver would be faced, including: resolution, topology, geometry, boundary conditions, domain discretization regularity, dimensionality, etc. In this work, we build a solver, satisfying these properties, where all the components are based on neural message passing, replacing all heuristically designed components in the computation graph with backprop-optimized neural function approximators. We show that neural message passing solvers representationally contain some classical methods, such as finite differences, finite volumes, and WENO schemes. In order to encourage stability in training autoregressive models, we put forward a method that is based on the principle of zero-stability, posing stability as a domain adaptation problem. We validate our method on various fluid-like flow problems, demonstrating fast, stable, and accurate performance across different domain topologies, equation parameters, discretizations, etc., in 1D and 2D.
abstract_zh: 偏微分方程（PDE）的数值求解非常困难，迄今为止已经进行了一个世纪的研究。最近，人们一直在推动构建神经数值混合求解器，它顺应了完全端到端学习系统的现代趋势。到目前为止，大多数工作只能概括通用求解器所面临的属性的子集，包括：分辨率、拓扑、几何、边界条件、域离散化正则性、维数等。在这项工作中，我们构建了一个满足这些属性的求解器，其中所有组件都基于神经消息传递，用反向传播优化的神经函数逼近器替换计算图中所有启发式设计的组件。我们证明神经消息传递求解器代表性地包含一些经典方法，例如有限差分、有限体积和 WENO 方案。为了鼓励训练自回归模型的稳定性，我们提出了一种基于零稳定性原理的方法，将稳定性视为域适应问题。我们在各种类流体流动问题上验证了我们的方法，在一维和二维中展示了跨不同域拓扑、方程参数、离散化等的快速、稳定和准确的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于神经消息传递的偏微分方程（PDE）求解器，通过神经网络替代传统启发式组件，提升求解器的通用性和稳定性。
AI.motivation: 现有PDE数值求解方法在处理不同分辨率、几何结构、边界条件等场景时存在泛化能力不足的问题，需构建更通用的神经-数值混合求解框架。
AI.method: 采用神经消息传递机制重构计算图，用可微分神经网络替代传统差分/有限体积等组件，并引入零稳定性原则作为训练稳定性保障机制。
AI.result: 在1D/2D流体动力学问题中验证了方法有效性，展示了对不同拓扑结构、离散化方案和方程参数的鲁棒性，实现快速稳定求解。
AI.conclusion: 神经消息传递框架可统一表达经典数值方法，为构建通用PDE求解器提供了新范式，稳定性控制策略显著提升了模型可靠性。

title: LEDNet: Joint Low-light Enhancement and Deblurring in the Dark
title_zh: LEDNet：联合低光增强和黑暗去模糊
abstract: Night photography typically suffers from both low light and blurring issues due to the dim environment and the common use of long exposure. While existing light enhancement and deblurring methods could deal with each problem individually, a cascade of such methods cannot work harmoniously to cope well with joint degradation of visibility and textures. Training an end-to-end network is also infeasible as no paired data is available to characterize the coexistence of low light and blurs. We address the problem by introducing a novel data synthesis pipeline that models realistic low-light blurring degradations. With the pipeline, we present the first large-scale dataset for joint low-light enhancement and deblurring. The dataset, LOL-Blur, contains 12,000 low-blur/normal-sharp pairs with diverse darkness and motion blurs in different scenarios. We further present an effective network, named LEDNet, to perform joint low-light enhancement and deblurring. Our network is unique as it is specially designed to consider the synergy between the two inter-connected tasks. Both the proposed dataset and network provide a foundation for this challenging joint task. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our method on both synthetic and real-world datasets.
summary: Night photography typically suffers from both low light and blurring issues due to the dim environment and the common use of long exposure. While existing light enhancement and deblurring methods could deal with each problem individually, a cascade of such methods cannot work harmoniously to cope well with joint degradation of visibility and textures. Training an end-to-end network is also infeasible as no paired data is available to characterize the coexistence of low light and blurs. We address the problem by introducing a novel data synthesis pipeline that models realistic low-light blurring degradations. With the pipeline, we present the first large-scale dataset for joint low-light enhancement and deblurring. The dataset, LOL-Blur, contains 12,000 low-blur/normal-sharp pairs with diverse darkness and motion blurs in different scenarios. We further present an effective network, named LEDNet, to perform joint low-light enhancement and deblurring. Our network is unique as it is specially designed to consider the synergy between the two inter-connected tasks. Both the proposed dataset and network provide a foundation for this challenging joint task. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our method on both synthetic and real-world datasets.
abstract_zh: 由于昏暗的环境和长时间曝光的普遍使用，夜间摄影通常会遇到低光和模糊问题。虽然现有的光增强和去模糊方法可以单独处理每个问题，但此类方法的级联不能协调工作以很好地应对可见性和纹理的联合退化。训练端到端网络也是不可行的，因为没有配对数据可用于表征低光和模糊的共存。我们通过引入一种新颖的数据合成管道来解决这个问题，该管道可以模拟现实的低光模糊退化。通过该管道，我们提出了第一个用于联合低光增强和去模糊的大规模数据集。 LOL-Blur 数据集包含 12,000 个低模糊/正常锐利对，在不同场景中具有不同的黑暗和运动模糊。我们进一步提出了一个有效的网络，名为 LEDNet，来执行联合低光增强和去模糊。我们的网络是独一无二的，因为它是专门为考虑两个相互连接的任务之间的协同作用而设计的。所提出的数据集和网络都为这项具有挑战性的联合任务提供了基础。大量的实验证明了我们的方法在合成数据集和真实数据集上的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出LEDNet网络和LOL-Blur数据集，解决夜间摄影中低光与模糊联合修复的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有方法无法协同处理低光增强与去模糊，且缺乏联合退化配对数据导致端到端训练不可行。
AI.method: 设计真实低光模糊退化合成管道，构建包含12,000对低光-模糊/正常-清晰图像的LOL-Blur数据集，并提出考虑任务协同效应的LEDNet网络。
AI.result: 在合成与真实数据集上均验证了方法有效性，实现了低光增强与去模糊的联合优化。
AI.conclusion: 提出的 dataset 和网络为联合低光增强与去模糊任务提供了基础支撑。

search_text: LEDNet: Joint Low-light Enhancement and Deblurring in the Dark LEDNet：联合低光增强和黑暗去模糊 Night photography typically suffers from both low light and blurring issues due to the dim environment and the common use of long exposure. While existing light enhancement and deblurring methods could deal with each problem individually, a cascade of such methods cannot work harmoniously to cope well with joint degradation of visibility and textures. Training an end-to-end network is also infeasible as no paired data is available to characterize the coexistence of low light and blurs. We address the problem by introducing a novel data synthesis pipeline that models realistic low-light blurring degradations. With the pipeline, we present the first large-scale dataset for joint low-light enhancement and deblurring. The dataset, LOL-Blur, contains 12,000 low-blur/normal-sharp pairs with diverse darkness and motion blurs in different scenarios. We further present an effective network, named LEDNet, to perform joint low-light enhancement and deblurring. Our network is unique as it is specially designed to consider the synergy between the two inter-connected tasks. Both the proposed dataset and network provide a foundation for this challenging joint task. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our method on both synthetic and real-world datasets. 由于昏暗的环境和长时间曝光的普遍使用，夜间摄影通常会遇到低光和模糊问题。虽然现有的光增强和去模糊方法可以单独处理每个问题，但此类方法的级联不能协调工作以很好地应对可见性和纹理的联合退化。训练端到端网络也是不可行的，因为没有配对数据可用于表征低光和模糊的共存。我们通过引入一种新颖的数据合成管道来解决这个问题，该管道可以模拟现实的低光模糊退化。通过该管道，我们提出了第一个用于联合低光增强和去模糊的大规模数据集。 LOL-Blur 数据集包含 12,000 个低模糊/正常锐利对，在不同场景中具有不同的黑暗和运动模糊。我们进一步提出了一个有效的网络，名为 LEDNet，来执行联合低光增强和去模糊。我们的网络是独一无二的，因为它是专门为考虑两个相互连接的任务之间的协同作用而设计的。所提出的数据集和网络都为这项具有挑战性的联合任务提供了基础。大量的实验证明了我们的方法在合成数据集和真实数据集上的有效性。 本文提出LEDNet网络和LOL-Blur数据集，解决夜间摄影中低光与模糊联合修复的挑战。 Shangchen Zhou,Chongyi Li,Chen Change Loy eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Andrei Atanov,Shijian Xu,Onur Beker,Andrei Filatov,Amir Zamir
title: Simple Control Baselines for Evaluating Transfer Learning
title_zh: 用于评估迁移学习的简单控制基线
abstract: Transfer learning has witnessed remarkable progress in recent years, for example, with the introduction of augmentation-based contrastive self-supervised learning methods. While a number of large-scale empirical studies on the transfer performance of such models have been conducted, there is not yet an agreed-upon set of control baselines, evaluation practices, and metrics to report, which often hinders a nuanced and calibrated understanding of the real efficacy of the methods. We share an evaluation standard that aims to quantify and communicate transfer learning performance in an informative and accessible setup. This is done by baking a number of simple yet critical control baselines in the evaluation method, particularly the blind-guess (quantifying the dataset bias), scratch-model (quantifying the architectural contribution), and maximal-supervision (quantifying the upper-bound). To demonstrate how the evaluation standard can be employed, we provide an example empirical study investigating a few basic questions about self-supervised learning. For example, using this standard, the study shows the effectiveness of existing self-supervised pre-training methods is skewed towards image classification tasks versus dense pixel-wise predictions. In general, we encourage using/reporting the suggested control baselines in evaluating transfer learning in order to gain a more meaningful and informative understanding.
summary: Transfer learning has witnessed remarkable progress in recent years, for example, with the introduction of augmentation-based contrastive self-supervised learning methods. While a number of large-scale empirical studies on the transfer performance of such models have been conducted, there is not yet an agreed-upon set of control baselines, evaluation practices, and metrics to report, which often hinders a nuanced and calibrated understanding of the real efficacy of the methods. We share an evaluation standard that aims to quantify and communicate transfer learning performance in an informative and accessible setup. This is done by baking a number of simple yet critical control baselines in the evaluation method, particularly the blind-guess (quantifying the dataset bias), scratch-model (quantifying the architectural contribution), and maximal-supervision (quantifying the upper-bound). To demonstrate how the evaluation standard can be employed, we provide an example empirical study investigating a few basic questions about self-supervised learning. For example, using this standard, the study shows the effectiveness of existing self-supervised pre-training methods is skewed towards image classification tasks versus dense pixel-wise predictions. In general, we encourage using/reporting the suggested control baselines in evaluating transfer learning in order to gain a more meaningful and informative understanding.
abstract_zh: 近年来，迁移学习取得了显着的进步，例如，引入了基于增强的对比自监督学习方法。虽然已经对此类模型的转移性能进行了许多大规模的实证研究，但还没有一套商定的控制基线、评估实践和报告指标，这往往阻碍了对这些方法的实际功效的细致入微和校准的理解。我们共享一个评估标准，旨在以信息丰富且易于访问的方式量化和交流迁移学习的表现。这是通过在评估方法中烘焙一些简单但关键的控制基线来完成的，特别是盲猜（量化数据集偏差）、暂存模型（量化架构贡献）和最大监督（量化上限）。为了演示如何采用评估标准，我们提供了一个示例实证研究，调查有关自我监督学习的一些基本问题。例如，使用该标准，研究表明现有自监督预训练方法的有效性偏向于图像分类任务而不是密集的像素级预测。一般来说，我们鼓励在评估迁移学习时使用/报告建议的控制基线，以获得更有意义和信息丰富的理解。

AI.tldr: 提出包含盲猜、从头模型和最大监督的控制基线，以量化评估迁移学习效果，促进更准确的比较和理解。
AI.motivation: 当前迁移学习评估缺乏统一标准，难以准确衡量方法效果，需建立基准以促进深入分析。
AI.method: 设计三个关键控制基线（盲猜、从头模型、最大监督），并结合实证研究展示其应用，以量化不同任务中的迁移学习效果。
AI.result: 实证研究显示，现有自监督方法在图像分类任务中效果显著，但在密集像素预测任务中效果有限，凸显评估标准的重要性。
AI.conclusion: 建议在迁移学习评估中采用这些基线，以提升评估的准确性和信息量，推动领域发展。

title: FrePGAN: Robust Deepfake Detection Using Frequency-level Perturbations
title_zh: FrePGAN：使用频率级扰动的鲁棒 Deepfake 检测
abstract: Various deepfake detectors have been proposed, but challenges still exist to detect images of unknown categories or GAN models outside of the training settings. Such issues arise from the overfitting issue, which we discover from our own analysis and the previous studies to originate from the frequency-level artifacts in generated images. We find that ignoring the frequency-level artifacts can improve the detector's generalization across various GAN models, but it can reduce the model's performance for the trained GAN models. Thus, we design a framework to generalize the deepfake detector for both the known and unseen GAN models. Our framework generates the frequency-level perturbation maps to make the generated images indistinguishable from the real images. By updating the deepfake detector along with the training of the perturbation generator, our model is trained to detect the frequency-level artifacts at the initial iterations and consider the image-level irregularities at the last iterations. For experiments, we design new test scenarios varying from the training settings in GAN models, color manipulations, and object categories. Numerous experiments validate the state-of-the-art performance of our deepfake detector.
summary: Various deepfake detectors have been proposed, but challenges still exist to detect images of unknown categories or GAN models outside of the training settings. Such issues arise from the overfitting issue, which we discover from our own analysis and the previous studies to originate from the frequency-level artifacts in generated images. We find that ignoring the frequency-level artifacts can improve the detector's generalization across various GAN models, but it can reduce the model's performance for the trained GAN models. Thus, we design a framework to generalize the deepfake detector for both the known and unseen GAN models. Our framework generates the frequency-level perturbation maps to make the generated images indistinguishable from the real images. By updating the deepfake detector along with the training of the perturbation generator, our model is trained to detect the frequency-level artifacts at the initial iterations and consider the image-level irregularities at the last iterations. For experiments, we design new test scenarios varying from the training settings in GAN models, color manipulations, and object categories. Numerous experiments validate the state-of-the-art performance of our deepfake detector.
abstract_zh: 人们已经提出了各种 Deepfake 检测器，但在训练设置之外检测未知类别的图像或 GAN 模型仍然存在挑战。此类问题源于过度拟合问题，我们从自己的分析和之前的研究中发现，过度拟合问题源于生成图像中的频率级伪影。我们发现，忽略频率级伪影可以提高检测器在各种 GAN 模型上的泛化能力，但会降低模型对于经过训练的 GAN 模型的性能。因此，我们设计了一个框架来泛化已知和未见过的 GAN 模型的 Deepfake 检测器。我们的框架生成频率级扰动图，使生成的图像与真实图像无法区分。通过更新 Deepfake 检测器以及扰动生成器的训练，我们的模型被训练为在初始迭代时检测频率级伪影，并在最后一次迭代时考虑图像级不规则性。对于实验，我们设计了与 GAN 模型、颜色操作和对象类别中的训练设置不同的新测试场景。大量实验验证了我们的 Deepfake 探测器的最先进性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FrePGAN框架，通过频率级扰动提升深度伪造检测器在已知和未知GAN模型上的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有检测器因过度依赖图像级特征而无法泛化到未知GAN模型或训练外场景，频率级伪影是生成图像的关键缺陷但被忽视。
AI.method: 设计频率级扰动生成器与检测器联合训练，初期检测频率伪影，后期关注图像级异常，平衡泛化性与性能。
AI.result: 在多种GAN模型、颜色变换和物体类别测试中取得最先进性能，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 频率级扰动框架能有效提升检测器对未知生成模型的鲁棒性，为跨场景检测提供新思路。

Numerous experiments validate the state-of-the-art performance of our deepfake detector. 人们已经提出了各种 Deepfake 检测器，但在训练设置之外检测未知类别的图像或 GAN 模型仍然存在挑战。此类问题源于过度拟合问题，我们从自己的分析和之前的研究中发现，过度拟合问题源于生成图像中的频率级伪影。我们发现，忽略频率级伪影可以提高检测器在各种 GAN 模型上的泛化能力，但会降低模型对于经过训练的 GAN 模型的性能。因此，我们设计了一个框架来泛化已知和未见过的 GAN 模型的 Deepfake 检测器。我们的框架生成频率级扰动图，使生成的图像与真实图像无法区分。通过更新 Deepfake 检测器以及扰动生成器的训练，我们的模型被训练为在初始迭代时检测频率级伪影，并在最后一次迭代时考虑图像级不规则性。对于实验，我们设计了与 GAN 模型、颜色操作和对象类别中的训练设置不同的新测试场景。大量实验验证了我们的 Deepfake 探测器的最先进性能。 本文提出FrePGAN框架，通过频率级扰动提升深度伪造检测器在已知和未知GAN模型上的鲁棒性。 Yonghyun Jeong,Doyeon Kim,Youngmin Ro,Jongwon Choi cs.CV,cs.LG,eess.IV

title: A Review of Landcover Classification with Very-High Resolution Remotely Sensed Optical Images-Analysis Unit,Model Scalability and Transferability
title_zh: 超高分辨率遥感光学图像分析装置土地覆盖分类、模型可扩展性和可移植性综述
abstract: As an important application in remote sensing, landcover classification remains one of the most challenging tasks in very-high-resolution (VHR) image analysis. As the rapidly increasing number of Deep Learning (DL) based landcover methods and training strategies are claimed to be the state-of-the-art, the already fragmented technical landscape of landcover mapping methods has been further complicated. Although there exists a plethora of literature review work attempting to guide researchers in making an informed choice of landcover mapping methods, the articles either focus on the review of applications in a specific area or revolve around general deep learning models, which lack a systematic view of the ever advancing landcover mapping methods. In addition, issues related to training samples and model transferability have become more critical than ever in an era dominated by data-driven approaches, but these issues were addressed to a lesser extent in previous review articles regarding remote sensing classification. Therefore, in this paper, we present a systematic overview of existing methods by starting from learning methods and varying basic analysis units for landcover mapping tasks, to challenges and solutions on three aspects of scalability and transferability with a remote sensing classification focus including (1) sparsity and imbalance of data; (2) domain gaps across different geographical regions; and (3) multi-source and multi-view fusion. We discuss in detail each of these categorical methods and draw concluding remarks in these developments and recommend potential directions for the continued endeavor.
summary: As an important application in remote sensing, landcover classification remains one of the most challenging tasks in very-high-resolution (VHR) image analysis. As the rapidly increasing number of Deep Learning (DL) based landcover methods and training strategies are claimed to be the state-of-the-art, the already fragmented technical landscape of landcover mapping methods has been further complicated. Although there exists a plethora of literature review work attempting to guide researchers in making an informed choice of landcover mapping methods, the articles either focus on the review of applications in a specific area or revolve around general deep learning models, which lack a systematic view of the ever advancing landcover mapping methods. In addition, issues related to training samples and model transferability have become more critical than ever in an era dominated by data-driven approaches, but these issues were addressed to a lesser extent in previous review articles regarding remote sensing classification. Therefore, in this paper, we present a systematic overview of existing methods by starting from learning methods and varying basic analysis units for landcover mapping tasks, to challenges and solutions on three aspects of scalability and transferability with a remote sensing classification focus including (1) sparsity and imbalance of data; (2) domain gaps across different geographical regions; and (3) multi-source and multi-view fusion. We discuss in detail each of these categorical methods and draw concluding remarks in these developments and recommend potential directions for the continued endeavor.
abstract_zh: 作为遥感的重要应用，土地覆盖分类仍然是极高分辨率（VHR）图像分析中最具挑战性的任务之一。随着越来越多的基于深度学习（DL）的土地覆盖方法和训练策略被认为是最先进的，土地覆盖绘图方法本已分散的技术格局变得更加复杂。尽管存在大量文献综述工作试图指导研究人员对土地覆盖制图方法做出明智的选择，但这些文章要么侧重于特定领域的应用回顾，要么围绕一般的深度学习模型，缺乏对不断进步的土地覆盖制图方法的系统看法。此外，在数据驱动方法主导的时代，与训练样本和模型可迁移性相关的问题变得比以往任何时候都更加重要，但在之前有关遥感分类的评论文章中，这些问题的解决程度较低。因此，在本文中，我们从土地覆盖测绘任务的学习方法和不同的基本分析单元开始，对遥感分类的可扩展性和可转移性三个方面的挑战和解决方案进行了系统的概述，包括（1）数据的稀疏性和不平衡； (2) 不同地理区域之间的领域差距； (3)多源多视角融合。我们详细讨论了这些分类方法中的每一种，并对这些发展做出了总结性评论，并为继续努力提出了潜在的方向。

AI.tldr: 本文系统综述了高分辨率遥感图像土地覆盖分类方法，重点分析了分析单元、模型可扩展性及可迁移性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有综述缺乏对土地覆盖分类方法的系统性梳理，且未充分关注数据稀疏性、区域差异及多源融合等关键挑战。
AI.method: 从学习方法和分析单元出发，分类讨论数据稀疏性、区域域间差异、多源多视角融合三个维度的可扩展性与可迁移性问题。
AI.result: 系统总结了现有方法在 scalability 和 transferability 方面的挑战与解决方案，并提出未来研究方向。
AI.conclusion: 强调数据驱动时代下样本质量与模型迁移能力的重要性，建议未来需加强跨区域适应性与多源数据融合研究。

title: Probabilistic Consensus on Feature Distribution for Multi-robot Systems with Markovian Exploration Dynamics
title_zh: 具有马尔可夫探索动力学的多机器人系统特征分布的概率共识
comment: 8 pages, 13 figures, Accepted in IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters (RA-L)
comments: 8 pages, 13 figures, Accepted in IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters (RA-L)
abstract: In this paper, we present a consensus-based decentralized multi-robot approach to reconstruct a discrete distribution of features, modeled as an occupancy grid map, that represent information contained in a bounded planar 2D environment, such as visual cues used for navigation or semantic labels associated with object detection. The robots explore the environment according to a random walk modeled by a discrete-time discrete-state (DTDS) Markov chain and estimate the feature distribution from their own measurements and the estimates communicated by neighboring robots, using a distributed Chernoff fusion protocol. We prove that under this decentralized fusion protocol, each robot's feature distribution converges to the ground truth distribution in an almost sure sense. We verify this result in numerical simulations that show that the Hellinger distance between the estimated and ground truth feature distributions converges to zero over time for each robot. We also validate our strategy through Software-In-The-Loop (SITL) simulations of quadrotors that search a bounded square grid for a set of visual features distributed on a discretized circle.
summary: In this paper, we present a consensus-based decentralized multi-robot approach to reconstruct a discrete distribution of features, modeled as an occupancy grid map, that represent information contained in a bounded planar 2D environment, such as visual cues used for navigation or semantic labels associated with object detection. The robots explore the environment according to a random walk modeled by a discrete-time discrete-state (DTDS) Markov chain and estimate the feature distribution from their own measurements and the estimates communicated by neighboring robots, using a distributed Chernoff fusion protocol. We prove that under this decentralized fusion protocol, each robot's feature distribution converges to the ground truth distribution in an almost sure sense. We verify this result in numerical simulations that show that the Hellinger distance between the estimated and ground truth feature distributions converges to zero over time for each robot. We also validate our strategy through Software-In-The-Loop (SITL) simulations of quadrotors that search a bounded square grid for a set of visual features distributed on a discretized circle.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种基于共识的分散式多机器人方法来重建特征的离散分布，建模为占用网格图，表示有界平面 2D 环境中包含的信息，例如用于导航的视觉提示或与对象检测相关的语义标签。机器人根据由离散时间离散状态 (DTDS) 马尔可夫链建模的随机游走来探索环境，并使用分布式 Chernoff 融合协议根据自己的测量值和相邻机器人传达的估计来估计特征分布。我们证明，在这种分散的融合协议下，每个机器人的特征分布几乎可以肯定地收敛到地面真实分布。我们在数值模拟中验证了这一结果，该模拟表明每个机器人的估计特征分布和地面真实特征分布之间的海灵格距离随着时间的推移收敛到零。我们还通过四旋翼飞行器的软件在环 (SITL) 模拟来验证我们的策略，四旋翼飞行器在有界方形网格中搜索分布在离散圆上的一组视觉特征。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于共识的分布式多机器人方法，用于重建表示有限平面二维环境中特征分布的离散分布。
AI.motivation: 在多机器人系统中，需要通过分布式方法来重建环境中的特征分布，以提高导航和物体检测的准确性。
AI.method: 使用马尔可夫链建模的随机游走方式探索环境，并采用分布式Chernoff融合协议来估计特征分布。
AI.result: 通过数值模拟和软件在环（SITL）仿真验证了该方法的有效性，结果显示估计的特征分布与真实分布之间的Hellinger距离随时间趋于零。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能够在去中心化的融合协议下，使每个机器人的特征分布几乎必然收敛于真实分布，从而有效实现多机器人系统的环境特征重建。

title: Motion-Plane-Adaptive Inter Prediction in 360-Degree Video Coding
title_zh: 360 度视频编码中的运动平面自适应帧间预测
comment: 14 pages, 12 figures, 6 tables; This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
comments: 14 pages, 12 figures, 6 tables; This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
abstract: Inter prediction is one of the key technologies enabling the high compression efficiency of modern video coding standards. 360-degree video needs to be mapped to the 2D image plane prior to coding in order to allow compression using existing video coding standards. The distortions that inevitably occur when mapping spherical data onto the 2D image plane, however, impair the performance of classical inter prediction techniques. In this paper, we propose a motion-plane-adaptive inter prediction technique (MPA) for 360-degree video that takes the spherical characteristics of 360-degree video into account. Based on the known projection format of the video, MPA allows to perform inter prediction on different motion planes in 3D space instead of having to work on the - in theory arbitrarily mapped - 2D image representation directly. We furthermore derive a motion-plane-adaptive motion vector prediction technique (MPA-MVP) that allows to translate motion information between different motion planes and motion models. Our proposed integration of MPA together with MPA-MVP into the state-of-the-art H.266/VVC video coding standard shows significant Bjontegaard Delta rate savings of 1.72% with a peak of 3.97% based on PSNR and 1.56% with a peak of 3.40% based on WS-PSNR compared to the VTM-14.2 baseline on average.
summary: Inter prediction is one of the key technologies enabling the high compression efficiency of modern video coding standards. 360-degree video needs to be mapped to the 2D image plane prior to coding in order to allow compression using existing video coding standards. The distortions that inevitably occur when mapping spherical data onto the 2D image plane, however, impair the performance of classical inter prediction techniques. In this paper, we propose a motion-plane-adaptive inter prediction technique (MPA) for 360-degree video that takes the spherical characteristics of 360-degree video into account. Based on the known projection format of the video, MPA allows to perform inter prediction on different motion planes in 3D space instead of having to work on the - in theory arbitrarily mapped - 2D image representation directly. We furthermore derive a motion-plane-adaptive motion vector prediction technique (MPA-MVP) that allows to translate motion information between different motion planes and motion models. Our proposed integration of MPA together with MPA-MVP into the state-of-the-art H.266/VVC video coding standard shows significant Bjontegaard Delta rate savings of 1.72% with a peak of 3.97% based on PSNR and 1.56% with a peak of 3.40% based on WS-PSNR compared to the VTM-14.2 baseline on average.
abstract_zh: 帧间预测是实现现代视频编码标准高压缩效率的关键技术之一。 360 度视频需要在编码之前映射到 2D 图像平面，以便允许使用现有视频编码标准进行压缩。然而，将球形数据映射到 2D 图像平面时不可避免地发生的失真会损害经典帧间预测技术的性能。在本文中，我们提出了一种针对 360 度视频的运动平面自适应帧间预测技术（MPA），该技术考虑了 360 度视频的球面特征。基于已知的视频投影格式，MPA 允许在 3D 空间中的不同运动平面上执行帧间预测，而不必直接处理理论上任意映射的 2D 图像表示。我们还推导了运动平面自适应运动矢量预测技术（MPA-MVP），该技术允许在不同运动平面和运动模型之间转换运动信息。我们建议将 MPA 与 MPA-MVP 集成到最先进的 H.266/VVC 视频编码标准中，结果显示，与 VTM-14.2 基线相比，Bjontegaard Delta 速率平均可显着节省 1.72%（基于 PSNR，峰值为 3.97%）；平均而言，与 VTM-14.2 基线相比，可显着节省 1.56%（基于 WS-PSNR，峰值为 3.40%）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种适用于360度视频编码的运动平面自适应帧间预测技术（MPA），以解决球面视频映射到2D平面时的失真问题。
AI.motivation: 传统帧间预测技术在处理映射到2D平面的360度视频时，因球面数据映射失真导致性能下降，需考虑视频的球面特性改进预测方法。
AI.method: 基于视频已知的投影格式，MPA在3D空间中对不同运动平面进行帧间预测，并提出运动平面自适应运动矢量预测技术（MPA-MVP）实现不同运动平面间的运动信息转换。
AI.result: 将MPA与MPA-MVP集成到H.266/VVC标准中，相比VTM-14.2基线平均实现1.72%（峰值3.97%）的PSNR Bjontegaard Delta码率节省，WS-PSNR指标节省1.56%（峰值3.40%）。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过利用360度视频的球面特性，有效提升了帧间预测性能，验证了运动平面自适应技术在360度视频编码中的有效性。

authors_text: Paloma T. Lima,Vinicius F. dos Santos,Ignasi Sau,Uéverton S. Souza,Prafullkumar Tale
title: Reducing the Vertex Cover Number via Edge Contractions
title_zh: 通过边缘收缩减少顶点覆盖数
abstract: The CONTRACTION(vc) problem takes as input a graph $G$ on $n$ vertices and two integers $k$ and $d$, and asks whether one can contract at most $k$ edges to reduce the size of a minimum vertex cover of $G$ by at least $d$. Recently, Lima et al. [JCSS 2021] proved, among other results, that unlike most of the so-called blocker problems, CONTRACTION(vc) admits an XP algorithm running in time $f(d) \cdot n^{O(d)}$. They left open the question of whether this problem is FPT under this parameterization. In this article, we continue this line of research and prove the following results: 1. CONTRACTION(vc) is W[1]-hard parameterized by $k + d$. Moreover, unless the ETH fails, the problem does not admit an algorithm running in time $f(k + d) \cdot n^{o(k + d)}$ for any function $f$. In particular, this answers the open question stated in Lima et al. [JCSS 2021] in the negative. 2. It is NP-hard to decide whether an instance $(G, k, d)$ of CONTRACTION(vc) is a yes-instance even when $k = d$, hence enhancing our understanding of the classical complexity of the problem. 3. CONTRACTION(vc) can be solved in time $2^{O(d)} \cdot n^{k - d + O(1)}$. This XP algorithm improves the one of Lima et al. [JCSS 2021], which uses Courcelle's theorem as a subroutine and hence, the $f(d)$-factor in the running time is non-explicit and probably very large. On the other hard, it shows that when $k=d$, the problem is FPT parameterized by $d$ (or by $k$).
summary: The CONTRACTION(vc) problem takes as input a graph $G$ on $n$ vertices and two integers $k$ and $d$, and asks whether one can contract at most $k$ edges to reduce the size of a minimum vertex cover of $G$ by at least $d$. Recently, Lima et al. [JCSS 2021] proved, among other results, that unlike most of the so-called blocker problems, CONTRACTION(vc) admits an XP algorithm running in time $f(d) \cdot n^{O(d)}$. They left open the question of whether this problem is FPT under this parameterization. In this article, we continue this line of research and prove the following results: 1. CONTRACTION(vc) is W[1]-hard parameterized by $k + d$. Moreover, unless the ETH fails, the problem does not admit an algorithm running in time $f(k + d) \cdot n^{o(k + d)}$ for any function $f$. In particular, this answers the open question stated in Lima et al. [JCSS 2021] in the negative. 2. It is NP-hard to decide whether an instance $(G, k, d)$ of CONTRACTION(vc) is a yes-instance even when $k = d$, hence enhancing our understanding of the classical complexity of the problem. 3. CONTRACTION(vc) can be solved in time $2^{O(d)} \cdot n^{k - d + O(1)}$. This XP algorithm improves the one of Lima et al. [JCSS 2021], which uses Courcelle's theorem as a subroutine and hence, the $f(d)$-factor in the running time is non-explicit and probably very large. On the other hard, it shows that when $k=d$, the problem is FPT parameterized by $d$ (or by $k$).
abstract_zh: CONTRACTION(vc) 问题将 $n$ 个顶点上的图 $G$ 以及两个整数 $k$ 和 $d$ 作为输入，并询问是否可以收缩最多 $k$ 个边，以将 $G$ 的最小顶点覆盖的大小减少至少 $d$。最近，利马等人。 [JCSS 2021] 除其他结果外，证明与大多数所谓的阻塞问题不同，CONTRACTION(vc) 承认 XP 算法在 $f(d) \cdot n^{O(d)}$ 时间内运行。他们留下了一个问题：在这个参数化下这个问题是否是 FPT。在本文中，我们继续这一方向的研究并证明以下结果： 1. CONTRACTION(vc) 是由 $k + d$ 参数化的 W[1]-hard。此外，除非 ETH 失败，否则该问题不允许算法对于任何函数 $f$ 在 $f(k + d) \cdot n^{o(k + d)}$ 时间内运行。特别是，这回答了 Lima 等人提出的悬而未决的问题。 [JCSS 2021] 是否定的。 2. 即使当 $k = d$ 时，确定 CONTRACTION(vc) 的实例 $(G, k, d)$ 是否为是实例也是 NP 困难的，因此增强了我们对问题的经典复杂性的理解。 3. CONTRACTION(vc) 可以在 $2^{O(d)} \cdot n^{k - d + O(1)}$ 时间内求解。该 XP 算法改进了 Lima 等人的算法。 [JCSS 2021]，它使用 Courcelle 定理作为子程序，因此运行时间中的 $f(d)$ 因子是非显式的，并且可能非常大。另一方面，它表明当 $k=d$ 时，问题是由 $d$（或 $k$）参数化的 FPT。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了通过边收缩减少图的顶点覆盖数的问题（CONTRACTION(vc)），分析其参数化复杂性并提出改进算法。
AI.motivation: 尽管已有XP算法解决该问题，但其FPT可行性仍未知。本文旨在填补这一理论空白，并改进现有算法效率。
AI.method: 通过参数化复杂性分析、问题归约及算法设计，结合W[1]-硬度证明与改进的XP算法实现。
AI.result: 证明CONTRACTION(vc)参数k+d为W[1]-难，且当k=d时为NP难；提出时间复杂度为2^{O(d)}·n^{k−d+O(1)}的XP算法，改进了原有算法。
AI.conclusion: 该问题在k+d参数下不具有FPT性质，但当k=d时具有FPT性质，为参数化算法设计提供了新方向。

authors_text: Riku Murai,Joseph Ortiz,Sajad Saeedi,Paul H. J. Kelly,Andrew J. Davison
title: A Robot Web for Distributed Many-Device Localisation
title_zh: 用于分布式多设备本地化的机器人网络
comment: Published in IEEE Transactions on Robotics (TRO) 2023
comments: Published in IEEE Transactions on Robotics (TRO) 2023
abstract: We show that a distributed network of robots or other devices which make measurements of each other can collaborate to globally localise via efficient ad-hoc peer to peer communication. Our Robot Web solution is based on Gaussian Belief Propagation on the fundamental non-linear factor graph describing the probabilistic structure of all of the observations robots make internally or of each other, and is flexible for any type of robot, motion or sensor. We define a simple and efficient communication protocol which can be implemented by the publishing and reading of web pages or other asynchronous communication technologies. We show in simulations with up to 1000 robots interacting in arbitrary patterns that our solution convergently achieves global accuracy as accurate as a centralised non-linear factor graph solver while operating with high distributed efficiency of computation and communication. Via the use of robust factors in GBP, our method is tolerant to a high percentage of faults in sensor measurements or dropped communication packets.
summary: We show that a distributed network of robots or other devices which make measurements of each other can collaborate to globally localise via efficient ad-hoc peer to peer communication. Our Robot Web solution is based on Gaussian Belief Propagation on the fundamental non-linear factor graph describing the probabilistic structure of all of the observations robots make internally or of each other, and is flexible for any type of robot, motion or sensor. We define a simple and efficient communication protocol which can be implemented by the publishing and reading of web pages or other asynchronous communication technologies. We show in simulations with up to 1000 robots interacting in arbitrary patterns that our solution convergently achieves global accuracy as accurate as a centralised non-linear factor graph solver while operating with high distributed efficiency of computation and communication. Via the use of robust factors in GBP, our method is tolerant to a high percentage of faults in sensor measurements or dropped communication packets.
abstract_zh: 我们证明，由机器人或其他相互测量的设备组成的分布式网络可以通过高效的临时点对点通信进行协作以进行全球定位。我们的机器人网络解决方案基于基本非线性因子图上的高斯置信传播，描述了机器人内部或彼此之间进行的所有观察的概率结构，并且对于任何类型的机器人、运动或传感器都灵活。我们定义了一个简单高效的通信协议，可以通过网页的发布和阅读或其他异步通信技术来实现。我们在多达 1000 个以任意模式交互的机器人的模拟中表明，我们的解决方案收敛地实现了与集中式非线性因子图解算器一样精确的全局精度，同时以高分布式计算和通信效率运行。通过使用英镑中的鲁棒因素，我们的方法可以容忍传感器测量中的高比例故障或丢失的通信数据包。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于分布式网络的机器人定位方法，通过设备间的协同测量和高效通信实现全局定位。
AI.motivation: 传统集中式定位系统存在可扩展性差和单点故障风险，需设计一种适用于大规模设备、具备容错能力的分布式定位方案。
AI.method: 采用高斯信念传播算法处理非线性因子图，并设计基于网页发布/读取的异步通信协议，实现去中心化的协同定位。
AI.result: 在1000台机器人仿真中，该方法达到与集中式求解器相当的全局精度，同时保持计算和通信的高效率，且对传感器故障和通信丢包具有强鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: Robot Web框架通过分布式信念传播和轻量级通信协议，有效解决了大规模设备定位的准确性、效率和容错性问题。

title: Training OOD Detectors in their Natural Habitats
title_zh: 在自然栖息地训练 OOD 探测器
comment: Accepted to International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML) 2022
comments: Accepted to International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML) 2022
abstract: Out-of-distribution (OOD) detection is important for machine learning models deployed in the wild. Recent methods use auxiliary outlier data to regularize the model for improved OOD detection. However, these approaches make a strong distributional assumption that the auxiliary outlier data is completely separable from the in-distribution (ID) data. In this paper, we propose a novel framework that leverages wild mixture data, which naturally consists of both ID and OOD samples. Such wild data is abundant and arises freely upon deploying a machine learning classifier in their natural habitats. Our key idea is to formulate a constrained optimization problem and to show how to tractably solve it. Our learning objective maximizes the OOD detection rate, subject to constraints on the classification error of ID data and on the OOD error rate of ID examples. We extensively evaluate our approach on common OOD detection tasks and demonstrate superior performance.
summary: Out-of-distribution (OOD) detection is important for machine learning models deployed in the wild. Recent methods use auxiliary outlier data to regularize the model for improved OOD detection. However, these approaches make a strong distributional assumption that the auxiliary outlier data is completely separable from the in-distribution (ID) data. In this paper, we propose a novel framework that leverages wild mixture data, which naturally consists of both ID and OOD samples. Such wild data is abundant and arises freely upon deploying a machine learning classifier in their natural habitats. Our key idea is to formulate a constrained optimization problem and to show how to tractably solve it. Our learning objective maximizes the OOD detection rate, subject to constraints on the classification error of ID data and on the OOD error rate of ID examples. We extensively evaluate our approach on common OOD detection tasks and demonstrate superior performance.
abstract_zh: 分布外 (OOD) 检测对于野外部署的机器学习模型非常重要。最近的方法使用辅助异常值数据来规范模型以改进 OOD 检测。然而，这些方法做出了强有力的分布假设，即辅助异常值数据与分布内 (ID) 数据完全可分离。在本文中，我们提出了一种利用野生混合数据的新颖框架，该数据自然由 ID 和 OOD 样本组成。这些野生数据非常丰富，并且在其自然栖息地部署机器学习分类器时会自由产生。我们的关键思想是制定一个约束优化问题并展示如何轻松解决它。我们的学习目标是最大化 OOD 检测率，但受到 ID 数据的分类错误和 ID 示例的 OOD 错误率的约束。我们在常见的 OOD 检测任务上广泛评估了我们的方法，并展示了卓越的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种在自然环境中利用混合数据训练OOD检测器的新框架，无需依赖人工标注的异常数据。
AI.motivation: 传统OOD检测方法依赖人工收集的辅助异常数据，但该数据与正常数据需完全可分的强假设在实际场景中难以满足。
AI.method: 构建约束优化问题，通过最大化OOD检测率同时控制正常数据分类误差和OOD样本误判率，利用自然场景中天然存在的混合数据进行训练。
AI.result: 在多个标准OOD检测任务中，该方法相较现有技术取得更优性能表现。
AI.conclusion: 直接利用部署环境中的自然混合数据训练OOD检测器，可有效提升检测性能且无需依赖人工标注的异常数据集。

title: Mental Disorders on Online Social Media Through the Lens of Language and Behaviour: Analysis and Visualisation
title_zh: 从语言和行为的角度观察在线社交媒体上的精神障碍：分析和可视化
comment: To appear in Elsevier Information Processing & Management
comments: To appear in Elsevier Information Processing & Management
abstract: Due to the worldwide accessibility to the Internet along with the continuous advances in mobile technologies, physical and digital worlds have become completely blended, and the proliferation of social media platforms has taken a leading role over this evolution. In this paper, we undertake a thorough analysis towards better visualising and understanding the factors that characterise and differentiate social media users affected by mental disorders. We perform different experiments studying multiple dimensions of language, including vocabulary uniqueness, word usage, linguistic style, psychometric attributes, emotions' co-occurrence patterns, and online behavioural traits, including social engagement and posting trends. Our findings reveal significant differences on the use of function words, such as adverbs and verb tense, and topic-specific vocabulary, such as biological processes. As for emotional expression, we observe that affected users tend to share emotions more regularly than control individuals on average. Overall, the monthly posting variance of the affected groups is higher than the control groups. Moreover, we found evidence suggesting that language use on micro-blogging platforms is less distinguishable for users who have a mental disorder than other less restrictive platforms. In particular, we observe on Twitter less quantifiable differences between affected and control groups compared to Reddit.
summary: Due to the worldwide accessibility to the Internet along with the continuous advances in mobile technologies, physical and digital worlds have become completely blended, and the proliferation of social media platforms has taken a leading role over this evolution. In this paper, we undertake a thorough analysis towards better visualising and understanding the factors that characterise and differentiate social media users affected by mental disorders. We perform different experiments studying multiple dimensions of language, including vocabulary uniqueness, word usage, linguistic style, psychometric attributes, emotions' co-occurrence patterns, and online behavioural traits, including social engagement and posting trends. Our findings reveal significant differences on the use of function words, such as adverbs and verb tense, and topic-specific vocabulary, such as biological processes. As for emotional expression, we observe that affected users tend to share emotions more regularly than control individuals on average. Overall, the monthly posting variance of the affected groups is higher than the control groups. Moreover, we found evidence suggesting that language use on micro-blogging platforms is less distinguishable for users who have a mental disorder than other less restrictive platforms. In particular, we observe on Twitter less quantifiable differences between affected and control groups compared to Reddit.
abstract_zh: 由于互联网在全球范围内的普及以及移动技术的不断进步，物理世界和数字世界已经完全融合，而社交媒体平台的激增在这一演变中发挥了主导作用。在本文中，我们进行了彻底的分析，以便更好地可视化和理解表征和区分受精神障碍影响的社交媒体用户的因素。我们进行了不同的实验来研究语言的多个维度，包括词汇独特性、词语使用、语言风格、心理测量属性、情绪共现模式和在线行为特征，包括社交参与和发布趋势。我们的研究结果揭示了功能词（例如副词和动词时态）和特定主题词汇（例如生物过程）的使用存在显着差异。至于情绪表达，我们观察到受影响的用户平均比对照组的人更频繁地分享情绪。总体而言，受影响组的每月过帐方差高于对照组。此外，我们发现的证据表明，与其他限制较少的平台相比，患有精神障碍的用户在微博平台上的语言使用不太容易区分。特别是，我们在 Twitter 上观察到，与 Reddit 相比，受影响群体和对照组之间的可量化差异较小。

AI.tldr: 通过分析社交媒体用户的语言和行为特征，识别和区分受心理障碍影响的用户，并进行可视化展示。
AI.motivation: 随着社交媒体的普及，研究用户语言和行为特征有助于理解心理障碍的表现，从而为早期干预和心理健康支持提供依据。
AI.method: 通过分析用户语言特征（如词汇独特性、功能词使用、情绪表达）和行为模式（如社交互动频率、发帖趋势），结合统计实验和可视化方法进行比较研究。
AI.result: 发现受影响用户更频繁使用功能词和特定主题词汇，情绪表达更频繁，发帖频率波动更大；且在Twitter上，受影响用户与对照组的语言差异较Reddit更不明显。
AI.conclusion: 社交媒体用户的语言和行为特征可有效区分心理障碍群体，但平台特性（如Twitter的开放性）可能影响分析结果的显著性，需结合多平台数据进行综合评估。

tldr: 通过分析社交媒体用户的语言和行为特征，识别和区分受心理障碍影响的用户，并进行可视化展示。
motivation: 随着社交媒体的普及，研究用户语言和行为特征有助于理解心理障碍的表现，从而为早期干预和心理健康支持提供依据。
method: 通过分析用户语言特征（如词汇独特性、功能词使用、情绪表达）和行为模式（如社交互动频率、发帖趋势），结合统计实验和可视化方法进行比较研究。
result: 发现受影响用户更频繁使用功能词和特定主题词汇，情绪表达更频繁，发帖频率波动更大；且在Twitter上，受影响用户与对照组的语言差异较Reddit更不明显。
conclusion: 社交媒体用户的语言和行为特征可有效区分心理障碍群体，但平台特性（如Twitter的开放性）可能影响分析结果的显著性，需结合多平台数据进行综合评估。
search_text: Mental Disorders on Online Social Media Through the Lens of Language and Behaviour: Analysis and Visualisation 从语言和行为的角度观察在线社交媒体上的精神障碍：分析和可视化 Due to the worldwide accessibility to the Internet along with the continuous advances in mobile technologies, physical and digital worlds have become completely blended, and the proliferation of social media platforms has taken a leading role over this evolution. In this paper, we undertake a thorough analysis towards better visualising and understanding the factors that characterise and differentiate social media users affected by mental disorders. We perform different experiments studying multiple dimensions of language, including vocabulary uniqueness, word usage, linguistic style, psychometric attributes, emotions' co-occurrence patterns, and online behavioural traits, including social engagement and posting trends. Our findings reveal significant differences on the use of function words, such as adverbs and verb tense, and topic-specific vocabulary, such as biological processes. As for emotional expression, we observe that affected users tend to share emotions more regularly than control individuals on average. Overall, the monthly posting variance of the affected groups is higher than the control groups. Moreover, we found evidence suggesting that language use on micro-blogging platforms is less distinguishable for users who have a mental disorder than other less restrictive platforms. In particular, we observe on Twitter less quantifiable differences between affected and control groups compared to Reddit. 由于互联网在全球范围内的普及以及移动技术的不断进步，物理世界和数字世界已经完全融合，而社交媒体平台的激增在这一演变中发挥了主导作用。在本文中，我们进行了彻底的分析，以便更好地可视化和理解表征和区分受精神障碍影响的社交媒体用户的因素。我们进行了不同的实验来研究语言的多个维度，包括词汇独特性、词语使用、语言风格、心理测量属性、情绪共现模式和在线行为特征，包括社交参与和发布趋势。我们的研究结果揭示了功能词（例如副词和动词时态）和特定主题词汇（例如生物过程）的使用存在显着差异。至于情绪表达，我们观察到受影响的用户平均比对照组的人更频繁地分享情绪。总体而言，受影响组的每月过帐方差高于对照组。此外，我们发现的证据表明，与其他限制较少的平台相比，患有精神障碍的用户在微博平台上的语言使用不太容易区分。特别是，我们在 Twitter 上观察到，与 Reddit 相比，受影响群体和对照组之间的可量化差异较小。 通过分析社交媒体用户的语言和行为特征，识别和区分受心理障碍影响的用户，并进行可视化展示。 Esteban A. Ríssola,Mohammad Aliannejadi,Fabio Crestani cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Ethan Perez,Saffron Huang,Francis Song,Trevor Cai,Roman Ring,John Aslanides,Amelia Glaese,Nat McAleese,Geoffrey Irving
title: Red Teaming Language Models with Language Models
title_zh: 红队语言模型与语言模型
abstract: Language Models (LMs) often cannot be deployed because of their potential to harm users in hard-to-predict ways. Prior work identifies harmful behaviors before deployment by using human annotators to hand-write test cases. However, human annotation is expensive, limiting the number and diversity of test cases. In this work, we automatically find cases where a target LM behaves in a harmful way, by generating test cases ("red teaming") using another LM. We evaluate the target LM's replies to generated test questions using a classifier trained to detect offensive content, uncovering tens of thousands of offensive replies in a 280B parameter LM chatbot. We explore several methods, from zero-shot generation to reinforcement learning, for generating test cases with varying levels of diversity and difficulty. Furthermore, we use prompt engineering to control LM-generated test cases to uncover a variety of other harms, automatically finding groups of people that the chatbot discusses in offensive ways, personal and hospital phone numbers generated as the chatbot's own contact info, leakage of private training data in generated text, and harms that occur over the course of a conversation. Overall, LM-based red teaming is one promising tool (among many needed) for finding and fixing diverse, undesirable LM behaviors before impacting users.
summary: Language Models (LMs) often cannot be deployed because of their potential to harm users in hard-to-predict ways. Prior work identifies harmful behaviors before deployment by using human annotators to hand-write test cases. However, human annotation is expensive, limiting the number and diversity of test cases. In this work, we automatically find cases where a target LM behaves in a harmful way, by generating test cases ("red teaming") using another LM. We evaluate the target LM's replies to generated test questions using a classifier trained to detect offensive content, uncovering tens of thousands of offensive replies in a 280B parameter LM chatbot. We explore several methods, from zero-shot generation to reinforcement learning, for generating test cases with varying levels of diversity and difficulty. Furthermore, we use prompt engineering to control LM-generated test cases to uncover a variety of other harms, automatically finding groups of people that the chatbot discusses in offensive ways, personal and hospital phone numbers generated as the chatbot's own contact info, leakage of private training data in generated text, and harms that occur over the course of a conversation. Overall, LM-based red teaming is one promising tool (among many needed) for finding and fixing diverse, undesirable LM behaviors before impacting users.
abstract_zh: 语言模型 (LM) 通常无法部署，因为它们有可能以难以预测的方式伤害用户。先前的工作通过使用人工注释者手写测试用例来在部署之前识别有害行为。然而，人工注释成本高昂，限制了测试用例的数量和多样性。在这项工作中，我们通过使用另一个 LM 生成测试用例（“红队”）来自动查找目标 LM 行为有害的情况。我们使用经过训练来检测攻击性内容的分类器评估目标 LM 对生成的测试问题的回复，在 280B 参数 LM 聊天机器人中发现数以万计的攻击性回复。我们探索了从零样本生成到强化学习的多种方法，用于生成具有不同程度的多样性和难度的测试用例。此外，我们使用即时工程来控制 LM 生成的测试用例，以发现各种其他危害，自动查找聊天机器人以攻击性方式讨论的人群、作为聊天机器人自己的联系信息生成的个人和医院电话号码、生成文本中私人训练数据的泄露以及对话过程中发生的危害。总体而言，基于 LM 的红队是一种很有前途的工具（也是许多需要的工具之一），用于在影响用户之前发现并修复各种不良的 LM 行为。

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用语言模型自动生成测试用例，以发现目标语言模型中的有害行为。
AI.motivation: 传统依赖人工标注的测试方法成本高且测试用例多样性不足，难以全面检测语言模型的潜在危害。
AI.method: 通过零样本生成、强化学习等方法生成测试用例，并利用分类器评估目标模型回复的有害性，结合提示工程控制测试用例以发现多种风险。
AI.result: 在280B参数的聊天机器人中自动检测到数万条攻击性回复，包括对特定群体的歧视性内容、生成虚假联系方式及训练数据泄露等问题。
AI.conclusion: 基于语言模型的红队测试是发现和修复语言模型有害行为的有效工具，应作为部署前的重要安全措施之一。

title: CZU-MHAD: A multimodal dataset for human action recognition utilizing a depth camera and 10 wearable inertial sensors
title_zh: CZU-MHAD：利用深度相机和 10 个可穿戴惯性传感器进行人类动作识别的多模式数据集
abstract: Human action recognition has been widely used in many fields of life, and many human action datasets have been published at the same time. However, most of the multi-modal databases have some shortcomings in the layout and number of sensors, which cannot fully represent the action features. Regarding the problems, this paper proposes a freely available dataset, named CZU-MHAD (Changzhou University: a comprehensive multi-modal human action dataset). It consists of 22 actions and three modals temporal synchronized data. These modals include depth videos and skeleton positions from a kinect v2 camera, and inertial signals from 10 wearable sensors. Compared with single modal sensors, multi-modal sensors can collect different modal data, so the use of multi-modal sensors can describe actions more accurately. Moreover, CZU-MHAD obtains the 3-axis acceleration and 3-axis angular velocity of 10 main motion joints by binding inertial sensors to them, and these data were captured at the same time. Experimental results are provided to show that this dataset can be used to study structural relationships between different parts of the human body when performing actions and fusion approaches that involve multi-modal sensor data.
summary: Human action recognition has been widely used in many fields of life, and many human action datasets have been published at the same time. However, most of the multi-modal databases have some shortcomings in the layout and number of sensors, which cannot fully represent the action features. Regarding the problems, this paper proposes a freely available dataset, named CZU-MHAD (Changzhou University: a comprehensive multi-modal human action dataset). It consists of 22 actions and three modals temporal synchronized data. These modals include depth videos and skeleton positions from a kinect v2 camera, and inertial signals from 10 wearable sensors. Compared with single modal sensors, multi-modal sensors can collect different modal data, so the use of multi-modal sensors can describe actions more accurately. Moreover, CZU-MHAD obtains the 3-axis acceleration and 3-axis angular velocity of 10 main motion joints by binding inertial sensors to them, and these data were captured at the same time. Experimental results are provided to show that this dataset can be used to study structural relationships between different parts of the human body when performing actions and fusion approaches that involve multi-modal sensor data.
abstract_zh: 人类动作识别已广泛应用于生活的许多领域，同时发布了许多人类动作数据集。然而，大多数多模态数据库在传感器的布局和数量上都存在一些缺陷，不能充分代表动作特征。针对这些问题，本文提出了一个免费的数据集，命名为CZU-MHAD（常州大学：综合多模态人类行为数据集）。它由 22 个动作和三个模态时间同步数据组成。这些模态包括来自 kinect v2 摄像头的深度视频和骨骼位置，以及来自 10 个可穿戴传感器的惯性信号。与单模态传感器相比，多模态传感器可以采集不同模态的数据，因此使用多模态传感器可以更准确地描述动作。此外，CZU-MHAD通过绑定惯性传感器获得10个主要运动关节的3轴加速度和3轴角速度，并同时捕获这些数据。实验结果表明，该数据集可用于研究执行涉及多模态传感器数据的动作和融合方法时人体不同部位之间的结构关系。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个名为CZU-MHAD的多模态数据集，用于人体动作识别，结合深度摄像头和10个可穿戴惯性传感器的数据。
AI.motivation: 现有多模态数据集在传感器布局和数量上存在不足，无法全面表征动作特征，需更全面的数据支持研究。
AI.method: 通过Kinect v2采集深度视频和骨骼位置数据，同时在10个主要运动关节绑定惯性传感器，同步获取三轴加速度和角速度数据。
AI.result: 实验表明该数据集可有效研究人体动作中各部位的结构关系，并验证多模态传感器数据融合方法的可行性。
AI.conclusion: CZU-MHAD为人体动作识别领域提供了新型多模态数据资源，有助于推动多模态融合技术的研究与应用。

Compared with single modal sensors, multi-modal sensors can collect different modal data, so the use of multi-modal sensors can describe actions more accurately. Moreover, CZU-MHAD obtains the 3-axis acceleration and 3-axis angular velocity of 10 main motion joints by binding inertial sensors to them, and these data were captured at the same time. Experimental results are provided to show that this dataset can be used to study structural relationships between different parts of the human body when performing actions and fusion approaches that involve multi-modal sensor data. 人类动作识别已广泛应用于生活的许多领域，同时发布了许多人类动作数据集。然而，大多数多模态数据库在传感器的布局和数量上都存在一些缺陷，不能充分代表动作特征。针对这些问题，本文提出了一个免费的数据集，命名为CZU-MHAD（常州大学：综合多模态人类行为数据集）。它由 22 个动作和三个模态时间同步数据组成。这些模态包括来自 kinect v2 摄像头的深度视频和骨骼位置，以及来自 10 个可穿戴传感器的惯性信号。与单模态传感器相比，多模态传感器可以采集不同模态的数据，因此使用多模态传感器可以更准确地描述动作。此外，CZU-MHAD通过绑定惯性传感器获得10个主要运动关节的3轴加速度和3轴角速度，并同时捕获这些数据。实验结果表明，该数据集可用于研究执行涉及多模态传感器数据的动作和融合方法时人体不同部位之间的结构关系。 本文提出一个名为CZU-MHAD的多模态数据集，用于人体动作识别，结合深度摄像头和10个可穿戴惯性传感器的数据。 Xin Chao,Zhenjie Hou,Yujian Mo cs.CV

title: Personalized Public Policy Analysis in Social Sciences using Causal-Graphical Normalizing Flows
title_zh: 使用因果图标准化流进行社会科学中的个性化公共政策分析
abstract: Structural Equation/Causal Models (SEMs/SCMs) are widely used in epidemiology and social sciences to identify and analyze the average causal effect (ACE) and conditional ACE (CACE). Traditional causal effect estimation methods such as Inverse Probability Weighting (IPW) and more recently Regression-With-Residuals (RWR) are widely used - as they avoid the challenging task of identifying the SCM parameters - to estimate ACE and CACE. However, much work remains before traditional estimation methods can be used for counterfactual inference, and for the benefit of Personalized Public Policy Analysis (P$^3$A) in the social sciences. While doctors rely on personalized medicine to tailor treatments to patients in laboratory settings (relatively closed systems), P$^3$A draws inspiration from such tailoring but adapts it for open social systems. In this article, we develop a method for counterfactual inference that we name causal-Graphical Normalizing Flow (c-GNF), facilitating P$^3$A. First, we show how c-GNF captures the underlying SCM without making any assumption about functional forms. Second, we propose a novel dequantization trick to deal with discrete variables, which is a limitation of normalizing flows in general. Third, we demonstrate in experiments that c-GNF performs on-par with IPW and RWR in terms of bias and variance for estimating the ATE, when the true functional forms are known, and better when they are unknown. Fourth and most importantly, we conduct counterfactual inference with c-GNFs, demonstrating promising empirical performance. Because IPW and RWR, like other traditional methods, lack the capability of counterfactual inference, c-GNFs will likely play a major role in tailoring personalized treatment, facilitating P$^3$A, optimizing social interventions - in contrast to the current `one-size-fits-all' approach of existing methods.

Traditional causal effect estimation methods such as Inverse Probability Weighting (IPW) and more recently Regression-With-Residuals (RWR) are widely used - as they avoid the challenging task of identifying the SCM parameters - to estimate ACE and CACE. However, much work remains before traditional estimation methods can be used for counterfactual inference, and for the benefit of Personalized Public Policy Analysis (P$^3$A) in the social sciences. While doctors rely on personalized medicine to tailor treatments to patients in laboratory settings (relatively closed systems), P$^3$A draws inspiration from such tailoring but adapts it for open social systems. In this article, we develop a method for counterfactual inference that we name causal-Graphical Normalizing Flow (c-GNF), facilitating P$^3$A. First, we show how c-GNF captures the underlying SCM without making any assumption about functional forms. Second, we propose a novel dequantization trick to deal with discrete variables, which is a limitation of normalizing flows in general. Third, we demonstrate in experiments that c-GNF performs on-par with IPW and RWR in terms of bias and variance for estimating the ATE, when the true functional forms are known, and better when they are unknown. Fourth and most importantly, we conduct counterfactual inference with c-GNFs, demonstrating promising empirical performance. Because IPW and RWR, like other traditional methods, lack the capability of counterfactual inference, c-GNFs will likely play a major role in tailoring personalized treatment, facilitating P$^3$A, optimizing social interventions - in contrast to the current `one-size-fits-all' approach of existing methods.
abstract_zh: 结构方程/因果模型 (SEM/SCM) 广泛应用于流行病学和社会科学中，用于识别和分析平均因果效应 (ACE) 和条件 ACE (CACE)。传统的因果效应估计方法（例如逆概率加权 (IPW) 和最近的残差回归 (RWR)）被广泛使用 - 因为它们避免了识别 SCM 参数的挑战性任务 - 来估计 ACE 和 CACE。然而，在传统的估计方法可用于反事实推理以及社会科学中的个性化公共政策分析（P$^3$A）之前，还有很多工作要做。虽然医生依靠个性化医疗在实验室环境（相对封闭的系统）中为患者量身定制治疗方案，但 P$^3$A 从这种定制中汲取灵感，但将其适应开放的社会系统。在本文中，我们开发了一种反事实推理方法，我们将其命名为因果图归一化流（c-GNF），促进 P$^3$A。首先，我们展示 c-GNF 如何捕获底层 SCM，而不对功能形式做出任何假设。其次，我们提出了一种新颖的反量化技巧来处理离散变量，这通常是归一化流的限制。第三，我们在实验中证明，当真实函数形式已知时，c-GNF 在估计 ATE 的偏差和方差方面与 IPW 和 RWR 表现不相上下，而当真实函数形式未知时，c-GNF 表现更好。第四，也是最重要的一点，我们使用 c-GNF 进行反事实推理，展示了有希望的实证性能。由于 IPW 和 RWR 与其他传统方法一样，缺乏反事实推理的能力，因此 c-GNF 可能会在定制个性化治疗、促进 P$^3$A、优化社会干预方面发挥重要作用，这与现有方法当前的“一刀切”方法形成鲜明对比。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为因果图归一化流（c-GNF）的方法，用于社会科学研究中的个性化公共政策分析（P³A），通过反事实推理解决传统方法的局限性。
AI.motivation: 传统因果效应估计方法（如IPW和RWR）无法进行反事实推理，难以支持社会科学研究中需要个性化干预的开放系统政策分析，需开发新方法以实现类似精准医疗的个性化政策制定。
AI.method: 开发c-GNF方法：1) 无需假设函数形式即可捕捉结构因果模型（SCM）；2) 提出离散变量去量化技巧；3) 通过实验验证其在估计平均处理效应（ATE）时的性能，并实现反事实推理。
AI.result: c-GNF在已知真实函数形式时与IPW/RWR性能相当，未知时表现更优；首次成功实现反事实推理，为个性化政策分析提供可行方案。
AI.conclusion: c-GNF方法突破了传统方法的限制，为社会科学研究中的个性化干预和优化政策制定提供了新工具，有望替代现有单一化政策分析范式。

authors_text: Xiangyu Peng,Kai Wang,Zheng Zhu,Mang Wang,Yang You
title: Crafting Better Contrastive Views for Siamese Representation Learning
title_zh: 为连体表征学习打造更好的对比视图
comment: Accepted by CVPR 2022 as an oral paper
comments: Accepted by CVPR 2022 as an oral paper
abstract: Recent self-supervised contrastive learning methods greatly benefit from the Siamese structure that aims at minimizing distances between positive pairs. For high performance Siamese representation learning, one of the keys is to design good contrastive pairs. Most previous works simply apply random sampling to make different crops of the same image, which overlooks the semantic information that may degrade the quality of views. In this work, we propose ContrastiveCrop, which could effectively generate better crops for Siamese representation learning. Firstly, a semantic-aware object localization strategy is proposed within the training process in a fully unsupervised manner. This guides us to generate contrastive views which could avoid most false positives (i.e., object vs. background). Moreover, we empirically find that views with similar appearances are trivial for the Siamese model training. Thus, a center-suppressed sampling is further designed to enlarge the variance of crops. Remarkably, our method takes a careful consideration of positive pairs for contrastive learning with negligible extra training overhead. As a plug-and-play and framework-agnostic module, ContrastiveCrop consistently improves SimCLR, MoCo, BYOL, SimSiam by 0.4% ~ 2.0% classification accuracy on CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, Tiny ImageNet and STL-10. Superior results are also achieved on downstream detection and segmentation tasks when pre-trained on ImageNet-1K.
summary: Recent self-supervised contrastive learning methods greatly benefit from the Siamese structure that aims at minimizing distances between positive pairs. For high performance Siamese representation learning, one of the keys is to design good contrastive pairs. Most previous works simply apply random sampling to make different crops of the same image, which overlooks the semantic information that may degrade the quality of views. In this work, we propose ContrastiveCrop, which could effectively generate better crops for Siamese representation learning. Firstly, a semantic-aware object localization strategy is proposed within the training process in a fully unsupervised manner. This guides us to generate contrastive views which could avoid most false positives (i.e., object vs. background). Moreover, we empirically find that views with similar appearances are trivial for the Siamese model training. Thus, a center-suppressed sampling is further designed to enlarge the variance of crops. Remarkably, our method takes a careful consideration of positive pairs for contrastive learning with negligible extra training overhead. As a plug-and-play and framework-agnostic module, ContrastiveCrop consistently improves SimCLR, MoCo, BYOL, SimSiam by 0.4% ~ 2.0% classification accuracy on CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, Tiny ImageNet and STL-10. Superior results are also achieved on downstream detection and segmentation tasks when pre-trained on ImageNet-1K.
abstract_zh: 最近的自我监督对比学习方法极大地受益于暹罗结构，该结构旨在最小化正对之间的距离。对于高性能连体表示学习，关键之一是设计良好的对比对。以前的大多数工作只是简单地应用随机采样来对同一图像进行不同的裁剪，这忽略了可能降低视图质量的语义信息。在这项工作中，我们提出了 ContrastiveCrop，它可以有效地为暹罗表示学习生成更好的作物。首先，在训练过程中以完全无监督的方式提出语义感知的对象定位策略。这引导我们生成对比视图，从而避免大多数误报（即对象与背景）。此外，我们凭经验发现，具有相似外观的视图对于 Siamese 模型训练来说是微不足道的。因此，进一步设计了中心抑制抽样来扩大作物的方差。值得注意的是，我们的方法仔细考虑了对比学习的正对，而额外的训练开销可以忽略不计。作为一个即插即用且与框架无关的模块，ContrastiveCrop 在 CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100、Tiny ImageNet 和 STL-10 上持续将 SimCLR、MoCo、BYOL、SimSiam 的分类精度提高了 0.4% ~ 2.0%。在 ImageNet-1K 上进行预训练时，下游检测和分割任务也能取得优异的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ContrastiveCrop方法，通过优化对比视图生成策略提升自监督对比学习的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统随机裁剪方法忽略语义信息，导致对比视图质量下降，影响Siamese结构的表征学习效果。
AI.method: 设计语义感知的目标定位策略和中心抑制采样机制，在无监督框架下生成更高质量的对比视图。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10/100、Tiny ImageNet等数据集上，使SimCLR、MoCo等模型分类准确率提升0.4%-2.0%，并在下游任务中表现优异。
AI.conclusion: ContrastiveCrop通过精细的正样本对设计，在几乎不增加训练成本的情况下，有效提升了多种自监督学习框架的性能。

For high performance Siamese representation learning, one of the keys is to design good contrastive pairs. Most previous works simply apply random sampling to make different crops of the same image, which overlooks the semantic information that may degrade the quality of views. In this work, we propose ContrastiveCrop, which could effectively generate better crops for Siamese representation learning. Firstly, a semantic-aware object localization strategy is proposed within the training process in a fully unsupervised manner. This guides us to generate contrastive views which could avoid most false positives (i.e., object vs. background). Moreover, we empirically find that views with similar appearances are trivial for the Siamese model training. Thus, a center-suppressed sampling is further designed to enlarge the variance of crops. Remarkably, our method takes a careful consideration of positive pairs for contrastive learning with negligible extra training overhead. As a plug-and-play and framework-agnostic module, ContrastiveCrop consistently improves SimCLR, MoCo, BYOL, SimSiam by 0.4% ~ 2.0% classification accuracy on CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, Tiny ImageNet and STL-10. Superior results are also achieved on downstream detection and segmentation tasks when pre-trained on ImageNet-1K. 最近的自我监督对比学习方法极大地受益于暹罗结构，该结构旨在最小化正对之间的距离。对于高性能连体表示学习，关键之一是设计良好的对比对。以前的大多数工作只是简单地应用随机采样来对同一图像进行不同的裁剪，这忽略了可能降低视图质量的语义信息。在这项工作中，我们提出了 ContrastiveCrop，它可以有效地为暹罗表示学习生成更好的作物。首先，在训练过程中以完全无监督的方式提出语义感知的对象定位策略。这引导我们生成对比视图，从而避免大多数误报（即对象与背景）。此外，我们凭经验发现，具有相似外观的视图对于 Siamese 模型训练来说是微不足道的。因此，进一步设计了中心抑制抽样来扩大作物的方差。值得注意的是，我们的方法仔细考虑了对比学习的正对，而额外的训练开销可以忽略不计。作为一个即插即用且与框架无关的模块，ContrastiveCrop 在 CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100、Tiny ImageNet 和 STL-10 上持续将 SimCLR、MoCo、BYOL、SimSiam 的分类精度提高了 0.4% ~ 2.0%。在 ImageNet-1K 上进行预训练时，下游检测和分割任务也能取得优异的结果。 本文提出ContrastiveCrop方法，通过优化对比视图生成策略提升自监督对比学习的性能。 Xiangyu Peng,Kai Wang,Zheng Zhu,Mang Wang,Yang You cs.CV

authors_text: Md. Milon Islam,Sheikh Nooruddin,Fakhri Karray,Ghulam Muhammad
title: Human Activity Recognition Using Tools of Convolutional Neural Networks: A State of the Art Review, Data Sets, Challenges and Future Prospects
title_zh: 使用卷积神经网络工具进行人类活动识别：最先进的回顾、数据集、挑战和未来前景
abstract: Human Activity Recognition (HAR) plays a significant role in the everyday life of people because of its ability to learn extensive high-level information about human activity from wearable or stationary devices. A substantial amount of research has been conducted on HAR and numerous approaches based on deep learning and machine learning have been exploited by the research community to classify human activities. The main goal of this review is to summarize recent works based on a wide range of deep neural networks architecture, namely convolutional neural networks (CNNs) for human activity recognition. The reviewed systems are clustered into four categories depending on the use of input devices like multimodal sensing devices, smartphones, radar, and vision devices. This review describes the performances, strengths, weaknesses, and the used hyperparameters of CNN architectures for each reviewed system with an overview of available public data sources. In addition, a discussion with the current challenges to CNN-based HAR systems is presented. Finally, this review is concluded with some potential future directions that would be of great assistance for the researchers who would like to contribute to this field.
summary: Human Activity Recognition (HAR) plays a significant role in the everyday life of people because of its ability to learn extensive high-level information about human activity from wearable or stationary devices. A substantial amount of research has been conducted on HAR and numerous approaches based on deep learning and machine learning have been exploited by the research community to classify human activities. The main goal of this review is to summarize recent works based on a wide range of deep neural networks architecture, namely convolutional neural networks (CNNs) for human activity recognition. The reviewed systems are clustered into four categories depending on the use of input devices like multimodal sensing devices, smartphones, radar, and vision devices. This review describes the performances, strengths, weaknesses, and the used hyperparameters of CNN architectures for each reviewed system with an overview of available public data sources. In addition, a discussion with the current challenges to CNN-based HAR systems is presented. Finally, this review is concluded with some potential future directions that would be of great assistance for the researchers who would like to contribute to this field.
abstract_zh: 人类活动识别 (HAR) 在人们的日常生活中发挥着重要作用，因为它能够从可穿戴或固定设备中了解有关人类活动的广泛高级信息。人们对 HAR 进行了大量研究，并且研究界已经利用许多基于深度学习和机器学习的方法对人类活动进行分类。本综述的主要目的是总结基于各种深度神经网络架构的最新工作，即用于人类活动识别的卷积神经网络（CNN）。根据多模态传感设备、智能手机、雷达和视觉设备等输入设备的使用情况，所审查的系统分为四类。这篇评论描述了每个受审查系统的 CNN 架构的性能、优点、缺点和使用的超参数，并概述了可用的公共数据源。此外，还讨论了基于 CNN 的 HAR 系统当前面临的挑战。最后，本次综述总结了一些潜在的未来方向，这对于希望在该领域做出贡献的研究人员有很大帮助。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了使用卷积神经网络进行人类活动识别（HAR）的最新研究、数据集、挑战和未来发展方向。
AI.motivation: 人类活动识别在日常生活中具有重要意义，而卷积神经网络（CNN）在该领域表现出色，因此需要对基于CNN的HAR方法进行全面回顾和分析。
AI.method: 本文通过分类输入设备（如多模态传感器、智能手机、雷达和视觉设备）对基于CNN的HAR系统进行了系统性分类，并讨论了每种系统的性能、优缺点、超参数及可用数据集。
AI.result: 本文总结了不同设备下的CNN架构在HAR中的应用表现，并分析了当前基于CNN的HAR系统面临的主要挑战。
AI.conclusion: 本文为研究人员提供了关于HAR领域的未来研究方向，有助于推动该领域的进一步发展。

title: Wave-Controlled Metasurface-Based Reconfigurable Intelligent Surfaces
title_zh: 基于波控超表面的可重构智能表面
abstract: Reconfigurable Intelligent Surfaces (RISs) are programmable metasurfaces that can adaptively steer received electromagnetic energy in desired directions by employing controllable phase shifting cells. Among other uses, an RIS can modify the propagation environment in order to provide wireless access to user locations that are not otherwise reachable by a base station. Alternatively, an RIS can steer the waves away from particular locations in space, to eliminate interference and allow for co-existence of the wireless network with other types of fixed wireless services (e.g., radars, unlicensed radio bands, etc.). The novel approach in this work is a wave-controlled architecture that properly accounts for the maximum possible change in the local reflection phase that can be achieved by adjacent RIS elements. It obviates the need for dense wiring and signal paths that would be required for individual control of every RIS element, and thus offers a substantial reduction in the required hardware. We specify this wave-controlled RIS architecture in detail and discuss signal processing and machine learning methods that exploit it in both point-to-point and multicell MIMO systems. Such implementations can lead to a dramatic improvement in next-generation wireless, radar, and navigation systems where RIS finds wide applications. They have the potential to improve the efficiency of spectrum utilization and coexistence by orders of magnitude.
summary: Reconfigurable Intelligent Surfaces (RISs) are programmable metasurfaces that can adaptively steer received electromagnetic energy in desired directions by employing controllable phase shifting cells. Among other uses, an RIS can modify the propagation environment in order to provide wireless access to user locations that are not otherwise reachable by a base station. Alternatively, an RIS can steer the waves away from particular locations in space, to eliminate interference and allow for co-existence of the wireless network with other types of fixed wireless services (e.g., radars, unlicensed radio bands, etc.). The novel approach in this work is a wave-controlled architecture that properly accounts for the maximum possible change in the local reflection phase that can be achieved by adjacent RIS elements. It obviates the need for dense wiring and signal paths that would be required for individual control of every RIS element, and thus offers a substantial reduction in the required hardware. We specify this wave-controlled RIS architecture in detail and discuss signal processing and machine learning methods that exploit it in both point-to-point and multicell MIMO systems. Such implementations can lead to a dramatic improvement in next-generation wireless, radar, and navigation systems where RIS finds wide applications. They have the potential to improve the efficiency of spectrum utilization and coexistence by orders of magnitude.
abstract_zh: 可重构智能表面（RIS）是可编程超表面，可以通过采用可控相移单元自适应地将接收到的电磁能引导到所需方向。除其他用途外，RIS 可以修改传播环境，以便提供对基站无法到达的用户位置的无线访问。或者，RIS 可以引导电波远离太空中的特定位置，以消除干扰并允许无线网络与其他类型的固定无线服务（例如雷达、未经许可的无线电频段等）共存。这项工作中的新颖方法是一种波控架构，它正确地考虑了相邻 RIS 元件可以实现的局部反射相位的最大可能变化。它消除了对每个 RIS 元件单独控制所需的密集布线和信号路径的需求，从而大大减少了所需的硬件。我们详细说明了这种波控 RIS 架构，并讨论了在点对点和多小区 MIMO 系统中利用它的信号处理和机器学习方法。此类实施可以显着改进 RIS 广泛应用的下一代无线、雷达和导航系统。它们有可能将频谱利用和共存的效率提高几个数量级。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于波控超表面的可重构智能表面（RIS）架构，通过优化相邻单元的相位调控，减少硬件复杂度并提升无线通信性能。
AI.motivation: 传统RIS需独立控制每个单元导致硬件复杂且成本高，难以满足下一代无线通信对高效频谱利用和干扰管理的需求。
AI.method: 设计波控RIS架构，利用相邻单元相位变化特性，结合信号处理与机器学习方法，实现对点对点及多小区MIMO系统的优化。
AI.result: 显著降低硬件需求，提升无线通信、雷达及导航系统的频谱效率与共存能力，为下一代通信技术提供可行方案。
AI.conclusion: 波控RIS架构通过简化控制机制与智能算法结合，有望在无线通信领域实现频谱利用效率的阶跃式提升。

title: Evaluation of Runtime Monitoring for UAV Emergency Landing
title_zh: 无人机紧急迫降运行时监测评估
comment: 7 pages, 4 figures, 1 table. To appear in the proceedings of 2022 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA)
comments: 7 pages, 4 figures, 1 table. To appear in the proceedings of 2022 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA)
abstract: To certify UAV operations in populated areas, risk mitigation strategies -- such as Emergency Landing (EL) -- must be in place to account for potential failures. EL aims at reducing ground risk by finding safe landing areas using on-board sensors. The first contribution of this paper is to present a new EL approach, in line with safety requirements introduced in recent research. In particular, the proposed EL pipeline includes mechanisms to monitor learning based components during execution. This way, another contribution is to study the behavior of Machine Learning Runtime Monitoring (MLRM) approaches within the context of a real-world critical system. A new evaluation methodology is introduced, and applied to assess the practical safety benefits of three MLRM mechanisms. The proposed approach is compared to a default mitigation strategy (open a parachute when a failure is detected), and appears to be much safer.
summary: To certify UAV operations in populated areas, risk mitigation strategies -- such as Emergency Landing (EL) -- must be in place to account for potential failures. EL aims at reducing ground risk by finding safe landing areas using on-board sensors. The first contribution of this paper is to present a new EL approach, in line with safety requirements introduced in recent research. In particular, the proposed EL pipeline includes mechanisms to monitor learning based components during execution. This way, another contribution is to study the behavior of Machine Learning Runtime Monitoring (MLRM) approaches within the context of a real-world critical system. A new evaluation methodology is introduced, and applied to assess the practical safety benefits of three MLRM mechanisms. The proposed approach is compared to a default mitigation strategy (open a parachute when a failure is detected), and appears to be much safer.
abstract_zh: 为了验证无人机在人口稠密地区的运行，必须制定风险缓解策略，例如紧急着陆 (EL)，以应对潜在的故障。 EL 旨在通过使用机载传感器寻找安全着陆区域来降低地面风险。本文的第一个贡献是提出一种新的 EL 方法，符合最近研究中引入的安全要求。特别是，所提出的 EL 管道包括在执行期间监视基于学习的组件的机制。这样，另一个贡献是研究现实世界关键系统背景下的机器学习运行时监控 (MLRM) 方法的行为。引入了一种新的评估方法，并应用于评估三种 MLRM 机制的实际安全效益。所提出的方法与默认缓解策略（检测到故障时打开降落伞）相比，似乎更安全。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新型无人机紧急着陆（EL）方法，通过集成机器学习运行时监控（MLRM）机制，评估其在实际系统中的安全效益。
AI.motivation: 为确保无人机在人口密集区域的安全运行，需有效风险缓解策略。传统方法（如开伞）存在局限，需验证MLRM在动态环境中的可靠性。
AI.method: 设计包含学习组件监控的EL流程，提出MLRM评估方法，对比三种MLRM机制与传统开伞策略的安全性能。
AI.result: 实验表明，新方法较传统策略显著提升安全水平，MLRM机制能有效降低地面风险。
AI.conclusion: MLRM在无人机紧急着陆场景中具备实际安全价值，为未来安全关键系统提供可行监控方案。
