title: Multi-Objective Quality Diversity Optimization
title_zh: 多目标质量多样性优化
abstract: In this work, we consider the problem of Quality-Diversity (QD) optimization with multiple objectives. QD algorithms have been proposed to search for a large collection of both diverse and high-performing solutions instead of a single set of local optima. Thriving for diversity was shown to be useful in many industrial and robotics applications. On the other hand, most real-life problems exhibit several potentially antagonist objectives to be optimized. Hence being able to optimize for multiple objectives with an appropriate technique while thriving for diversity is important to many fields. Here, we propose an extension of the MAP-Elites algorithm in the multi-objective setting: Multi-Objective MAP-Elites (MOME). Namely, it combines the diversity inherited from the MAP-Elites grid algorithm with the strength of multi-objective optimizations by filling each cell with a Pareto Front. As such, it allows to extract diverse solutions in the descriptor space while exploring different compromises between objectives. We evaluate our method on several tasks, from standard optimization problems to robotics simulations. Our experimental evaluation shows the ability of MOME to provide diverse solutions while providing global performances similar to standard multi-objective algorithms.
summary: In this work, we consider the problem of Quality-Diversity (QD) optimization with multiple objectives. QD algorithms have been proposed to search for a large collection of both diverse and high-performing solutions instead of a single set of local optima. Thriving for diversity was shown to be useful in many industrial and robotics applications. On the other hand, most real-life problems exhibit several potentially antagonist objectives to be optimized. Hence being able to optimize for multiple objectives with an appropriate technique while thriving for diversity is important to many fields. Here, we propose an extension of the MAP-Elites algorithm in the multi-objective setting: Multi-Objective MAP-Elites (MOME). Namely, it combines the diversity inherited from the MAP-Elites grid algorithm with the strength of multi-objective optimizations by filling each cell with a Pareto Front. As such, it allows to extract diverse solutions in the descriptor space while exploring different compromises between objectives. We evaluate our method on several tasks, from standard optimization problems to robotics simulations. Our experimental evaluation shows the ability of MOME to provide diverse solutions while providing global performances similar to standard multi-objective algorithms.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们考虑多目标的质量多样性（QD）优化问题。 QD 算法已被提出来搜索大量多样化且高性能的解决方案，而不是一组局部最优解。事实证明，多元化的蓬勃发展在许多工业和机器人应用中非常有用。另一方面，大多数现实生活中的问题都表现出几个潜在的对立目标需要优化。因此，能够使用适当的技术优化多个目标，同时实现多样性，对于许多领域都很重要。在这里，我们提出了多目标设置中 MAP-Elites 算法的扩展：多目标 MAP-Elites (MOME)。也就是说，它将 MAP-Elites 网格算法继承的多样性与通过用帕累托前沿填充每个单元格的多目标优化的强度相结合。因此，它允许在描述符空间中提取不同的解决方案，同时探索目标之间的不同折衷方案。我们在多项任务上评估我们的方法，从标准优化问题到机器人模拟。我们的实验评估表明 MOME 能够提供多样化的解决方案，同时提供类似于标准多目标算法的全局性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多目标质量多样性优化方法MOME，通过扩展MAP-Elites算法，结合多目标优化技术，在保持解多样性的同时探索不同目标间的权衡。
AI.motivation: 现实问题常涉及多个对抗性目标，传统QD算法仅针对单一目标优化，难以满足实际需求，需开发兼顾多目标优化与多样性的方法。
AI.method: 设计Multi-Objective MAP-Elites（MOME）算法，将MAP-Elites的网格结构与多目标优化的帕累托前沿结合，每个网格单元存储帕累托最优解集，实现描述空间多样性与目标权衡的探索。
AI.result: 实验表明MOME在标准优化问题和机器人仿真任务中，既能生成多样化解决方案，又保持与主流多目标算法相当的全局性能。
AI.conclusion: MOME有效融合质量多样性与多目标优化，为复杂问题提供多样化的高性能解集，验证了方法在多领域任务中的有效性。

authors_text: Peng Wang,An Yang,Rui Men,Junyang Lin,Shuai Bai,Zhikang Li,Jianxin Ma,Chang Zhou,Jingren Zhou,Hongxia Yang
title: OFA: Unifying Architectures, Tasks, and Modalities Through a Simple Sequence-to-Sequence Learning Framework
title_zh: OFA：通过简单的序列到序列学习框架统一架构、任务和模式
abstract: In this work, we pursue a unified paradigm for multimodal pretraining to break the scaffolds of complex task/modality-specific customization. We propose OFA, a Task-Agnostic and Modality-Agnostic framework that supports Task Comprehensiveness. OFA unifies a diverse set of cross-modal and unimodal tasks, including image generation, visual grounding, image captioning, image classification, language modeling, etc., in a simple sequence-to-sequence learning framework. OFA follows the instruction-based learning in both pretraining and finetuning stages, requiring no extra task-specific layers for downstream tasks. In comparison with the recent state-of-the-art vision & language models that rely on extremely large cross-modal datasets, OFA is pretrained on only 20M publicly available image-text pairs. Despite its simplicity and relatively small-scale training data, OFA achieves new SOTAs in a series of cross-modal tasks while attaining highly competitive performances on uni-modal tasks. Our further analysis indicates that OFA can also effectively transfer to unseen tasks and unseen domains. Our code and models are publicly available at https://github.com/OFA-Sys/OFA.
summary: In this work, we pursue a unified paradigm for multimodal pretraining to break the scaffolds of complex task/modality-specific customization. We propose OFA, a Task-Agnostic and Modality-Agnostic framework that supports Task Comprehensiveness. OFA unifies a diverse set of cross-modal and unimodal tasks, including image generation, visual grounding, image captioning, image classification, language modeling, etc., in a simple sequence-to-sequence learning framework. OFA follows the instruction-based learning in both pretraining and finetuning stages, requiring no extra task-specific layers for downstream tasks. In comparison with the recent state-of-the-art vision & language models that rely on extremely large cross-modal datasets, OFA is pretrained on only 20M publicly available image-text pairs. Despite its simplicity and relatively small-scale training data, OFA achieves new SOTAs in a series of cross-modal tasks while attaining highly competitive performances on uni-modal tasks. Our further analysis indicates that OFA can also effectively transfer to unseen tasks and unseen domains. Our code and models are publicly available at https://github.com/OFA-Sys/OFA.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们追求多模式预训练的统一范例，以打破复杂任务/特定模式定制的支架。我们提出了 OFA，一个支持任务综合性的任务无关和模态无关的框架。 OFA 在一个简单的序列到序列学习框架中统一了一组不同的跨模态和单模态任务，包括图像生成、视觉基础、图像字幕、图像分类、语言建模等。 OFA 在预训练和微调阶段都遵循基于指令的学习，下游任务不需要额外的特定于任务的层。与最近依赖于极大跨模态数据集的最先进的视觉和语言模型相比，OFA 仅在 2000 万个公开可用的图像文本对上进行了预训练。尽管其简单且训练数据规模相对较小，OFA 在一系列跨模态任务中实现了新的 SOTA，同时在单模态任务上获得了极具竞争力的表现。我们的进一步分析表明，OFA 还可以有效地转移到看不见的任务和看不见的领域。我们的代码和模型可在 https://github.com/OFA-Sys/OFA 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出OFA框架，通过简单的序列到序列学习框架统一多种跨模态和单模态任务，无需任务特定层。
AI.motivation: 现有模型依赖复杂任务/模态定制和大规模数据，缺乏通用性。本文旨在构建一个任务和模态无关的统一框架，以更简洁的方式处理多模态任务。
AI.method: 采用指令驱动学习，在预训练和微调阶段均无需额外任务层，基于20M公开图像-文本对进行预训练，使用统一序列到序列架构处理多模态任务。
AI.result: 在跨模态任务中达到新SOTA，在单模态任务中表现竞争力，并能有效迁移到新任务和领域。
AI.conclusion: OFA证明了简单框架在少量数据下可实现多任务统一，展示了强大的跨任务和跨领域迁移能力。

tldr: 本文提出OFA框架，通过简单的序列到序列学习框架统一多种跨模态和单模态任务，无需任务特定层。
motivation: 现有模型依赖复杂任务/模态定制和大规模数据，缺乏通用性。本文旨在构建一个任务和模态无关的统一框架，以更简洁的方式处理多模态任务。
method: 采用指令驱动学习，在预训练和微调阶段均无需额外任务层，基于20M公开图像-文本对进行预训练，使用统一序列到序列架构处理多模态任务。
result: 在跨模态任务中达到新SOTA，在单模态任务中表现竞争力，并能有效迁移到新任务和领域。
conclusion: OFA证明了简单框架在少量数据下可实现多任务统一，展示了强大的跨任务和跨领域迁移能力。
search_text: OFA: Unifying Architectures, Tasks, and Modalities Through a Simple Sequence-to-Sequence Learning Framework OFA：通过简单的序列到序列学习框架统一架构、任务和模式 In this work, we pursue a unified paradigm for multimodal pretraining to break the scaffolds of complex task/modality-specific customization. We propose OFA, a Task-Agnostic and Modality-Agnostic framework that supports Task Comprehensiveness. OFA unifies a diverse set of cross-modal and unimodal tasks, including image generation, visual grounding, image captioning, image classification, language modeling, etc., in a simple sequence-to-sequence learning framework. OFA follows the instruction-based learning in both pretraining and finetuning stages, requiring no extra task-specific layers for downstream tasks. In comparison with the recent state-of-the-art vision & language models that rely on extremely large cross-modal datasets, OFA is pretrained on only 20M publicly available image-text pairs. Despite its simplicity and relatively small-scale training data, OFA achieves new SOTAs in a series of cross-modal tasks while attaining highly competitive performances on uni-modal tasks. Our further analysis indicates that OFA can also effectively transfer to unseen tasks and unseen domains. Our code and models are publicly available at https://github.com/OFA-Sys/OFA. 在这项工作中，我们追求多模式预训练的统一范例，以打破复杂任务/特定模式定制的支架。我们提出了 OFA，一个支持任务综合性的任务无关和模态无关的框架。 OFA 在一个简单的序列到序列学习框架中统一了一组不同的跨模态和单模态任务，包括图像生成、视觉基础、图像字幕、图像分类、语言建模等。 OFA 在预训练和微调阶段都遵循基于指令的学习，下游任务不需要额外的特定于任务的层。与最近依赖于极大跨模态数据集的最先进的视觉和语言模型相比，OFA 仅在 2000 万个公开可用的图像文本对上进行了预训练。尽管其简单且训练数据规模相对较小，OFA 在一系列跨模态任务中实现了新的 SOTA，同时在单模态任务上获得了极具竞争力的表现。我们的进一步分析表明，OFA 还可以有效地转移到看不见的任务和看不见的领域。我们的代码和模型可在 https://github.com/OFA-Sys/OFA 上公开获取。 本文提出OFA框架，通过简单的序列到序列学习框架统一多种跨模态和单模态任务，无需任务特定层。 Peng Wang,An Yang,Rui Men,Junyang Lin,Shuai Bai,Zhikang Li,Jianxin Ma,Chang Zhou,Jingren Zhou,Hongxia Yang cs.CV,cs.CL

title: Using Partial Monotonicity in Submodular Maximization
title_zh: 在子模最大化中使用部分单调性
abstract: Over the last two decades, submodular function maximization has been the workhorse of many discrete optimization problems in machine learning applications. Traditionally, the study of submodular functions was based on binary function properties. However, such properties have an inherit weakness, namely, if an algorithm assumes functions that have a particular property, then it provides no guarantee for functions that violate this property, even when the violation is very slight. Therefore, recent works began to consider continuous versions of function properties. Probably the most significant among these (so far) are the submodularity ratio and the curvature, which were studied extensively together and separately. The monotonicity property of set functions plays a central role in submodular maximization. Nevertheless, and despite all the above works, no continuous version of this property has been suggested to date (as far as we know). This is unfortunate since submoduar functions that are almost monotone often arise in machine learning applications. In this work we fill this gap by defining the monotonicity ratio, which is a continues version of the monotonicity property. We then show that for many standard submodular maximization algorithms one can prove new approximation guarantees that depend on the monotonicity ratio; leading to improved approximation ratios for the common machine learning applications of movie recommendation, quadratic programming and image summarization.
summary: Over the last two decades, submodular function maximization has been the workhorse of many discrete optimization problems in machine learning applications. Traditionally, the study of submodular functions was based on binary function properties. However, such properties have an inherit weakness, namely, if an algorithm assumes functions that have a particular property, then it provides no guarantee for functions that violate this property, even when the violation is very slight. Therefore, recent works began to consider continuous versions of function properties. Probably the most significant among these (so far) are the submodularity ratio and the curvature, which were studied extensively together and separately. The monotonicity property of set functions plays a central role in submodular maximization. Nevertheless, and despite all the above works, no continuous version of this property has been suggested to date (as far as we know). This is unfortunate since submoduar functions that are almost monotone often arise in machine learning applications. In this work we fill this gap by defining the monotonicity ratio, which is a continues version of the monotonicity property. We then show that for many standard submodular maximization algorithms one can prove new approximation guarantees that depend on the monotonicity ratio; leading to improved approximation ratios for the common machine learning applications of movie recommendation, quadratic programming and image summarization.
abstract_zh: 在过去的二十年中，子模函数最大化一直是机器学习应用中许多离散优化问题的主力。传统上，子模函数的研究是基于二元函数性质。然而，这些属性有一个继承的弱点，即，如果算法假设函数具有特定属性，那么它不能为违反该属性的函数提供保证，即使违反非常轻微。因此，最近的工作开始考虑函数属性的连续版本。其中最重要的（到目前为止）可能是子模比和曲率，它们被一起和单独进行了广泛的研究。集合函数的单调性在子模最大化中起着核心作用。尽管如此，尽管进行了上述所有工作，但迄今为止尚未提出该属性的连续版本（据我们所知）。这是不幸的，因为机器学习应用中经常出现几乎单调的子模函数。在这项工作中，我们通过定义单调性比率来填补这一空白，这是单调性属性的连续版本。然后我们证明，对于许多标准子模最大化算法，我们可以证明依赖于单调性比率的新近似保证；提高了电影推荐、二次规划和图像摘要等常见机器学习应用的近似率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出单调性比率这一连续版本的单调性属性，并将其应用于子模最大化算法以改进近似比率。
AI.motivation: 传统子模函数研究依赖二元属性，但实际应用中存在轻微违反这些属性的函数，而现有连续属性（如子模性比率）未覆盖单调性属性，导致算法无法有效处理实际问题。
AI.method: 定义单调性比率作为单调性的连续度量，并证明其可应用于多种子模最大化算法以推导新的近似保证。
AI.result: 改进了电影推荐、二次规划和图像摘要等机器学习任务的近似比率，验证了单调性比率的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 填补了子模最大化中连续单调性属性的空白，为算法设计提供了新思路并提升了实际应用效果。

title: Data set creation and empirical analysis for detecting signs of depression from social media postings
title_zh: 用于从社交媒体帖子中检测抑郁迹象的数据集创建和实证分析
abstract: Depression is a common mental illness that has to be detected and treated at an early stage to avoid serious consequences. There are many methods and modalities for detecting depression that involves physical examination of the individual. However, diagnosing mental health using their social media data is more effective as it avoids such physical examinations. Also, people express their emotions well in social media, it is desirable to diagnose their mental health using social media data. Though there are many existing systems that detects mental illness of a person by analysing their social media data, detecting the level of depression is also important for further treatment. Thus, in this research, we developed a gold standard data set that detects the levels of depression as `not depressed', `moderately depressed' and `severely depressed' from the social media postings. Traditional learning algorithms were employed on this data set and an empirical analysis was presented in this paper. Data augmentation technique was applied to overcome the data imbalance. Among the several variations that are implemented, the model with Word2Vec vectorizer and Random Forest classifier on augmented data outperforms the other variations with a score of 0.877 for both accuracy and F1 measure.
summary: Depression is a common mental illness that has to be detected and treated at an early stage to avoid serious consequences. There are many methods and modalities for detecting depression that involves physical examination of the individual. However, diagnosing mental health using their social media data is more effective as it avoids such physical examinations. Also, people express their emotions well in social media, it is desirable to diagnose their mental health using social media data. Though there are many existing systems that detects mental illness of a person by analysing their social media data, detecting the level of depression is also important for further treatment. Thus, in this research, we developed a gold standard data set that detects the levels of depression as `not depressed', `moderately depressed' and `severely depressed' from the social media postings. Traditional learning algorithms were employed on this data set and an empirical analysis was presented in this paper. Data augmentation technique was applied to overcome the data imbalance. Among the several variations that are implemented, the model with Word2Vec vectorizer and Random Forest classifier on augmented data outperforms the other variations with a score of 0.877 for both accuracy and F1 measure.
abstract_zh: 抑郁症是一种常见的精神疾病，必须及早发现、及早治疗，以免造成严重后果。检测抑郁症的方法和方式有很多，其中包括对个人进行身体检查。然而，使用社交媒体数据诊断心理健康状况更有效，因为它避免了此类体检。此外，人们在社交媒体上很好地表达了自己的情绪，因此需要利用社交媒体数据来诊断他们的心理健康状况。尽管有许多现有系统可以通过分析一个人的社交媒体数据来检测其精神疾病，但检测抑郁程度对于进一步治疗也很重要。因此，在这项研究中，我们开发了一个黄金标准数据集，可以根据社交媒体帖子检测抑郁程度为“不抑郁”、“中度抑郁”和“重度抑郁”。在此数据集上采用传统的学习算法，并进行了实证分析。应用数据增强技术来克服数据不平衡。在实现的几种变体中，在增强数据上使用 Word2Vec 矢量器和随机森林分类器的模型优于其他变体，准确度和 F1 测量得分均为 0.877。

AI.tldr: 该论文旨在创建一个用于从社交媒体帖子中检测抑郁程度的黄金标准数据集，并通过实证分析评估不同方法的效果。
AI.motivation: 抑郁症需要早期检测，而传统方法依赖于身体检查，社交媒体数据能更有效地反映情绪状态，但现有系统难以准确判断抑郁程度。
AI.method: 构建包含三类抑郁程度的数据集，采用数据增强技术解决类别不平衡问题，并使用Word2Vec向量化与随机森林分类器进行实验。
AI.result: 在增强数据上，Word2Vec结合随机森林模型达到0.877的准确率和F1值，优于其他方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的模型和数据集为抑郁症的社交媒体检测提供了有效工具，未来可进一步优化特征提取和分类算法。

Thus, in this research, we developed a gold standard data set that detects the levels of depression as `not depressed', `moderately depressed' and `severely depressed' from the social media postings. Traditional learning algorithms were employed on this data set and an empirical analysis was presented in this paper. Data augmentation technique was applied to overcome the data imbalance. Among the several variations that are implemented, the model with Word2Vec vectorizer and Random Forest classifier on augmented data outperforms the other variations with a score of 0.877 for both accuracy and F1 measure. 抑郁症是一种常见的精神疾病，必须及早发现、及早治疗，以免造成严重后果。检测抑郁症的方法和方式有很多，其中包括对个人进行身体检查。然而，使用社交媒体数据诊断心理健康状况更有效，因为它避免了此类体检。此外，人们在社交媒体上很好地表达了自己的情绪，因此需要利用社交媒体数据来诊断他们的心理健康状况。尽管有许多现有系统可以通过分析一个人的社交媒体数据来检测其精神疾病，但检测抑郁程度对于进一步治疗也很重要。因此，在这项研究中，我们开发了一个黄金标准数据集，可以根据社交媒体帖子检测抑郁程度为“不抑郁”、“中度抑郁”和“重度抑郁”。在此数据集上采用传统的学习算法，并进行了实证分析。应用数据增强技术来克服数据不平衡。在实现的几种变体中，在增强数据上使用 Word2Vec 矢量器和随机森林分类器的模型优于其他变体，准确度和 F1 测量得分均为 0.877。 该论文旨在创建一个用于从社交媒体帖子中检测抑郁程度的黄金标准数据集，并通过实证分析评估不同方法的效果。 Kayalvizhi S,Thenmozhi D cs.AI

authors_text: Daniil Chesakov,Anastasia Maltseva,Alexander Groshev,Andrey Kuznetsov,Denis Dimitrov
title: A new face swap method for image and video domains: a technical report
title_zh: 图像和视频领域的新换脸方法：技术报告
abstract: Deep fake technology became a hot field of research in the last few years. Researchers investigate sophisticated Generative Adversarial Networks (GAN), autoencoders, and other approaches to establish precise and robust algorithms for face swapping. Achieved results show that the deep fake unsupervised synthesis task has problems in terms of the visual quality of generated data. These problems usually lead to high fake detection accuracy when an expert analyzes them. The first problem is that existing image-to-image approaches do not consider video domain specificity and frame-by-frame processing leads to face jittering and other clearly visible distortions. Another problem is the generated data resolution, which is low for many existing methods due to high computational complexity. The third problem appears when the source face has larger proportions (like bigger cheeks), and after replacement it becomes visible on the face border. Our main goal was to develop such an approach that could solve these problems and outperform existing solutions on a number of clue metrics. We introduce a new face swap pipeline that is based on FaceShifter architecture and fixes the problems stated above. With a new eye loss function, super-resolution block, and Gaussian-based face mask generation leads to improvements in quality which is confirmed during evaluation.
summary: Deep fake technology became a hot field of research in the last few years. Researchers investigate sophisticated Generative Adversarial Networks (GAN), autoencoders, and other approaches to establish precise and robust algorithms for face swapping. Achieved results show that the deep fake unsupervised synthesis task has problems in terms of the visual quality of generated data. These problems usually lead to high fake detection accuracy when an expert analyzes them. The first problem is that existing image-to-image approaches do not consider video domain specificity and frame-by-frame processing leads to face jittering and other clearly visible distortions. Another problem is the generated data resolution, which is low for many existing methods due to high computational complexity. The third problem appears when the source face has larger proportions (like bigger cheeks), and after replacement it becomes visible on the face border. Our main goal was to develop such an approach that could solve these problems and outperform existing solutions on a number of clue metrics. We introduce a new face swap pipeline that is based on FaceShifter architecture and fixes the problems stated above. With a new eye loss function, super-resolution block, and Gaussian-based face mask generation leads to improvements in quality which is confirmed during evaluation.
abstract_zh: 深度造假技术成为近几年的研究热点。研究人员研究了复杂的生成对抗网络 (GAN)、自动编码器和其他方法，以建立精确且强大的面部交换算法。所取得的结果表明，深度假无监督合成任务在生成数据的视觉质量方面存在问题。当专家分析这些问题时，通常会导致较高的假货检测准确率。第一个问题是现有的图像到图像方法没有考虑视频域的特殊性，逐帧处理会导致面部抖动和其他清晰可见的失真。另一个问题是生成的数据分辨率，由于计算复杂度高，许多现有方法的分辨率较低。当源脸部比例较大（例如更大的脸颊）时，会出现第三个问题，并且在替换后它在脸部边框上变得可见。我们的主要目标是开发一种可以解决这些问题并在许多线索指标上优于现有解决方案的方法。我们引入了一种基于 FaceShifter 架构的新面部交换管道，并修复了上述问题。借助新的眼损失函数、超分辨率块和基于高斯的面罩生成，可以提高质量，这一点在评估过程中得到了证实。

AI.tldr: 提出一种新的图像和视频领域换脸方法，解决现有技术中的视觉质量与视频特定性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有换脸技术存在视频帧处理抖动、生成分辨率不足及面部比例失真等问题，导致检测准确率高。
AI.method: 基于FaceShifter架构，结合新眼损失函数、超分辨率模块和高斯掩码生成技术。
AI.result: 在多个关键指标上优于现有方法，生成质量得到验证。
AI.conclusion: 新方法有效解决了视频抖动、分辨率及面部比例问题，为换脸技术提供更优方案。

authors_text: Jack Raymond,Radomir Stevanovic,William Bernoudy,Kelly Boothby,Catherine McGeoch,Andrew J. Berkley,Pau Farré,Andrew D. King
title: Hybrid quantum annealing for larger-than-QPU lattice-structured problems
title_zh: 针对大于 QPU 晶格结构问题的混合量子退火
abstract: Quantum processing units (QPUs) executing annealing algorithms have shown promise in optimization and simulation applications. Hybrid algorithms are a natural bridge to additional applications of larger scale. We present a straightforward and effective method for solving larger-than-QPU lattice-structured Ising optimization problems. Performance is compared against simulated annealing with promising results, and improvement is shown as a function of the generation of D-Wave QPU used.
summary: Quantum processing units (QPUs) executing annealing algorithms have shown promise in optimization and simulation applications. Hybrid algorithms are a natural bridge to additional applications of larger scale. We present a straightforward and effective method for solving larger-than-QPU lattice-structured Ising optimization problems. Performance is compared against simulated annealing with promising results, and improvement is shown as a function of the generation of D-Wave QPU used.
abstract_zh: 执行退火算法的量子处理单元 (QPU) 在优化和模拟应用中表现出了良好的前景。混合算法是通往更大规模其他应用的天然桥梁。我们提出了一种简单有效的方法来解决大于 QPU 晶格结构的 Ising 优化问题。将性能与模拟退火进行比较，结果令人满意，并且改进显示为所使用的 D-Wave QPU 代数的函数。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种混合量子退火方法，用于解决超出量子处理单元（QPU）规模的晶格结构Ising优化问题。
AI.motivation: 量子退火在优化和模拟中表现良好，但受限于QPU规模，需通过混合算法扩展其应用范围。
AI.method: 结合量子退火与经典算法，设计混合方法解决大规模晶格结构问题，并与模拟退火进行性能对比。
AI.result: 实验表明，混合方法性能优于模拟退火，且随着D-Wave QPU代数提升，改进效果更显著。
AI.conclusion: 混合量子退火有效扩展了QPU的应用规模，为更大问题提供了可行解决方案。

authors_text: Aamir Arsalan,Muhammad Majid,Imran Fareed Nizami,Waleed Manzoor,Syed Muhammad Anwar,Jihyoung Ryu
title: Human Stress Assessment: A Comprehensive Review of Methods Using Wearable Sensors and Non-wearable Techniques
title_zh: 人体压力评估：使用可穿戴传感器和非可穿戴技术的方法的综合回顾
abstract: This paper presents a comprehensive review of methods covering significant subjective and objective human stress detection techniques available in the literature. The methods for measuring human stress responses could include subjective questionnaires (developed by psychologists) and objective markers observed using data from wearable and non-wearable sensors. In particular, wearable sensor-based methods commonly use data from electroencephalography, electrocardiogram, galvanic skin response, electromyography, electrodermal activity, heart rate, heart rate variability, and photoplethysmography both individually and in multimodal fusion strategies. Whereas, methods based on non-wearable sensors include strategies such as analyzing pupil dilation and speech, smartphone data, eye movement, body posture, and thermal imaging. Whenever a stressful situation is encountered by an individual, physiological, physical, or behavioral change is induced which help in coping with the challenge at hand. A wide range of studies has attempted to establish a relationship between these stressful situations and the response of human beings by using different kinds of psychological, physiological, physical, and behavioral measures. Inspired by the lack of availability of a definitive verdict about the relationship of human stress with these different kinds of markers, a detailed survey about human stress detection methods is conducted in this paper. In particular, we explore how stress detection methods can benefit from artificial intelligence utilizing relevant data from various sources. This review will prove to be a reference document that would provide guidelines for future research enabling effective detection of human stress conditions.
summary: This paper presents a comprehensive review of methods covering significant subjective and objective human stress detection techniques available in the literature. The methods for measuring human stress responses could include subjective questionnaires (developed by psychologists) and objective markers observed using data from wearable and non-wearable sensors. In particular, wearable sensor-based methods commonly use data from electroencephalography, electrocardiogram, galvanic skin response, electromyography, electrodermal activity, heart rate, heart rate variability, and photoplethysmography both individually and in multimodal fusion strategies. Whereas, methods based on non-wearable sensors include strategies such as analyzing pupil dilation and speech, smartphone data, eye movement, body posture, and thermal imaging. Whenever a stressful situation is encountered by an individual, physiological, physical, or behavioral change is induced which help in coping with the challenge at hand. A wide range of studies has attempted to establish a relationship between these stressful situations and the response of human beings by using different kinds of psychological, physiological, physical, and behavioral measures. Inspired by the lack of availability of a definitive verdict about the relationship of human stress with these different kinds of markers, a detailed survey about human stress detection methods is conducted in this paper. In particular, we explore how stress detection methods can benefit from artificial intelligence utilizing relevant data from various sources. This review will prove to be a reference document that would provide guidelines for future research enabling effective detection of human stress conditions.
abstract_zh: 本文对文献中可用的重要主观和客观人体压力检测技术的方法进行了全面回顾。测量人类压力反应的方法可能包括主观问卷（由心理学家开发）和使用可穿戴和非可穿戴传感器的数据观察的客观标记。特别是，基于可穿戴传感器的方法通常使用来自脑电图、心电图、皮肤电反应、肌电图、皮肤电活动、心率、心率变异性和光电容积描记术的数据，无论是单独的还是在多模态融合策略中。而基于非可穿戴传感器的方法包括分析瞳孔扩张和语音、智能手机数据、眼球运动、身体姿势和热成像等策略。每当个人遇到压力情况时，就会引起生理、身体或行为变化，这有助于应对眼前的挑战。广泛的研究试图通过使用不同种类的心理、生理、身体和行为测量来建立这些压力情况与人类反应之间的关系。由于缺乏关于人类压力与这些不同类型标记之间关系的明确结论，本文对人类压力检测方法进行了详细调查。特别是，我们探索压力检测方法如何利用来自各种来源的相关数据从人工智能中受益。这篇综述将被证明是一个参考文件，将为未来研究提供指导，从而有效检测人类压力状况。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了利用可穿戴和非可穿戴传感器检测人类压力的方法，并探讨人工智能在其中的应用。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏对压力与生理、行为等标记关系的明确结论，需系统梳理检测方法以指导未来研究。
AI.method: 通过文献综述，分类总结主观问卷、可穿戴传感器（如EEG、ECG、GSR）和非可穿戴技术（如瞳孔扩张、语音分析、智能手机数据）的检测方法，并分析人工智能的整合潜力。
AI.result: 详细分类了压力检测技术，比较了不同方法的优缺点，并指出多模态数据与AI算法结合的前景。
AI.conclusion: 本文为压力检测研究提供参考框架，强调跨学科方法与人工智能技术对提升检测效果的重要性。

search_text: Human Stress Assessment: A Comprehensive Review of Methods Using Wearable Sensors and Non-wearable Techniques 人体压力评估：使用可穿戴传感器和非可穿戴技术的方法的综合回顾 This paper presents a comprehensive review of methods covering significant subjective and objective human stress detection techniques available in the literature. The methods for measuring human stress responses could include subjective questionnaires (developed by psychologists) and objective markers observed using data from wearable and non-wearable sensors. In particular, wearable sensor-based methods commonly use data from electroencephalography, electrocardiogram, galvanic skin response, electromyography, electrodermal activity, heart rate, heart rate variability, and photoplethysmography both individually and in multimodal fusion strategies. Whereas, methods based on non-wearable sensors include strategies such as analyzing pupil dilation and speech, smartphone data, eye movement, body posture, and thermal imaging. Whenever a stressful situation is encountered by an individual, physiological, physical, or behavioral change is induced which help in coping with the challenge at hand. A wide range of studies has attempted to establish a relationship between these stressful situations and the response of human beings by using different kinds of psychological, physiological, physical, and behavioral measures. Inspired by the lack of availability of a definitive verdict about the relationship of human stress with these different kinds of markers, a detailed survey about human stress detection methods is conducted in this paper. In particular, we explore how stress detection methods can benefit from artificial intelligence utilizing relevant data from various sources. This review will prove to be a reference document that would provide guidelines for future research enabling effective detection of human stress conditions. 本文对文献中可用的重要主观和客观人体压力检测技术的方法进行了全面回顾。测量人类压力反应的方法可能包括主观问卷（由心理学家开发）和使用可穿戴和非可穿戴传感器的数据观察的客观标记。特别是，基于可穿戴传感器的方法通常使用来自脑电图、心电图、皮肤电反应、肌电图、皮肤电活动、心率、心率变异性和光电容积描记术的数据，无论是单独的还是在多模态融合策略中。而基于非可穿戴传感器的方法包括分析瞳孔扩张和语音、智能手机数据、眼球运动、身体姿势和热成像等策略。每当个人遇到压力情况时，就会引起生理、身体或行为变化，这有助于应对眼前的挑战。广泛的研究试图通过使用不同种类的心理、生理、身体和行为测量来建立这些压力情况与人类反应之间的关系。由于缺乏关于人类压力与这些不同类型标记之间关系的明确结论，本文对人类压力检测方法进行了详细调查。特别是，我们探索压力检测方法如何利用来自各种来源的相关数据从人工智能中受益。这篇综述将被证明是一个参考文件，将为未来研究提供指导，从而有效检测人类压力状况。 本文综述了利用可穿戴和非可穿戴传感器检测人类压力的方法，并探讨人工智能在其中的应用。 Aamir Arsalan,Muhammad Majid,Imran Fareed Nizami,Waleed Manzoor,Syed Muhammad Anwar,Jihyoung Ryu cs.HC,cs.AI

authors_text: Yazhong Si,Fan Yang,Ya Guo,Wei Zhang,Yipu Yang
title: A comprehensive benchmark analysis for sand dust image reconstruction
title_zh: 沙尘图像重建的综合基准分析
abstract: Numerous sand dust image enhancement algorithms have been proposed in recent years. To our best acknowledge, however, most methods evaluated their performance with no-reference way using few selected real-world images from internet. It is unclear how to quantitatively analysis the performance of the algorithms in a supervised way and how we could gauge the progress in the field. Moreover, due to the absence of large-scale benchmark datasets, there are no well-known reports of data-driven based method for sand dust image enhancement up till now. To advance the development of deep learning-based algorithms for sand dust image reconstruction, while enabling supervised objective evaluation of algorithm performance. In this paper, we presented a comprehensive perceptual study and analysis of real-world sand dust images, then constructed a Sand-dust Image Reconstruction Benchmark (SIRB) for training Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) and evaluating algorithms performance. In addition, we adopted the existing image transformation neural network trained on SIRB as baseline to illustrate the generalization of SIRB for training CNNs. Finally, we conducted the qualitative and quantitative evaluation to demonstrate the performance and limitations of the state-of-the-arts (SOTA), which shed light on future research in sand dust image reconstruction.

To advance the development of deep learning-based algorithms for sand dust image reconstruction, while enabling supervised objective evaluation of algorithm performance. In this paper, we presented a comprehensive perceptual study and analysis of real-world sand dust images, then constructed a Sand-dust Image Reconstruction Benchmark (SIRB) for training Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) and evaluating algorithms performance. In addition, we adopted the existing image transformation neural network trained on SIRB as baseline to illustrate the generalization of SIRB for training CNNs. Finally, we conducted the qualitative and quantitative evaluation to demonstrate the performance and limitations of the state-of-the-arts (SOTA), which shed light on future research in sand dust image reconstruction.
abstract_zh: 近年来，人们提出了许多沙尘图像增强算法。然而，据我们所知，大多数方法都使用来自互联网的少数选定的真实世界图像，以无参考的方式评估其性能。目前尚不清楚如何以监督方式定量分析算法的性能以及如何衡量该领域的进展。此外，由于缺乏大规模的基准数据集，迄今为止还没有基于数据驱动的沙尘图像增强方法的知名报道。推进基于深度学习的沙尘图像重建算法的开发，同时实现算法性能的监督客观评估。在本文中，我们对现实世界的沙尘图像进行了全面的感知研究和分析，然后构建了沙尘图像重建基准（SIRB），用于训练卷积神经网络（CNN）和评估算法性能。此外，我们采用在 SIRB 上训练的现有图像变换神经网络作为基线来说明 SIRB 用于训练 CNN 的泛化。最后，我们进行了定性和定量评估，以展示最先进的（SOTA）的性能和局限性，这为沙尘图像重建的未来研究提供了线索。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个名为SIRB的沙尘图像重建基准数据集，用于训练和评估深度学习算法，并对现有方法进行定性和定量分析。
AI.motivation: 现有沙尘图像增强算法缺乏大规模基准数据集和监督式客观评估方法，难以量化算法性能并推动领域进展。
AI.method: 通过感知研究构建SIRB数据集，采用图像转换神经网络作为基线模型，并对最新算法进行定性和定量评估。
AI.result: 成功构建SIRB基准，验证了其在训练CNN中的泛化能力，并揭示了当前最先进的沙尘图像重建方法的性能与局限性。
AI.conclusion: SIRB基准为沙尘图像重建领域提供了监督评估框架，指明了未来研究方向，强调了高质量数据集对算法发展的重要性。

authors_text: Jernej Rudi Finžgar,Philipp Ross,Leonhard Hölscher,Johannes Klepsch,Andre Luckow
title: QUARK: A Framework for Quantum Computing Application Benchmarking
title_zh: QUARK：量子计算应用基准测试框架
comment: Improved version, as submitted to IEEE QCE22 conference
comments: Improved version, as submitted to IEEE QCE22 conference
abstract: Quantum computing (QC) is anticipated to provide a speedup over classical HPC approaches for specific problems in optimization, simulation, and machine learning. With the advances in quantum computing toward practical applications, the need to analyze and compare different quantum solutions increases. While different low-level benchmarks for QC exist, these benchmarks do not provide sufficient insights into real-world application-level performance. We propose an application-centric benchmark method and the QUantum computing Application benchmaRK (QUARK) framework to foster the investigation and creation of application benchmarks for QC. This paper establishes three significant contributions: (1) it makes a case for application-level benchmarks and provides an in-depth "pen and paper" benchmark formulation of two reference problems: robot path and vehicle option optimization from the industrial domain; (2) it proposes the open-source QUARK framework for designing, implementing, executing, and analyzing benchmarks; (3) it provides multiple reference implementations for these two reference problems based on different known, and where needed, extended, classical and quantum algorithmic approaches and analyzes their performance on different types of infrastructures.
summary: Quantum computing (QC) is anticipated to provide a speedup over classical HPC approaches for specific problems in optimization, simulation, and machine learning. With the advances in quantum computing toward practical applications, the need to analyze and compare different quantum solutions increases. While different low-level benchmarks for QC exist, these benchmarks do not provide sufficient insights into real-world application-level performance. We propose an application-centric benchmark method and the QUantum computing Application benchmaRK (QUARK) framework to foster the investigation and creation of application benchmarks for QC. This paper establishes three significant contributions: (1) it makes a case for application-level benchmarks and provides an in-depth "pen and paper" benchmark formulation of two reference problems: robot path and vehicle option optimization from the industrial domain; (2) it proposes the open-source QUARK framework for designing, implementing, executing, and analyzing benchmarks; (3) it provides multiple reference implementations for these two reference problems based on different known, and where needed, extended, classical and quantum algorithmic approaches and analyzes their performance on different types of infrastructures.
abstract_zh: 量子计算 (QC) 预计将比传统 HPC 方法更快地解决优化、模拟和机器学习中的特定问题。随着量子计算向实际应用迈进，分析和比较不同量子解决方案的需求也随之增加。虽然存在不同的 QC 低级基准，但这些基准无法提供对实际应用程序级性能的足够洞察。我们提出了一种以应用为中心的基准测试方法和量子计算应用基准测试（QUARK）框架，以促进质量控制应用基准测试的研究和创建。本文做出了三个重大贡献：（1）它为应用级基准提供了案例，并为工业领域的机器人路径和车辆选项优化这两个参考问题提供了深入的“纸笔”基准制定； (2) 提出了用于设计、实现、执行和分析基准测试的开源 QUARK 框架； (3)它基于不同的已知的以及需要的扩展的经典和量子算法方法为这两个参考问题提供了多个参考实现，并分析了它们在不同类型的基础设施上的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出QUARK框架，用于量子计算应用层面的基准测试，以解决现有低级基准无法反映实际应用性能的问题。
AI.motivation: 量子计算虽在特定领域有潜力超越经典计算，但现有基准缺乏对实际应用场景的性能分析，需建立应用级基准以推动量子解决方案的比较研究。
AI.method: 设计应用导向的基准方法，构建开源QUARK框架，包含基准设计、实现、执行与分析模块，并针对工业场景中的机器人路径优化和车辆选项优化问题提供经典与量子算法的参考实现。
AI.result: 提出两个工业参考问题的基准案例，开发QUARK框架并开源，分析不同算法在多种基础设施下的性能表现。
AI.conclusion: 应用级基准对量子计算发展至关重要，QUARK框架为量子解决方案的评估与比较提供了系统化工具，推动实际应用研究。

While different low-level benchmarks for QC exist, these benchmarks do not provide sufficient insights into real-world application-level performance. We propose an application-centric benchmark method and the QUantum computing Application benchmaRK (QUARK) framework to foster the investigation and creation of application benchmarks for QC. This paper establishes three significant contributions: (1) it makes a case for application-level benchmarks and provides an in-depth "pen and paper" benchmark formulation of two reference problems: robot path and vehicle option optimization from the industrial domain; (2) it proposes the open-source QUARK framework for designing, implementing, executing, and analyzing benchmarks; (3) it provides multiple reference implementations for these two reference problems based on different known, and where needed, extended, classical and quantum algorithmic approaches and analyzes their performance on different types of infrastructures. 量子计算 (QC) 预计将比传统 HPC 方法更快地解决优化、模拟和机器学习中的特定问题。随着量子计算向实际应用迈进，分析和比较不同量子解决方案的需求也随之增加。虽然存在不同的 QC 低级基准，但这些基准无法提供对实际应用程序级性能的足够洞察。我们提出了一种以应用为中心的基准测试方法和量子计算应用基准测试（QUARK）框架，以促进质量控制应用基准测试的研究和创建。本文做出了三个重大贡献：（1）它为应用级基准提供了案例，并为工业领域的机器人路径和车辆选项优化这两个参考问题提供了深入的“纸笔”基准制定； (2) 提出了用于设计、实现、执行和分析基准测试的开源 QUARK 框架； (3)它基于不同的已知的以及需要的扩展的经典和量子算法方法为这两个参考问题提供了多个参考实现，并分析了它们在不同类型的基础设施上的性能。 本文提出QUARK框架，用于量子计算应用层面的基准测试，以解决现有低级基准无法反映实际应用性能的问题。 Jernej Rudi Finžgar,Philipp Ross,Leonhard Hölscher,Johannes Klepsch,Andre Luckow quant-ph,cs.ET

authors_text: Xiaokang Chen,Mingyu Ding,Xiaodi Wang,Ying Xin,Shentong Mo,Yunhao Wang,Shumin Han,Ping Luo,Gang Zeng,Jingdong Wang
title: Context Autoencoder for Self-Supervised Representation Learning
title_zh: 用于自监督表示学习的上下文自动编码器
comment: Accepted by International Journal of Computer Vision (IJCV)
comments: Accepted by International Journal of Computer Vision (IJCV)
abstract: We present a novel masked image modeling (MIM) approach, context autoencoder (CAE), for self-supervised representation pretraining. We pretrain an encoder by making predictions in the encoded representation space. The pretraining tasks include two tasks: masked representation prediction - predict the representations for the masked patches, and masked patch reconstruction - reconstruct the masked patches. The network is an encoder-regressor-decoder architecture: the encoder takes the visible patches as input; the regressor predicts the representations of the masked patches, which are expected to be aligned with the representations computed from the encoder, using the representations of visible patches and the positions of visible and masked patches; the decoder reconstructs the masked patches from the predicted encoded representations. The CAE design encourages the separation of learning the encoder (representation) from completing the pertaining tasks: masked representation prediction and masked patch reconstruction tasks, and making predictions in the encoded representation space empirically shows the benefit to representation learning. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our CAE through superior transfer performance in downstream tasks: semantic segmentation, object detection and instance segmentation, and classification. The code will be available at https://github.com/Atten4Vis/CAE.
summary: We present a novel masked image modeling (MIM) approach, context autoencoder (CAE), for self-supervised representation pretraining. We pretrain an encoder by making predictions in the encoded representation space. The pretraining tasks include two tasks: masked representation prediction - predict the representations for the masked patches, and masked patch reconstruction - reconstruct the masked patches. The network is an encoder-regressor-decoder architecture: the encoder takes the visible patches as input; the regressor predicts the representations of the masked patches, which are expected to be aligned with the representations computed from the encoder, using the representations of visible patches and the positions of visible and masked patches; the decoder reconstructs the masked patches from the predicted encoded representations. The CAE design encourages the separation of learning the encoder (representation) from completing the pertaining tasks: masked representation prediction and masked patch reconstruction tasks, and making predictions in the encoded representation space empirically shows the benefit to representation learning. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our CAE through superior transfer performance in downstream tasks: semantic segmentation, object detection and instance segmentation, and classification. The code will be available at https://github.com/Atten4Vis/CAE.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新颖的掩模图像建模（MIM）方法，即上下文自动编码器（CAE），用于自监督表示预训练。我们通过在编码表示空间中进行预测来预训练编码器。预训练任务包括两个任务：掩码表示预测 - 预测掩码补丁的表示，以及掩码补丁重建 - 重建掩码补丁。该网络是一个编码器-回归器-解码器架构：编码器将可见补丁作为输入；回归器使用可见补丁的表示以及可见补丁和掩模补丁的位置来预测掩模补丁的表示，该表示预计与编码器计算的表示对齐；解码器根据预测的编码表示重建屏蔽补丁。 CAE 设计鼓励将学习编码器（表示）与完成相关任务分开：屏蔽表示预测和屏蔽补丁重建任务，并且在编码表示空间中进行预测凭经验显示了表示学习的好处。我们通过下游任务中的卓越传输性能证明了 CAE 的有效性：语义分割、对象检测和实例分割以及分类。该代码可在 https://github.com/Atten4Vis/CAE 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Context Autoencoder (CAE)的新型自监督表示学习方法，通过掩码图像建模（MIM）进行预训练。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督学习方法在表示学习中存在任务分离不足的问题，需探索更有效的预训练策略以提升下游任务性能。
AI.method: 采用编码器-回归器-解码器架构，包含两个预训练任务：掩码表示预测（预测掩码块的编码表示）和掩码块重建（从预测表示重构掩码块）。
AI.result: 在语义分割、目标检测、分类等下游任务中表现出优于现有方法的迁移性能。
AI.conclusion: CAE通过分离表示学习与任务完成过程，验证了在编码表示空间进行预测对表征学习的有效性。

authors_text: Arda Senocak,Hyeonggon Ryu,Junsik Kim,In So Kweon
title: Learning Sound Localization Better From Semantically Similar Samples
title_zh: 从语义相似的样本中更好地学习声音定位
comment: Accepted to ICASSP 2022. SOTA performance in Audio-Visual Sound Localization. 5 Pages
comments: Accepted to ICASSP 2022. SOTA performance in Audio-Visual Sound Localization. 5 Pages
abstract: The objective of this work is to localize the sound sources in visual scenes. Existing audio-visual works employ contrastive learning by assigning corresponding audio-visual pairs from the same source as positives while randomly mismatched pairs as negatives. However, these negative pairs may contain semantically matched audio-visual information. Thus, these semantically correlated pairs, "hard positives", are mistakenly grouped as negatives. Our key contribution is showing that hard positives can give similar response maps to the corresponding pairs. Our approach incorporates these hard positives by adding their response maps into a contrastive learning objective directly. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach on VGG-SS and SoundNet-Flickr test sets, showing favorable performance to the state-of-the-art methods.
summary: The objective of this work is to localize the sound sources in visual scenes. Existing audio-visual works employ contrastive learning by assigning corresponding audio-visual pairs from the same source as positives while randomly mismatched pairs as negatives. However, these negative pairs may contain semantically matched audio-visual information. Thus, these semantically correlated pairs, "hard positives", are mistakenly grouped as negatives. Our key contribution is showing that hard positives can give similar response maps to the corresponding pairs. Our approach incorporates these hard positives by adding their response maps into a contrastive learning objective directly. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach on VGG-SS and SoundNet-Flickr test sets, showing favorable performance to the state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 这项工作的目标是定位视觉场景中的声源。现有的视听作品采用对比学习，将来自同一来源的相应视听对分配为正例，而随机不匹配的视听对作为负例。然而，这些否定对可能包含语义匹配的视听信息。因此，这些语义相关的对，“硬肯定”，被错误地分组为否定。我们的主要贡献是表明硬阳性可以为相应的对提供相似的响应图。我们的方法通过将它们的响应图直接添加到对比学习目标中来整合这些硬性积极因素。我们在 VGG-SS 和 SoundNet-Flickr 测试集上证明了我们的方法的有效性，显示出对最先进方法的良好性能。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过利用语义相似样本改进声音在视觉场景中的定位方法。
AI.motivation: 现有对比学习方法将语义相关但错配的视听对误判为负样本，导致模型无法有效学习硬正样本特征。
AI.method: 直接将硬正样本的响应图纳入对比学习目标，增强模型对语义相关样本的表征能力。
AI.result: 在VGG-SS和SoundNet-Flickr数据集上优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过显式利用语义相似样本的响应图，可有效提升声音定位的准确性和鲁棒性。

title: B2EA: An Evolutionary Algorithm Assisted by Two Bayesian Optimization Modules for Neural Architecture Search
title_zh: B2EA：两个贝叶斯优化模块辅助的神经架构搜索进化算法
abstract: The early pioneering Neural Architecture Search (NAS) works were multi-trial methods applicable to any general search space. The subsequent works took advantage of the early findings and developed weight-sharing methods that assume a structured search space typically with pre-fixed hyperparameters. Despite the amazing computational efficiency of the weight-sharing NAS algorithms, it is becoming apparent that multi-trial NAS algorithms are also needed for identifying very high-performance architectures, especially when exploring a general search space. In this work, we carefully review the latest multi-trial NAS algorithms and identify the key strategies including Evolutionary Algorithm (EA), Bayesian Optimization (BO), diversification, input and output transformations, and lower fidelity estimation. To accommodate the key strategies into a single framework, we develop B2EA that is a surrogate assisted EA with two BO surrogate models and a mutation step in between. To show that B2EA is robust and efficient, we evaluate three performance metrics over 14 benchmarks with general and cell-based search spaces. Comparisons with state-of-the-art multi-trial algorithms reveal that B2EA is robust and efficient over the 14 benchmarks for three difficulty levels of target performance. The B2EA code is publicly available at \url{https://github.com/snu-adsl/BBEA}.
summary: The early pioneering Neural Architecture Search (NAS) works were multi-trial methods applicable to any general search space. The subsequent works took advantage of the early findings and developed weight-sharing methods that assume a structured search space typically with pre-fixed hyperparameters. Despite the amazing computational efficiency of the weight-sharing NAS algorithms, it is becoming apparent that multi-trial NAS algorithms are also needed for identifying very high-performance architectures, especially when exploring a general search space. In this work, we carefully review the latest multi-trial NAS algorithms and identify the key strategies including Evolutionary Algorithm (EA), Bayesian Optimization (BO), diversification, input and output transformations, and lower fidelity estimation. To accommodate the key strategies into a single framework, we develop B2EA that is a surrogate assisted EA with two BO surrogate models and a mutation step in between. To show that B2EA is robust and efficient, we evaluate three performance metrics over 14 benchmarks with general and cell-based search spaces. Comparisons with state-of-the-art multi-trial algorithms reveal that B2EA is robust and efficient over the 14 benchmarks for three difficulty levels of target performance. The B2EA code is publicly available at \url{https://github.com/snu-adsl/BBEA}.
abstract_zh: 早期开创性的神经架构搜索（NAS）工作是适用于任何通用搜索空间的多重试验方法。随后的工作利用了早期的发现并开发了权重共享方法，该方法假设通常具有预先固定的超参数的结构化搜索空间。尽管权重共享 NAS 算法具有惊人的计算效率，但很明显，还需要多次试验 NAS 算法来识别非常高性能的架构，特别是在探索通用搜索空间时。在这项工作中，我们仔细回顾了最新的多试验 NAS 算法，并确定了关键策略，包括进化算法 (EA)、贝叶斯优化 (BO)、多样化、输入和输出转换以及较低保真度估计。为了将关键策略纳入单一框架中，我们开发了 B2EA，它是一种替代辅助 EA，具有两个 BO 替代模型和中间的突变步骤。为了证明 B2EA 稳健且高效，我们使用通用和基于单元的搜索空间评估了 14 个基准的三个性能指标。与最先进的多试验算法的比较表明，B2EA 在 14 个基准测试中针对三个难度级别的目标性能表现稳健且高效。 B2EA 代码可在 \url{https://github.com/snu-adsl/BBEA} 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出B2EA，一种结合两个贝叶斯优化模块的进化算法，用于神经架构搜索（NAS）。
AI.motivation: 尽管权重共享NAS算法效率高，但多试验NAS在探索通用搜索空间时仍需优化，以发现更高性能的架构。
AI.method: B2EA框架整合进化算法（EA）与两个贝叶斯优化（BO）代理模型，并引入突变步骤，适应通用和基于单元的搜索空间。
AI.result: 在14个基准测试中，B2EA在三个性能难度级别下均表现出稳健性和高效性，优于现有最先进的多试验算法。
AI.conclusion: B2EA通过结合BO与EA，在通用搜索空间中实现了高效的神经架构搜索，代码已公开。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出B2EA，一种结合两个贝叶斯优化模块的进化算法，用于神经架构搜索（NAS）。

search_text: B2EA: An Evolutionary Algorithm Assisted by Two Bayesian Optimization Modules for Neural Architecture Search B2EA：两个贝叶斯优化模块辅助的神经架构搜索进化算法 The early pioneering Neural Architecture Search (NAS) works were multi-trial methods applicable to any general search space. The subsequent works took advantage of the early findings and developed weight-sharing methods that assume a structured search space typically with pre-fixed hyperparameters. Despite the amazing computational efficiency of the weight-sharing NAS algorithms, it is becoming apparent that multi-trial NAS algorithms are also needed for identifying very high-performance architectures, especially when exploring a general search space. In this work, we carefully review the latest multi-trial NAS algorithms and identify the key strategies including Evolutionary Algorithm (EA), Bayesian Optimization (BO), diversification, input and output transformations, and lower fidelity estimation. To accommodate the key strategies into a single framework, we develop B2EA that is a surrogate assisted EA with two BO surrogate models and a mutation step in between. To show that B2EA is robust and efficient, we evaluate three performance metrics over 14 benchmarks with general and cell-based search spaces. Comparisons with state-of-the-art multi-trial algorithms reveal that B2EA is robust and efficient over the 14 benchmarks for three difficulty levels of target performance. The B2EA code is publicly available at \url{https://github.com/snu-adsl/BBEA}. 早期开创性的神经架构搜索（NAS）工作是适用于任何通用搜索空间的多重试验方法。随后的工作利用了早期的发现并开发了权重共享方法，该方法假设通常具有预先固定的超参数的结构化搜索空间。尽管权重共享 NAS 算法具有惊人的计算效率，但很明显，还需要多次试验 NAS 算法来识别非常高性能的架构，特别是在探索通用搜索空间时。在这项工作中，我们仔细回顾了最新的多试验 NAS 算法，并确定了关键策略，包括进化算法 (EA)、贝叶斯优化 (BO)、多样化、输入和输出转换以及较低保真度估计。为了将关键策略纳入单一框架中，我们开发了 B2EA，它是一种替代辅助 EA，具有两个 BO 替代模型和中间的突变步骤。为了证明 B2EA 稳健且高效，我们使用通用和基于单元的搜索空间评估了 14 个基准的三个性能指标。与最先进的多试验算法的比较表明，B2EA 在 14 个基准测试中针对三个难度级别的目标性能表现稳健且高效。 B2EA 代码可在 \url{https://github.com/snu-adsl/BBEA} 上公开获取。 本文提出B2EA，一种结合两个贝叶斯优化模块的进化算法，用于神经架构搜索（NAS）。 Hyunghun Cho,Jungwook Shin,Wonjong Rhee cs.NE,cs.LG

authors_text: Nati Ofir,Ran Yacobi,Omer Granoviter,Boris Levant,Ore Shtalrid
title: Automatic defect segmentation by unsupervised anomaly learning
title_zh: 通过无监督异常学习自动缺陷分割
abstract: This paper addresses the problem of defect segmentation in semiconductor manufacturing. The input of our segmentation is a scanning-electron-microscopy (SEM) image of the candidate defect region. We train a U-net shape network to segment defects using a dataset of clean background images. The samples of the training phase are produced automatically such that no manual labeling is required. To enrich the dataset of clean background samples, we apply defect implant augmentation. To that end, we apply a copy-and-paste of a random image patch in the clean specimen. To improve the robustness of the unlabeled data scenario, we train the features of the network with unsupervised learning methods and loss functions. Our experiments show that we succeed to segment real defects with high quality, even though our dataset contains no defect examples. Our approach performs accurately also on the problem of supervised and labeled defect segmentation.
summary: This paper addresses the problem of defect segmentation in semiconductor manufacturing. The input of our segmentation is a scanning-electron-microscopy (SEM) image of the candidate defect region. We train a U-net shape network to segment defects using a dataset of clean background images. The samples of the training phase are produced automatically such that no manual labeling is required. To enrich the dataset of clean background samples, we apply defect implant augmentation. To that end, we apply a copy-and-paste of a random image patch in the clean specimen. To improve the robustness of the unlabeled data scenario, we train the features of the network with unsupervised learning methods and loss functions. Our experiments show that we succeed to segment real defects with high quality, even though our dataset contains no defect examples. Our approach performs accurately also on the problem of supervised and labeled defect segmentation.
abstract_zh: 本文解决了半导体制造中的缺陷分割问题。我们的分割的输入是候选缺陷区域的扫描电子显微镜 (SEM) 图像。我们训练 U 网形状网络，使用干净背景图像的数据集来分割缺陷。训练阶段的样本是自动生成的，无需手动标记。为了丰富干净背景样本的数据集，我们应用了缺陷植入增强。为此，我们将随机图像块复制并粘贴到干净的样本中。为了提高无标签数据场景的鲁棒性，我们使用无监督学习方法和损失函数来训练网络的特征。我们的实验表明，即使我们的数据集不包含缺陷示例，我们仍然能够成功地高质量分割真实缺陷。我们的方法在监督和标记缺陷分割问题上也能准确执行。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于无监督异常学习的自动缺陷分割方法，用于半导体制造中的扫描电子显微镜图像缺陷检测，无需人工标注数据。
AI.motivation: 传统缺陷分割依赖大量标注数据，但半导体制造中缺陷样本获取成本高且耗时，需开发无需标注数据的自动化分割方法。
AI.method: 采用U-Net网络结构，利用无监督学习训练干净背景图像特征，并通过缺陷植入增强（随机复制粘贴图像块）扩充数据集，结合损失函数提升模型鲁棒性。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在无缺陷样本的情况下仍能实现高质量缺陷分割，且在有监督分割任务中表现准确。
AI.conclusion: 无监督异常学习有效解决了缺陷分割中数据标注难题，适用于半导体制造等实际工业场景的自动化缺陷检测需求。

title: Graph Self-supervised Learning with Accurate Discrepancy Learning
title_zh: 具有精确差异学习的图自监督学习
abstract: Self-supervised learning of graph neural networks (GNNs) aims to learn an accurate representation of the graphs in an unsupervised manner, to obtain transferable representations of them for diverse downstream tasks. Predictive learning and contrastive learning are the two most prevalent approaches for graph self-supervised learning. However, they have their own drawbacks. While the predictive learning methods can learn the contextual relationships between neighboring nodes and edges, they cannot learn global graph-level similarities. Contrastive learning, while it can learn global graph-level similarities, its objective to maximize the similarity between two differently perturbed graphs may result in representations that cannot discriminate two similar graphs with different properties. To tackle such limitations, we propose a framework that aims to learn the exact discrepancy between the original and the perturbed graphs, coined as Discrepancy-based Self-supervised LeArning (D-SLA). Specifically, we create multiple perturbations of the given graph with varying degrees of similarity, and train the model to predict whether each graph is the original graph or the perturbed one. Moreover, we further aim to accurately capture the amount of discrepancy for each perturbed graph using the graph edit distance. We validate our D-SLA on various graph-related downstream tasks, including molecular property prediction, protein function prediction, and link prediction tasks, on which ours largely outperforms relevant baselines.
summary: Self-supervised learning of graph neural networks (GNNs) aims to learn an accurate representation of the graphs in an unsupervised manner, to obtain transferable representations of them for diverse downstream tasks. Predictive learning and contrastive learning are the two most prevalent approaches for graph self-supervised learning. However, they have their own drawbacks. While the predictive learning methods can learn the contextual relationships between neighboring nodes and edges, they cannot learn global graph-level similarities. Contrastive learning, while it can learn global graph-level similarities, its objective to maximize the similarity between two differently perturbed graphs may result in representations that cannot discriminate two similar graphs with different properties. To tackle such limitations, we propose a framework that aims to learn the exact discrepancy between the original and the perturbed graphs, coined as Discrepancy-based Self-supervised LeArning (D-SLA). Specifically, we create multiple perturbations of the given graph with varying degrees of similarity, and train the model to predict whether each graph is the original graph or the perturbed one. Moreover, we further aim to accurately capture the amount of discrepancy for each perturbed graph using the graph edit distance. We validate our D-SLA on various graph-related downstream tasks, including molecular property prediction, protein function prediction, and link prediction tasks, on which ours largely outperforms relevant baselines.
abstract_zh: 图神经网络（GNN）的自监督学习旨在以无监督的方式学习图的准确表示，以获得用于各种下游任务的可转移表示。预测学习和对比学习是图自监督学习的两种最流行的方法。然而，它们也有自己的缺点。虽然预测学习方法可以学习相邻节点和边之间的上下文关系，但它们无法学习全局图级相似性。对比学习虽然可以学习全局图级相似性，但其目标是最大化两个不同扰动图之间的相似性，可能会导致无法区分具有不同属性的两个相似图的表示。为了解决这些限制，我们提出了一个框架，旨在学习原始图和扰动图之间的确切差异，称为基于差异的自监督学习（D-SLA）。具体来说，我们对给定图创建具有不同相似程度的多个扰动，并训练模型来预测每个图是原始图还是扰动图。此外，我们进一步的目标是使用图编辑距离准确捕获每个扰动图的差异量。我们在各种与图相关的下游任务上验证了我们的 D-SLA，包括分子属性预测、蛋白质功能预测和链接预测任务，在这些任务上我们的 D-SLA 很大程度上优于相关基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于精确差异学习的图自监督学习框架D-SLA，旨在解决现有预测学习和对比学习方法在图表示学习中的局限性。
AI.motivation: 现有预测学习方法无法捕捉全局图级相似性，对比学习方法可能无法区分具有不同属性的相似图，因此需要一种能准确学习原始图与扰动图之间差异的方法。
AI.method: 通过创建不同程度相似性的图扰动，训练模型判断图是否为原始图；结合图编辑距离精确量化每个扰动图的差异，从而学习更准确的图表示。
AI.result: 在分子属性预测、蛋白质功能预测和链接预测等下游任务中，D-SLA显著优于相关基线方法。
AI.conclusion: D-SLA通过精确差异学习有效克服了现有方法的局限性，为图自监督学习提供了更优的表示学习框架。

Specifically, we create multiple perturbations of the given graph with varying degrees of similarity, and train the model to predict whether each graph is the original graph or the perturbed one. Moreover, we further aim to accurately capture the amount of discrepancy for each perturbed graph using the graph edit distance. We validate our D-SLA on various graph-related downstream tasks, including molecular property prediction, protein function prediction, and link prediction tasks, on which ours largely outperforms relevant baselines. 图神经网络（GNN）的自监督学习旨在以无监督的方式学习图的准确表示，以获得用于各种下游任务的可转移表示。预测学习和对比学习是图自监督学习的两种最流行的方法。然而，它们也有自己的缺点。虽然预测学习方法可以学习相邻节点和边之间的上下文关系，但它们无法学习全局图级相似性。对比学习虽然可以学习全局图级相似性，但其目标是最大化两个不同扰动图之间的相似性，可能会导致无法区分具有不同属性的两个相似图的表示。为了解决这些限制，我们提出了一个框架，旨在学习原始图和扰动图之间的确切差异，称为基于差异的自监督学习（D-SLA）。具体来说，我们对给定图创建具有不同相似程度的多个扰动，并训练模型来预测每个图是原始图还是扰动图。此外，我们进一步的目标是使用图编辑距离准确捕获每个扰动图的差异量。我们在各种与图相关的下游任务上验证了我们的 D-SLA，包括分子属性预测、蛋白质功能预测和链接预测任务，在这些任务上我们的 D-SLA 很大程度上优于相关基线。 本文提出了一种基于精确差异学习的图自监督学习框架D-SLA，旨在解决现有预测学习和对比学习方法在图表示学习中的局限性。 Dongki Kim,Jinheon Baek,Sung Ju Hwang cs.LG,cs.AI

title: 3D Object Detection from Images for Autonomous Driving: A Survey
title_zh: 自动驾驶图像中的 3D 物体检测：调查
abstract: 3D object detection from images, one of the fundamental and challenging problems in autonomous driving, has received increasing attention from both industry and academia in recent years. Benefiting from the rapid development of deep learning technologies, image-based 3D detection has achieved remarkable progress. Particularly, more than 200 works have studied this problem from 2015 to 2021, encompassing a broad spectrum of theories, algorithms, and applications. However, to date no recent survey exists to collect and organize this knowledge. In this paper, we fill this gap in the literature and provide the first comprehensive survey of this novel and continuously growing research field, summarizing the most commonly used pipelines for image-based 3D detection and deeply analyzing each of their components. Additionally, we also propose two new taxonomies to organize the state-of-the-art methods into different categories, with the intent of providing a more systematic review of existing methods and facilitating fair comparisons with future works. In retrospect of what has been achieved so far, we also analyze the current challenges in the field and discuss future directions for image-based 3D detection research.
summary: 3D object detection from images, one of the fundamental and challenging problems in autonomous driving, has received increasing attention from both industry and academia in recent years. Benefiting from the rapid development of deep learning technologies, image-based 3D detection has achieved remarkable progress. Particularly, more than 200 works have studied this problem from 2015 to 2021, encompassing a broad spectrum of theories, algorithms, and applications. However, to date no recent survey exists to collect and organize this knowledge. In this paper, we fill this gap in the literature and provide the first comprehensive survey of this novel and continuously growing research field, summarizing the most commonly used pipelines for image-based 3D detection and deeply analyzing each of their components. Additionally, we also propose two new taxonomies to organize the state-of-the-art methods into different categories, with the intent of providing a more systematic review of existing methods and facilitating fair comparisons with future works. In retrospect of what has been achieved so far, we also analyze the current challenges in the field and discuss future directions for image-based 3D detection research.
abstract_zh: 图像中的 3D 目标检测是自动驾驶中的基本且具有挑战性的问题之一，近年来受到工业界和学术界越来越多的关注。受益于深度学习技术的快速发展，基于图像的3D检测取得了显着的进步。特别是，从 2015 年到 2021 年，已有 200 多篇著作研究了这个问题，涵盖了广泛的理论、算法和应用。然而，迄今为止，还没有最近的调查来收集和组织这些知识。在本文中，我们填补了文献中的这一空白，并对这个新颖且不断发展的研究领域进行了首次全面调查，总结了基于图像的 3D 检测最常用的流程，并深入分析了它们的每个组成部分。此外，我们还提出了两种新的分类法，将最先进的方法分为不同的类别，目的是对现有方法进行更系统的审查，并促进与未来工作的公平比较。回顾迄今为止所取得的成就，我们还分析了该领域当前的挑战，并讨论了基于图像的 3D 检测研究的未来方向。

AI.tldr: 综述图像基的3D物体检测方法，总结流程，分析组件，提出分类法，并讨论挑战与未来方向。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏全面综述，需系统总结方法并提供分类框架以促进未来研究。
AI.method: 总结常用检测流程，分析各组件，并提出两种新分类法组织现有方法。
AI.result: 首次全面综述图像基3D检测方法，系统分类现有技术，分析当前挑战并提出未来研究方向。
AI.conclusion: 通过系统综述与分类，为未来研究提供框架和比较基准，推动自动驾驶中3D检测技术的发展。

authors_text: Deng Cai,Elman Mansimov,Yi-An Lai,Yixuan Su,Lei Shu,Yi Zhang
title: Measuring and Reducing Model Update Regression in Structured Prediction for NLP
title_zh: NLP 结构化预测中测量和减少模型更新回归
abstract: Recent advance in deep learning has led to the rapid adoption of machine learning-based NLP models in a wide range of applications. Despite the continuous gain in accuracy, backward compatibility is also an important aspect for industrial applications, yet it received little research attention. Backward compatibility requires that the new model does not regress on cases that were correctly handled by its predecessor. This work studies model update regression in structured prediction tasks. We choose syntactic dependency parsing and conversational semantic parsing as representative examples of structured prediction tasks in NLP. First, we measure and analyze model update regression in different model update settings. Next, we explore and benchmark existing techniques for reducing model update regression including model ensemble and knowledge distillation. We further propose a simple and effective method, Backward-Congruent Re-ranking (BCR), by taking into account the characteristics of structured prediction. Experiments show that BCR can better mitigate model update regression than model ensemble and knowledge distillation approaches.
summary: Recent advance in deep learning has led to the rapid adoption of machine learning-based NLP models in a wide range of applications. Despite the continuous gain in accuracy, backward compatibility is also an important aspect for industrial applications, yet it received little research attention. Backward compatibility requires that the new model does not regress on cases that were correctly handled by its predecessor. This work studies model update regression in structured prediction tasks. We choose syntactic dependency parsing and conversational semantic parsing as representative examples of structured prediction tasks in NLP. First, we measure and analyze model update regression in different model update settings. Next, we explore and benchmark existing techniques for reducing model update regression including model ensemble and knowledge distillation. We further propose a simple and effective method, Backward-Congruent Re-ranking (BCR), by taking into account the characteristics of structured prediction. Experiments show that BCR can better mitigate model update regression than model ensemble and knowledge distillation approaches.
abstract_zh: 深度学习的最新进展导致基于机器学习的 NLP 模型在广泛的应用中得到快速采用。尽管精度不断提高，向后兼容性也是工业应用的一个重要方面，但很少受到研究关注。向后兼容性要求新模型不会在其前身正确处理的情况下出现退化。这项工作研究结构化预测任务中的模型更新回归。我们选择句法依存解析和会话语义解析作为 NLP 中结构化预测任务的代表性示例。首先，我们测量和分析不同模型更新设置下的模型更新回归。接下来，我们探索和基准测试减少模型更新回归的现有技术，包括模型集成和知识蒸馏。考虑到结构化预测的特点，我们进一步提出了一种简单有效的方法，即后向一致重排序（BCR）。实验表明，与模型集成和知识蒸馏方法相比，BCR 可以更好地缓解模型更新回归。

AI.tldr: 本文研究自然语言处理中结构化预测任务的模型更新回归问题，提出了一种新的缓解方法。
AI.motivation: 工业应用中模型更新需保持向后兼容性，但现有研究对模型更新导致的性能退化问题关注不足。
AI.method: 通过句法依存分析和语义解析任务分析模型更新回归现象，对比集成学习与知识蒸馏等方法，提出考虑结构化预测特性的Backward-Congruent Re-ranking（BCR）方法。
AI.result: 实验表明BCR方法在缓解模型更新回归方面优于现有技术，能有效保持新模型对旧版本正确案例的兼容性。
AI.conclusion: BCR方法为结构化预测模型的更新提供了简单有效的解决方案，有助于提升工业场景下的模型迭代可靠性。

authors_text: Yingchen Tian,Yuxia Zhang,Klaas-Jan Stol,Lin Jiang,Hui Liu
title: What Makes a Good Commit Message?
title_zh: 什么才是好的提交消息？
abstract: A key issue in collaborative software development is communication among developers. One modality of communication is a commit message, in which developers describe the changes they make in a repository. As such, commit messages serve as an "audit trail" by which developers can understand how the source code of a project has changed-and why. Hence, the quality of commit messages affects the effectiveness of communication among developers. Commit messages are often of poor quality as developers lack time and motivation to craft a good message. Several automatic approaches have been proposed to generate commit messages. However, these are based on uncurated datasets including considerable proportions of poorly phrased commit messages. In this multi-method study, we first define what constitutes a "good" commit message, and then establish what proportion of commit messages lack information using a sample of almost 1,600 messages from five highly active open source projects. We find that an average of circa 44% of messages could be improved, suggesting the use of uncurated datasets may be a major threat when commit message generators are trained with such data. We also observe that prior work has not considered semantics of commit messages, and there is surprisingly little guidance available for writing good commit messages. To that end, we develop a taxonomy based on recurring patterns in commit messages' expressions. Finally, we investigate whether "good" commit messages can be automatically identified; such automation could prompt developers to write better commit messages.
summary: A key issue in collaborative software development is communication among developers. One modality of communication is a commit message, in which developers describe the changes they make in a repository. As such, commit messages serve as an "audit trail" by which developers can understand how the source code of a project has changed-and why. Hence, the quality of commit messages affects the effectiveness of communication among developers. Commit messages are often of poor quality as developers lack time and motivation to craft a good message. Several automatic approaches have been proposed to generate commit messages. However, these are based on uncurated datasets including considerable proportions of poorly phrased commit messages. In this multi-method study, we first define what constitutes a "good" commit message, and then establish what proportion of commit messages lack information using a sample of almost 1,600 messages from five highly active open source projects. We find that an average of circa 44% of messages could be improved, suggesting the use of uncurated datasets may be a major threat when commit message generators are trained with such data. We also observe that prior work has not considered semantics of commit messages, and there is surprisingly little guidance available for writing good commit messages. To that end, we develop a taxonomy based on recurring patterns in commit messages' expressions. Finally, we investigate whether "good" commit messages can be automatically identified; such automation could prompt developers to write better commit messages.
abstract_zh: 协作软件开发的一个关键问题是开发人员之间的沟通。一种通信方式是提交消息，开发人员在其中描述他们在存储库中所做的更改。因此，提交消息充当“审计跟踪”，开发人员可以通过它了解项目的源代码如何更改以及更改的原因。因此，提交消息的质量会影响开发人员之间沟通的有效性。提交消息的质量通常很差，因为开发人员缺乏时间和动力来制作良好的消息。已经提出了几种自动方法来生成提交消息。然而，这些都是基于未经整理的数据集，其中包括相当大比例的措辞不当的提交消息。在这项多方法研究中，我们首先定义什么构成了“良好”提交消息，然后使用来自五个高度活跃的开源项目的近 1,600 条消息作为样本，确定提交消息中缺乏信息的比例。我们发现平均大约 44% 的消息可以得到改进，这表明当使用此类数据训练提交消息生成器时，使用未经整理的数据集可能是一个主要威胁。我们还观察到，先前的工作没有考虑提交消息的语义，并且令人惊讶的是，可用于编写良好提交消息的指导很少。为此，我们根据提交消息表达式中的重复模式开发了一种分类法。最后，我们研究是否可以自动识别“好的”提交消息；这种自动化可以促使开发人员编写更好的提交消息。

AI.tldr: 分析提交信息质量并提出改进方法
AI.motivation: 现有自动提交信息生成方法依赖低质量数据，缺乏语义分析和明确指导
AI.method: 多方法研究：定义标准、分析样本、开发分类法、探索自动化识别
AI.result: 44%提交信息质量差，现有方法忽略语义，缺乏写作指南
AI.conclusion: 低质量数据威胁模型效果，需语义分析和自动化工具辅助

search_text: What Makes a Good Commit Message? 什么才是好的提交消息？ A key issue in collaborative software development is communication among developers. One modality of communication is a commit message, in which developers describe the changes they make in a repository. As such, commit messages serve as an "audit trail" by which developers can understand how the source code of a project has changed-and why. Hence, the quality of commit messages affects the effectiveness of communication among developers. Commit messages are often of poor quality as developers lack time and motivation to craft a good message. Several automatic approaches have been proposed to generate commit messages. However, these are based on uncurated datasets including considerable proportions of poorly phrased commit messages. In this multi-method study, we first define what constitutes a "good" commit message, and then establish what proportion of commit messages lack information using a sample of almost 1,600 messages from five highly active open source projects. We find that an average of circa 44% of messages could be improved, suggesting the use of uncurated datasets may be a major threat when commit message generators are trained with such data. We also observe that prior work has not considered semantics of commit messages, and there is surprisingly little guidance available for writing good commit messages. To that end, we develop a taxonomy based on recurring patterns in commit messages' expressions. Finally, we investigate whether "good" commit messages can be automatically identified; such automation could prompt developers to write better commit messages. 协作软件开发的一个关键问题是开发人员之间的沟通。一种通信方式是提交消息，开发人员在其中描述他们在存储库中所做的更改。因此，提交消息充当“审计跟踪”，开发人员可以通过它了解项目的源代码如何更改以及更改的原因。因此，提交消息的质量会影响开发人员之间沟通的有效性。提交消息的质量通常很差，因为开发人员缺乏时间和动力来制作良好的消息。已经提出了几种自动方法来生成提交消息。然而，这些都是基于未经整理的数据集，其中包括相当大比例的措辞不当的提交消息。在这项多方法研究中，我们首先定义什么构成了“良好”提交消息，然后使用来自五个高度活跃的开源项目的近 1,600 条消息作为样本，确定提交消息中缺乏信息的比例。我们发现平均大约 44% 的消息可以得到改进，这表明当使用此类数据训练提交消息生成器时，使用未经整理的数据集可能是一个主要威胁。我们还观察到，先前的工作没有考虑提交消息的语义，并且令人惊讶的是，可用于编写良好提交消息的指导很少。为此，我们根据提交消息表达式中的重复模式开发了一种分类法。最后，我们研究是否可以自动识别“好的”提交消息；这种自动化可以促使开发人员编写更好的提交消息。 分析提交信息质量并提出改进方法 Yingchen Tian,Yuxia Zhang,Klaas-Jan Stol,Lin Jiang,Hui Liu cs.SE,cs.HC

title: Locally Differentially Private Distributed Deep Learning via Knowledge Distillation
title_zh: 通过知识蒸馏的局部差分私有分布式深度学习
comment: 10 pages, 6 figures, 1 table. Submitted to IEEE Transactions on Knowledge and Data Engineering
comments: 10 pages, 6 figures, 1 table. Submitted to IEEE Transactions on Knowledge and Data Engineering
abstract: Deep learning often requires a large amount of data. In real-world applications, e.g., healthcare applications, the data collected by a single organization (e.g., hospital) is often limited, and the majority of massive and diverse data is often segregated across multiple organizations. As such, it motivates the researchers to conduct distributed deep learning, where the data user would like to build DL models using the data segregated across multiple different data owners. However, this could lead to severe privacy concerns due to the sensitive nature of the data, thus the data owners would be hesitant and reluctant to participate. We propose LDP-DL, a privacy-preserving distributed deep learning framework via local differential privacy and knowledge distillation, where each data owner learns a teacher model using its own (local) private dataset, and the data user learns a student model to mimic the output of the ensemble of the teacher models. In the experimental evaluation, a comprehensive comparison has been made among our proposed approach (i.e., LDP-DL), DP-SGD, PATE and DP-FL, using three popular deep learning benchmark datasets (i.e., CIFAR10, MNIST and FashionMNIST). The experimental results show that LDP-DL consistently outperforms the other competitors in terms of privacy budget and model accuracy.
summary: Deep learning often requires a large amount of data. In real-world applications, e.g., healthcare applications, the data collected by a single organization (e.g., hospital) is often limited, and the majority of massive and diverse data is often segregated across multiple organizations. As such, it motivates the researchers to conduct distributed deep learning, where the data user would like to build DL models using the data segregated across multiple different data owners. However, this could lead to severe privacy concerns due to the sensitive nature of the data, thus the data owners would be hesitant and reluctant to participate. We propose LDP-DL, a privacy-preserving distributed deep learning framework via local differential privacy and knowledge distillation, where each data owner learns a teacher model using its own (local) private dataset, and the data user learns a student model to mimic the output of the ensemble of the teacher models. In the experimental evaluation, a comprehensive comparison has been made among our proposed approach (i.e., LDP-DL), DP-SGD, PATE and DP-FL, using three popular deep learning benchmark datasets (i.e., CIFAR10, MNIST and FashionMNIST). The experimental results show that LDP-DL consistently outperforms the other competitors in terms of privacy budget and model accuracy.
abstract_zh: 深度学习通常需要大量数据。在现实世界的应用程序中，例如医疗保健应用程序，单个组织（例如医院）收集的数据通常是有限的，并且大多数海量且多样化的数据通常分散在多个组织中。因此，它激励研究人员进行分布式深度学习，其中数据用户希望使用跨多个不同数据所有者的数据来构建深度学习模型。然而，由于数据的敏感性，这可能会导致严重的隐私问题，因此数据所有者会犹豫并不愿意参与。我们提出了 LDP-DL，这是一种通过本地差分隐私和知识蒸馏来保护隐私的分布式深度学习框架，其中每个数据所有者使用自己的（本地）私有数据集学习教师模型，而数据用户学习学生模型来模仿教师模型集合的输出。在实验评估中，使用三个流行的深度学习基准数据集（即CIFAR10、MNIST和FashionMNIST）对我们提出的方法（即LDP-DL）、DP-SGD、PATE和DP-FL进行了全面比较。实验结果表明，LDP-DL 在隐私预算和模型准确性方面始终优于其他竞争对手。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于本地差分隐私和知识蒸馏的分布式深度学习框架LDP-DL，解决多组织数据分割场景下的隐私保护问题。
AI.motivation: 医疗等领域的数据常被多个机构分隔存储，但数据所有者因隐私担忧不愿参与联合建模，需在保证隐私的前提下实现模型训练。
AI.method: 每个数据所有者在本地训练带差分隐私的教师模型，数据使用者通过知识蒸馏从教师模型集合中学习学生模型，实现隐私保护下的分布式学习。
AI.result: 在CIFAR10、MNIST和FashionMNIST数据集上，LDP-DL在隐私预算消耗和模型准确率指标上均优于DP-SGD、PATE和DP-FL等对比方法。
AI.conclusion: LDP-DL通过结合本地差分隐私与知识蒸馏机制，在分布式深度学习中实现了更优的隐私-效用平衡，为隐私敏感场景提供了可行解决方案。

title: Think-Aloud Verbalizations for Identifying User Experience Problems: Effects of Language Proficiency with Chinese Non-Native English Speakers
title_zh: 用于识别用户体验问题的有声思考言语表达：语言能力对中国非英语母语者的影响
comment: The Ninth International Symposium of Chinese CHI (Chinese CHI 2021), October 16--17, 2021, Online, Hong Kong
comments: The Ninth International Symposium of Chinese CHI (Chinese CHI 2021), October 16--17, 2021, Online, Hong Kong
abstract: Subtle patterns in users' think-aloud (TA) verbalizations (i.e., utterances) are shown to be telltale signs of user experience (UX) problems and used to build artificial intelligence (AI) models or AI-assisted tools to help UX evaluators identify UX problems automatically or semi-automatically. Despite the potential of such verbalization patterns, they were uncovered with native English speakers. As most people who speak English are non-native speakers, it is important to investigate whether similar patterns exist in non-native English speakers' TA verbalizations. As a first step to answer this question, we conducted think-aloud usability testing with Chinese non-native English speakers and native English speakers using three common TA protocols. We compared their verbalizations and UX problems that they encountered to understand the effects of language and TA protocols. Our findings show that both language groups had similar amounts and proportions of verbalization categories, encountered similar problems, and had similar verbalization patterns that indicate UX problems. Furthermore, TA protocols did not significantly affect the correlations between verbalizations and problems. Based on the findings, we present three design implications for UX practitioners and the design of AI-assisted analysis tools.
summary: Subtle patterns in users' think-aloud (TA) verbalizations (i.e., utterances) are shown to be telltale signs of user experience (UX) problems and used to build artificial intelligence (AI) models or AI-assisted tools to help UX evaluators identify UX problems automatically or semi-automatically. Despite the potential of such verbalization patterns, they were uncovered with native English speakers. As most people who speak English are non-native speakers, it is important to investigate whether similar patterns exist in non-native English speakers' TA verbalizations. As a first step to answer this question, we conducted think-aloud usability testing with Chinese non-native English speakers and native English speakers using three common TA protocols. We compared their verbalizations and UX problems that they encountered to understand the effects of language and TA protocols. Our findings show that both language groups had similar amounts and proportions of verbalization categories, encountered similar problems, and had similar verbalization patterns that indicate UX problems. Furthermore, TA protocols did not significantly affect the correlations between verbalizations and problems. Based on the findings, we present three design implications for UX practitioners and the design of AI-assisted analysis tools.
abstract_zh: 用户有声思考 (TA) 言语（即话语）中的微妙模式被证明是用户体验 (UX) 问题的明显迹象，并用于构建人工智能 (AI) 模型或人工智能辅助工具，以帮助 UX 评估人员自动或半自动识别 UX 问题。尽管这种语言模式具有潜力，但以英语为母语的人却发现了它们。由于大多数说英语的人都是非母语人士，因此研究非英语母语人士的助教言语中是否存在类似的模式非常重要。作为回答这个问题的第一步，我们使用三种常见的 TA 协议对中国非英语母语者和英语母语者进行了有声思考可用性测试。我们比较了他们的言语表达和遇到的用户体验问题，以了解语言和 TA 协议的影响。我们的研究结果表明，两个语言组的言语类别数量和比例相似，遇到相似的问题，并且具有相似的言语模式（表明用户体验问题）。此外，TA 协议并没有显着影响言语和问题之间的相关性。根据研究结果，我们为用户体验从业者和人工智能辅助分析工具的设计提出了三种设计含义。

AI.tldr: 研究中文非英语母语者在思考出声（TA）中的口头表达模式是否能有效识别用户体验问题，并与英语母语者进行对比分析。
AI.motivation: 现有TA口头表达模式研究主要基于英语母语者，但实际中多数英语使用者为非母语者，需验证其模式是否具有普适性。
AI.method: 对中文非英语母语者和英语母语者进行TA可用性测试，采用三种常见TA协议，比较其口头表达类别、问题类型及协议影响。
AI.result: 两组被试在口头表达类别数量、问题类型及TA协议相关性方面均无显著差异，表明语言能力不影响模式有效性。
AI.conclusion: 提出三类设计建议，为UX实践者和AI辅助工具开发提供依据，强调TA模式在跨语言场景中的适用性。
